E: Skott, who gathered all the filming resources to become the greatest protagonist of all protagonists. With his consciousness and soul scattered by a Servant, he seeks revenge from the Trailblazer in a thousand different appearances.

C: 蕴含特定认知的实体，由忆域中的潜意识碎片堆积而成。\n哀苦的回忆如炽焰灼心，当苦难褪去，怨恨化作的生命便会于灰烬中诞生，积聚无穷的盛怒。
E: An entity imbued with specific cognition, formed by the accumulation of subconscious fragments in the Memory Zone.\nMemories of anguish burn like flames, scorching the heart. When the suffering fades away, the life born from resentment will rise from the ashes, accumulating boundless fury.

C: 一切妄图逃离终局的生者，皆要面对来自冥土的追索。
E: All who wish to futilely escape the end must face the underworld's pursuit.

C:
大海的女儿们，被「毁灭」的罪孽蚀尽灵肉，只余空荡扭曲的形骸，为将临的黑日起舞颂唱。
残有的黑潮自往世流淌，落入此世浪涛——
美艳动人的波涛啊，你为君王饮尽灾殃，酒痕染花碎珍珠点缀的妆——
你醉倒在迷狂的屠场，在血与蜜酿的坟场，引歌为自己号丧。
E:
Daughters of the sea, their souls and flesh corroded by the sins of "Destruction," now dance and chant for the coming Dark Sun as hollow, twisted husks.
The remnant black tide flows from past ages into this world's tides—
Enchanting waves, you drank calamity for your sovereign, and your visage is adorned with wine-stained petals and shattered pearls—
You lie drunken in the frenzied abattoir, and in this grave of blood and honeyed ruin, you sing your elegy into the void.

C: 流光忆庭的模因生命遭遇「毁灭」金血糅合而成的扭曲怪物。初具犬形。\n它咄咄逼人，可见即便人性已经蒸发，遵循着「毁灭」的本能便是如此模样。
E: A distorted monster formed from the Garden of Recollection's memetic lifeform by the Destruction using golden ichor. It has begun to take the shape of a dog.\nIt is aggressive, showing that even with humanity evaporated, its instinct of following the Destruction manifests in this manner.

C: 工造司匠人随手造就的机巧发明。原本是不具灵智，用以烛照黑暗的灯具，如今却因为某些异变被赋予了短暂的「生命」。
E: An ingenium casually made by craftsmasters of the Artisanship Commission. It was originally an inanimate illuminator used for casting light upon darkness, but now it has been given a short-lived "life" due to certain mutations.

C: 「星际和平公司」的资深员工，级别至少是项目组的小组长。驾驶的机甲属于公有资产，一旦损坏需要自费赔偿。工资尚可，足够在公司旗下的企业舰上租下一室一厅的单间。
E: An Interastral Peace Corporation senior staff member with a minimal rank of project team leader. The mech they drive belongs to the IPC. If damaged, its repair fees have to be paid out-of-pocket. With a half-decent salary, they can at least afford to rent a one-bedroom apartment on one of the IPC's enterprise ships.

C: 「反物质军团」以黄昏古兽的残片为基「战争熔炉」的万骸哀怨为引所铸炼而成「末日兽」之一。怨灵的痴缠化作有形之手，旧日的灾影凝为掩映诸天之尾。「末日兽」拘禁了未释然亦未死灭的众生意志。或嗔怒，或忧恸，或妄喜——迷相既露，诸邪肆动。「末日兽」的核心为一颗暗物质驱动的引擎。
E: Using fragments of the Dusk Leviathan as the foundation, and the weeping bones of thousands of the dead in the Warforge as the agent, the Antimatter Legion cast the Doomsday Beast. The resentful spirits' senseless obsession turns into a tangible hand, and the shadow of the old disaster conceals the heavens. The Doomsday Beast detains the will of all beings that are not at ease and have yet to die. Anger, mourning, or delusional joy — all is revealed, and all evil eagerly throb. The Doomsday Beast's core is a dark matter engine.

C: 辅助机械臂单元
E: Auxiliary Robot Arm Unit

C: 喰云之首
E: Nebula Devourer

C: 蕉研组的助蕉
E: Banacademic Office's Assistanana

C: 忆域迷因「我心支离破碎」
E: Memory Zone Meme "Heartbreaker"

C: 忆域迷因「何物朝向死亡」
E: Memory Zone Meme "Something Unto Death"

C: 「星核猎手」萨姆
E: Stellaron Hunter: Sam

C: 被操弄的逻各斯
E: Manipulated Logos

C: 狈影
E: Shadow Jackhyena

C: 存护扑满
E: Trotter of Preservation

C: 「所有或一无所有」
E: "All or Nothing"

C: 对我方全体造成少量冰属性伤害。
E: Deals minor Ice DMG to all targets.

C: 召唤【银鬃近卫】或【银鬃射手】。
E: Summons Silvermane Soldiers or Silvermane Gunners

C: 对指定我方单体施放【裂魂寒流】大概率使该目标陷入冻结状态。
E: Uses Soulrend Coldstream on a single target, with a high chance to Freeze the target.

C: 每有1个我方目标陷入冻结或禁锢状态，自身及召唤物造成的伤害提高。
E: This unit and all its summoned objects gain increased DMG for each Frozen or Imprisoned target on the opposing team.

C: 锁定指定我方单体，下次行动对其施放【砍伐指令】。
E: Locks Onto a single target. The next action on the target will cast "Felling Order."

C: 每当我方目标触发触电状态时，卡芙卡自身伤害提高。
E: Every time a target becomes afflicted with Shock, Kafka's DMG increases.

C: 对指定我方单体造成冰属性伤害，同时有大概率使受到攻击的目标陷入冻结状态。
E: Deals Ice DMG to a single target, with a high chance to Freeze the target.

C: 锁定我方单体，两回合后对其施放【风归云动，天河泻梦】。
E: Locks on to a single target. After 2 turns, use Aethereal Dreamflux on the target.

C: 召唤4把【飞剑（幻象）】，获得【剑阵】效果，提高自身速度。【飞剑（幻象）】只有在弱点击破后才能被消灭，并将其弱点转移给随机的剩余飞剑。所有【飞剑（幻象）】的弱点均被击破后解除【剑阵】。
E: Summons 4 Flying Swords (Illusion) and gains the Sword Formation effect that increases this unit's SPD. Flying Swords (Illusion) can only be destroyed once they are Weakness Broken, and their Weaknesses will be transferred to the remaining Flying Swords. After inflicting Weakness Break on all Flying Swords (Illusion), the Sword Formation effect will be dispelled.

C: 对指定我方单体造成冰属性伤害，同时有大概率使受到攻击的目标陷入冻结状态。
E: Deals Ice DMG to a single target, with a high chance to Freeze the target.

C: 召唤1个当前生命值与自身相同的【狈影】。
E: Summons 1 Shadow Jackhyena with the same Current HP as itself.

C: 对我方全体造成少量风属性伤害。
E: Deals minor Wind DMG to all targets.

C: 对指定我方单体造成雷属性伤害。
E: Deals Lightning DMG to a single target.

C: 召唤2个建木枝梢【缃叶之杪】，1个建木枝梢【肃风之杪】，1个建木枝梢【繁花之杪】。
E: Summons 2 Ambrosial Arbor Branch "Twig of Marple Leaf," 1 Ambrosial Arbor Branch "Twig of Wintry Wind," and 1 Ambrosial Arbor Branch "Twig of Glorious Blooms."

C: 对我方全体造成少量量子属性伤害，并使我方全体能量减少。只能在【诅咒】状态下使用。
E: Deals minor Quantum DMG to all targets and causes all targets' Energy to be reduced. This ability can only be used while in the "Curse" state.

C: 在受到一定次数攻击后，会从【课堂频道】状态转变为【课间频道】状态，并陷入弱点击破状态。
E: After being attacked for a number of times, switches the "Classroom Channel" state to the "Off-Class Channel" state and enters the Weakness Broken state.

C: 进入蓄力状态，下次行动施放【静享天赐安眠】。
E: Enters the Charging state. Uses "Sleep In Heavenly Peace" for the next action.

C: 使我方全体当前承受的所有持续伤害效果立即产生一次伤害，并解除我方全体的持续伤害效果。
E: Immediately causes all DoT effects currently active on all targets to deal damage 1 time and dispels all DoT effects on all targets.

C: 当永眠墓碣受到致命攻击后，对应我方目标将解除【梦死】状态并回复生命值和能量。
E: After Sombrous Sepulcher receives a killing blow, dispels Morbid Dream from the corresponding target, restoring their HP and regenerating Energy.

C: 对敌方银枝施加1层可叠加的伤害提高效果。【灵魂释放】状态下，施加的伤害提高效果层数增加。
E: Applies 1 stack of stackable DMG Boost effect to enemy Argenti. When in the "Soulfreed" state, increases the applied DMG Boost stacks.

C: 对敌方银枝施加屏障。【灵魂释放】状态下，对敌方全体施加屏障。
E: Applies a Barrier to enemy Argenti. Applies Barriers to all friendly units while in the "Soulfreed" state.

C: 对指定我方单体及其相邻目标造成虚数属性伤害。
E: Deals Imaginary DMG to one designated target and adjacent targets.

C: 拥有一定层数的【战甲】，使自身受到的伤害降低。受到攻击后减少自身1层【战甲】，减少到0层时，【战甲】被破坏，对自身造成大量虚数属性伤害，并使自身行动延后，使破坏【战甲】的我方单位恢复能量。【战甲】被破坏后，自身受到攻击时额外再受到少量虚数属性伤害。【战甲】在自身回合结束时恢复到最大层数。
E: Possesses a number of "War Armor" stacks, which decreases DMG taken. Loses 1 stack of "War Armor" on this unit after being attacked. When at 0 stacks, "War Armor" will be destroyed, dealing massive Imaginary DMG to this unit and delaying their action. The target that destroyed "War Armor" will regenerate Energy. After "War Armor" is destroyed, this unit will also additionally take minor Imaginary DMG when attacked. "War Armor" will be restored to maximum stacks at the end of this unit's turn.

C: 对指定我方单体目标造成虚数属性伤害。
E: Deals Imaginary DMG to one designated target.

C: 吸收剩余的【征服或被征服】强化【冠军，卫城，纷争之主】，同时添加韧性保护并解除【冠军，卫城，纷争之主】身上的控制类负面状态与弱点击破状态。
E: Absorbs remaining "Conquer or Be Conquered" to enhance "Victor, Acropolis, and Lord of Strife." At the same time, adds Toughness Protection and dispels Crowd Control debuffs and Weakness Break debuffs on "Victor, Acropolis, and Lord of Strife."

C: 【玻吕刻斯】或【哀悯长臂】的技能击中我方目标时，会为我方目标施加不可解除的特殊持续伤害状态，该状态下目标当前生命值百分比越高受到的伤害越高，该伤害<u>【不致命】</u>。
E: When "Pollux" or "The Long Arms of Sorrow" hits a target with an ability, applies a special Unremovable DoT DMG state to the target. While under this state, the higher the target's HP percentage is, the more DMG they take. This DMG is "<u>Non-fatal</u>."

C: 对我方全体造成大量量子属性伤害，伤害由我方全体单位<u>平均分摊</u>。如果【枯茎朽骨的引路人】处于<u>【死亡的芬芳】</u>状态，对每个目标额外造成量子属性<u>【衰亡伤害】</u>。
E: Deals massive Quantum DMG to all targets, with the DMG <u>distributed evenly</u> among all target units. If "Guide of Withering and Decay" is in the <u>"Fragrance of Death"</u> state, additionally deals Quantum <u>"Atrophy DMG"</u> to each target.

C: <u>修复</u>【干涸的泪骨】，并对我方全体目标造成大量固定数值虚数属性伤害，伤害由目标<u>平均分摊</u>。
E: <u>Reinstates</u> "Dried Lacrimal Bone" and deals a set amount of massive Imaginary DMG to all targets. The DMG is <u>distributed evenly</u> among the targets.

C: 抵抗控制类负面状态。当【黑斗篷魔王】再次施放【亡死的黑云】或【将尽的命数】时，若自身曾被该攻击召唤且处于【共祭】状态，则与【黑斗篷魔王】一同发起攻击。随后被其吸收，回复转化为<u>【苦痛缠绕】</u>的生命值，并使其获得<u>【灾难之力】</u>。
E: Resists Crowd Control debuffs. When "Black Cloak Demon King" uses "Demise's Storm" or "Fading Fate" again, if this unit was summoned by the current attack and is in a "Mutual Sacrifice" state, then "Black Cloak Demon King" also attacks. It is absorbed after this, restoring HP that was converted to <u>"Entangled By Agony"</u> and gaining "<u>Calamity Power</u>."

C: 对我方全体造成少量物理属性伤害，被击中目标降低生命值的一部分转化为<u>【侵蚀】</u>。
E: Deals minor Physical DMG to all targets. A portion of the hit target's reduced HP is converted to "<u>Corrosion</u>."

C: 攻击对我方目标造成伤害时，被击中目标降低生命值的一部分转化为<u>【侵蚀】</u>。
E: When this unit's attack deals DMG to any target, converts a portion of the hit target's reduced HP to <u>"Corrosion"</u>.

C: 获得<u>【灾难之力】</u>并进入【沉默的悲叹】状态，下次行动时施放【莫因舍弃而哭泣】。
E: Obtains <u>"Calamity Power"</u> and enters the "Silent Sorrow" state. Uses "Cry Not For The Discarded" in the next action.

C: 消耗所有<u>【灾难之力】</u>对我方全体造成数次少量物理属性伤害，消耗的<u>【灾难之力】</u>层数越多，伤害的段数越多，随后对我方全体造成少量物理属性伤害。
E: Consumes all <u>"Calamity Power"</u> and deals several instances of minor Physical DMG hits to all targets. The more <u>"Calamity Power"</u> stacks are consumed, the more instances of DMG. Then, deals minor Physical DMG to all targets.

C: 施放【亡死的黑云】或【将尽的命数】时，消耗生命值召唤【残破容器】，并使消耗的生命值转化为<u>【苦痛缠绕】</u>。若该攻击召唤的【残破容器】被消灭，则额外对自身造成物理属性伤害。当自身再次施放【亡死的黑云】或【将尽的命数】时，曾被该攻击召唤的【残破容器】将一同发起攻击，随后被自身吸收， 回复转化为<u>【苦痛缠绕】</u>的生命值并使自身获得<u>【灾难之力】</u>。
E: When using "Demise's Storm" or "Fading Fate," consumes HP to summon "Long-Shattered Vessel" and convert the consumed HP into <u>"Entangled By Agony."</u> If the "Long-Shattered Vessel" summoned by this attack is defeated, additionally deals Physical DMG to this unit. When this unit uses "Demise's Storm" or "Fading Fate" again, the "Long-Shattered Vessel" that was summoned by the attacking ability will attack together with this unit. This unit will then absorb the Vessel, restoring the HP that was converted to <u>"Entangled By Agony"</u> and granting <u>"Calamity Power"</u> to this unit.

C: 进入<u>【镣铐崩解】</u>状态，召唤4个【残破容器】，并对这些【残破容器】施加【枷锁】状态。
E: Enters the <u>"Shackle Shatter"</u> state, summons 4 "Long-Shattered Vessels," and puts these "Long-Shattered Vessels" in the "Shackled" state.

C: 【反造物主】、【秘所思】、【逻各斯】的攻击技能会提高【翁法罗斯的「恨」】，当【恨】提高时，【铁墓】会施放【「智识」的陨落】，使我方目标可回复的生命上限和可回复的战技点上限降低，【恨】降低时该效果会被削弱。当【恨】达到上限时，会立刻施放【万有成灰，陪葬新生】。队伍中当前在场的我方角色数量越少，【翁法罗斯的「恨」】提高得越少。
E: Attack abilities of "Anti-Creator," "Mythos," or "Logos" increases "Amphorean Hatred." When "Hatred" increases, "Irontomb" uses "The Fall of Erudition," reducing the targets' Maximum Restorable HP and Maximum Recoverable Skill Points. This effect is weakened when "Hatred" decreases. When "Hatred" reaches its maximum, immediately uses "Ashes of All Begets Genesis." The fewer ally characters on the field, the less "Amphorean Hatred" increases.

C: 锁定指定我方角色，使自身的速度提高，并在数个回合内对该目标施放【罪血嚼齿】和【罪血锯刑】。施放该技能后再行动1次。
E: Locks on to one designated character, increases this unit's SPD, and uses "Hemotort Teethgrind" and "Hemotort Saw" on the target within several turns. Take 1 extra action after using this ability.

C: 对指定我方单体造成伤害，若目标处于持续伤害状态，其当前承受的所有持续伤害立即产生1次伤害。之后，大概率使受到攻击的我方目标陷入触电状态。
E: Deals DMG to a single target. If the target is in a DoT state, then all DoT effects currently applied to the target will cause DMG for 1 time. Afterward, there is a high chance to Shock the target.

C: 下次行动施放【自爆模块】。
E: The next action uses Self-Exploding Module.

C: 扑满拔腿就跑，瞬间失去了踪影。
E: The Trotter flees in an instant.

C: 连续对我方随机单体造成少量火属性伤害，并大概率使受到攻击的我方目标陷入【焚烧】状态。
E: Deals successive minor Fire DMG to a random single target, with a high chance to inflict Enkindle.

C: 积蓄力量并吸收所有我方全体持有的【焚烧】状态。
E: Starts charging, and absorbs all the Enkindle statuses that are inflicted on all targets.

C: 对指定我方单体造成风属性伤害，并大概率使其陷入风化状态。
E: Deals Wind DMG to a single target and has a high chance to inflict Wind Shear.

C: 对我方全体造成量子属性伤害。
E: Deals Quantum DMG to all targets.

C: 对指定我方单体造成风属性伤害。
E: Deals Wind DMG to a single target.

C: 进入蓄力状态，下次行动施放【虫群突袭】。
E: Enters the Charging state. Uses Swarm Onslaught for the next action.

C: 对指定我方单体造成少量物理属性伤害。
E: Deals minor Physical DMG to a single target.

C: 每次经营完成后，额外获得<unbreak>800</unbreak>发展资金
E: After each management action, the development fund additionally increases by <unbreak>800</unbreak>

C: 展品所在展区的「吸引人流」指标需求减少5%
E: Reduces the Visitor Appeal parameter of the exhibition area where the exhibit is located by 5%

C: 实物，地髓收音机，约七百年以前。
E: Genuine article. Geomarrow radio from about <unbreak>700</unbreak> years ago.

C: 昔在、今在、永在的剧目
E: The Past, Present, and Eternal Show

C: 布洛妮娅
E: Bronya

C: 娜塔莎
E: Natasha

C: 银鬃近卫
E: Silvermane Soldier

C: 文静的大姐头
E: Courteous Woman

C: 维修工程师
E: Maintenance Engineer

C: 春分
E: Chunfen

C: 老白
E: Old Bai

C: 乔凡娜
E: Giovanna

C: 忒斯庇斯
E: Thespis

C: 拉缇娜
E: Lathena

C: 卡丽斯塔
E: Kalista

C: 奥卢斯
E: Aulus

C: 服装店广告牌
E: Fashion Store Billboard

C: 艾格尼斯
E: Agnes

C: 受伤的乘客
E: Injured Passenger

C: 温萍萍
E: Wenfry

C: 武赫
E: Wu He

C: 「镕金铄铁第一巧手」
E: Smelter Extraordinaire

C: 银河之星
E: Cosmic Star

C: 财富学院学生主席
E: Fortune Academy Student President

C: 军火大亨
E: Arms Mogul

C: 乐坊老板娘
E: Music Shop Proprietress

C: 白厄的父亲
E: Phainon's Father

C: 树庭学者
E: Grove Scholar

C: 点心兑现
E: Snack Exchange

C: 「美食行家•烤饼天王」
E: "Gourmet Expert: King of Pancakes"

C: 星槎如子起落，将求药、治学和经商的人们经由此处送往各处。
E: Starskiffs take off and land like game pieces being placed on and off the board, transporting medicine seekers, knowledge pursuers, and merchant traders from here to all corners of the world.

C: 操作扎格列斯之手填补道路的缺口
E: Control the Hand of Zagreus to fill the gap on the path

C: 降魔机巧鸟
E: Exorcist Cycrane

C: 「纯美」，伊德莉拉
E: Idrila the Beauty

C: 波尔卡•卡卡目（人物）
E: Polka Kakamond (Character)

C: 泯灭帮 - 毁灭
E: Annihilation Gang — Destruction

C: X_X
E: X_X

C: 据说只要按照特定的节奏敲击艾迪恩公园的游艺机器，就能召唤来稀有神兽：梦境猎犬。
E: Rumor has it that tapping the amusement park attractions in Aideen Park in a specific rhythm will cause the legendary creature "Dreamhound" to be summoned.

C: 曾经，我们梦见彼此互不相识。\n醒来，却发现我们原本相亲相爱。
E: Once, we dreamed of being strangers.\nUpon waking up, we realized we had always loved each other.

C: 了解克劳迪娅与她家人的故事
E: Learn about Claudia and her family's story

C: 在朝露公馆深处的会议室找到麦考先生，填补他缺失的情绪
E: Find Mr. McCoy in the conference room deep inside Dewlight Pavilion and restore his missing emotions

C: 在钟表小子广场获取知更鸟的盛会之星收藏卡
E: Collect Robin's Planet of Festivities Collectible Card at Clockie Plaza

C: 入侵
E: Invasion

C: 幻胧欲将景元转化为虚卒，却在景元与丹恒的连携攻击中被摧毁身躯。景元向「毁灭」宣战，称「巡猎」的复仇必将来临。
E: As Phantylia tried to transform Jing Yuan into a Voidranger, Jing Yuan and Dan Heng's joint attack destroyed her form. Jing Yuan declared war against Destruction, stating that The Hunt's vengeance would come.

C: 缇宝触碰神殿中的装置。随着祷言念颂结束，神殿中的时空发生了变化。
E: Tribbie touched the device in the temple. When the prayer finished, the space-time fabric of the temple started to alter.

C: 真理医生释放灵火，藉此将自己传送离开。螺丝咕姆收纳残留的灵火，若有所思。
E: Dr. Ratio released the Phase Flame and used it to teleport away. Screwllum gathered the lingering Phase Flame, deep in thought.

C: 浮烟不服落败，变幻出巨大身形，对景元发动直接攻击。景元召出神君，将浮烟轻松压制，反将一军。
E: Cirrus refused to admit defeat and transformed into a massive form, launching a direct assault on Jing Yuan. Jing Yuan summoned the Lightning-Lord, who effortlessly suppressed Cirrus and seized the upper hand.

C: 望着舷窗外的雪原星球，三月七好奇自己在冰封之前的过去。丹恒与你们会合，「开拓」小分队集结完毕。
E: Gazing at the snowy planet outside the porthole, March 7th wondered about her past before becoming frozen. Dan Heng joined you, and the Trailblaze squad was fully assembled.

C: 你们看到被建木根系完全缠绕住的「造化洪炉」，那是工造司的至宝。公输师傅称必须尽快将其解放出来。
E: You witnessed the Creation Furnace, a treasure of the Artisanship Commission, fully entangled by Arbor roots. Master Gongshu called for its swift liberation.

C: 你们抵达丹鼎司，发现此地一片狼藉，满是已经倒下的云骑军与魔阴身士卒。你们不知符玄所率军队是否赢得战斗，只能谨慎展开探索。
E: Entering the Alchemy Commission, you found fallen Cloud Knights and Mara-Struck Soldiers. With Fu Xuan's forces unaccounted for and her victory uncertain, you proceeded cautiously.

C: 天象画壁成功启动，艾格勒的「化身印记」随之出现。你们需要使用其他浑象仪改变天象以困住泰坦，「西风罗盘」可以为此创造通路。
E: The celestial mural was activated, and Aquila's "marks of manifestation" began to appear. You needed to use the celestial globe to alter the firmament again and force the Titan to reveal themself. To that end, the West Wind Compass would allow you to create a path forward.

C: 阿格莱雅的金丝将你们自坠落中拯救，风堇将「天空」火种收入掌心。平台摇摇欲坠，你尝试用回溯装置将破碎的平台复原。
E: Aglaea's golden threads saved you from the fall, and Hyacine accepted the Coreflame of "Sky." With the platform about to collapse, you tried to use a temporal rewind device to repair the platform.

C: 刻律德菈命令手下，向民众公示大祭司长谋逆的下场。至于两位误入法场的「客人」，则交由「剑旗爵」海瑟音。
E: Cerydra ordered her subordinates to reveal the fate of the traitorous high priest to the public. As for the two "guests" who had wandered into the execution grounds, she entrusted them to "Dux Gladiorum," Hysilens.

C: 赛飞儿挖出白厄的金色羽毛，证明这片废墟是他用三千万世残躯堆成的「封印」。赛飞儿将翻飞之币交予你们，需要跑路时，就把它抛上天空吧。
E: Cipher unearthed Phainon's golden feather, proving this ruin to be a seal he raised from his remains over thirty million cycles. Cipher handed you the Coin of Whimsy. When you needed to make a quick escape, you could simply toss it skyward.

C: 矿脉探测器是古代遗物，十分稀有。费斯曼袒露苦衷，之所以要出卖矿脉情报，是为了尽可能多地筹钱，为虎克的未来作打算。
E: The vein detector was an extremely rare ancient relic. Fersman confessed his predicament: The reason he was selling mining intel was to raise as much money as possible for Hook's future.

C: 在极光出现之前，佩拉与玲可谈心。玲可从与哥哥姐姐的相处中感到压力，希望他们能不再操心自己。与此同时，有裂界怪物靠近营地。
E: Before the aurora appeared, Pela had a heart-to-heart talk with Lynx. Lynx felt pressured by her interactions with her brother and sister, wishing they would stop worrying about her. Meanwhile, some Fragmentum creatures were approaching the camp.

C: 景元向怀炎正式引荐列车组。怀炎称他与飞霄同受联盟派遣前来探问建木灾异始末，但怀炎相信景元对仙舟联盟的忠诚从未改变。
E: Jing Yuan formally introduced the Express Crew to Huaiyan. Huaiyan said he and Feixiao had both been sent by the Alliance to investigate the Ambrosial Arbor disaster, but he believed that Jing Yuan's loyalty to the Xianzhou Alliance had never wavered.

C: 你与丹恒来到神策府，作为经历建木灾异事件的证人，接受飞霄的质询提问。
E: You and Dan Heng arrived at the Seat of Divine Foresight to be questioned by Feixiao as witnesses to the Ambrosial Arbor incident.

C: 景元任由浮烟叫嚣却并不应战，而是以身份地位不对等为由与浮烟立下赌约：浮烟需击败捉鬼小队方可与将军重续当年对决，否则需诚实回答捉鬼小队的一次提问。
E: Jing Yuan disregarded Cirrus's taunts and proposed a bet based on their unequal standings: Cirrus needed to defeat the ghost-hunting squad to earn a rematch with the general. If not, they would have to honestly answer one question from the squad.

C: 被犀焰凭附的符玄将青雀开除了，青雀虽然满心欢喜，但仍决定留下来先解决太卜司的麻烦。
E: Fu Xuan, under Keralum's influence, fired Qingque. Despite excited about this, Qingque decided to stay and deal with the Divination Commission's problems first.

C: 尾巴指出，倘若岁阳在精神上认输，就会溃不成形。苦战之际，景元终于赶到，与浮烟重续当年战斗。
E: Tail explained that a heliobus would unravel entirely if it gave up the fight in its mind. Amid the fierce clash, Jing Yuan finally arrived and resumed his long-standing battle with Cirrus.

C: 作为太卜，符玄在陈年公案中得知「丹恒」作为饮月君转世的名字。亲眼见到当年的传奇，符玄觉得丹恒与绘影里记录的样子所差无几。
E: As the Master Diviner, Fu Xuan learned from old case files that "Dan Heng" was the reincarnated name of Imbibitor Lunae. Upon seeing this legend in person, Fu Xuan thought Dan Heng looked almost identical to how he was depicted in the visiograph.

C: 黄泉与瓦尔特到达圆桌大厅，此处依然空无一人。黄泉与瓦尔特分头寻找线索，但嘱托瓦尔特别离太远，这样黄泉能一并遮蔽他的气息。
E: Acheron and Welt arrived at the Round Table Hall, where it was also empty. They split up to search for clues, but she warned him not to wander too far. That way, she could hide his presence along with her own.

C: 知更鸟遇到一位欢快的宾客。她忍受不了现实生活的无聊，宁愿将短暂的一生全都投入到梦境的享乐中。
E: Robin encountered a cheerful guest who could not bear the dullness of real life and would rather devote her brief existence entirely to the pleasures of dreams.

C: 波提欧向酒店安保人员打听梦境里的变故。科蒂以猎犬家系成员的名义保证，谐乐大典一切进展顺利。看来酒店员工也不知情。
E: Boothill then questioned the hotel security staff about problems in the dreamscape. Coty, speaking as a member of the Bloodhound Family, assured him that everything with the Charmony Festival was proceeding smoothly. It seemed the hotel staff were also unaware of any anomalies.

C: 你在谜钟内心世界里听到呼救声，发现折纸小鸟被困高温怪物体内，决定出手相救，展开战斗。
E: You heard cries of help in the Ticker's inner world. Discovering that it was an Origami Bird trapped inside a high-temperature monster's torso, you decided to fight and save the Origami Bird.

C: 流萤见到你正热情地与人赌宝箱，决定暂时避开，不去打扰。
E: Firefly saw you passionately betting on treasure chests with other people and decided not to interrupt you for now.

C: 芮克先生鼓励芭蕉花酱，称很看好这位小演员。芭蕉花酱备受鼓舞。
E: Mr. Reca encouraged Nanabloom-chan, saying he had high hopes for the young actress, by which Nanabloom-chan was greatly inspired.

C: 蒙塔娜称，睡蕉社今天将迎来「显圣」，社员们都能见到「真正的睡蕉小猴」。附近有些参加过先前显圣的人，波提欧打算去会会他们。
E: Montana announced that the Slumbernana Association would experience a "theophany" today, where members would get to see the True Slumbernana Monkey. There were some people nearby who had attended previous theophanies, and Boothill planned to go meet them.

C: 研究猿认为，「苦茶大师」正在让实验走向错误的方向。作为补救措施，乱破被移交给「叆叇馆主」。
E: The research ape believed that Master Kucha was leading the Experiment in the wrong direction. As a remedial measure, Rappa was transferred to the Umbra Headmistress.

C: 你走向芮克先生留下的摄影机，它能将你们送往另一片梦境。若你已做好准备，就开始本场影片的最后演出吧。
E: You approached the camera left by Mr. Reca, which could transport you to another dreamscape. If you are ready, let's begin the final act of this film.

C: 为感谢乱破帮自己拍摄了如此精彩的影片，芮克先生向乱破奉上片酬——关于原始博士的去向。
E: To thank Rappa for filming such an amazing video, Mr. Reca rewarded her with information about Dr. Primitive's whereabouts.

C: 你们与负责迎新的「助蕉<unbreak>416</unbreak>」交流。你得知校庆期间大部分老师都在参加学术研讨，折纸大学校长委托美梦剧团来填补师资空缺。
E: You spoke with Assistanana <unbreak>416</unbreak> from the welcoming committee. You learned that most of the teachers were attending the academic conference during the school's anniversary, which was why the dean had asked the Sweet Dreams Troupe to be substitute teachers.

C: 旅程将暂留匹诺康尼，列车组讨论是否前往「永恒之地，翁法罗斯」。
E: The journey would temporarily pause at Penacony as the Crew discussed whether they should head to The Eternal Land, Amphoreus.

C: 大家就星期日是否能加入星穹列车展开讨论，并交由你决定<color=#f29e38ff>他是否加入星穹列车</color>。星期日承诺将共赴前路，履行责任，追寻答案。
E: Everyone discussed whether Sunday could join the Astral Express, and left it to you to decide <color=#f29e38ff>whether he could be a part of the Express</color>. Sunday promised to walk on this road together with you, to carry out his duties, and to seek his answer.

C: 你与丹恒尝试追踪未知生物。丹恒提醒你做好最坏的打算，从破坏车厢的那一击来看，翁法罗斯本地居民的实力不容小觑。
E: You and Dan Heng tried to follow the unknown creature. Dan Heng advised you to be prepared for trouble, since whatever damaged the train car clearly showed Amphoreus's locals were dangerously powerful.

C: 你与白厄、丹恒穿过云石市集，即将前往尼卡多利所在的云石天宫。遐蝶与你们分别，她负责处理城中残余的敌人。
E: You, Phainon, and Dan Heng made it through the Marmoreal Market and were heading to the Marmoreal Palace where Nikador was. Castorice split off from your group to deal with the enemies still in the city.

C: 你们与黄金狮首对话。黄金狮首称欧利庞正密谋着亵渎尼卡多利神性的计划，恳请你们回应召唤，成为勇士，拯救悬锋城。
E: You spoke with the Chryseus Leo. It claimed that Eurypon was scheming a blasphemous plan to defile Nikador's divinity, and pleaded with you to answer the call of becoming warriors and to save Castrum Kremnos.

C: 万敌看到先前遇见过的悬锋幼童。孩子们不再高呼「悬锋的王」，而将万敌称为「翁法罗斯的守护者」。
E: Mydei once again met the children of Kremnos he had seen before. They praised him, chanting "King of Kremnos" and calling Mydei the "Guardian of Amphoreus."

C: 白厄回忆逐火之旅，与缇安、那刻夏等同伴诀别，接受阿格莱雅「将创世权交予凡人」的嘱托。昔涟出现于记忆终幕，称白厄从未改变。
E: Phainon recalled his Flame-Chase Journey thus far, and the farewells he bade to Trianne, Anaxa, and his other companions, and accepted the duty Aglaea had charged him with in her final wishes, to give the power of creation to the people. Cyrene appeared at the end of his memories, saying that Phainon had never changed.

C: 风堇召唤出裁判官克里斯普斯的英魂，表达归还「天空」火种的决心，取得其赐福。丹恒用「灵水」将风堇送去涡心，谒见下一位先祖。
E: Hyacine summoned the soul of Magistrate Crispus and expressed her determination to return the Coreflame of "Sky," earning her the first sky blessing. Dan Heng used spirit water to send Hyacine to the Vortex of Genesis to meet her next ancestor.

C: 白厄独自击败「大地」泰坦，挽救众多士兵的生命。在随后的时间里，白厄为其余泰坦一一带去陨落，直至收集全部火种。
E: Phainon defeated the Earth Titan alone, saving the lives of many soldiers. He felled the remaining Titans one by one in the coming years, until he had gathered every Coreflame.

C: Archer与Lancer分析现状，认为主办方发动了一场「拟似圣杯战争」。波提欧接到「你」的短信，邀他去克劳克影视乐园。
E: Archer and Lancer analyzed the situation and concluded the organizers had triggered a "Simulated Holy Grail War." Boothill received a message from "you," inviting him to Clock Studios Theme Park.

C: 你成功联系上黑塔与螺丝咕姆，得知「权杖」内部有足以限制管理员的严密自主协议，其在翁法罗斯表现为<color=#f29e38ff>「律法」之泰坦</color>。你与昔涟需要前往「光历<unbreak>3960</unbreak>年，平衡月」，让「律法」的权能为你所用，全力避免其落入来古士手中。
E: You managed to reach Herta and Screwllum. They informed you that deep within the "Scepter" lay an advanced autonomous protocol powerful enough to restrict the Administrator. In Amphoreus, it took the form of the <color=#f29e38ff>Law Titan</color>. You and Cyrene needed to travel to "Light Calendar <unbreak>3960</unbreak>, Month of Balance" and gain the power of "Law" before it falls into Lygus's hands.

C: 你与昔涟分析当下情况，认为刻律德菈有所隐瞒。你们决定借沐浴的名义找个合适的隐秘地点，以与黑塔和螺丝咕姆商议现状。
E: You and Cyrene reviewed the situation and suspected Cerydra was hiding something. Under the pretense of bathing, you sought a hidden place to speak with Herta and Screwllum about what was truly going on.

C: 刻律德菈动员众人，称「毁灭」的金血将孕育出无往不利的巨兽「铁墓」，以此可踏遍天外群星。刻律德菈号召众人，为征服星海举杯。
E: Cerydra rallied the people, proclaiming that from the golden blood of the Destruction would rise an unstoppable colossus, "Irontomb," an iron beast to trample the universe. Cerydra raised her cup, calling all to toast their conquest of the starry seas.

C: 你意识到三月七不在这里，并冷静下来寻找脱困的方法。你尝试抓住迷迷和星期日伸出的援手，却被长夜月打断。
E: You realized March 7th was gone and searched for a way out. Just as you reached for Mem and Sunday, Evernight intervened.

C: 你向遐蝶和海瑟音道别。遐蝶仍然记得花海尽头与你的拥抱，并请你带上所有美好的愿望，坚定前行。海瑟音愿用洋流和歌声拱卫你的旅途，期待与你重逢于凯旋的欢宴。
E: You bid farewell to Castorice and Hysilens. Castorice still remembers your embrace at the edge of the flower sea, and asks you to carry all good wishes as you press forward with determination. Hysilens promises to guard your journey with ocean currents and songs, looking forward to reuniting with you at the triumphant feast.

C: 你们在时光归墟遇到那刻夏。那刻夏称晶体中承载着「救世的愿望」，它们必须被带向决战。而要将其取出，只有白厄心中的英雄——你能做到。
E: You met Anaxa in the Ruins of Time. Anaxa claimed that the crystal contained "the wish to save the world," and it must be brought to the decisive battle. But to extract them, only you, the hero in Phainon's heart, can do it.

C: 那刻夏与海瑟音谈论宴会与渎神。那刻夏认为渎神是现象而非目的，天才会将致命的真理共享，而疯子却试图将其强加于他人。
E: Anaxa and Hysilens discussed banquets and blasphemy. Anaxa believed blasphemy was a phenomenon rather than a goal. Geniuses share lethal truths, while madmen try to force them upon others.

C: 你调查最后的涂鸦。墙上的图案慢慢溶解、消失，至此，银狼在空间站的「游戏」告一段落。
E: You examined the final piece of graffiti. The pattern on the wall slowly melted away, signaling the end of Silver Wolf's little "game" aboard the space station.

C: 你遇到一位戴着石膏头的诡异男子。对方称自己误入此地，目睹阮•梅的实验，真正的「阮•梅造物」就藏在下方的巨型培养皿中。
E: You encountered a strange man adorned with an alabaster head. He claimed he had wandered in by accident and witnessed Ruan Mei's experiment. The real "Ruan Mei's Creation" was hidden in the giant incubator below you two.

C: 半夏交代她曾为梁沐带去「药王秘传」的秘药，导致了他得了病。所以她才以帮助白露逃离作为交换，拜托她救下梁沐。
E: Banxia confessed that she had once brought Liangmu a clandestine medicine from the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus, which caused his illness. That was why she offered to help Bailu escape in exchange for saving Liangmu.

C: 地衡司执事为你们带来了本案嫌疑人的照片，而瓦尔特则似乎在照片中见到了熟悉的身影。

E: March 7th tried to crawl into a crate, only to find it packed with various small mechanical devices. Maybe she should try a different crate.

E: After consuming the Crimson Moon, Feixiao earned the right to become a borisin Warhead. Hoolay offered Feixiao the power to determine the pack's fate, hoping she would return to the fold as a strong leader and rule the pack.

C: 作为新伦蒂尼恩工人，在操劳几十年后，你终于迎来了光荣的退休。政府为退休者提供了一种新选择：拿上一笔钱，或是进入名为「壳」的公寓，接受社会化赡养。公寓会衡量你平生的贡献，提供不同规格的待遇——最差也能衣食无忧。公司的宣传语称：「足以让老人重返孩提时代。」
E: As a worker in New Londinium, after decades of hard work, you finally enjoy a glorious retirement. The government offers retirees a new option: Take a sum of money or move into an apartment known as "Shell" to receive socialized care. The apartment will assess your lifelong contributions and provide varying levels of benefits — the worst of which still ensures that you have food and clothing. The company's slogan proclaims: "Enough to bring the elderly back to their childhood."

C: 晖长石号 / 开拓之尾号 / 塔塔洛夫号 / 飞翔时针号的休闲区域总是摆着几张桌子，供客人们茶歇时打牌消遣。某天，桌边出现了一位年轻的挑战者。论牌技，没人比得过他；论运气，那人也好得出奇。输掉口袋里的全部苜蓿币后，大副终于请你出马。\n「我还在想你什么时候才会出现呢，」穿着华贵的青年拉开椅子，「来玩一把吧，朋友，玩什么由你选择。」
E: The lounge area for The Radiant Feldspar / The Trailblaze's Stern / The Tatalov / The Soaring Clock Hand always has a few tables for guests to play cards during tea breaks. One day, a young challenger appears at the table. No one can match his skill at cards, and he also has uncanny luck. After losing all the Alfalfa credits in their pocket, the first mate finally asks for your help.\n"I was wondering when you'd show up," the well-dressed young man said while pulling out a chair. "Let's play a round, friend. You choose the game."

C:
嗅觉曾经构建了步离人战首的感官世界，雨、尘土、篝火、鲜血、伤药...从战场最深处摇摇晃晃、幽幽荡荡地传来，汇成气味洪流，淹没他每一寸神经。

如今他只能嗅到刑具的沉重坚固、与陪审者的畏缩恐惧充盈空气。

他知道这些血肉软弱的审判者忌惮獠牙锐利——他曾伫立陡峭的崖顶，沐浴疯狂的月华，感受血脉中本能冲动；他曾循着气味组成的迷宫，于无光黑夜里，深入敌营，逐一咬碎猎物的头颅…步离人战首崇敬磋磨后的獠牙，将其视为砥锋白刃，是撕裂一切的力量与自信。

「步离巢父，啮噬吮血，荼害无辜。判其拘笼终身覆面，钳口固齿，问十恶重罪。」

战首轻蔑地环视着四周，如冰海怒涛般席卷一切的剑客不在这里…他对繁芜的判词不感兴趣。
E:
Smell was the sense that constructed the borisin Warhead's sense of the world. Rain, dust, campfire, blood, medicine... From the deepest part of the battlefield, they came shaking and wafting, with a torrent of odors that flooded every inch of his neurons.

All he could smell now is the heavy sturdiness of the torture devices, and the cowering fear of the jurors filling the air.

He knows that these weak-fleshed judges are afraid of the sharpness of his fangs — He had stood on the precipice of a steep cliff, bathed in the moonlight of madness, and felt the instinctive impulse in his veins. He had followed the labyrinth of smells, penetrating into the enemy's camp in the darkness of a lightless night, and crushed the skulls of his prey one by one... The borisin Warhead admires the concept of polished fangs, regarding them as blades and spears, symbols of the power and confidence to tear apart anything.

"The borisin Brood Lord gnashed and gnawed on flesh, devouring the blood of innocents. He is sentenced to a lifetime in a cage with his face covered in a closed-mouth muzzle, convicted of the Ten Unpardonable Sins."

The Warhead contemptuously looks around. The swordmaster who engulfed everything like an icy sea of fury is not there... He has no interest in this tedious sentence.

C: 遮天蔽日的虫群在火海中化为灰烬，银白的雪花飘散在深空中，映射恒星的惨淡光辉。仅在此刻，耳畔无休止的振翅声，以及通讯频道里的指令终于得以宁静。 袭击「帝国」的虫群并未被彻底涤荡干净，下条出击指令也会在短暂愣神之后鸣响起来，一如既往。 「帝国」的铁骑感受着深髓信号传输带来的外界感受，她回想起上次脱离驾驶舱时的体验，热风轻微撩起长发，郁热的空气浸透了她的后颈，汗珠附着在皮肤上。她并不讨厌那种感受，它比模拟信号鲜活百倍。装甲将感官与驾驶员深度同步，尽管这会进一步加剧失熵的痛苦，但为了战胜虫裔，铁骑早已没有选择。 「格拉默军规第8条，存活的骑士应主动归队……」 直到铁骑看见戮首的银色盔甲，才明白装甲的感官信号欺骗了自己——下条出击指令不会再响起了，多么残忍的短暂休憩。
E: The Swarm that covers the sky turns to dust in a sea of fire. Silvery-white snowflakes drift in deep space, reflecting the pallid light of the star. In this brief moment, the endless sound of buzzing and the commands in the communication channel finally dials down to silence. The Swarm attacking the "empire" has not been eradicated, and the next command to head to battle will ring out again after a brief pause, as it always did. The Iron Cavalry of the "empire" feels the external sensations passed to her via the deep spinal cord signals. She remembers what she felt the last time she was removed from the cockpit. The hot wind had lightly tousled her hair and the humid air soaked the tissue on the back of her neck, with droplets of sweat stuck to her skin. She does not hate that feeling. It is tenfold more lively than the simulated signals. The armor deeply synchronizes its sensory organs with that of the pilot. Though this would worsen the pain of entropy loss, the Iron Cavalry has no other choice if they wish to defeat the Swarm. "Rule 8 of the Glamoth Military Regulations. Any surviving Cavalry members should voluntarily return to their regiment..." The fighter only realizes that the external sensory signals have tricked her when she sees the decapitated silver armor — The next command to head to the battlefield will never sound again. What a cruel brief reprieve.

E: Replace all Equations and Blessings with random Equations and Blessings. There is a higher chance that Equations and Blessings for the Path of Harmony will appear, and obtain "Benediction Shard: Passage."

C: 孩童被反物质军团的战火震慑，从此丧失理智。老人被药师的神迹勾去心神，踏上求药之旅。意识是苦痛的本源，记忆是悲伤的根须。倘若有什么造就了现实的诸般苦难，答案唯有智慧头脑中肮脏的过去。\n\n你抹除幸福的记忆，如此再没人会知晓痛苦的感觉。你碾碎繁华的记忆，如此再不存在对腐朽的认知。你从一颗颗哀叹的星球掠过，于是，他们便不再哭泣。你销毁一段段失落的昨天，从此，他们便变得轻盈。这世上第二纯粹的，是新生的孩童，他们一无所知。第一纯粹的，是河畔的石头，因它们无可认知。
E: A child, stunned by the sight of the Antimatter Legion's battle, loses his mind forever. An old man, enchanted by the miracles of Yaoshi, sets out on a relentless quest for immortality. Consciousness births pain, and memory begets sorrow. If there is anything that gives rise to the suffering of reality, it is the tainted past of sapient minds.\n\nYou erase the memory of happiness, so that no one may ever feel the sting of pain. You shatter the memory of prosperity, so that decay is never known again. Passing by planet after planet steeped in sorrow, you silence their cries. You obliterate the disappointed yesterdays, so that they may become weightless. The second-purest thing in this world is the newborn child, untouched by knowledge. But the first are the stones by the river, for they exist beyond the reach of cognition.

C:
多么瑰丽的箴言，被历史掩埋的「相对认知」。当你在自我的坠落中抓住那根稻草时，便已成为这逝去学派的虔诚信徒。你知道，所谓现实，不过是凝聚在混沌的认知剪切流体上的岛屿，只要笃信的应力被更改，世界便会随你的想象而变化。

你不再受那些花言巧语的欺骗，听信能够解释一切的规律。你在画布上描摹自己的世界，它没有抽象的概念，没有撕裂天体的引力，也不存在绝对不变的真理，只有可塑的认知与虚无。当你睁开眼时，世界便存在。当你闭上眼时，世界便消失。

他们嘲笑你的诡辩，说你是疯子，于是你不再聆听他们的声音，将他们杀死在你的世界里。
E:
What a magnificent aphorism — the concept of "relative cognition" lost to history. You became a devout disciple of this bygone school of thought when you clutched that straw as your ego fell. You know that so-called reality is merely an island formed amidst chaotic cognitive fluid, and that the world will shift according to your imagination as long as your beliefs are transformed.

You are no longer swayed by fancy words, choosing instead to heed the maxims that explain everything. You map your world onto a canvas devoid of abstract concepts, of gravitational forces that rend the heavens, and of absolute truths. Instead, there are only malleable cognition and the void. When you open your eyes, the world comes into being. When you close them, the world vanishes.

They scoff at your sophistry and deem you mad, so you no longer listen to their voices and kill them within your world.

C:
我知道您厌恶刻工的做派，但请容我替他们求情。
英雄们怀着豪情壮志出征，归来时却两眼空空。
他们看见友人被海啸淹没，目睹怪物刺穿血亲的胸膛，
心中余下的，只剩无奈与绝望。
树木用年轮记录历史，刻工以扮演与期满镌刻过往。
在他们的故事里，迟暮的英雄并未出征，
失去的朋友或是归来，或是出了趟远门。
崩塌的城邦仍旧屹立，在错愕的老人身旁，
尽是说着家乡话语的孩提。
用谎言为困在过去的英雄打造一时的美梦，
这固然荒谬，但对这个时代却是必需。
E:
I understand you detest the conduct of the Engravers, but please allow me to plead on their behalf.
Heroes set out with lofty aspirations, only to return to a world of desolation.
They witnessed friends consumed by tsunamis and monsters piercing the chests of their kin.
In their hearts, all that remains is helplessness and despair.
Trees record history through their rings, while Engravers etch the past out of empathy and aspiration.
In their stories, aging heroes never embarked on their expeditions.
Lost friends either returned or were merely on a long journey.
The collapsed city still stood, sheltering bewildered elders
And children speaking the language of their homeland.
Through lies, they craft a fleeting dream for heroes trapped in the past.
Absurd as it may seem, it is indispensable for this era.
