C: 你的「故事」•三
E: Your "Story": Part III

C: 八面玲珑的狐人少女，天舶司商团「鸣火」的首席代表。\n停云天生生得一副慧心妙舌，但凡她开口，人们就免不了想听她多说几句。在她的调度下，仙舟的贸易庆典逐渐声名远扬。\n能不战斗就尽量不去战斗，能劝为己用就尽量劝为己用——这便是停云的原则。
E: A silver-tongued foxian girl, Tingyun is the Head Representative of the Whistling Flames, a merchant guild officially approved by the Sky-Faring Commission.\nShe has such a way with words that often leaves her audience eagerly waiting for more of her captivating tales. As a result of her supervision, the Xianzhou trade fairs are now known throughout the cosmos.\n"Try one's best to avoid conflict when possible, and persuade those who can be persuaded" — that's Tingyun's motto.

C:
无光的幽暗中，他仿佛回到持明卵中，在波涛与幻梦里辗转来去。

他梦见锁龙针钉入身躯，珊瑚金造就的锁链重重捆缚，将他悬吊在幽囚狱里。他梦见长老们来了又去，询问他妙法的真相和龙心的所在。他沉默不语。

他梦见幽府的判官们来到他面前宣读判词，要判他大辟入灭。他沉默不语。

他梦见白发的云骑骁卫前来看望他，为他带来斡旋的结果。持明们不许他死去，也不许他离去。他沉默不语。

他梦见再度与他们举杯共饮，他梦见自己褪去龙鳞，他梦见自己重回卵中，成了另一个人。

他梦见了许多许多，就像一场永远不会结束，名为「自我」的幻戏。

幻戏之后，是更清晰却不可及的虚像。

他看见自己被放逐，他看见自己登上一辆列车，他看见自己奔向遥远的星空，再不回头。
E:
In the dim abyss devoid of light, he seemed to have returned to the insides of a Vidyadhara egg, being ceaselessly churned in tumultuous waves and elusive dreams.

He dreamed of the Dracocatena Nails being staked into his body, and chains of corallium winding around him to hang him in midair in the Shackling Prison. He dreamed the elders coming and going to interrogate him about the truth of the Arcanum and the whereabouts of the dragon heart. He did not speak.

He dreamed of the Judges coming before him to read their decision and wanting to sentence him to death. He did not speak.

He dreamed of the white-haired Cloud Knight Lieutenant coming to visit him and bringing him news of the Lieutenant's negotiations. The Vidyadhara did not permit him to die, nor did they permit him to leave. He did not speak.

He dreamed he was raising his cup to drink with the others again, that he molted off his scales, and that he returned to the egg, and became someone else.

He dreamed many, many things, like a never-ending immersia entitled "Self."

Following the immersia was an even clearer but unreachable illusion.

He saw himself being exiled. He saw himself boarding an express. He saw himself running into the endless stars, never looking back.

C: 自那三相神谕垂怜的圣地，信使分作千身，启程远行。\n雅努萨波利斯的圣女，缇里西庇俄丝，窃夺「门径」火种的黄金裔，要为众生奔走，令救世的讯息晓喻大地\n——找寻那流淌黄金神血的人子，冲破世间至暗，去往星月满天的明日。
E: From that holy land blessed by the tripartite prophecy, the messenger split into a thousand forms, embarking on a long journey.\nTribios, Holy Maiden of Janusopolis, the Chrysos Heir who stole Passage's Coreflame, toiled for the masses and brought the news of deliverance to all domains.\n—Seek the children of humanity with golden blood in their veins, shatter the dimmest dark in this world, and walk toward the tomorrow where the stars gleam.

C: 在入侵现场优雅踱步的女人如同一道谜题，她嘲弄着受害者的同时又残酷地将加害者消灭殆尽。\n通讯里神秘的协助者透露出两人似乎怀抱着某种目的。\n她们的入局是混乱升级的预兆抑或是一段故事的开始？
E: The woman sauntering elegantly across the invasion site is a mystery. She mocks the victims, while also ruthlessly eliminating their oppressors.\n Over their comms, the mysterious helper revealed that the two seem to have some sort of agenda.\nIs their presence a sign of more chaos to come? Or is it the start of a new story?

C: 抵达监控室的二人面对的却是不在此处的空间站主人随手留下的迷阵。\n「用奇物来隐藏奇物，的确是那女人会干的事情。」\n但很多时候即便猜到了手法，你也猜不到故事的结局。
E: The two arrive at the Monitoring Room to find a maze left by the absent space station's owner.\n"Using a Curio to hide another Curio sounds like something she would do."\nBut oftentimes, knowing the way does not equate to knowing how it ends.

C: 先前出手相救的姬子终于登场，她的笃定与从容几乎让你忘了他们也是被卷入这场险境的外来者。\n如今，只有空间站的代理站长艾丝妲知道，这场危机是否已经得到了缓和……
E: Himeko, who helped you before, has finally made her appearance. Her relaxed and confident posture almost makes you forget about the fact that they're also outsiders who were dragged into this crisis.\nAt this point, only Asta, the acting lead researcher of the space station, knows whether the crisis has been adverted...

C: 坏消息是，你的「好哥们」桑博抛弃了你，留下你独自面对银鬃铁卫戍卫官——杰帕德•朗道；好消息是，面前这位威风凛凛的军人似乎没那么死板。\n你成功说服了杰帕德，令他相信你们来自天外世界。他承诺会护送你前往贝洛伯格的大守护者之所在。\n这一切看起来是那么恰到好处…别怀疑，跟着银鬃铁卫们走就是了。
E: The bad news is that your buddy Sampo has abandoned you and left you to deal with Gepard Landau, the Silvermane Guard Captain, alone. The good news, however, is that the imposing soldier is actually quite flexible.\nYou successfully persuade Gepard by making him believe that you are from a world beyond the sky. He promises to escort you to the Supreme Guardian at Belobog.\nEverything looked perfect... There's no reason for doubt, all you have to do is follow the Silvermane Guards.

C:
为了逃脱追捕，你们冲进了裂界。可你们怎会突然沦落至此？三月七也无法解释，因为她的人设只是一位单纯可爱的少女。
不过，你们迅速达成共识：当务之急是找到裂界的出口，其他事项等离开这片险地再作商议。
你是当之无愧的铁门克星…被你打开的两道铁门一定会为你作证的。
裂界的出口已经近在眼前，你们就要安全了…暂时。
E:
You rush into the Fragmentum to avoid getting caught. How come things went downhill so quickly? March 7th has no clue — she's written as an innocent and sweet teenage girl after all.
Despite the initial shock, you quickly agree on the course of action: Find the way out of the Fragmentum first. Everything else can wait.
You are the bane of all gates... The two you've opened would agree.
The Fragmentum exit is right in front of you. Safety is within reach... for the time being.

C:
你自然而然地找到了物资，布洛妮娅自然而然地找到了证明自己身世的物件，希儿也自然而然地对此表示震惊。
于是，差点成为童年玩伴的两人自然而然地陷入了回忆中，开始促膝长谈——
尽管你很想问两人何时成为了这样无话不谈的好闺蜜，但你忍心打破眼前这片来之不易的宁静吗？
你不忍心，所以你决定自己深入孤儿院周边搜索物资…
E:
You naturally find the supplies, Bronya naturally finds the item to prove her past, and Seele naturally feels very shocked about all of this.
The two who almost became childhood friends naturally go for a trip down the memory lane and begin a very long and deep conversation...
Although you would really like to ask them when they became such great friends that share all their secrets with one another, would you be able to bring yourself to disturb the rare peace in front of you?
You couldn't. So you decide to venture further around the orphanage to search for the supplies...

C: 在和同伴充分交换意见之后，你们很快得出结论：当下最要紧之事务应是回到旅店房间好好睡一觉，回头再去请教「地火」的想法。\n这听起来确实是有点扯，但你如何能拒绝长途跋涉和艰苦战斗之后的柔软床垫呢？\n休息是为了走更长远的路——每个旅人都应该明白这一浅显的道理，包括你在内。
E: After an exchange of ideas and opinions, you quickly come up with a conclusion: The most urgent matter at hand is to return to the hotel and get a good night's sleep. You'll find out what the Wildfire thinks later.\nIt may not sound like the most heroic thing to do, but a soft and fluffy mattress after hard fights and toil is simply too much of a temptation.\nA short break goes a long way towards preparing for the journey ahead. This is true for every traveler, and you are no exception.

C: 可可利亚已经战败，星核的影响也随着她的消亡而减弱。\n你将胜利的消息传达给了下层区的人们，众人无不雀跃鼓舞…尽管你们把一些难以启齿的真相暂时藏在了心里。\n还剩下两个重要人物没有被告知——克拉拉和史瓦罗。如果没有他们的帮助，这段旅程想必会更加波折。
E: Cocolia was defeated and the influence of the Stellaron weakened with her demise.\nYou passed news of the victory to the Underworlders. Everyone is happy and celebrating... while you temporarily withhold the ugly truth.\nThere are still two important people not informed of the news, those being Clara and Svarog. Your journey would have been much more difficult without their help.

C: 在你抵达造物之柱以前，众多向往自由的垃圾桶已经与「垃圾之王」塔塔洛夫展开激战。你的到来一定能为他们扭转颓势。
E: Before you arrive at the Pillars of Creation, a huge number of trashcans yearning for freedom have already engaged Tatalov the Garbage King in a ferocious battle. Your arrival is certain to help them turn the tide of battle.

C: 离开诊所后，映入眼帘的是一座由垃圾桶构成的巨大王国。一名名为莎塔娜的垃圾桶找到了你，请求你帮助垃圾桶们从烦忧中解脱，带领众垃圾桶获得解放——前提是取得三个「信任的证明」。\n你帮阿圾米德解决了困扰他已久的问题，向他汇报你的成果吧。
E: As you leave the clinic, what lies before your eyes is a giant kingdom formed of trashcans. A trashcan by the name of Shatana finds you and asks for your help in freeing the trashcans from their worries and leading them to liberation — The prerequisite is that you acquire three Proofs of Trust.\nYou have helped Trashiemedes resolve a problem that has plagued him for a long time. Report your results to him.

C: 筑梦绅士在匹诺康尼随处可见，此刻他又恰如其分地出现在你的面前，以便为你提供一道根本没有必要存在的谜题。\n完成这道谜题，离开这座被扭曲的忆域吧。
E: The Dreamweaver Gentleman can be seen all over Penacony, yet he has appeared before you precisely at this moment again to give you a completely unnecessary puzzle.\nComplete this puzzle and leave this distorted Memory Zone.

C: 视角再次来到了匹诺康尼的另一个角落。来看看在你不知道的地方，又有怎样的好戏正在上演吧。
E: The spotlight refocuses on another location in Penacony. Let's check out the happenings in places that you aren't aware of.

C: 列车组的各位也平安抵达了「黄金的时刻」，并和你交换了各种信息。经过一番激烈的讨论，你们决定答应砂金的合作请求。在拟定下一步计划前，先和伙伴们分别讨论一下各自在意的事情吧。
E: The Crew safely arrives at the Golden Hour and exchanges info with you. After an intense discussion, you decide to work with Aventurine. Before planning the next step, take some time to discuss what everyone is concerned about.

C: 筑梦拼图在匹诺康尼无处不在。通常来说，看到筑梦拼图就等于看到了一扇大门…不知是有意还是无意，这种诡异的设计在匹诺康尼简直泛滥成灾，让你深感家族是不是没有新活可以整了。\n无论如何，还是按照流程集齐筑梦碎片吧，你知道教授朋友向来没什么耐心。
E: Dream Jigsaws are ubiquitous in Penacony. Generally speaking, seeing a Dream Jigsaw is the same as seeing a door... Intentional or not, this creepy design is so common in Penacony that it makes you wonder whether The Family has run out of creative ideas.\nAnyway, you might as well go through the procedure and collect all the jigsaw fragments. You know how your professor friend isn't known for his patience.

C: 米沙声称流梦礁是自己的家——如果真是这样，那「白日梦」酒店的待遇可真有够糟糕的。不过，天真可爱的小米沙不以为意，反而看出你们遇到了麻烦，提出带领各位寻找走失的同伴，顺便游览这座冷寂的小镇。不仅如此，你们甚至还有机会见到一位老朋友——知更鸟。\n但在那以前，你们首先要和三月七与姬子会合才行。小米沙认为列车组成员很有可能身在贸易区，或许你们可以前去看看。
E: Misha claims Dreamflux Reef to be his home... If that is the case, you can only imagine how bad the treatment must have been at The Reverie. Although, the cute and naïve Misha has not taken that to heart. In fact, seeing that you are in trouble, he offers to lead you on a search for your lost companions and give you a tour of the desolate town along the way. Not only that, you may even have a chance to meet with an old friend... Robin.\nBefore anything else, you need to regroup with March 7th and Himeko. Misha believes that the Express Crew is likely in the trading district. Maybe you should go and check it out.

C: 第一次选择！你和流萤来到了「戏梦奇战•演技派挑战」的舞台。根据引导员的说法，你们将在这里接受「演技」的考验……\n演技是什么？你完全不理解这个词的意思。对你而言，真诚永远是最强的必杀技。
E: The first choice! You and Firefly arrive at the Dreamplay Fantasia: Acting Challenge arena. According to the guide's instructions, your "acting" skills will be tested here...\nWhat are acting skills exactly? You have no idea. For you, sincerity has always been the ultimate instrument.

C: 时间回退至你们尚未离开流梦礁的时间点。姬子从黄金的时刻归来，更捎来了一个强有力的推断：「钟表匠」怀中空无一物的梦泡与门童米沙或许有着千丝万缕的联系。\n为了求证，你们携米沙一道，再次进入米哈伊尔的梦泡——如无意外，一切真相就潜藏在这段稚子的长梦中。
E: Time reverses to the point before you left Dreamflux Reef. Himeko returns from Golden Hour with a powerful deduction: There may be some inextricable link between the empty dream bubble that the Watchmaker is holding and Misha the bellboy.\nIn order to prove it, you take Misha back into Mikhail's dream bubble... If everything goes as expected, the truth may be lurking here in this long dream of the child.

C: 抱着九分怀疑和一分缥缈的侥幸，流萤登上了「晖长石号」。\n她来这里是为了寻找传闻中的「慈玉典押」，听说那是一家能实现任何人心愿的典当行。\n为了活下去，星核猎手选择暂时相信这个传说。
E: Mostly harboring suspicion but with a sliver of hope, Firefly boards the Radiant Feldspar. \nShe's here to find the rumored Bonajade Exchange, which is said to be a pawn shop that can grant anybody's wishes.\nIn order to survive, the Stellaron Hunter chooses to believe this legend — for now.

C: 抱着九分怀疑和一分缥缈的侥幸，流萤登上了「晖长石号」。\n她来这里是为了寻找传闻中的「慈玉典押」，听说那是一家能实现任何人心愿的典当行。\n星核猎手得知了「慈玉典押」的位置，并准备和它的老板娘谈谈。
E: Mostly harboring suspicion but with a sliver of hope, Firefly boards the Radiant Feldspar. \nShe's here to find the rumored Bonajade Exchange, which is said to be a pawn shop that can grant anybody's wishes.\nThe Stellaron Hunter learns the location of the Bonajade Exchange, and gets ready to talk with the madame who owns it.

C: 成为忍者的女孩，用你的忍符来让忍之都的色彩复苏吧！至于忍符的内容…没什么比你的名字更合适了——一心不乱，破邪显正！\nAK-A-3，你真的以为自己拥有了虚假的名字，拥有了虚假的梦想，就是有价值的「人」了吗？
E: Girl, you who have become a ninja — restore color to the Ninja Capital with your ninja talisman! And what better content for the talisman than your own name — eradicating evil and upholding justice!\nAK-A-3, do you truly believe that bearing a false name and harboring false dreams makes you a valuable "person"?

C: 最终的壮绝•狩猎已经开始！踏入狩猎场的众忍，握紧手中的忍法帖，挥洒那些你们曾见过的血泪——那不只是缭乱•忍侠的血泪，而是成万上亿被御猿•邪忍迫害之人的血泪！此战并非为忍义，而是为往日那些遮蔽银河群星的仇恨，以及断绝未来的仇恨的种子而战！化作大岚神的箭矢，照亮黑夜，唤醒众生，刺穿邪祟吧！\n唤醒迷惘的小猴，追猎逃窜的蕉授，不死不休，不死不休！
E: The final Grand Hunt has begun! The ninjas, who have entered the hunting grounds, grasp their ninjutsu talisman tight, and shed blood and tears that they have seen — It's not just the blood and tears of the Dazzling Ninja Hero, but the blood and tears of the billions of victims ruined by Evil Ninja Osaru! This battle is not fought for ninja honor, but for the vengeance that had covered the very stars in the past, and to uproot the seeds of hatred in the future once and for all! Transform into the arrows of the Great Lan, lighting up the night, awakening those affected, and piercing through the fiendish foes!\nAwaken the bewildered monkeys and pursue the fleeing Profnana! To the death! TO THE DEATH!

C: 好在「粉霞天女」风波结束得够快，黄金裔们暂未发觉。为感谢我们先前从尼卡多利手中保护奥赫玛，阿格莱雅似有谢礼要送。
E: Fortunately, the "Rosy Celestial Maiden" fiasco was quickly resolved before the Chrysos Heirs discovered it. As a token of gratitude for saving Okhema from Nikador, Aglaea seems to have prepared a special gift for us.

C: 「圣城」奥赫玛…据说是如今的末世长夜中，唯一的永昼之地。我们决定在城中游历一番，了解此处风土人情，同时收集可靠信息。
E: Okhema, the holy city... It is said to be the only place with eternal daylight amidst the end times' long night. We decide to tour the city to familiarize ourselves with the area and gather reliable information.

C: 身处这纷争的国度，白厄与万敌两位黄金裔一时兴起，相约开启竞技，兵分两路杀入悬锋城中。城内机关遍地、危机四伏，必须小心翼翼地前进。
E: In this war-torn land, the two Chrysos Heirs, Phainon and Mydei, agreed on a spontaneous competition. They split into two paths, each eliminating enemies on the way to Castrum Kremnos. Traps and dangers lurked around every corner in the city, demanding that one proceed with utmost caution.

C: 与此同时，奥赫玛城中，阿格莱雅也开始着手处理尼卡多利渗透一事。但奥赫玛的政局似乎并没有我们所预想的那么稳定。
E: Meanwhile, in the city of Okhema, Aglaea has begun addressing Nikador's infiltration. However, the political situation in Okhema appears far less stable than we had anticipated.

C: 经过一路的观察，遐蝶揭穿卡吕普索的真面目，指出其人正是{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}。瑟希斯承认身份，委托{NICKNAME}等人助它前往那刻夏所在之处，将火种再度熔合，以便缉拿树庭覆灭的元凶——无名的黑袍剑士。
E: After careful observation, Castorice exposes Calypso's true identity as {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#}. Cerces admits to this and asks {NICKNAME}'s group to help them reach Anaxa, so they can fuse the Coreflame again to catch the culprit behind the annihilation of the Grove — the nameless black-robed swordmaster.

C: 一场梦境，将*我们*带回那段早已为岁月所模糊的遥远回忆之中，而这场幻梦，印刻着*我们*内心最深处的不安。
E: A dream carries us back to memories long faded by time, and this dream mirrors the profound fears within our hearts.

C: 元老院如你所料派出了使者抢在阿格莱雅行动前将你带到了黎明云崖。在这里，你将接受众元老们的庇护。\n凯妮斯就像是条诡诈的毒蛇，想要获得她的信任并不容易。
E: The Council of Elders dispatched a messenger, as you anticipated, to escort you to Dawncloud before Aglaea could make her move. Here, you will be under the Elders' protection.\nCaenis is like a cunning snake. Gaining her trust will not be easy.

C: 遐蝶登门拜访，既是为了散心，也是让{NICKNAME}跟随她取一样东西。\n遐蝶准备的礼物被翁法罗斯最有名的猫咪怪盗给偷走了，而她还留下了线索。
E: Castorice's visit isn't only for the purpose of relaxation, but also to have {NICKNAME} follow her to retrieve a certain item.\nThe gift that Castorice prepared was stolen by the famous Amphorean Kitty Phantom Thief. What's more, the thief left clues.

C: 斯缇科西亚，巨龙与海浪的城邦。如今，那冥河却把这凄惨的城池团团围拢。\n斯缇科西亚的亡魂们重复诉说着往昔，他们似乎是来自「黄金世」的亡者。
E: Styxia, the City-State of Dragons and Waves... At present, the River of Souls has encircled this pitiful city.\nThe spirits of Anaxagoras repeatedly recount the past. They seem to be those who fell during Era Chrysea.

C: 晨昏之眼，被冠以泰坦神名的天空壁垒，既是遥远年代天空一族的故乡，也是如今艾格勒的栖地。在风堇的帮助下，我们踏上了这片域外之地，找寻那位制约天幕的泰坦。
E: The Eye of Twilight, a sky barrier named after a Titan, was both the homeland of the Sky people in ancient times and now serves as Aquila's dwelling. With Hyacine's help, we have set foot on this outworld land to find the Titan who binds the sky.

C: 艾格勒于激战之后坠入黄金池中，其火种也顺利被风堇所接收——当务之急，是从逐渐崩毁的天空堡垒中逃离。
E: After a fierce battle, Aquila plunged into the pool of gold, and their Coreflame was seamlessly claimed by Hyacine. Now, the urgent task is to flee the crumbling sky fortress before it collapses entirely.

C:
你还记得她吗，无缘黎明的卡厄斯兰那？
遐蝶，所有的叹息都从她的指尖涌出；所有的慰语都因她的手被阻隔；所有的死亡都为她拥入怀中；所有的恸哭都被她吞咽在掌心。
说啊，倘若刻法勒永志不忘：你已为她磔碎多少对翼，熄灭多少鲜花，把蝴蝶扑入死灰？
芬芳的月色流成冥河，如何被你酿成金色的毒酒，为你徒劳救世的欢宴设奠？
倒是你，披着羊皮的救世主，最该成祭神的牺牲！
丑陋的野兽，伪善的眼睑盖不住喷薄的毒火，那矛似的犄角生来更为弑杀友亲。
就将尸骨当作美餐饱腹，鲜甜会说服你：「我毕竟对屠刀一无所知」。
E:
Do you still remember her, Khaslana, the one who won't reach the dawn?
Castorice, with every sigh flowing from her fingertips and her hands blocking all words of comfort, she held each death close to her heart and swallowed every cry of grief in her palms.
Tell me, if Kephale never forgets, how many pairs of wings have you shattered for her? How many blossoms have you snuffed out? How many butterflies have you cast into the ashes?
The moonlight's fragrance once streamed like the River of Souls. How did you turn it into golden poison and make it libations for your banquet of futile deliverance?
And yet it is you, so-called Deliverer in sheep's clothing, who ought to be the sacrifice upon the altar to the gods!
Ugly beast — your seemingly pious gaze cannot hide the seething venom beneath. And that spear-like horn of yours was born to slay your kin.
So feast upon bones and call it grace. The sweetness will surely convince you: "I never truly knew anything about the blade of slaughter."

C: 同样的能力，但凡给我换一个有用点的御主，我是不是都已经赢了？
E: With these abilities, if I had a slightly more decent Master, I'd have already won.

C: 人们说，这是一个金血晕染鲜血的残酷时代，这是一个海啸山崩下衰颓的灾难时代，这是一个昏君践踏律法的暴虐时代，这是一个神与信徒都被屠戮的黑暗时代。这就是第一次逐火之旅的时代，这个时代有一颗灼热的太阳，燃烧着令人目盲的光。\n而你要直视它，请它把你要的火点亮。
E: People say this is a cruel era stained with golden blood and crimson, an era of catastrophe where tsunamis rage and mountains crumble, an era of tyranny where corrupt rulers trample the law, a dark era where both gods and their faithful are slaughtered. This is the era of the First Flame-Chase Journey, an era with a scorching sun that burns with blinding light.\nAnd you must gaze directly into it, asking it to illuminate the fire you seek.

C:
那天，满载荣耀与五百位英雄的大船自斯缇科西亚启航，撞入了迷雾下的巨浪怀抱。数日之后，海面平歇，千年再无风浪。
无人知晓迷雾与浪中的故事。或许，只有海知道——
一颗灼热的野心，点燃满船的柴薪。余虚无的灰，落入海底。
去吧，感受那冰冷的火，滚烫的泪。
E:
That day, a grand ship, laden with glory and five hundred heroes, set sail from Styxia and plunged into the embrace of towering waves shrouded in mist. Days later, the ocean fell silent, and for a thousand years, no wave rose again.
No one knows the story hidden in mist and waves. Perhaps, only the ocean remembers —
A single burning ambition ignited all the timbers laden on that ship. Ashes of emptiness drifted slowly to the ocean floor.
Go now, and feel that chilling flame, and those burning tears.

C: 「大地」的权能已在手中，我会担起职责，也会与你们并肩面对「再创世」。\n如果当初是荒笛与长夜月构筑了忆潮世界，那么现在的我有能力找回{NICKNAME}。
E: The authority of Earth is now in my hands. I will shoulder this responsibility and stand with you all to face "Era Nova."\nIf it were Terravox and Evernight who built the memoria tide world, then I now have the power to bring {NICKNAME} back.

C: 在这永恒的居所，昔涟保护着银河众生的记忆，却也几乎散尽了自我。我必须与她一同铭记被铁墓抹消的银河众生，踏上记忆的命途，为故事写下不同的结局。
E: In this eternal dwelling, Cyrene guards the memories of all cosmic beings, yet has almost lost herself in the process. I must join her in remembering those erased by the Irontomb, embark on the Path of Remembrance, and write a different ending to the story.

C: 从一页永恒返回战场吧。让记忆与爱成为我们的弓矢，平息那无首巨匠的劫火，为银河的未来做出截然不同的证明——宇宙的答案绝非「毁灭」，在沉重的终幕背后，会亮起希望的起始。
E: Return to the battlefield from An Eternal Page. Let remembrances and love be our bow and arrow to quell the headless giant's karmic flames and prove a different path for the Cosmos's future. The answer to the universe will never be the Destruction. Hope's beginning shall shine forth behind the heavy curtain of the final act.

C: 近日，地概科的年轻科员洛奇陷入了重重心事。原来，他一直与暗恋对象保持着通讯，但这一次，对方却没有如期回信。\n考虑到二人一度相谈甚欢，以及他「刚刚表白」这一特殊时间节点，心急如焚的他请求你调查双方联络中断的因由。
E: A young researcher named Rocky from the Department of Cosmic Geography seems to have a lot on his mind lately. As it turns out, he's been keeping in contact with his crush. However, this time, the expected letter of reply from his crush never came.\nThe two never run out of things to talk about, and seeing that he had just confessed his love, he is urgently asking for you to investigate why their communications have abruptly ended.

C: 抵到终点时，阿兰与你发现呜呜伯们聚在纪念碑前。\n阿兰似乎明白了什么，还是向他打听一下究竟发生了什么吧。
E: When you reach the end, you and Arlan discover Wubbaboos gathered before their monument.\nArlan seems to understand what's going on. Ask him about what is happening.

C: 姬子建议你直接找出谣言制造者，在她的帮助下，你得知有位外号为「瓜农」的科员或许会知道谣言制造者的真实身份。\n你决定前往「瓜农」常去的地方找她。
E: Himeko recommends you to find the person making the rumor. With her help, you learn that a researcher nicknamed "Gossipmonger" may know the true identity of the one who created the rumor.\nYou decide to look for Gossipmonger at the place she frequents.

C: 利用相机扫描怪物，击败藏有左侧房间密钥的怪物
E: Use the camera to scan for monsters and defeat the monster that is carrying the encryption key to the room on the left

C: 接受艾丝妲的远程协助，了解收容舱段的状况
E: Receive remote assistance from Asta and learn about the condition of the storage zone

C: 用相机扫描怪物，找到并击败藏有密钥的怪物
E: Use the camera to scan for monsters. Find and defeat the monster that is carrying the encryption key

C: 你实在没想到，梅厄居然是这么一个人。你无法将先前表现古怪的她，与数据记录里那个可爱的云养猫爱好者联系到一起去。但她的确不是感染者，接下来，该查查其他人了……
E: You never thought Mare was someone like this. It's hard to believe that the eccentric person you know and the cute cat-lover in the record are the same. At any rate, she is not infected. Now you need to check the others...

C: 空间站的网络安全工程师认为军团入侵事件的背后另有隐情。你回想起自己苏醒时的遭遇，决定与他一同追踪星核猎手「银狼」的行迹。
E: The network security engineer of the space station thinks there is something else behind the invasion of the Legion. You recall what happened to you when you woke up and decide to join him in tracking down the Stellaron Hunter, Silver Wolf.

C: 空间站竟然有隐藏的秘密舱段？！这恐怕是很多科员都不曾知晓的事情。你单独前去调查，里面似乎盛放着许多不可思议的东西……
E: The space station has a secret zone? This might just be something not even most the researchers know about. You investigate alone, and find the space filled with many incredible objects...

C: {NICKNAME}的开拓日报：\n不能跟公司的喽啰硬碰硬。杰帕德有妙招。启动「潜爆机兵」吧。
E: {NICKNAME}'s Trailblaze Daily Report:\nCan't go head to head with the IPC's peons. Gepard has a plan. Time to activate the Automaton Stealth Bomb.

C: 你收到搏击俱乐部的主理人掘掘博士的信息，听说他的老板正在苦思冥想新的商业模式。\n他提到了「赚大钱」，有空的话就去找这位史考特聊聊吧。
E: Dr. Dig, the manager of the Fight Club, sends you a message, saying that his boss is trying to hatch a new business idea.\nHe also mentions "big money." Have a chat with Scott when you have the time.

C: 尽管你知道史考特是个见利忘义的黑心老板，但你没想到为了榨干科鲁泽的最后一丝商业价值，他竟然让科鲁泽独自前往铆钉镇寻找怪物…但以科鲁泽的伤势，但愿别出现什么意外才好。
E: You know Scott is nothing but a mercenary, but you didn't expect that he would send Kluzer to Rivet Town alone in order to extract the last drip of monetary value... You hope that Kluzer is fine even with his injuries.

C: 你突然收到了来自克拉拉的短信——这位胆怯的小女孩似乎希望向你寻求帮助。\n感叹短信中的克拉拉同现实中一样可爱之余，应她的要求前往机械聚落了解更多细节吧。
E: You suddenly receive a message from Clara — the shy little girl seems to be asking you for help.\nWhile you may admire how Clara is as cute in text as she is in person, do go to the robot settlement and get an understanding of the situation as she had requested.

C: 帕斯卡带领你与克拉拉来到了铆钉镇的废弃工作室「淬火工坊」。从帕斯卡破碎的词句中，你们拼凑出它行如此举动的部分动机。\n帕斯卡似乎是将此处当作了自己的「秘密基地」，并在这里日夜不停地维护整个铆钉镇。\n可帕斯卡的身上仍然还有许多谜团——在这「淬火工坊」中仔细调查，或许就能揭开谜底了。
E: Pascal led Clara and you to the abandoned workshop in Rivet Town, the Tempering Workshop. You piece together some of the motivations underlying Pascal's behavior from its broken speech.\nPascal seemed to have treated this place as its secret base and maintained the entire Rivet Town ceaselessly from here.\nBut there are still many mysteries surrounding Pascal — Perhaps a thorough investigation at the Tempering Workshop could solve the puzzle.

C: 根据《冒险鼹鼠队》的目录来看，<color=#dbc291ff>还有3个章节隐藏在边缘通路、铆钉镇、以及铁卫禁区。</color>找到了缺失的书页就能找到宝藏的线索，如果有什么不清楚的，还可以和尤利安再商量商量。一旦将它们收集齐后，就去找尤利安聊聊吧。
E: Based on the table of contents of The Adventurous Moles, there are still 3 chapters hidden at Backwater Pass, Rivet Town, and the Silvermane Guard Restricted Zone respectively. If you find these missing pages, you can find clues to the treasure. Ask Julian if you have any questions. Once you've collected everything, talk to Julian.

C: 娜塔莎与她住在上层区的养父母重新建立了沟通，希望能藉由他们在医界的人脉为下层区的病患谋取资源。\n你挑选好了花束，回去找娜塔莎聊聊吧——希望她能对你的选择感到满意。
E: Natasha has reconnected with her adoptive parents living in the Overworld, hoping that their network in the medical community could help the patients in the Underworld obtain more medical resources.\nYou have chosen a flower bouquet. Go back and talk to Natasha again. Hopefully, she will be satisfied.

C: 玲可似乎因为佩拉有些触动。她请求你陪她一起返回机械屋「永动」，且似乎有话想对自己的哥哥姐姐说。\n听听玲可究竟想说什么吧。
E: Lynx seems to be emotionally affected because of Pela. She asks you to go back to the Neverwinter workshop with her, and seems to have something to say to her siblings.\nListen to what Lynx has to say.

C: 工业展区的雕塑「齿轮与智慧」失窃了，没有这件关键的展品，工业区就无法对外开放。\n为了调查案件，佩拉请你和她一同前往机械聚落。准备好了就和她聊聊吧。
E: The sculpture Gears and Wisdom in the Industrial Exhibit was stolen. Without this key exhibit, the Industrial Exhibit cannot open to the public.\nTo investigate this case, Pela invited you to head to the Robot Settlement with her. Go speak to her once you're prepared.

C: 你找到了所有的标识，并将它们记录了下来，现在该将这些光印拓迹交给陶德了，或许这次他就能破解出他老师的失踪之谜了。
E: You've found all the markings and recorded them down. Now it's time to give the Optical Markings to Todd. Maybe this time he'll be able to solve the mystery of his teacher's disappearance.

C: 你收到司辰宫秘书夕葵的信息，听说了测速员檀檀策划了一个「仙舟测速员」的体验活动。\n据说统计交通流量很简单，有空的话就去找测速员檀檀聊聊吧。
E: There's a message from Secretary Xikui at the Palace of Astrum, who's heard that the speed tester Tantan is planning a trial program called Xianzhou Speed Tester.\nCounting vehicles is supposed to be easy. If you have the time, go find the speed tester Tantan for a chat.

C: 铖杰老师需要星槎的影像资料用作参考，帮他拍一张对应阶段的培养舱照片应该就可以了。\n青雀管照片叫作「绘影图形」，仙舟上还有很多这样熟悉又陌生的说法，你得学会适应它。
E: Chengjie requires a visual reference of a starskiff. Take a picture of an incubator in its corresponding phase.\nQingque calls these pictures "visiographs." There are probably more of these familiar-yet-foreign terminology used all over the Xianzhou, you should get used to them.

C: 你应该成功调低了「忧郁」情绪权重，现在应该是能好好说话了？试试吧，你还得把它带到小聪那里。\n你感觉到了，小聪很麻烦，它制造的机巧也很麻烦，接下来的事情也会很麻烦。\n但是你就是喜欢就解决麻烦，好，这里不允许否定。
E: You should have successfully lowered the "gloomy" emotional weight, and it should be able to speak normally. Give it a shot. You still have to bring it to Cong anyway.\nYou feel that Cong is a handful and the ingenia he made are also very troublesome. Moreover, what's coming up next thing will also be very problematic.\nBut you are someone who likes solving problems, that is the undeniable truth.

C: 看起来大善人们都倒大霉了，这下乐子可大了…啊不，我是说…这下可惨了。赶紧看看发生了什么吧。
E: Looks like the Benevolent Ones are all in serious trouble. That's gonna be a lot of fun... Oops, I meant... it's going to be bad. Go see what's going on.

C: 虽然浮烟似乎并不可信，但依照它的指示，你最终找到了藿藿。\n呃，如果此时一位判官也和你一样身坠幻境之中，那园子外面……算了，你决定不去想整个绥园的情况。因为毫无疑问，一定糟透了。
E: Cirrus seems unreliable, but following its instructions ultimately leads to Huohuo.\nWell, if even a Judge would be stuck in an illusion just like you did, then the garden must... No, you decide you don't want to think through whatever's happening in Fyxestroll Garden. Because without any doubt, it will be irredeemably dreadful.

C: 云璃答应你冷静下来，至少会与爷爷再聊一次，你明白她并不是喜欢向人解释自己做事缘由的人，能让她痛痛快快讲出来，也是你的本事。\n怀炎将军拜托你的事你办到了，现在回去跟他讲讲发生了什么吧。
E: Yunli promises to calm down and speak with her grandfather about it again. You know she's not one to explain herself, so you totally deserve a pat on your back for getting her to spill everything.\nNow that you've done what General Huaiyan asked of you, it's time to go back and tell him what happened.

C: 在彦卿的迎接下，你们回到了阔别…呃，也不算太久的罗浮仙舟，参加即将召开的演武仪典。\n在司辰宫中，将军静候你们的到来，这回他又将用什么差事「欢迎」列车的客人们呢？想想还有点小期待呢。
E: With Yanqing welcoming you, you returned to the Xianzhou Luofu, where you have been away for a — um, not a particularly long time — to participate in the upcoming Wardance.\nThe general awaits your arrival in the Palace of Astrum. What kind of task will he use to "welcome" the guests from the Express? Just thinking about it is making you feel the tiniest bit of flutter.

C: 柯柯娜似乎在往一个地方跑去，赶紧追上她看看发生了什么吧。
E: Cocona seems to be running towards a particular location. Catch up with her and see what has happened.

C: 现在，你已经是白日梦酒店的临时大堂经理了。\n准备工作似乎已经万全…不，还差一点。身为尊贵的大堂经理，你必须拥有无限的苏乐达畅饮权。
E: You are now the interim lobby manager of the Reverie.\nNow that everything is ready... Wait, something is still amiss. As the esteemed lobby manager, you need to secure your privilege for an unlimited supply of SoulGlad.

C: 忙碌如大堂经理也需要一些时间调整状态，缓和心情。\n等你准备好了就继续工作吧，客人不知道什么时候就会找上门来。
E: Even a busy lobby manager needs occasional breaks to relax and unwind.\nReturn to your work when you feel ready, as guests may arrive at any moment.

C: 你见证了天谴猎手的追忆，该如何形容这个故事？一场悲剧？一个误会？一段谎言？而她念诵那两个名字时的情感，是爱？是恨？还是只有疑虑？\n你为此探寻到最后，还是没能给出答案。\n他所爱慕的身体的鲜花要是凋谢了，他就会展翅离开，哪怕曾经说过很多的话，曾经有过深沉的承诺。
E: Having witnessed the Furiae Archer's memories, how would you describe this story? A tragedy? A misunderstanding? A lie? And the emotion in her voice when she pronounces those two names... Is it love? Hatred? Or simply confusion?\nHaving explored this story to its end, you still cannot find an answer for yourself.\nIf the flowers on the body that he so loves were to wither, he would sprout wings and fly away. It does not matter what sweet words he'd said before, or how deep a promise he had made.

C: 这场记忆的主人在陌生的城邦中生活着，感受着新的事物与自己的变化。这里有许多她从未见过的东西，就比如这场云石天宫的宴会——对悬锋人来说，法吉娜没什么好歌颂的，只有在纵欲畅饮的时候值得唱上两句。\n戏剧的过场有时也代表着岁月的流逝，有剧作家否认这种做法，提倡将时间、地点与人物统一，好让观众与舞台同调——但这样很难。
E: Living in this unfamiliar city, the master of this memory is experiencing new feelings and changes within themself. There are many things here that she has never seen before, just like this banquet at the Marmoreal Palace... To the Kremnoans, Phagousa is nothing worth singing about. They may simply throw them a passing mention when they indulge in heavy drinking.\nSometimes play interludes are used to represent the passage of time. Some playwrights criticize this approach, saying that time, location, and characters should be unified in order for spectators to resonate with the scene... But this is very difficult.

C: 不受束缚的观众在岁月与岁月之间跳跃，跳过她是如何压抑心中的顾虑，如何磨削旁人的冷眼，如何争得仇敌的接纳。她做了很多，终于成为了一名奥赫玛的臣民而非敌手或客人——但这真的是她想做的吗？\n是否和你一样，只是被任务目标一样的命运牵着走呢？\n戏剧的过场有时也代表着岁月的流逝，有剧作家否认这种做法，提倡将时间、地点与人物统一，好让观众与舞台同调——但这样很难。
E: Unbound, the spectators leap through time: Skipping past how it was that she suppressed the concerns in her heart, how she wore down the cold stares of those around her and how she won the acceptance of her former enemies. She has done so much to finally become a true subject of Okhema, as opposed to a guest or an enemy... But is this truly what she wants to do?\nIs she not the same as you, being blindly led along by fate towards her mission?\nSometimes play interludes are used to represent the passage of time. Some playwrights criticize this approach, saying that time, location, and characters should be unified in order for spectators to resonate with the scene... But this is very difficult.

C: 你的学生希拉竟是一名仿生人，你答应要教导她的也并非什么寻常知识，而是教她如何做人。
E: Your student, Sheila, is an android, and you're going to teach her how to act like a human.

C: 做好心理准备后，前往特殊地点与阿德勒碰头，询问「怪谈」究竟是什么。
E: After preparing yourself mentally, go to the special spot to meet up with Adler and ask about the "ghost story."

C: 听说阿德勒又打听到了新的「怪谈」。前往特殊地点与阿德勒碰头，询问这次的「怪谈」是什么。
E: Sounds like Adler has gotten hold of a new "ghost story." Meet up with Adler at the special spot and ask about the story this time.

C: 磐岩镇的小女孩阿丽娜似乎在为什么事烦恼，去找她聊聊看吧。
E: Alina, a girl in Boulder Town, is upset about something. Go talk to her.

C: 不甘落败的棋鬼又准备了新的「寻径指津」谜题，是时候让它输得心服口服了。
E: Unwilling to accept defeat, the Chess Ghost has prepared a new Pathfinder puzzle. It's time to make it acknowledge defeat gracefully.

C: 在机缘巧合下，你成了卜筮用具「雅努斯迷津」的辅祭。好人做到底，协助命运三相殿的祭司，完成一批积压的寻物委托吧。
E: By a twist of fate, you're now an acolyte of the divination tool — Janus' Maze. Since you've started, might as well help the priests of the Temple of the Three Fates finish their backlog of "lost and found" assignments.

C: 前一次经过这里时，通往另一方向的道路被铁球挡住了…现在再去看看，说不定会有新的发现？
E: When you were here before, the other path was blocked by an iron ball... Perhaps things have changed if you take another look?

C: 试着向布洛妮娅讨教一些管理学经验。
E: Ask Bronya about her managerial experiences.

C: 你设身处地为帕姆着想，再三挑选过后，你为帕姆买到了最适合帕姆喝的饮料（你认为）。不知道帕姆喝下去会有什么反应呢，帕姆会吧咂嘴吗？莫名地，你开始期待着帕姆的反应……
E: After placing yourself in Pom-Pom's shoes and giving the choices a lot of thought, you have bought the perfect drink (in your opinion) for Pom-Pom. What would Pom-Pom's reaction be when they drink it? Would Pom-pom smack their lips? You find yourself eagerly anticipating Pom-Pom's response...

C: 在你的帮助下佩佩脱离了危险，现在你和它联手探，你决定跟随它的步伐，继续前进……
E: Thanks to your help, Peppy is out of danger. You have decided to follow its lead and explore the area together...

C: 地衡司已经判明「模拟云吟术」是次元扑满所为，接下来你和地衡司决定展开「追猎行动」。\n地衡司以行医市集为陷阱布置饵食，希望由你抓住引起异象的扑满……
E: The Realm-Keeping Commission has ascertained that the "cloudhymn magic imitation" is a Warp Trotter's doing. Following this, you and the Realm-Keeping Commission have decided to go on a "hunt."\nThe Realm-Keeping Commission has placed baited traps all over Healer's Market, and they hope you can capture the Trotter causing the abnormalities...

C: 利用谛听穿越警戒区，尽可能不要惊扰敌人。
E: Use the Diting to cross the guard zone and try not to alert any enemies.

C: 现在，继续深入黎明云崖、向负世泰坦的所在进发吧。
E: Now, proceed further into Dawncloud toward the Worldbearing Titan.

C: 沿着站岗守卫的指引，你来到了抵抗黑潮的前线，却发现这里刚刚遭遇过怪物入侵。\n调查一下倒地的卫兵们是否还活着吧。
E: Following the stationed guards' directions, you arrive at the front line of the battle against black tide, only to find the area has just been overrun by monsters.\nCheck on the guards lying prone on the ground and see if any are still alive.

C: 之前驭空急匆匆地赶来救援晴霓，结果似乎将什么东西遗落在了迴星港。陪晴霓把她找回来吧，现在她俩之间关系紧张，也许这能成为母女二人破冰的关键。
E: When Yukong was rushing to rescue Qingni before, she seemed to have dropped something in Stargazer Navalia. Accompany Qingni to find it back. Since the relationship between the two of them is currently very tense, this can be the key to salvage the situation for the mother and daughter.

C: 银狼引起的风波终于告一段落，但伦纳德依旧忧心忡忡。\n为了空间站的网络安全，也为了保住这份工作，他请求你协助进行一项测试……
E: The troubles caused by Silver Wolf have abated, but Leonard still looks concerned.\nHe's asking for your help to carry out a task that will improve the space station's cybersecurity and help him keep his job...

C: 西衍先生是挖坑不填的惯犯，身为仙舟人民的老朋友，你有责任带着你的棒球棍前往星槎海执行正义的武装催更。
E: Mr. Xiyan is a frequent offender when it comes to not finishing his stories. As a good friend of the people of the Xianzhou, you have a duty to bring your bat with you to Starskiff Haven and demand updates with justice.

C: 在西衍先生的安排下，你要和这位「龙尊大人」搭戏，给这个传奇故事画上一个完美的句点。好在这位老戏骨，看起来稍微比西衍先生靠谱一些。
E: Under Mr. Xiyan's direction, you're going to be playing against this "high elder" and drawing a perfect conclusion for this legendary tale. Thankfully this old thespian seems a little more reliable than Mr. Xiyan.

C: 驭空告诉了你要「重组商会」的商户代表，如果能够说服霄老大，肯定能赢得不少商户的支持。\n霄老大是同功坊的店主，到那里去和霄老大聊聊吧。
E: Yukong told you that you need to "reassemble" the merchant guild's representatives. If you can convince Mr. Xiao, you'll win the support of many business owners.\nMr. Xiao is the owner of Artistry Hardware. Head there and speak with him.

C: 帮助商会完成码头营收的任务，建立商铺与商会的合作，规划合理的路线…这都将帮助金人巷实现复兴。\n金人巷商会通过码头运营赚取储值金，至少应该先挣到目标金额，帮助商会摆脱眼前的危机。
E: Help the merchant guild reach the dock's revenue goal, build up cooperation between the guild and the stores, plan reasonable routes... All these tasks will help revitalize Aurum Alley.\nThe Aurum Alley Merchant Guild accumulates funding through operating the docks. You should prioritize reaching the revenue goal and help the guild overcome their immediate crisis.

C: 为了重振金人巷，商会希望充分利用码头物流，与金人巷的商户们建立紧密的合作。\n商会派你来劝说「美馔阁」与商会建立合作关系。但「美馔阁」的老板矮阿姨此时却碰上了一些麻烦……
E: In order to revitalize Aurum Alley, the merchant guild aims to fully utilize the docks' logistics capacity and establish close collaborations with the stores in the alley.\nThe guild has sent you to persuade Short Auntie, owner of Delicacy Pavilion, to establish a partnership with the guild. However, Short Auntie has encountered some troubles at the moment...

C: 为了重振金人巷，商会希望充分利用码头物流，与金人巷的商户们建立紧密的合作。\n商会派你来劝说「清玩斋」与商会建立合作关系。但「清玩斋」的老板泊阳此时却碰上了一些麻烦……
E: In order to revitalize Aurum Alley, the merchant guild aims to fully utilize the docks' logistics capacity and establish close collaborations with the stores in the alley.\nThe guild has sent you to persuade Elegance Pagoda to establish a partnership with the guild. However, its proprietor Boyang has encountered some troubles at the moment...

C: 黑塔、阮•梅、螺丝咕姆和斯蒂芬，联手推出了模拟宇宙的第一次大更新！三个位面都在模拟宇宙中开启了。同时，黑塔想了点法子，让你通过「觐见之间」更快接近星神——这里以代码演算，模拟出历史上许多命途行者的行为，并将其封存了下来。你可以效仿他们，得到来自不同命途的「力量」——毕竟在行为中践行对「命途」的虔诚，才能够觐见星神。
E: Herta, Ruan Mei, Screwllum, and Stephen have joined forces to bring about the Simulated Universe's first major update! The three planes are now active within the Simulated Universe. At the same time, Herta had the idea to use the Audience Chamber to get you closer to the Aeons faster. Here, using computational data, she has simulated and saved instances of numerous Pathstriders across the span of history. You can imitate them to gain "power" from various Paths. After all, it is only through active practice of piety toward each of the Paths that one draws the attention of the Aeons.

C: 大矿区的试炼居然是用机器人引爆「托帕后援团」——当然这只是特效，并不会有人真受到伤害。爆炸乃艺术，不是吗？\n有时艺术需要开动脑筋，炸弹自然也需要小小的变体。
E: The trial of the Great Mine involves blowing up Topaz's Support Squad with robots, though as the explosions are rooted in special effects, no one actually risks getting hurt. Still, blowing things up is an art form, right?\nSometimes, art requires a bit more thinking, and explosions themselves might need some minor variations.

C: 你们完成了全部试炼，这座乐园的冠军候补却始终没有露面。究竟是谁这么神秘？\n不管怎么说，你们已经有资格对他发出挑战了。他总不可能对战时都戴个面具吧......
E: You have completed all the trials, but the championship contender still hasn't revealed themselves. Just who is your mysterious adversary?\nWhatever the case, you already have the right to issue your challenge. They can't continue to wear their mask when you fight, can they?

C: 《以太战线》的核心玩法便是「对决」——挑战不同的玩家，证明自己的实力吧！
E: The core gameplay loop behind Aetherium Wars is "dueling." Challenge different players and show your true strength!

C: 在景元将军的帮助下，你们顺利渡过了罗浮上下鲜为人知的「秘密危机」。捉鬼小队功劳不少，去问问寒鸦大人，看看她是怎么说的吧。
E: With General Jing Yuan's assistance, you have protected Luofu from the hidden peril that few are aware of. The ghost-hunting squad contributed quite a lot to it. Ask Madam Hanya about her thoughts on this matter.

C: 与你一同发现幽灵星槎的，还有另一位被传言吸引而来的天舶司少女。\n与狐人少女聊聊，搞清楚幽灵星槎出现的原因。
E: Another girl from the Sky-Faring Commission has been attracted by the rumor and finds the Phantom Starskiff at the same time as you do.\nTalk to the foxian girl to figure out why the starskiff has emerged.

C: 桂乃芬好像有什么事情要和捉鬼小队的各位商量……\n不妨听她讲讲，到底发生了什么新鲜事吧。
E: Guinaifen seems to have something she wants to discuss with the ghost-hunting squad...\nListen to her and find out what new incident has gone down.

C: 帮助辛格勒收集线索——它们应该就散落在神秘空间的战利品宝箱中。
E: Help Singler search for clues — they should be scattered in the mysterious space's treasure chest.

C: 反复出入谜一样的梦境空间后，你们终于收集齐了所有的线索。\n离开错乱的空间，和辛格勒一起为调查做个收尾吧。
E: After numerous entries and exits from the enigmatic Dreamscape spaces, you have finally gathered all the clues.\nLeave the chaotic space and join Singler in concluding the investigation.

C: 没想到遇到了舒翁和艾米绮。从她们的谈话内容来看，舒翁似乎打算返回家族。司令很沮丧，现在需要把这个消息告诉酒吧的其他怪物。
E: You didn't expect to see Siobhan and Amiky. From their conversation, it seems like Siobhan has plans to return to The Family. Mr. Bigwig becomes despondent. It is time to break this news to the other monsters in the lounge.

C: 《美梦往事》剧组接受了苏乐达企业的合作方案，筹备了一部名为《爱汽水的钟表小子》的广告片，去帮帮忙吧！
E: The Dreamjoy Memoir crew accepted the collaboration from SoulGlad Enterprise and planned a commercial named Bubbly Clockie. Go help them!

C: 《美梦仙踪》的拍摄开始了，按目标完成拍摄任务吧！\n优秀的镜头要尽量让所有演员都入镜哦。
E: Filming for Dreamjoy Ascension has started. Complete filming missions according to the goals!\nA good shot needs to include all the actors in the frame.

C: 第二次选择！你和流萤来到了「戏梦奇战•枪火时间•枪火的试炼」的舞台。根据引导员的说法，你们将扮演钟表小子动画系列亦正亦邪、充满魅力的形象——哈努兄弟。\n「这到底是要比什么？」你想，「比谁的『哼』更酷吗？」
E: The second choice! You and Firefly arrive at the Dreamplay Fantasia — Gunfire Time: Gunfire Trial arena. According to the guide's instructions, you need to play the role of the evil-retributing, charisma-overflowing character from the Clockie series — Brother Hanu.\n"What is this competition supposed to be about?" You wonder. "Are we trying to see who has the coolest 'hmph'?"

C: 第二次选择！你和流萤来到了「戏梦奇战•枪火时间•时间的试炼」的舞台。根据引导员的说法，你们将与钟表小子动画系列中广受欢迎的角色——钟表小子——一道，突破重重难关，最终……\n…帮助这位并非真正的钟表小子的钟表小子克服与生俱来的存在主义危机。游戏也可以很深刻，不是吗？
E: The second choice! You and Firefly arrive at the Dreamplay Fantasia — Gunfire Time: Time Trial stage. According to the guide's instructions, you need to play the role ever-popular protagonist from the Clockie series — Clockie. Smash through the final obstacles together...\n...Help this inauthentic Clockie overcome an existential crisis. The game can also be rather profound, can't it?

C: 终极挑战就在眼前，但周围似乎发生了一些奇怪的事情。
E: The final showdown is just ahead. But strange things are happening around you.

C: 罗浮请纯美骑士当嘉宾，实在是一步妙棋。\n首先，他们长得好看，门票卖得非常好。其次，他们的战斗技巧和道德水准都很高，绝对不会误伤选手。第三，他们基本算是出家人，不太在乎出场费，很实惠。\n说起来，银枝真的特别欣赏卢卡。可能因为他们长得有点像。
E: The Luofu made a great call to invite the Knights of Beauty as guests.\nFirstly, they all look good, so the tickets sell like hotcakes. Secondly, they have both outstanding martial prowess and peerless morals, so they would never accidentally hurt their opponent. Thirdly, they're basically monastic monks and do not care much for the invitation fee, making them very cost-effective.\nNow that you think about it, Argenti really does take a liking to Luka. Maybe it's because they look similar.

C:
接下来的竞锋守擂，是属于波提欧的决赛。
卢卡想去看看这位曾给他带来心理阴影的选手，陪他一起去吧。
题外话——也许你还对波提欧在赛场上的行为有些不爽？
别担心，那场比赛结束后，银枝专门跑到波提欧的住处对他进行了长达三个时辰的思想教育。后者最后不得不动用了「江湖智慧」，才成功脱身。
他已经在好好反省了。
E:
The next Ringmaster's Challenge match is Boothill's finale.
Luka wants to watch the fight of this contestant who once gave him great trauma. Go with him to watch it.
By the way — Are you perhaps still upset at what Boothill did in the arena?
Don't worry. Argenti specifically went to Boothill's lodgings after that match and gave him a 6-hour lecture, and Boothill had to use his "street smarts" to get away.
The cowboy is already reflecting on his actions.

C: 相信他们吧，这可是{NICKNAME}的第一次「开拓」任务，没有点压力和波折，怎么能成为青春的回忆呢？
E: Have faith in them. Besides, this is {M#his}{F#her} first Trailblazing expedition. How will {M#he}{F#she} be able to look back fondly without a few twists and turns?

C: 哎呀，说这干嘛，扫兴。
E: Ugh, what am I talking about this for? Way to get everyone down, huh.

C: 旅程的目的也很明确：找到给这个世界带来灾厄、并造成了空间扭曲的「星核」，把它带回列车——后面的事就都交给我们吧。
E: The objective is clear: Find the Stellaron responsible for the disaster and the spatial distortions, and bring it back to the Express. We'll deal with the rest.

C: 哎呀，他一直都是那副装酷的样子，你不用太在意啦。
E: *sigh* That's our Dan Heng — always trying to look cool with his poker face. Don't mind him~

C: 停！
E: Stop!

C: 丹恒乘客，改变主意打算下车了吗？
E: You want to disembark, Dan Heng? Changed your mind?

C: 星核猎手声称一颗星核在仙舟「罗浮」上爆发了，而列车离它很近。如果我们前往罗浮，可能有机会拯救许多无辜者的生命。
E: Our Stellaron Hunter claims that a Stellaron burst has occurred on the Xianzhou Luofu, and that we're in the vicinity. If we head for the Luofu, we may have the chance to save many innocent lives.

C: 复读机吗？
E: Is it stuck on repeat?

C: 不是吧，他的过去这么黑暗吗？
E: Huh? Is his past really that dark?

C: 什么时候能抵达裴迦纳呢？
E: When will we get to Pegana?

C: 结合我的分析和猜测，那位大守护者恐怕在早年就遭受了「星核」的精神侵蚀——此后发生的一切悲剧都滥觞于此。
E: What I've gathered so far suggests it's likely that the supreme guardian was corrupted by the Stellaron at a very young age. All the tragedies that came after can be traced to that point...

C: 他一定不需要忙碌于复杂的工作吧，不然这个半吊子的屏幕怎么提供硬件支持？
E: I don't think he is busy with very complicated work, otherwise, how could this broken screen be of much use?

C: 我不记得了。
E: I don't remember.

C: 你找到他了啊…阿兰他知道这电梯怎么回事吗？
E: You found him! Will he know what to do about this elevator?

C: 不用想太多。
E: Don't overthink this.
You...

C: 这几张光锥的来路是正当的，我只能说到这里。你们先带上吧，它对战斗很有帮助。
E: They were acquired legitimately, that's all I can say. Take them, they're very useful in combat.

C: 艾丝妲站长！我们回来啦！
E: Asta! We're back!

C: 科员的安抚就拜托你们了。
E: I'll leave the reassurance of the researchers in your hands.

C: 为什么偏偏在我负责期间，电离网被怪物突破了……
E: Why did those monsters have to breach the ionizing grid on my watch...

C: 哼，这事是没发生在你身上，我可呆不住！
E: Hmph... it's easy for you to say! This didn't happen on your watch, you wouldn't understand!

C: 现在，我们所有科员都聚集到这里避难。但说真的，有没有人考虑过，空间站那些非人生物怎么办？
E: We researchers have all taken refuge here, but has anyone given any thought to the non-human life on this space station?

C: 历史？古恩，空间站面对如此大的动荡，我还是第一次看见。
E: History? Gunn, this is the first time I have witnessed the space station in such disarray.

C: 噗，天才俱乐部…
E: Heh, Genius Society...

C: 我还有别的问题…
E: I still have some questions...

C: 沉闷的话题就聊到这里吧。空间站里发生的变故太多，想必你也累了。
E: But I won't bore you any longer. So much happened at the space station, you must be tired.

C: 我不是…唉……
E: Y'know, I'm not... *sigh*

C: 真的假的？我自己一次都还没有成功过呢！
E: Really? I've never been able to do it successfully myself!

C: 三月七的床，直觉上应该比丹恒的地铺舒服。
E: March 7th's bed. Intuition tells you that should be comfier than Dan Heng's.

C: 是想靠这玩意抵御寒潮吗？
E: Is this how they repel the Eternal Freeze?

C: 说不定那群「筑城者」是想靠这些加热器抵御寒潮呢！
E: *gasp* Maybe this is how the Architects repel the Eternal Freeze!

C: 嗐，被你这么一说，感觉有点吓人……
E: *gasp* Do you have to put it like that? That's scary...

C: 铁卫能控制局面吗？
E: Are the Guards able to control the situation?

C: 我没事，走吧。
E: I'm okay. Let's go.

C: 没兴趣，我缺时间不缺钱！
E: Ha, not interested — I need time, not money!

C: …还是我来吧，你怕不是要讲到明天。
E: ...Perhaps I should do it, or we'll still be here tomorrow.

C: 「星核」的存在，贝洛伯格没几个人知道；就算知道有这么个东西，也不会把它跟裂界和寒潮的源头扯到一起。
E: Only a very few people in Belobog know of the existence of the Stellaron. Those that do would never associate it with the Fragmentum or Eternal Freeze.

C: 杰帕德会去铁卫禁区吗？
E: Is Gepard going to the Silvermane Guard Restricted Zone?

C: 毕竟军队里现在只剩烦心事儿了，我还惹上了不该惹的大人物——我也不知道该不该继续待在技术部…唉。
E: I mean, there's nothing but chores left for me in the military right now, and also, I messed with some big-wigs that I shouldn't have. I don't know if I should stay in the Technology Division anymore... ugh.

C: 这下又没头绪了啊…{NICKNAME}，你还有什么想法吗？
E: I'm out of ideas now... {NICKNAME}, what do you think?

C: 完了…别说普通市民了，就算是铁卫也很难踏足那片裂界，更别说到里面去找东西了。
E: Uh oh... Even for the Guards, it is difficult to set foot in the Fragmentum, let alone ordinary citizens like us, especially if you want to go searching around inside.

C: …那就是隔绝了上下层区十余年的封锁令。随着时间的推移，她开始认识到自己的决策带来的严重后果…她虽心存愧疚，却早已无法回头。
E: ...The order to seal off the Underworld from the Overworld. With the passage of time, she gradually came to realize the consequences of that decision... Although tortured with guilt, she could not undo the damage.

C: …但我渴求你们的合作。因为我们都十分清楚…缺少了你们的坚毅和汗水，贝洛伯格的复兴将无从谈起…文明的存续也将无从谈起。
E: But I want us to work together. We know that without your perseverance and hard work, Belobog will not recover its former glory... and the seed of civilization will not be preserved.

C: 不过是在用表面美好的话术编织谎言而已。希望你永远不用经历这些，三月。
E: It was all just a bunch of palatable lies. I hope you never have a similar experience, March.

C: 但那声音稍纵即逝。你尝试着回溯到记忆的前一帧，却发现手中的胶片已经被切断了，切口干净利落，不留任何痕迹。
E: But the voice passes rapidly. You try to recall what you saw in those fleeting moments, but find no trace.

C: 再说了，贝洛伯格难得变得这么热闹，你们就不想再多找人聊聊天吗？我反正还没待够呢！
E: Besides, don't you want to chit-chat with the locals now that Belobog is full of life again? I know I do!

C: …歌蒂？是歌蒂，对吧？
E: ...Gertie? It's Gertie, right?

C: 顺便一提，这位…「玲宝」，是朗道家年纪最小的妹妹。
E: And "little Lynxy" is the youngest sister of the Landau family, by the way...

C: 不过在你离开之前，我还有最后一事相求——戍卫队近期要去下层区一趟，勘察磐岩镇周边的情况。你也跟我一起去吧。
E: But before you leave, I have one last request to make. The Garrison is heading down to the Underworld soon to survey the situation around Boulder Town. Why don't you come with me?

C: 既然你横竖都要走，不如在那之前再帮城里的人民一个忙。
E: Since you're leaving one way or the other, why don't you do the people of the city one last favor before you go?

C: 我还以为你会带大部队过来呢。
E: What about the rest of the Garrison?

C: 哎？慢着，我可不想被你当成不靠谱的人啊……
E: Huh? Hold up, I wasn't that late...

C: 「你」的一只眼睛是假的，装着冷凝地髓液做成的假眼球；
E: One of "your" eyes is a fake eyeball made of condensed Geomarrow fluid.

C: 作为星穹列车的一员，你很优秀，你知道别人的行李属于他人财产，神圣而不可侵犯。
E: As a member of Astral Express, you are well-mannered and respectful. You know that other people's luggage is their sacred and inviolable property.

C: 文件堆成了小山，真的很不环保。
E: A mound of piled-up documents. What happened to being environmentally conscious?

C: 拿出来。
E: Take it out.

C: 信封上写着：行政区，六号街，三十五栋B<unbreak>03</unbreak>室，卡尔•艾尔先生收。
E: The envelope reads: To Carl Eyre, Room B<unbreak>03</unbreak>, Building <unbreak>35</unbreak>, 6th Street, Administrative District.

C: 一个大的出奇的纸团，展开后是几张七皱八褶的纸片。
E: An unusually large paper ball. Upon unfolding, you find it contains wrinkled scraps of paper.

C: 错字救人一命。
E: A few typos away from a new career...

C: 冲锋！
E: Chaaaarge!

C: 既然有事相求，顺手帮个忙应该不算过分吧？
E: And seeing as you need that helping hand, it wouldn't be too much to ask you to lend one here first, right?

C: 矿队、还有「地火」的各位，还是不理解史瓦罗先生的初衷…要是我们能为大家多做些事……
E: The mining team and Wildfire... they don't understand your actions... If only we could do more for them...

C: 或者交出他的记忆库，我们自己找也行。
E: Or get him to hand over his memory bank. We could go through it ourselves.

C: 什么啊，抓住了就是抓住了，你还真的想答题啊？
E: Wha—! But we caught you! What's with the Q&A?

C: 不好，要出事！
E: That doesn't sound good!

C: 最后他终于完成了梦想，在地上最黄金的地段开了自己的分店。
E: He eventually realized his dream and opened a hotel branch in the most expensive area on the surface.

C: 不必担心我的安全，「地火」的奥列格保证不会伤害我。我相信他那样的人会说到做到。去休息吧。
E: You don't need to worry about me. Oleg guaranteed that I wouldn't be harmed. He seemed like a man of his word. Go and rest.

C: 这得问丹恒。
E: You'd better ask Dan Heng.

C: 他是你们的领袖吗？感觉他不管做什么事，都很笃定。
E: Is he your leader? I feel he possesses a great stillness of mind in everything he does.

C: 从记事起，我每天的生活都在读书、礼教、训练中循环。
E: For as long as I can remember, my days have been an endless cycle of studying, etiquette lessons, and training.

C: 你小时候也在这里看过风景吗？
E: So... did you come to this spot when you were a child?

C: 她没带桑博不也走了？
E: She left without Sampo?

C: 既然约好了，我们在铆钉镇里见！虎克会到安全的地方等你的，可不许不来哦！
E: Let's agree to meet in Rivet Town! I'll be waiting for you in a safe spot. You're not allowed to not come!

C: 确实，等她拿到奖品以后，那家伙立马就回归本性了。
E: Of course, as soon as she got her award, she went straight back to her old self.

C: 其实「菌菌」的眼睛是宝石。
E: Junjun's eyes are precious gems.

C: 突然不想卖了？
E: You don't want to sell him all of a sudden?

C: 哼，好奇就自己来买票看，看不出来就别怪自己没眼力劲儿。
E: Hmph, if you're curious, then buy a ticket and see for yourself. If you still can't tell how strong they are, don't blame me.

C: 观众想要的是刺激，懂吗？刺激！感官上的冲击，视觉上的刺激，我得找一帮懂观众喜好的拳手才行！
E: Audiences want excitement. Excitement! Sensory feast, visual stimuli. I need someone who can stand in the ring and knows what the audience wants!

C: 没有了，我到旁边逛逛。
E: No, I'll have a look around.

C: 重建团结、稳定的贝洛伯格…有这对姐弟帮忙，再加上布洛妮娅姑娘，听上去也不像天方夜谭嘛。
E: With the help of Bronya, Serval, and Gepard, we're one step closer to rebuilding a united Belobog.

C: 磐岩镇的防御工事还有劳「地火」进行组织。请保证后方安全，同时接收从前线返回的伤员。
E: The defense of Boulder Town will need Wildfire's expertise. Watch out for ambushes and be ready to receive wounded soldiers.

C: 只是…看着其他人在为了生存拼命，而我却在盘算着该怎么逃离这里…多少有些负罪感。
E: It's just... I see people fighting for their lives and here I am thinking about how to escape... I feel guilty about that.

C: 你现在还小，所以需要姐姐的保护，这很正常。但等你长大以后，一定不要忘记姐姐为你付出的一切…你也要学会用自己的力量保护家人。
E: You're still young, so you need to stay under your sister's wing. But when you grow up, remember to use what you've learned to protect her.

C: 他们分别是独立自主比男孩子更厉害的贝琪，擅长发明创造的卡宾，还有身强体壮的帕瓦！
E: There's Becky, who is so independent and much cooler than boys; Carbine, who is good at invention and crafting; and Pava, who is strong!

C: 求求你了。
E: Please.

C: 没错没错，等我长大了，就太晚了！
E: Correct, it'll be too late by the time I grow up!

C: 垃圾箱沉默不语，庞然巨物温柔地注视着你。
E: The dumpster remains silent. This hunk of junk gazes gently at you.

C: 地髓，这颗行星现今为数不多的可用能源。在上下封锁以后，只有这种矿石依然有权返回地上。
E: Geomarrow, one of the few still-usable energy sources on this planet. After the blockade was implemented, only this type of ore was allowed to return to the Overworld.

C: 你仿佛听到内心深处传来一个阴沉的声音：「何必浪费时间？」随后，另一个甜蜜的声音报以回应：「是啊是啊！」你不知道声音来自何方，但他们无疑很快达成了共识，并帮你做了决定。
E: You hear a deep voice resonating deep within your heart. "Why waste the effort?" Another voice follows, "That's right!" You don't know where the voices come from, but they undoubtedly arrived at the same conclusion and made the decision for you.

C: 星际和平公司将与混沌医师开展合作，为陷入精神危机中的世界提供医疗救助。
E: To address the mental health emergencies plaguing various worlds, the IPC has announced a partnership with the Doctors of Chaos to provide medical assistance.

C: 难不成仙舟也要在旅馆下手…
E: Let me guess, they're gonna put us up in a hotel first...

C: 亲口谢绝各位。
E: ...and politely decline your proposal.

C: …你真的是将军吗？
E: ...Are you really a general?

C: 杨叔觉得有古怪？
E: Do you think there's something strange about him?

C: 哦？我想听听你的看法。
E: Oh? Care to elaborate?

C: 什么看法？「天道昭邈，人心幽微」，你要我给这几位卜一卦，占测来意吉凶么？
E: What do I make of it? "The way of heaven is apparent, but the heart of humanity is often deceptive." Are you asking me to divine their true intentions?

C: 哼，那你倒是早些退位啊。
E: Hmph, why don't you retire early and I use my discretion full-time?

C: 卡芙卡撑着伞，意味着通信时她所在的地方正巧被人工雨云覆盖。
E: If Kafka was holding an umbrella, that means she was in an area with artificial rainfall during the transmission.

C: 也许他们另有妙法呢？哈，太卜司的内务，我一个小小接渡使如何知晓～
E: Maybe there's more to it? It's not like I would know, I'm a mere Amicassador.

C: …所以罗刹只是我在仙舟的常用名。仙舟以外的地方，我有个更拗口的名字。我猜你也想问这个吧？
E: ...Therefore, Luocha is just the name I use at Xianzhou. Outside of Xianzhou, I use something more difficult to pronounce. I'm guessing you want to know that name, too?

C: 我看看…哇，罗刹！你眼神真好！
E: Let me see... Whoa, Luocha! You've got sharp eyes!

C: 嗯嗯。它说港口风急，要用气味追踪可不容易。
E: Got it. He says the wind is too strong here at the port, so it's not easy to follow the scent.

C: 上面写着「廿四协会由<unbreak>23</unbreak>人组成，成立的目的，就是在每个月的二十四号，凑一桌人去吃至味盛苑的德悦全席」。
E: The invitation reads: The Club of the Twenty-Four, consisting of <unbreak>23</unbreak> people, is aimed to taste the set menu Virtue and Delight at the Garden of Gourmet every month on the <unbreak>24</unbreak>.

C: 琼实鸟串——
E: Berrypheasant skewers —

C: 手雷？哇！沾了什么东西——噫，是口红……
E: Agh! Is that a grenade? What's that on the side... Huh? It's lipstick...

C: 可让我们好等啊。
E: You kept us waiting alright.

C: 好吧，虽然太卜这回没有说「请」，但谁教这个忙只有咱们能帮。{NICKNAME}，杨叔，我说的对吧？
E: Fine. I didn't hear a "please," but seeing as we do kinda have superpowers around here... {NICKNAME}, Mr. Yang, what do you think?

C: 杨叔，你见多识广，刚才到底发生了什么？！
E: Mr. Yang, you're smart. What happened just now!?

C: 盔甲上留有刀剑的斫痕，令人惊诧的是，这些斫痕全都来自死者自己的武器。
E: Its armor is covered in sword marks. But the strange thing is that these marks all came from the deceased's own weapon.

C: 别动，让我好好瞧瞧……
E: Don't move. Let me have a look...

C: 那就释放吧，「魔阴身」……
E: Don't resist. Let the mara strike you...

C: 你还不能走，因为你的列车朋友们正在「鳞渊境」里等你呢。咱们一同去见见吧？
E: You cannot leave yet — your Astral Express friends are waiting for you in Scalegorge Waterscape. Shall we go and see them together?

C: 想走吗？那就趁现在吧。
E: Do you want to leave? Then do it now.

C: 那么，前往鳞渊境的船就在岸边，请您登上它吧。
E: It seems you already made your decision. There is a vessel bound for Scalegorge Waterscape located ahead.

C: 我会牵制住他，丹恒，扫清她所造的污秽！
E: I'll restrict her movements — Dan Heng, clear her creations!

C: 我知道。看到四人离去，三人返回，我就明白符玄送来的战报说的都是真的。
E: Yes, I have heard. Seeing four leave, yet only three return, was enough for me to know that Fu Xuan's report was indeed correct.

C: 为仪式准备的星槎都已备妥了。各位，将停云的纪念物放上星槎吧。
E: The starskiff is ready for the ceremony now. Everyone, please place your objects aboard the starskiff.

C: 这一回，咱们不用再争个高下了。去吧，飞去更远的世界吧。
E: This time, we needn't compete. Go, fly on to other distant worlds.

C: 与丹恒先生交手后，自觉技艺还不够精深，要是{NICKNAME}有空赐教……
E: After fighting Dan Heng, I feel like my skills are lacking somewhere. If you have any time to coach me...

C: 什么无名客？
E: What Nameless?

C: 仙舟的事不用在意，匹诺康尼并非我们旅途的最后一站，来日方长，等到收拾妥当，我自然会赶上你们的。
E: Pay no mind to the matters concerning the Xianzhou. Penacony isn't the final stop on our trip. We have plenty of time. Once everything is packed up, I will naturally catch up with all of you.

C: 你落下东西了吗？快去快回，我在这里等你～
E: You left something behind? Hurry up and go get it, I'll wait here for you!

C: 「谐乐大典」的舞台只属于你，妹妹。
E: The Charmony Festival's stage belongs only to you, little sister.

C: 我不知道。
E: I don't know.

C: 不，这是我们第一次见面。
E: No, this is the first time we've met.

C: 所以坐下来聊聊吧——于情于理，我都有这个资格，不是么？
E: So sit down, and let's have a chat. With everything said and done, I think I deserve at least this much, right?

C: 哦对了，临走前，咱们再玩个游戏吧。很简单，猜猜筹码在我哪只手里——就当是认识一下，好让你更了解我这人的性格，和做事方式……
E: Oh yes, before I go, let's play another game — a simple game, to get to know each other better. You just have to guess which hand the chip is hiding in. It'll help you get a better grasp on my personality, and the way I do things...

C: 是啊，酒店的预订信息里似乎没有你的名字……
E: Yes, your name isn't on the hotel's reservation list...

C: 够正直，我喜欢！你这个朋友我交定了——拿着，<unbreak>20000</unbreak>信用点！
E: How upright, I like you! I must have you as a friend — here, <unbreak>20,000</unbreak> credits!

C: 这是我的房间啊。
E: This is my room.

C: 刚才的声音是…
E: What was that sound just now...

C: 是一段谐乐。
E: It was a song with a harmonic tune.

C: 来世…往生……
E: See you... in the next life...

C: 也许您已经在梦境护照里阅读过了，但我可以再为您介绍一遍！
E: You've perhaps read about it in your Dreamscape Pass, but I can explain one more time!

C: 啊…该不会是前一位住客遗留的垃圾吧……
E: Ah... It wasn't trash left behind by the previous guest, was it...?

C: 这是要我自己给祂配音？
E: Do I have to do the voiceover for Akivili myself?

C: （好的！正在为您复现……）
E: (Splendid! I'm rendering it as we speak...)

C: 咳咳。别得意，我还没报完菜名呢帕！
E: Ahem. Don't get carried away just yet. This is only the beginning of your list of culinary offenses!

C: 你潜入哈衣艾怡邦立动物园，用列车组半个琥珀纪的预算买下二百五十只鼻行兽幼崽，将它们豢养在洗手间内令其无限增殖，导致大量污水灌满其他车厢——
E: You sneaked into the Hyai'i Zoo and splurged half an Amber Era's crew budget on <unbreak>250</unbreak> Nosewalker cubs. You kept them in the restroom, where they were left to breed and multiply uncontrollably, causing other carriages to be filled with sewage...

C: 太贵了，你不如去抢！
E: The price tag is off the charts. You might as well go rob a bank!

C: 真的非常感谢你！
E: Thank you so much!

C: 不客气，毕竟你帮了我大忙嘛！
E: Glad to hear that. After all, you just did me a huge favor!

C: 我消费水平有点高…
E: I should warn you, I do have very expensive tastes...

C: 没人知道他究竟是什么来历，但人人都想复现他的成功，成为下一个钟表匠！
E: The true story is anyone's guess, but everyone aspires to emulate his success and be the next Watchmaker!

C: 呀…怎么啦，已经玩够了吗？
E: What do you say? Ready to call it a day?

C: 还不错，这里的一切都很梦幻。
E: It's nice. Everywhere is just magical.

C: 你怎么不试试？
E: Why don't you try it yourself?

C: 所以，{NICKNAME}为什么变成这样了……
E: So, how did {NICKNAME} turn into that...

C: 为您解释一下，这是本店面向资深客人的服务：您可以将近期体验过的梦境交给我，辅以相关的情绪原型，即可制成可重复体验的个性化梦泡。
E: This is a service we offer to our long-time customers. You can submit dreams you've recently had to me. With the relevant emotion prototypes, I'll be able to turn them into customized dream bubbles that can be experienced repeatedly.

C: 没问题——爱德华医生竭诚为您服务！
E: No problem! Dr. Edward is happy to help you when you're ready!

C: 我…是向你隐瞒了一些事……
E: There are things... I'm hiding from you...

C: 不会是幻觉吧…
E: I'm not hallucinating... right?

C: <size=36>您开心就好！</size>
E: <size=36>Your happiness is our priority!</size>

C: 嘿，他好像变正常了——太好了！你成功了！
E: Hey, he seems normal now. That's wonderful! You did it!

C: 噢，灰色的朋友！你一定要告诉他，是石头老板干的好事！
E: Oh, my gray friend! You have to tell him that {RUBY_B#Boss}Stone{RUBY_E#} is behind this!

C: 我也想问这个…到底发生了什么？
E: I was wondering about that too... What happened back there, exactly?

C: 朋友，你怎么了？
E: Ok, buddy, what's gotten into you?

C: …什么人？！
E: ...Who's there!?

C: 唉…究竟是为什么呢？
E: Alas... Why did I do that?

C: 祂是我等的王，也是世间一切废料的牧人。他立于王座上，扶持谦卑的桶，压制强暴的桶；祂是贝洛伯格的墙基，稳固我等的桶盖，坚直我等的桶身……
E: He's our king, as well as the manager of all the waste in this world. Perched on his throne, he uplifts trashcans that are humble and suppresses those that are violent. He's the cornerstone of Belobog, the lid that secures us, the barrel that reinforces us.

C: 何不与我一起对抗塔塔洛夫？
E: Why not stand with me against Tatalov?

C: 你说话好像纯美骑士团…
E: You talk like a Knight of Beauty...

C: 这群星核猎手…竟然在匹诺康尼也有布局，真是纠缠不休！
E: Those Stellaron Hunters... They even factored Penacony into their plan! Nowhere's safe from them!

C: 谢谢你，{NICKNAME}…真的很感谢。
E: Thank you, {NICKNAME}... I'm truly grateful.

C: 抱歉，可以再给我几分钟吗？
E: Sorry, but could you give me a few more minutes?

C: 从这些只言片语推断，流萤的同行者中途背叛，把她一个人关在这个房间，而自己不知所踪…为什么？
E: Based on these fragmented pieces of information, it seems Firefly's companion betrayed her halfway and trapped her alone in this room, disappearing without a trace... But why?

C: 这些东倒西歪的小可怜……
E: These poor little things stumbling about...

C: 这个方向——请跟我来。
E: This way, follow me.

C: 他们有什么底气这样言之凿凿？因为这承诺的背后是「同谐」的庇佑：家族的筑梦师们将思想连缀成一，构建起坚不可破的安全防线。
E: What gives them the confidence to make such conclusive statements? Because behind this promise is the Harmony: The Family's Dreamweavers link up their minds together to construct an unbreakable defensive line.

C: 就这？
E: That's it?

C: 用穷举法解题并不能证明你有多高明。<color=#dbc291ff>侧面的房间</color>，别让我强调第二次。
E: Solving a problem by brute force doesn't prove your intelligence. <color=#dbc291ff>The side room</color> — don't let me repeat myself.

C: 总算能安静一会儿了。
E: Finally, a moment of peace.

C: 流光忆庭…
E: The Garden of Recollection...

C: 原来你们认识…{NICKNAME}，你怎么到哪都能遇见揍过的人啊？
E: So you know each other... {NICKNAME}, why do you keep running into people you've beaten up before?

C: 唉，人类总是无法互相理解的……
E: Humans will never understand one another...

C: 闭嘴。我可没允许你说话，茨冈尼亚的鬣狗。
E: Silence. I didn't give you permission to speak, you Sigonian hound.

C: 效果太差劲，一开始是个长满眼睛的怪物照你肚子来了一刀，之后除了能模模糊糊地看到点高楼和灯光，就只剩下天旋地转了，差点给我晕吐出来……
E: The effects were awful. First, some monster covered in eyes stabs you in the gut, and then all you see are blurry glimpses of buildings and lights. The sky was spinning so fast it almost made me puke...

C: 朋友，别激动。我只是想向你打听件事。
E: Oh, it's not much. I just want to ask you something.

C: 你想和我聊聊？可以，但不许涉及敏感话题。
E: You want to talk to me? Sure, but nothing too sensitive, okay?

C: …真的是指「知更鸟」么？
E: ...Did you really mean Robin?

C: 我永远忘不了，当米哈伊尔带着我在梦境的荒野中策马飞驰时，忆质的流风中就裹着这种味道。那段时光令人魂牵梦萦…美得太不真实。
E: I'll never forget the flavor that danced on my tongue as Mikhail whisked me through the Dreamscape wilderness. Those were haunting times... too beautiful to be real.

C: 各位呢，可还满意？
E: So, are you satisfied?

C: 「死亡」完全消灭了她…
E: "Death" eradicated her...

C: 一段时间后……
E: Some time later...

C: 哈努努解放了边陲监狱，但没来得及看见和平就走了。贫瘠的资源，虎视眈眈的外部，离心离德的各大监区…阿斯德纳的未来依旧岌岌可危。
E: Hanunue freed the frontier prison, but peace still eluded him. With limited resources, threats from the outside world, and internal conflicts between major prison districts, the future of Asdana was uncertain.

C: 但我确实是叛徒，不是背叛家族，而是背叛了…米哈伊尔。
E: But I am indeed a traitor. Not to The Family, but to... Mikhail.

C: 你不知道有多少人盼着你永远闭上眼睛。身为奴隶，你不该反抗主人的…可你却把那个男人干掉了。
E: You don't know how many people long for your eyes to be closed forever. As a servant, you should not resist your master... Yet you went and killed that man anyway.

C: 女士，我已得到了想要的——被带到你的面前，开启下一场豪赌。
E: Madam, I already have what I want — to be brought before you, for the next high-stakes gamble.

C: 这只是个诱饵。
E: This is just bait.

C: 难道你真的相信「风险越大，回报越高」？看不出你对公司如此忠诚啊。
E: Do you truly believe that the greater the risk, the greater the rewards? I wouldn't have guessed you'd be so loyal to the IPC.

C: 是啊。可惜人不可能一辈子只做正确的决定…虽然好运总是站在你这边。
E: Yes. Alas, people won't make all the right choices in their lifetime... Though luck always seems like it's on your side.

C: 只有一个皮皮西…不对，小孩子？
E: Just a Pepeshi... No, a child?

C: …反正不是我。
E: ...It's not going to be me anyway.

C: <size=36>匹诺康尼有史以来最惊奇、最盛大的表演即将开幕——</size>
E: <size=36>The most wondrous, most magnificent show in Penacony's history is about to begin...</size>

C: 真是姗姗来迟啊，星穹列车的各位，还有这边的…「不速之客」。
E: Astral Express, you're late, and this... "unsought guest."

C: 所以…这就是我的终点，死后之地？
E: So... Is this my final destination, the land of the dead?

C: 犹豫…当然。但我只能相信我的好运。
E: Wavered? Of course I have. But I can only bank on my own good fortune.

C: 可这个男人不一样，他活在当下。每个沉沦的夜晚，每次孤注一掷，他的梦中从未出现明日的模样。
E: But this man is different. He lives and breathes in the present. In every sinking night, by every daring gamble, no vision of morrow ever graced his dreams.

C: ——你这个混账，该死的丧家犬，为什么要杀了她？！
E: ...You devil! You wretched, despicable dog, why did you kill her!?

C: 就生活在阴影中这点，我们应该没有区别。至少在和别人对话时，你应该现出本貌……
E: Speaking of living in the shadows, there's probably not much difference between us. It's only polite to reveal your true self, at least when speaking to others...

C: 它的未来是一片「虚无」，就和所有溺亡在{RUBY_B#「虚无」IX}祂{RUBY_E#}阴影中的世界一样。
E: Its future holds nothing but Nihility, just like all the worlds that have drowned in {RUBY_B#IX, the Nihility}THEIR{RUBY_E#} shadow.

C: IX从不瞥视任何人，这才符合常理。祂有什么理由授予凡人力量？
E: IX never gives anyone so much as a first glance, and that's perfectly normal. What reason would THEY have to bequeath strength unto mortals?

C: 那你一定知道令使也可以隐瞒自己的身份，甚至对不少人而言，这么做更好，不然就意味着走上银河厮杀大舞台，甚至…背叛所行的命途。
E: Then you must know that Emanators can also conceal their own identities, which, for many people, is better that way. Otherwise, there'd be wanton bloodshed across the cosmos, or even... perhaps... turning their back on the Path they're supposed to follow.

C: 根据「剧本」的提示，我对那只迷因有了些猜想。于是我让银狼寄出邀请，将各位引导至梦中的酒店……
E: So, following the clues in the script, I came up with some theories about the meme. That's why I instructed Silver Wolf to issue invitations, drawing everyone to the dream's hotel...

C: 但问题正在于此，你们明明是在侦办凶案，身为治安官的他为何顾左右而言他，开始讲述自己和「钟表匠」的过去？
E: But this is precisely where the problem lies — you were clearly investigating a murder. So then why, as a security officer, is he changing the subject to talk about his past with the Watchmaker?

C: 为什么不说出真实身份？
E: Why couldn't you reveal your true identity?

C: 美梦可不是凭空变出来的。如果把忆域比作大海，建立一片梦想之地就是在汹涌的汪洋中填土造陆。
E: The sweet dream doesn't come out of thin air. If you think of the Memory Zone as the sea, creating the land of the dreams is like filling that wild ocean with earth to make an island.

C: 你说得没错。在追查杀害妹妹的「凶手」时，除了你…我其次怀疑的就是他。
E: Correct. When I was trying to track down the person who murdered my sister, apart from you... Gopher Wood was my second suspect.

C: 既然各位有共同的目标，不如同心协力，或许还有一线成功的机会。
E: Since our interests are aligned, why don't we team up? Maybe, just maybe, we'll have a shot at success.

C: 老顽童…我也没期待过他能留下什么后手就是了。
E: That mischievous old man... Well, I didn't expect him to leave anything concrete behind anyway.

C: 嗯…请你继续。
E: I see... Please go on.

C: 我的世界本来就是残缺的，说不定下个瞬间就会消失不见，所以…就算梦境再怎么虚假，对我来说也是乐园。我珍惜在这里的每时每刻。
E: My world has been torn apart, and my life could end any second. So... even if this whole place is an illusion, it's still my paradise, and I'll treasure every moment I spend here.

C: 什么…？
E: What...?

C: 我们是星穹列车的无名客，过来办入住的，一直都没回应！你们前台那小姑娘说要帮我们联系管事的，结果人也没影了！
E: We're the Nameless from the Astral Express! We wanted to check in, but there's something wrong with your system! The lady at the front desk said she would contact the manager, but now she's nowhere to be found!

C: 可以，太可以了！二位有着卓越的表演才能，我都要看哭了！
E: Of course! Absolutely! I was this close to tears. Both of you possess exceptional acting talent!

C: 无论多么漫长的战斗，你都坚持了下来，打倒这位强敌，便能峰回路转，迎来成功！
E: No matter how lengthy the battle, you always persevere. Topple this powerful opponent, and the tides will turn, paving a way to success!

C: 这就是「纯美」吗？太耀眼了…
E: Is this the Beauty? It's dazzling...

C: 天哪，是一只折纸小鸟！它怎么钻进十七分熟的尾巴里了？
E: Oh dear, it's an origami bird! What's it doing in Beyond Overcooked's tail?

C: 他踏上新的旅程了，我们已经好久没见啦。
E: He went off on a new journey, and it's been quite a while since I last saw him.

C: 我的下一站？那应该是哪里？我从来都是跟着你的……
E: My next destination? What's that supposed to be? I've been following you...

C: 就是因为我们只剩下你了！你忘记铁尔南了吗？银河不像当初，太危险了！如果再失去你，匹诺康尼该怎么办？
E: Because you're all we have! Have you forgotten about Tiernan? The Cosmos is way more dangerous now! What will happen to Penacony if we lose you, too?

C: 得了吧！你哪个点子不是在把自己往火坑里推？老头，别怪我说话难听，匹诺康尼当年的英雄人物，现在可是只剩你一个了。
E: Oh, come on! Aren't all your "ideas" just ways to get yourself killed? I may be blunt here, but you're the last remaining hero in Penacony.

C: 恐怕就是这个意思。
E: I'm afraid so.

C: 嗯。如果没有，我就不会来到这里。
E: Yes, otherwise I wouldn't be here.

C: 身受沉眠无相者的祝福，却想着要如何杀死祂？这可真是…彻头彻尾的「虚无」啊。
E: The one blessed by the sleeping and shapeless is considering how to kill THEM? That's truly... pure Nihility.

C: 如果报应真的存在，那么众生皆有报应——你有你的，我也有我的。
E: If karma exists, then everyone has their own karma. You have yours, and I have mine.

C: 被汽水冲上天的感觉还挺刺激。不过…谐乐大典都要开始了，怎么还没开放入场啊？
E: It's quite exhilarating to be flushed into the air by SoulGlad, but... why is the venue still closed when the Charmony Festival is about to start?

C: 亏你还有心思开玩笑……
E: Can't believe you're in the mood to crack jokes...

C: 我昏迷期间发生了什么？
E: What happened while I was out?

C: 哈，他小宝贝的！你一定就是他们说的那颗「星核」，对吧？
E: Well fork me! You must be that Stellaron they were talkin' about.

C: 况且公司虽急于事功，但到底有「和平」之名在先；家族尽管进退无门，可也自称心向「和谐」。我联盟历来以理服人，相信双方定能捐弃前嫌，握手言和。
E: Furthermore, despite the IPC's eagerness for success, it prioritizes "peace" above all, and The Family, trapped though it may be, professes a desire for "Harmony." The Alliance has always won people over with reason. I firmly believe both parties can indeed put aside their differences and come to a peaceful agreement.

C: 哈哈哈，不愧是「银河球棒侠」——侠之大者，敢作敢当！
E: Hahaha, if it isn't the Galactic Baseballer — a true hero who dares to take action!

C: 直觉告诉我这里只有一种选择…
E: Dunno why, but something tells me I only have one real option here...

C: 也确实好久没见了。
E: It has indeed been a while.

C: 世间万物皆出自精神和灵性的力量——这力量正是「记忆」。要想使我们免于被世界遗落在身后，便要让世界记住我们…或者，用我们的「记忆」重塑世界。
E: All the world is born from the power of mind and soul, and that power is "memory." To prevent ourselves from being forgotten by the world, we must make the world remember us... or, use our memories to recreate it.

C: 不仅如此，我们还通过公司与忆庭取得联系，他们也承诺会协助开展研究……
E: Not only that, we've also established contact with the Garden of Recollection through the IPC, and they've pledged their support for our research endeavors...

C: 恐怕其中也掺入了不少天外合唱班的「记忆」…在漫长的时间里，梦变得与现实无异，现实也开始出现幻觉。人们自以为清醒，精神却早已步入「秩序」的殿堂。
E: ...And that included a lot of memoria from the Beyond the Sky Choir. As time came and went, the dreams eventually became indistinguishable from reality, and reality became an illusion. People think they are awake, but their spirits have long since stepped into the temple of Order.

C: 所以，最终还是回到了你这边，是吗？
E: So, you're the key in the end, I assume?

C: 听见你这么说，真令人放心呀。
E: That's a relief to hear.

C: 呼，经历了这一切，感觉没什么比平平安安的现实更好了……
E: Phew, after all this craziness, nothing is better than staying safe in reality...

C: 你可能不知道自己有个坏习惯：每当你使用疑问语气的时候，其实心里早就做好决定了，别人说什么也劝不住你。
E: You may not realize it, but you have a bad habit: Whenever you seem to be asking a question, you've already made up your mind, and no words will dissuade you.

C: 倒也不是…这么和您说吧，这段时间有好事者在美梦中四处捣乱，逢人便把奇怪的按钮装置塞给对方。
E: Not exactly... Lately, there's been a prankster in the sweet dream who's been handing out strange button devices to anyone he meets.

C: 但现在，我们同为「石心十人」，托帕，我只需要你拿出最好的状态，毕竟接下来的谈判不容有失。
E: Well, now that we're both members of the Ten Stonehearts, I need you to be at your best, especially since the upcoming negotiations leave no room for error.

C: 危机亦是际遇。您其实一直在等待时机，等待匹诺康尼再次成为所有人的视线焦点。
E: Crisis and opportunity are two sides of the same coin. So, you've been waiting for the right moment for Penacony to regain the spotlight.

C: 也许这就是我内心深处的渴望，当意识到这点时…我就知道它并不真实了。
E: Perhaps this could be a deep-seated desire inside me, and upon realizing this... I... I knew it wasn't real.

C: 说起来，来这的路上发生了件怪事。我好端端走着，突然被人塞了件奇怪的礼物。
E: Guess what! Something weird just happened when I was on my way over here. Someone gave me a strange gift.

C: 外面那个灰色头发的人……
E: The gray-haired one outside...

C: 哦？我记得你，你在空间站「黑塔」的表现…基本及格。
E: Ah, yes, I remember you. Your performance at Herta's space station was... adequate, I suppose.

C: （就在这里落座吧……）
E: (Let's take a seat here...)

C: 我识破你什么了…
E: What exactly have I seen through...?

C: 卟卟——回答错误！两个现场里的娃娃造型分别是火火博士和花花博士，根本不是一回事！
E: Bzzt — Wrong answer! The dolls at the two scenes are modeled after Dr. Boom and Dr. Bloom respectively — they're not the same!

C: 唉，小灰毛呀小灰毛，这么长时间过去了，你一点变化都没有，我好失望呀……
E: Oh Gray Hair, Gray Hair, it's been so long, but you haven't changed at all. I'm sorely disappointed...

C: 智慧眷顾勇者，我很欣赏你。
E: Fortune favors the bold, and I respect you for it.

C: 嗬，宝贝，怂了？告诉你，晚了！你已经打开了魔盒……
E: Oh? You scared, lil' fudgehead? It's too late, I tell you! You've already opened Pandora's box...

C: 黄泉？黄泉是谁？
E: Acheron? Who's that?

C: 你的剧情转场也太多了吧！
E: You have way too many storyline transitions!

C: 不该说的话别乱说。
E: Don't speak out of turn.

C: 那我们就找到那家伙好了。
E: Then we'll just have to find that person.

C: 但现在看来…在「梦想之地」，果然一切都有可能啊。
E: But it seems... in the Land of the Dreams, anything is indeed possible.

C: 因为「自灭」的诅咒，我的记忆片片剥离，过去变得模糊不堪。在与你走过这么一段路后，我可以确信…彼时模糊的感受只是错觉，我们确实是第一次见面。
E: Because of the Self-Annihilator's curse, my memories are stripped away, blurring my past. And after our journey together, what I originally thought were familiar feelings were merely illusions... I believe this was truly our first meeting.

C: 没关系，尽情哭出来吧，帕姆。
E: It's okay. Pom-Pom, just let it all out.

C: 事到如今，何必再假情假意地赏给将死之人开口的机会？
E: The dance is done. Why bother with the compassionate pretense and give someone who's about to die the chance to talk?

C: 一片、一片、一片、一片、一片……
E: An... island... island... island... island... island...

C: 入梦池给我干哪来了？
E: Where did the Dreampool send me?

C: 蕉蕉蕉，蕉蕉蕉……
E: Bana bana, bana bana...

C: 嗯…你说的猴子，难不成是指它们？
E: Uhh, those monkeys you were talking about... Is that them?

C: 这人看着好眼熟…啊，我好像在「蓝调的时刻」见过他的画像，是个很厉害的导演？
E: This guy looks familiar... Oh! I think I saw a picture of him in the Blue Hour. He's a really famous director, I think.

C: 他的作品都改编自真实事件，很有参考价值。
E: His works are based on real life events. They are worth referencing.

C: 大多数回答都很沉稳，像一位可靠的摄影师，还有协助「筑城者」的经历，最适合你的学院是——筑梦学院！
E: Most of your answers were calm and composed, like a reliable cinematographer. Combined with your experience in assisting the Architects, the best academy for you is... Dreamweaver Academy!

C: 真不买。
E: Still not buying.

C: 球棒•忍者，久别重逢，真是因缘•巧合！
E: Baseball Bat Ninja, it is good to see you again. This must be a fated reunion!

C: 那摄影就交给你了，加油！至于道具…就用这些睡蕉小猴玩偶吧。
E: Then you're in charge of photography. Good luck! As for our prop... Let's use this Slumbernana Monkey toy.

C: 他宝贝的……
E: Forkin' hell...

C: 他宝贝的，你干什么？
E: What in the forkin' hell are you doing?

C: 抱歉，我还没完全弄清楚。
E: I wish I could tell you, but I still haven't figured out what it is.

C: 如果接下来波提欧先生打算低调行事，那我就会变成拖累。
E: If you're hoping to keep a low profile, my presence will only be a burden, Mr. Boothill.

C: 若要渡过难关，又不想仰赖家族援助。流梦礁的人们就必须唱出属于自己的「同谐」之歌，这才是我的来意。
E: If the residents of Dreamflux Reef hope to tide over the crisis without The Family's help, they will have to sing their very own song of Harmony. This is why I'm here.

C: 但…这还真是胡闹啊。
E: But... this really is absurd.

C: 那算了嘛——之前打的助蕉算我一半就行。
E: Oh, alright then! I'll just take half the credit for those Assistananas we took out earlier.

C: 哈——胡闹的危机该用胡闹的方式解决？我倒不这么觉得。
E: What was it again? An absurd solution to an absurd crisis? I won't call it that.

C: 但很可惜，玩偶不会说话，只会倾听。不过对寂寞的人来说，倾听就足够了。
E: Pity that dolls can't talk and can only listen. For someone feeling lonely, however, listening is already enough.

C: 过一个巧手鉴定
E: Roll DEX once

C: 咦，不是说课程全部取消了吗？
E: Huh? I thought all classes were canceled?

C: 睡蕉小猴的火爆并不自然，如果有人在背后推波助澜，就需要重点关注教职人员的行为了。
E: Slumbernana Monkey's rise in popularity seems quite unnatural. If someone is stirring things up behind the scenes, we need to pay close attention to the actions of the teaching staff.

C: 是的，你将让心中的睡蕉小猴吞没了桶的意志。你收获了蕉师的夸奖和同学们的赞赏，但你抛弃了莎塔娜，抛弃了你作为桶之救主的荣耀……
E: Yes, you've let the little Slumbernana Monkey in your heart consume the will of the can. You've earned praise from the BananAdvisor and admiration from your peers, but you've abandoned Shatana and forsaken your glory as the Savior of the Cans...

C: 什么呀！蕉授不是说要让课堂自由起来吗？你的要求一点也不自由！
E: What even...! The Profnana was just encouraging freedom in the classroom, and you're not even making the slightest effort in your class!

C: 没有对睡蕉小猴的爱，给你再多时间也画不出来…我记得你是班里的吊车尾蕉吧？
E: Even if I did give you all the time in the cosmos, you won't have anything. Not when you're not passionate about Slumbernana Monkey. Ah... You're at the bottom of the class, aren't you?

C: 不能叫正常名字吗？
E: Can't they just call you Montana?

C: 店家还挺讲信用。
E: That store really keeps its promises.

C: 一场很公平的*蕉易*，不是吗？
E: Seems like a fair and banaworthy deal, wouldn't you say so?

C: （又来了，是梦里的感觉……）
E: (Not this again. It feels like I'm in a dream...)

C: 你又搞错了，三月同学，可比讲座厉害多了！真要说…那可是「显圣」。
E: Oh, March! You remembered wrong again. This is far grander than a seminar! I guess... you can call it a theophany?

C: 嗯？什么很有天分……
E: Huh? What talent do you have...?

C: 搞什么鬼啊，怎么还主动拦路？
E: What's your problem! Why are you blocking our way!?

C: 而他，凭借自己坚韧无比的心智，成为了更加可贵的样本。他的心智没有被彻底毁灭，反而……
E: The Ranger's extraordinarily staunch and unyielding mind made him an even more valuable specimen to be studied. His mind hasn't been completely wiped out, instead...

C: 你是个狡诈恶徒，你挨一枪一样会死，而我现在就握着那把枪。
E: You're a dastardly evildoer who'll cease to exist once a bullet's put into you. And guess what? I just so happen to be holdin' a gun right now.

C: 哎等等——你又要干嘛？
E: Hey, hold up! Where are you heading off to again?

C: 呦——文化人？
E: Oh, a cultured soul then?

C: 但在下要成为缭乱•忍侠，若不能降伏几只邪祟，何谈打败御猿•邪忍？战！战至清晨的乌鸦开始嘶鸣为止。
E: Yet, if I am to become the Dazzling Ninja, I must vanquish these fiendlings! Only then can I be worthy of defeating Evil Ninja Osaru... To battle! Do not stop until the crows start cawing at the crack of dawn.

C: 不枉在下日夜苦行，这便是缭乱•空手道。
E: My long hours of training have finally paid off. This is Dazzling Palm.

C: 乱破，离开。
E: Leave, Rappa.

C: 我也听不懂…不是，别跟他废话了，原始博士养的猴子，你说再多也没用。
E: Me neither... Wait, no more nonsense. There's no point in continuing the conversation with a monkey brought up by Dr. Primitive.

C: 怎么感觉你阴阳怪气的……
E: Hey, why do you sound so snarky...

C: 看来芮克先生没有骗我们，你的记忆确实可以消解睡蕉小猴的影响…我们的话语也恢复正常了。
E: Looks like Mr. Reca did tell the truth. Your memory worked in overwriting the Slumbernana Monkeys' influences. Our speech seems to have gone back to normal too.

C: 邪祟退却——正觉彩墨绽！
E: Fiendlings, be gone! Brilliant Enlightenment!

C: 你这老头，真是——
E: Hey, old man, how dare you—

C: 这还怎么旁观啊——搭档，我们也上！
