E: We can't just stand by and do nothing — let's move, partner!

C: 为彻底摧毁尼卡多利的正身，众人计划潜入往日的悬锋城捞取真相。在命运重渊的尽头，开拓者谒见「岁月」泰坦欧洛尼斯，神差鬼使间接受了浮黎的瞥视。
E: In order to destroy Nikador's true form, the group plans to infiltrate Castrum Kremnos of the past to discover the truth. At the end of the Abyss of Fate, the Trailblazer communes with the Time Titan Oronyx, and somehow receives a gaze from Fuli.

C: 还是到了这一步啊……
E: It has come to this, after all...

C: 我先前就很在意，种种迹象表明，翁法罗斯绝不是一个从未接触过宇宙的世界。无论是泰坦的降生，还是黑潮来袭…都难以用文明的自然发展解释。
E: This has been bothering me for a while now. Everything we have seen thus far suggests that Amphoreus wasn't always isolated from the rest of the universe. Be it the birth of the Titans or the encroaching black tide, none of these can be explained as a "natural progression" of a civilization.

C: 同样的问题，回敬给你——
E: I could ask you the same—

C: 「呵！你的恨意了然于色，迈德漠斯，这些话想必刺痛了你的心胸。但也正因此，我终于明白了……」
E: "Hah! Your hatred is as clear as day, Mydeimos. My words must have stung you deeply. But thanks to them, I have also come to realize..."

C: 终于来了，{NICKNAME}。
E: You're finally here, {NICKNAME}.

C: …让你们见笑了。
E: ...I'm sorry about my companion's behavior.

C: 情况不妙…克莱门汀，去安排一间安静的病房吧，我来治疗——被黑潮伤成这样，能撑到现在已经是个奇迹了。
E: This is bad... Clementine, prepare a ward for this man at once. I'll treat him myself... It's a miracle he's still alive, considering how badly the black tide injured him.

C: 很抱歉临时丢下你们…但我毕竟是一名医者，我不能放任生命在眼前逝去。
E: I'm sorry for leaving in the middle of the journey... but as a healer, I can't just stand by and watch someone pass away in front of me.

C: 这么喜欢可爱的小动物吗？莫非…你是很在意外貌的类型？
E: Do you like cute little animals that much? ...Are you secretly the type that cares a lot about outward appearances?

C: 这个…墨涅塔祭司手册里就是这么记载的……
E: Well... These lines are documented in the handbook of Mnestia's priests, so...

C: 别有压力，你已尽了你的职责。现在也别着急回树庭了，先好好休息吧。
E: Don't stress yourself out over this. You've already done everything in your power to save him. There's no need to hurry to the Grove either. You deserve a good rest now.

C: 算算时间，遐蝶她们也该到了。
E: Now that I think about it, Castorice and the rest should have arrived at the Grove by now.

C: 好，好。本以为你是那{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}「灰黯之手」{RUBY_E#}在人间播下的花蕾…现在看来倒像朵气鼓鼓的毒蕈了。
E: Alright, alright. I originally thought that you were just a beautiful flower planted in the mortal realm by the {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Hand of Shadow{RUBY_E#}... But now, I see you have some prickly thorns too.

C: 嗯？她去哪儿了……
E: Hm? Where did she go off to...

C: 比起这个——缇安大人，金线有对周围产生任何反应么？
E: Rather than worry about this, Lady Trianne, did the golden thread react to anything around here?

C: 既已至此…就将其供奉神蝶罢。
E: In that case... just offer it to the divine butterfly.

C: 退下。或者，死。
E: Stand down. Or die.

C: 或许能找到有价值的记忆——人家试试看。
E: Maybe I'll find some useful memories here... Let me try.

C: 喔…好吧。但你有点沉默。
E: Oh... Alright. You're a little quiet, though.

C: 所以，那黄金狮子到底是怎么上的墙？
E: Wait, so how in the world did Chryseus Leo get mounted on the wall!?

C: （不，不太对。）
E: (No. None of those sound right.)

C: 不用谢。
E: Then, you're welcome.

C: 于是！一场旷古绝伦的桑拿大战开始了。
E: And thus, an unprecedented sauna battle commences.

C: 两位阁下，需要我把温度调低些么？
E: My lords, would you like me to reduce the temperature a little?

C: 缇宝女士？！怎、怎么了？
E: Lady Tribbie!? Wh—What's wrong?

C: 我们都不是小肚鸡肠的人。矛盾的根本，你应该很清楚。
E: Neither of us is narrow-minded. You should know the root cause of our conflict.

C: 女士，卡林尼库斯在几日前，为了保护树庭，牺牲在抗击黑潮的过程中了。
E: Ma'am, Callinicus passed away a few days ago defending the Grove against the black tide.

C: 放心吧，就如我之前所说，我会保持分寸。
E: Don't worry. As I said before, I'll mind my behavior.

C: 说到{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}…{NICKNAME}阁下，还有一事，希望与你确认。
E: Speaking of {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#}... {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}, there is something else I wish to verify with you.

C: 阿格莱雅！给我一个解释。
E: Aglaea! I demand an explanation.

C: 「荣耀」…你与这二字何干？
E: As if you have any honor!

C: 我一直否定的命运，终于还是找上了门。
E: The fate I've always denied has finally caught up to me.

C: （不知道丹恒这些天如何……）
E: (I wonder how Dan Heng has been holding up these past few days.)

C: （声音…好遥远。）
E: (The voice... sounds so far away.)

C: 偷袭时得手的战利品，送你了。
E: I got it from the sneak attack. It's yours now.

C: …以*我们*现在的状态，恐怕也没法对它做什么。到时再想想其他办法吧……
E: ...In our current state, we probably can't do anything to them. We'll cross that bridge when we get there...

C: 缇宁、缇宝，为什么不说话？从刚才开始，缇安就听不见*你们*的声音了……
E: Trinnon, Tribbie, why aren't you saying anything? Trianne can't seem to hear you at all...

C: {RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}——
E: {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#} —

C: 带领族人发起反抗？说不上来，一时想不到什么两全其美的办法。
E: Lead my people on a resistance, perhaps? I'm not sure. I can't think of a solution that would make everyone happy.

C: 两千余年前，崇拜{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}力量的人们聚集在它脚下，建立了城邦。悬锋人从此成了战神的锋刃，追随泰坦的步伐征讨四方。
E: Over two millennia past, devotees of {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}'s might banded together beneath their feet and erected a city of their own. Ever since then, Kremnoans have served as the blades wielded by the god of war, following the Titan's path in its conquest.

C: 你也是，别死了——
E: Same goes for you. Don't die too easily —

C: 来吧，伙伴！记忆正在涌现——
E: Come, my friends! Memories are surging forth...

C: 既然这样，{NICKNAME}先处理私事吧。我们在这边等你。
E: In that case, please attend to your affairs first, {NICKNAME}. We'll be waiting for you here.

C: 你们不会全都读完了吧…
E: Don't tell me you actually read them all...

C: 意料之中。毕竟，到了要启程的时候了。
E: Just as expected. It's time to get going, after all.

C: 你要乖乖睡觉，无论梦到什么，都不要害怕——
E: Be a good girl and go to sleep now, and whatever you dream of, don't be afraid—

C: 承载神权吧—— / 铸造神迹吧——
E: Inherit divine authority — / Forge godly miracles —

C: 去猎杀吾等同袍吧—— / 去哀悼吾等命运吧——
E: Kill my kin — / Mourn our fate —

C: 她正要给出回答。
E: She's about to reveal the answer.

C: 算了，走一步看一步吧。不论发生什么，我陪你。
E: Forget it. We'll deal with that when the time comes. No matter what happens, I'll be right there with you.

C: 奥赫玛城里暗流涌动啊。
E: Looks like dark undercurrents are roiling in Okhema.

C: 我就喜欢这集。
E: That's my favorite episode.

C: 怎么了，丹恒？
E: Something wrong, Dan Heng?

C: 完全不记得。
E: Not a clue.

C: 圣…圣杯战争？！
E: The Ho... Holy Grail War!?

C: 但是，比起什么「我希望宇宙和平」之流的屁话，这才是真正脚踏实地的感人梦想啊！
E: But compared to lofty nonsense like world peace, your dream is refreshingly grounded.

C: 嚯嗬嗬～这不正是你为同僚们报仇雪恨的好机会？请您尽力获得胜利，将这位高傲的牛仔狠狠击落吧。
E: Hohoho~ Then isn't this your perfect shot at vengeance? Win this war, and you can bring that cocky cowboy crashing down yourself.

C: 换言之，从叙事学角度来讲，我们目前所发现的每一位参战者，都会在第一时间将你作为目标。
E: In other words, from a narrative standpoint, every single participant we've identified so far is likely to target you first.

C: 与此同时，黄金的时刻。
E: At the same time, in the Golden Hour.

C: 我身边这位小姐正是需要补充能量的时刻。
E: The lady next to me needs to replenish some energy.

C: 我的兄长，他曾为了自己的一己之愿，召唤更高力量的介入，想将匹诺康尼打造成「沉眠中的理想国」。他失败了…也要为此踏上赎罪的道路。
E: My brother once summoned a higher power to intervene here for his own wishes, hoping to turn Penacony into a "utopia in dormancy." He failed... and now must walk the road of atonement.

C: 但这位老奥帝先生，作为举办人却大张旗鼓地将仪式公之于众？这本该让它受到玷污，无法进行。
E: But this Old Oti, the host, is openly displaying the ritual to the public? This should have tainted it, making it impossible to carry out.

C: 在拔出选王之剑前，梅林就向我揭示过这一切……
E: Merlin had already warned me of all this before I drew the Sword of Selection...

C: ███列车来访。
E: Visit from ███ Express.

C: 既然曾经被囚禁，被夺取…那么如今您更不应该将所有为终结这场圣杯战争而来的御主与英灵困锁在宝具中。
E: You know how it feels to be locked in a cage and have everything taken from you, so why do you still trap the Masters and Heroic Spirits in your Noble Phantasm? When they wish to end this Holy Grail War?

C: 两位难道不觉得，这也是一种别开生面的故友重逢吗？可惜，米哈伊尔这老小子却没能在场。
E: Don't you think this is a rather unique reunion of old friends? It's unfortunate that Mikhail, that old rascal, couldn't be here to join us.

C: 哎，好不容易遇到个同好，就没点粉丝福利吗？
E: Oh, you finally meet a kindred spirit, and I don't get any fan benefits?

C: 当然，把片场留给演员，才是一位导演的生存之道。
E: Of course... real directors know when to leave the stage to the actors.

C: 领衔主演
E: Lead Actors

C: 真是比吃了三层夹心的仰望星空派还畅快的体验。好好享受一番吧，亲爱的角色们，直到……
E: It's even more satisfying than biting into a triple-stuffed Stargazer's Pie. Soak it in, dear character, until...

C: 让Archer留下来。
E: Let Archer stay.

C: 关于这点，我举双手赞同。我们无法承担可能的风险，如果敌人在他的身上施加了诅咒，或者将他做成特殊的使魔，万一……
E: I completely agree. We can't afford the risk. If the enemy cursed him or turned him into some kind of special familiar, then...

C: 该死，不知道为什么，我居然想和这混账跳一支舞。
E: Darn it, for some bizarre reason, I have this sudden urge to dance with this jerk.

C: 砂金，你真的背叛了吗？
E: Aventurine, did you really turn on us?

C: 看起来，这场战斗也没我们想的那么简单。
E: Seems like this battle's more complicated than we thought.

C: 只是觉得比起安慰，你可能更需要打击。
E: Just thought that being mean might be more effective than consoling you.

C: 两名猎犬。和之前的二人不同，他们看上去有要务在身。
E: I see two Bloodhounds... They appear to be on official business, unlike the pair from earlier.

C: 应当是家妹与他们达成了某种约定。而我能在匹诺康尼行动自如，则多亏了这位万维克的帮助。
E: My sister has likely made an agreement of some sort with them. As for how I'm able to move around freely in Penacony, I have Wonweek to thank for that.

C: 你遭受了绝灭大君的袭击，依照常理，绝不可能活下来。
E: You were attacked by a Lord Ravager. By all rights, you should not have survived.

C: 「死而复生」和「死里逃生」，二者只有一线之隔，却天差地别。如果你彻底死亡，我也无能为力。
E: There is only a fine line between resurrection and escaping death, yet they couldn't be more different. If you had truly died, I would have been powerless to do anything for you.

C: 柔韧性很好。
E: Extremely flexible.

C: 三月小姐怕是误会了，小女子只是觉着有些惋惜，又有些庆幸。
E: Miss March, you might have the wrong idea. I'm just feeling a mix of regret and relief.

C: 演出？在这里吗？
E: A show? Here?

C: （这样人就到齐了，去集合吧。）
E: (Now that everyone's here, I should go join them.)

C: 呵呵，大家心里自有答案。
E: I'm sure everyone has a destination in mind.

C: 最后，也是最大胆的选项——<color=#dbc291ff>「永恒之地，翁法罗斯」</color>。
E: And finally, the most adventurous option: <color=#dbc291ff>The Eternal Land, Amphoreus</color>.

C: 顺带一提，黑塔女士——你既然有算力如此强大的超级计算机，那它平时到底在…呃…算些什么？
E: A question on the side, Madam Herta: You have these powerful supercomputers and all, so... um, what are they normally programmed to calculate?

C: 解决了烦人的虫子，「算力区」也算打扫干净了。
E: With those annoying bugs squashed, we're done fixing the Computing Zone too.

C: 对，就这么做。
E: Yep, this is the way.

C: 消失了…完全不给我们摸清状况的机会。你看清那生物的模样了吗？
E: It's gone... That happened too fast for us to make any sense of it. Did you see what the creature looked like?

C: 门径之内会是怎样一番景象？你不禁开始放任自己遐想：惨烈的杀戮，喧嚣的盛筵，无底的黑渊……
E: What could lie within the gate? You can't help but let your imagination run wild: Bloody carnage, chaotic banquets, bottomless abyss...

C: {RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}啊，若您还在世……
E: {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#}, if only you were still here with us...

C: 他把我们当成黄金裔了。
E: He thought we were Chrysos Heirs.

C: 好吧，但请不要离开我身边。那些渣滓奈何不了你们，但我们的同伴，那些以「黄金裔」为名的人们……
E: Very well, but please remain by my side. These pests can't hurt you, but our companions, those known as the "Chrysos Heirs"...

C: 遐蝶小姐。
E: Miss Castorice.

C: …属于我的考验还没到来吗？
E: Could it be that my trial has not arrived yet?

C: 全世之座，{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}，请结束您长久以来的沉默，给予人类庇护吧……
E: O {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#}, Throne of Worlds, please end your long silence and grant humanity protection...

C: 就算是神明也会流血……
E: Even gods can bleed...

C: 虽然很想听你说说自己的故事，不过现在…我已占用了你太久时间，丹恒先生似乎有些心急了，他的焦虑扰乱了水流。
E: As much as I am interested to hear your story, I'm afraid I've already taken up too much of your time... Mr. Dan Heng's worrying has created ripples in the water.

C: 我似乎不行。
E: I don't seem to be cut out for this.

C: 搞定了。给二位过过目！
E: And... we're done! Here, have a look!

C: 小道消息已经传开了，有刚进城的难民说——你们是来自「天外」的人，是白厄阁下在路边捡到的。
E: I've heard some things here and there. Refugees that just came into the city are saying that the people Lord Phainon picked up are from beyond the sky.

C: 恐怕要让你失望了，先生，谣言只是谣言。
E: Sorry to disappoint you, sir. I'm afraid those rumors are just rumors.

C: 你从小到大——虽然也算不上多久的时间——还从来没有被一只动物看扁过。现在，恐怕只有一个办法可以保住你的尊严……
E: You've never been underestimated by an animal in your life — though your life hasn't been that long. Now, there's probably only one way to save your dignity...

C: 这…你太谦虚了，遐蝶小姐。简直无可挑剔。
E: This... You're too humble, Miss Castorice. It's perfect.

C: 那我先失陪了。两位请继续和大地兽玩耍吧。
E: Then, I'll take my leave now. Please continue playing with the dromases.

C: 哎，我做古宝鉴定的经验虽然远不及先生，但这点自信还是有的。您要是信不过我，可以再拿它去别家看看。
E: Although I'm not as experienced at doing appraisals as he is, I'm very confident about this. If you don't trust me, you can take it elsewhere for a second opinion.

C: 真的能成功吗？
E: Do you think he will succeed?

C: 粉霞天女！快来买啊！
E: Rosy Celestial Maiden merch! Come get them right here!

C: 他往生命花园跑了，快追！
E: He's running toward the Garden of Life. Give chase!

C: 合理的诉求。未能及时向你们道出全部，是我的过失。
E: A reasonable request. It is indeed my oversight for failing to tell you everything in time.

C: 在重渊与他们初遇时，我同样怀有戒心，回圣城的路上始终没有放下防备。
E: When I first met them in the Abyss, I was wary of them as well and never let my guard down throughout our journey back to the holy city.
...Yeah.

C: 如何，你听见了吗？
E: So, did you hear it?

C: 我不想让阿格莱雅女士察觉到异样，只能配合她的行动。
E: I had to follow Lady Aglaea's instructions to avoid arousing her suspicion.

C: 嗯？有新消息。
E: Hm? There's a new message.

C: 我，悬锋城的万敌，愿意前往。
E: I, Mydei from Castrum Kremnos, volunteer to join.

C: 哈…真是大方，但我不喜欢接受施舍。向{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的心脏刺出最后一剑的，一定是我。
E: Hah! How generous, but I'm not the type to accept charity, so I'll definitely be the one who deals the final blow through {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}'s heart.

C: 「学会」和「精通」是两个概念，没有祭司的共鸣力，普通人念上两句祷言就得昏迷不醒。
E: Learning and mastering are two different concepts. Without a priest's resonance, an ordinary person would fall into a coma after chanting the first few words of the prayer.

C: 哦？缇宝老师教会你了？
E: Oh? Tribbie taught you how?

C: 你在奥赫玛一定见过，但只靠双眼很难辨别。
E: You've likely seen them in Okhema, but it's hard to tell just by appearance.

C: 是我高估了自己…
E: I overestimated myself...

C: 什么动静？！
E: What's that sound!?

C: 吾师？
E: Teacher?

C: 它根本没想决出胜负，只是在利用一次又一次死亡，为手中的锋刃淬火…哪怕经受百死，也要贯穿{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}的躯体！
E: They have no intention of winning the fight. Instead, they're using death after death to temper their blade... Even with a hundred deaths, they've resolved to pierce through {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#}'s body!

C: …打不开？
E: ...It won't open?

C: 再施展一次「神迹」，或许我们就能通过了。
E: Let's summon another miracle. Perhaps this time we'll make it through.

C: 缇宝是怎么打败泰坦的…
E: How did Tribbie defeat a Titan...?

C: …不对，白厄阁下。
E: ...No, Lord Phainon.

C: （泰坦的低语）
E: *Titan's murmurs*

C: 我也无法理解。但如果这代表着{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}愿意与我们建立联系，或许值得一试。
E: I don't understand either. But if this means that {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#} is willing to establish a connection with us, maybe it'll be worth a try.

C: 请再等我片刻…
E: Please give me a moment...

C: 银狼抬头看向你，眼神中满是不耐烦。你从未以全息影像之外的形式和她对过话——和这位天才骇客四目相对的体验颇有些新鲜。
E: Silver Wolf looks up at you, her eyes filled with impatience. You've never spoken with her outside of a hologram — meeting this genius hacker face-to-face is quite novel.

C: 你为什么会在这里…
E: Why are you here...

C: 对，是伙伴。
E: Yes, they are my companions.

C: 没错…世界仿佛在一晃之间便走入了末路。
E: It is... The world seems to have plummeted to its end in the blink of an eye.

C: 还好不用再骑大地兽进城了。辛苦了，缇宝老师。
E: Thank goodness we no longer have to ride the dromas into the city. Thanks for your hard work, Tribbie.

C: 要是你对那段历史不甚熟悉，就让她再给你上上课吧。
E: If you're not well-versed in that history, have her refresh your memory.

C: 阿雅，你要量力而为呀。
E: Don't exhaust yourself, Agy.

C: 嗯。就在这花园静候片刻吧，阿雅。
E: Indeed. Let us wait here in this garden, Agy.

C: 这些人好像很愤怒。
E: Those people sound furious.

C: 是你！
E: It's you!

C: …马上就好。给我几秒钟的时间…让我将这个陌生的灵魂送到温柔乡吧。
E: ...I'll be fine. Just give me a few moments... Let me send this lost soul into the gentle embrace of death.

C: 你与{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}之间的共鸣一定十分牢固。
E: The resonance between you and {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#} must be strong.

C: 它剥离的那部分神性——它最想完整保存的部分——即为「理智」。
E: The fragment of divinity that they stripped away — the fragment they wanted to preserve the most — was Reason.

C: 该不该报告给队长呢？
E: Should I report it to the captain?

C: 我们完成使命了，缇宝老师——没有缺肢断腿，只是掌心多出了一颗滚烫的火种。
E: We completed the mission, Tribbie! No broken limbs or severe injuries, just a fiery Coreflame in the palm of my hand.

C: 应该提前准备点能玩的。
E: Should've brought games we could play offline...

C: 嗯，话虽如此…有关自己的事，还是记不起来一点呢。真头疼呀。
E: Huh... I don't remember a thing about myself. Ugh, my head hurts.

C: 谢谢你，遐蝶小姐。我想就这么再待一会儿，尽量不去考虑那些麻烦事，反正也想不出什么结果。
E: Thank you, Miss Castorice. I think I'll stay here for a little while and keep all of those unruly thoughts out. It's not like anything will come of them, anyway.

C: 你对他真的很有信心。
E: You have a lot of faith in him.

C: 神谕降下了它的代言人，它认可了白厄阁下的力量和品格，但对他的意志仍存疑虑。
E: The prophecy sent an ambassador. They acknowledged Lord Phainon's strength and character, but had doubts about his strength of will.

C: 但眼下，我们得先招待客人。
E: But now, let's greet our guest.

C: 她创作时也许没想这么多。
E: She probably did not think much of it while she was writing.

C: 可怜的孩子，没事的。请让我们帮助你…请好好睡一觉吧。
E: Oh, poor child, everything will be fine. Let us help you... You can have a good rest now.

C: 岁月…从不妥协…从不记恨……
E: Time... never compromises... never bears grudges...

C: 接下来该怎么办？
E: What should we do next?

C: 星核，起点作用啊！
E: Stellaron, do something!

C: 别放在心上，{NICKNAME}。你这一路上已经创造了无数奇迹，对吧？
E: Don't take it to heart, {NICKNAME}. After all, you've already created countless miracles along the way, right?

C: 我衷心希望你对他的判断是正确的，白厄。
E: I earnestly hope that your assessment of him is accurate, Phainon.

C: 此地竟有安提基色拉人？黄金战争后可称得上是难得一见了。
E: There are Antikytherans here? They have been a rare sight ever since the Chrysos War.

C: 啊呀…好一场精彩的交锋，不愧是{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}的信徒。
E: Oh my, what a thrilling confrontation... As expected of one of {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#}'s followers.

C: 不仅如此，是惟有汝能解答吾之所惑——正所谓「旁观者清」嘛。
E: Not only that, you're the only one who can shed light on my query. As the saying goes, onlookers see most clearly.

C: 诚如你所见，阿格莱雅觊觎我怀中的火种。这是我、也是各位同她周旋的资本，但相应地，我也需要元老院提供包括护卫在内的一切支持。
E: As you're no doubt aware, Aglaea covets the Coreflame that I possess, which makes it the bargaining chip that allows me and the rest of you to negotiate with her. However, in return, I'll need the Council of Elders to support me as much as possible. Naturally, this includes the guards as well.

C: 多说无用，好自为之。
E: Talk is cheap, so you'd better act prudently as well.

C: 告诉我，阁下：你能为我们高贵的公民奉献多少力量，以便他们击溃城邦的仇敌？
E: Tell me, what are you willing to do for our esteemed citizens so that they can vanquish the enemies of our fine city?

C: 我听到了。
E: I can hear it.

C: 本来，你就有足够的理由去觐见{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}。只是那大表演家利用了你的愿望…让我们不得不陷入两难的处境。
E: You already had every reason to seek an audience with {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#}. It's that Great Performer who has weaponized your wishes and placed us in this difficult situation.

C: 谢、谢谢你…别听她的，求求你……
E: Th—Thank you... I beg you... Don't listen to her...

C: <color=#eb4d3dff>轻轻触碰。</color>
E: <color=#eb4d3dff>A gentle touch.</color>

C: 除去敬畏，再无其他。
E: I have nothing but respect for her.

C: 这是假的。
E: This is the wrong one.

C: 赛飞儿阁下一向…随心所欲。但无论如何，她给我们带来了有价值的信息。
E: Lady Cipher has always been a... free spirit. In any case, she has brought us some valuable information.

C: …让我来吧。
E: ...Leave it to me.

C: 整理好心爱的衣物，随我启程吧。奥赫玛欢迎你，遐蝶。
E: Tidy up your precious garments and come with me. Okhema welcomes you, Castorice.

C: 元老院已经利用过你一回了。
E: So it seems that the Council of Elders has manipulated you once already.

C: 不必惊慌，我们只是过路人。您看，没有哪位会显出凶神恶煞之相。
E: There's no need to be alarmed. We're just passing by the area. See? None of us look threatening.

C: {RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}？那是何物？
E: {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#}? Who's that?

C: 但…「死亡」不就是由它带来世间的吗？
E: But... didn't that dragon already bring "Death" to the world?

C: …小心落得和那些黑潮造物同样的下场！
E: ...Be careful not to suffer the same fate as those black tide creatures!

C: 哇，人好多呀！
E: Wow, there are so many of you!

C: 于{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}的回忆之中，我见过了「死亡」的双子。现在，我已能确信，我曾是其中之一。
E: I saw the twins of "Death" in {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#}'s memory, and now I am certain that I was one of them.

C: 不过，在此之前，各位曾听到过声声叹息吗？
E: But before we talk about that... Have you heard the sighs?

C: 「征途之所以伟大，史诗之所以壮阔，是因为万物终有逝去之时」——曾有人如此为我解释，为何死亡是世间必需之物。
E: "Journeys and epics are only glorious and magnificent because all things eventually fade to dust." That's how someone once explained to me why death is necessary to the world.

C: …玻吕刻斯，我回来了。
E: ...I'm back, Pollux.

C: 就像…我们从前照料的那片花田。
E: Just like the flower fields we tended to back then...

C: 它的死之半身，我背负「拒绝死亡」的命运，在人间诞生的那一瞬间便宣告死去。
E: As the half of Thanatos representing death, I shoulder the fate of "defying death." I died the moment I entered the world of the living.

C: 已经太久太久了。我一个人守候在这里，日复一日地望着走投无路的亡灵被这片孤独的荒原拒之门外……
E: It's been far too long. I've waited here for centuries, watching day after day as desperate spirits are denied by this lonely wasteland...

C: 好神奇！就像待在一个巨大的泡泡里，河水都被分开了。
E: Amazing! It's like we're inside a giant bubble. Even the river got parted.

C: 整齐！列队！
E: Formation!

C: 愚弄人民者必得报应，弃誓者必得酷刑。我们应当尊重这座美丽的城邦和她的人民。
E: Repercussions await those who fool the people, and punishment must be meted out to those who abandon their vows. We should respect this beautiful city and her people.

C: 迷茫的时候，就寻找流星落下的方向吧。
E: Look for the direction of the falling stars when you're lost.

C: 啊呀呀……
E: Oh my...

C: 总有一天，我们的道路还会相交。
E: One day, our paths will cross again.

C: 前进！让我看见你的勇气。
E: Onward! Show me your courage.

C: 第四面镜，你负责……
E: Fourth Mirror, you'll be in charge of...

C: 喔，找到你们…的影子了。
E: Oh, I've finally found your... traces.

C: 其二：若您计划——正如您刚才暗示的那般——以宣战为由胁迫我与您合作，还请知晓……
E: Second: If your plan is — as you've alluded to previously — to force me into cooperating by showing hostility, do know that...

C: 尽管如此，汝对她的评价并不低，对吧？
E: Regardless, you think quite highly of her, no?

C: 这就是老师的秘密研究，不能为其他人所知的亵渎实验。比起他在公众面前的发言，这才是真正的「渎神」……
E: Yes, this is what he was secretly conducting research on — something he had to keep hidden from others. Compared to his public speeches, this is the real "blasphemy"...

C: 你还记得吗？黑潮抵近时，树庭本打算转移{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}的火种，可中途遭遇意外，那刻夏老师也以身殉道……
E: Do you remember? When the black tide was approaching, the Grove had planned to send {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#}' Coreflame to a safe place, but an accident happened along the way, and Anaxa lost his life in the process...

C: 汝大费周章，只为博得{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}一面光照…恐怕不只是为了质问神明吧？
E: You didn't go to such lengths for an audience with {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#} just to ask him a few questions, did you?

C: 哼，不错。
E: Hmph. So you figured it out.

C: 而且，就算事实果真如此…那也与{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}的所在相距甚远，我们要如何找到它？
E: Even on the off chance that you speak the truth, this brings us no closer to grasping {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#}' whereabouts. How are we to find them?

C: 你们应当知晓这一信息。悬锋人绝不退缩。倘若需要应战，随时找我。
E: I figured this is something you would want to know. We Kremnoans never back down from a fight, so if you plan to take that thing down in a battle, reach out to me anytime.

C: 依你所言，这就是吾曾经的样貌么？确实如出一辙。
E: So, according to your story, this is how I used to look? It's practically a mirror image.

C: 明明灵魂已所剩无几，阁下却还是如此达观…还是说，阁下已经无法感到悲伤了呢？
E: Although only a sliver of your soul remains, you remain so optimistic... Or maybe the truth is that you aren't able to feel sorrow anymore?

C: <color=#dbc291ff>它逃避阴云的追逐，并非出于对烈日的偏袒，而仅是畏惧那无边的黑暗。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>They flee from the clouds not out of favoritism toward the scorching sun, but merely out of fear of that boundless shadow.</color>

C: 「如今，金色的神血在我体内汹涌沸腾，天空的暴君也对我俯首称臣。我的光芒比烈日更凶猛，笼罩思绪的阴霾终于散开——」
E: "With golden divine blood coursing through me, even the Tyrant of the Sky bends to my unyielding light. My light burns far brighter than before, and the fog clouding my mind has finally lifted —"

C: 那刻夏老师的炼金术…竟在千年前就曾发挥过如此作用么？
E: Professor Anaxa's alchemy already achieved such power a thousand years ago?

C: 塞涅俄丝未能见证的团结与希望，我们代她收入了眼中。
E: The unity and hope Seliose couldn't see... we've witnessed in her place.

C: 大家，站稳了！
E: Everyone, hold on tight!

C: *您会好起来的，大司铎，请保持乐观，不要沮丧。*
E: Stay strong, Chaplain. Keep your spirits up and don't lose hope.

C: 一，二，三，四…唔……
E: One, two, three, four... wait...

C: 你的织坊…我多想…再偶然路过一次……
E: Your weave shop... I wish... I could chance upon it again, just once...

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「在彩虹桥的尽头，天空之子将缝补晨昏。」</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>"At the end of the rainbow bridge, the Skyfolk will mend dusk and dawn."</color>

C: 「庄严的十二泰坦。」
E: "O majesty of the Twelve Titans."

C: 「死亡」…
E: "Death"...

C: 人家…有种不妙的预感。
E: I... I have a bad feeling about this.

C: 冥河……
E: The River of Souls...

C: 话说回来，你要那么多钱干嘛？
E: Why do you need so much money anyway?

C: 多亏了灰子和粉松鼠，这古城的宝贝全都浮出水面咯！
E: The treasures in this ancient city are all floating back up thanks to Gray Mystery and that pink squirrel!

C: 若您给我一些时间，或许我能完全修复这节破损的车厢，令其完好如初。如此一来，您与{NICKNAME}阁下便能提早踏上归途了。
E: If you give me some time, I might be able to fully restore this damaged car to its former glory. Then you and your esteemed companion could set off on your return journey sooner.

C: 请原谅，来古士阁下，我接下来的话可能会有些冒犯。拜访黎明云崖时，我翻看了许多元老院议员的档案……
E: Forgive me, Lord Lygus, but I must be frank. When visiting Dawncloud, I reviewed the records of many Council Elders...

C: 但你现在还赢不过它。
E: But you can't beat them yet.

C: 这篇爱情故事在最糟糕的部分戛然而止。不知是作者失去了写下去的动力，还是发生了别的紧急情况……
E: This love story abruptly ends at its worst moment. Whether the author lost the motivation to continue or some urgent situation occurred remains unknown...

C: 命运总在人的前路投下阴影，让他们无法清晰地看见自己的未来。
E: Fate always casts a shadow in front of us, clouding our view of the future.

C: 洗什么？衣服还是车？
E: What's being cleaned? Clothes or cars?

C: …黄金战争时期，为了对抗黄金裔，多个城邦在地下集结了一支刺客部队，取名「清洗者」。
E: During the Chrysos War, to combat the Chrysos Heirs, several cities formed an underground assassin squad called "the Cleaners."

C: 嘿嘿…这里这么亮堂，你怕不是该给它换个名字啦？比如…「明光庭院」，如何？
E: Hehe... It's so bright here, maybe you should rename it? How about "Luminous Courtyard"?

C: 「此后…天空之民逐渐式微，诸多天空堡垒遭到废弃，他们的后裔开始于大地之上扎根求生……」
E: "Thereafter... the Skyfolk gradually declined, numerous sky fortresses were abandoned, and their descendants began to establish themselves on the land..."

C: …还有缇宝大人，你们没事便好。我听公民说你们在附近，就顺便前来看看。
E: ...And Lady Tribbie, good to see you're doing alright. I heard from the citizens you were nearby and came to check.

C: 没…事？发生什么了嘛，克拉特鲁斯？
E: Doing... alright? What's going on, Krateros?

C: 何等华贵的光泽…这般成色的海洋之泪，我只在母亲的宝库中见过……
E: Such exquisite luster... I've only seen an Ocean's Tear of this quality in my mother's treasury...

C: 久远的记忆罢了。我的家产早就被大火焚尽，这间织坊就是我白手起家的成果。
E: It's just an old memory. My family estate all burned to ashes long ago. This workshop is what I built from scratch.

C: 不赖嘛。不过我警告你，要是这玩意在我们蹚水到一半的时候失效……
E: Not bad. But just a warning — if this thing fails while we're halfway through the water...

C: 论歌喉，我还是更胜一筹呀，大姐头！
E: When it comes to singing, I still sound better than you, Boss!

C: 但他们甚至不敢妄下定论…因为她是活过千年的半神，黄金裔的领袖。这城中的大部分公民都以为她与死亡二字无关。
E: They were too afraid to jump to conclusions... After all, she was a demigod who'd lived for over a thousand years, the leader of the Chrysos Heirs. Most citizens of this city believed that death couldn't touch her.

C: 不太好。毕竟我们亲眼看到了阿格莱雅大人的…最后时刻。
E: Not well. After all, we witnessed Lady Aglaea's... last moments.

C: 你远赴树庭是为了让自己变得强大，强大到能对付威胁到奥赫玛的敌人。你没做错任何事，千万不要苛责自己呀。
E: You went to the Grove to prepare yourself for the threats to Okhema. You didn't do anything wrong, so don't be hard on yourself.

C: 谢谢你。各位都经历了惊魂未定的一天，请务必好好休息，整理一下心情。我还要去做好准……
E: Thank you. It's been a harrowing day for everyone. Please make sure to rest well and collect your thoughts. I need to prepare...

C: …她是奥赫玛的改衣师，黄金裔的领袖，「金织」阿格莱雅。而她这一生最大的壮举——
E: ...She was Okhema's dressmaker, the leader of the Chrysos Heirs, the Goldweaver Aglaea. And her greatest feat —

C: …你们的歌谣总能驱散我心里的阴云，哪怕只有短短的一刻。
E: ...your songs always dispelled the clouds in my heart, even if just for a moment.

C: 再见，那刻夏老师。
E: Goodbye, Professor Anaxa.

C: …阿格莱雅。
E: ...Aglaea.

C: 浴场，空荡荡的……
E: The baths are empty...

C: 不过，我的想法一直都没变哦。现在，我真的有机会站在英雄们身后，实现自己的理想了呀。
E: But my beliefs have never changed. Now I really have a chance to stay behind the heroes' frontline and realize my dream.

C: 一番交谈过后，她从裁判官克里斯普斯处获得了第一道天空赐福。
E: After a discussion, she obtained the first sky blessing from Magistrate Crispus.

C: 我用闲暇时间研习，取得了一些阶段性的成果。<color=#dbc291ff>现在，只要随身携带「灵水」，我就能用秘术开拓出通向创世涡心的通路</color>。
E: I've been practicing that in my spare time and made some progress. <color=#dbc291ff>Now, as long as I have spirit water with me, I can use those techniques to carve a path directly to the Vortex of Genesis</color>.

C: 毕竟在神话里，{RUBY_B#海洋之泰坦}法吉娜{RUBY_E#}本就是一位阴晴不定的泰坦嘛。
E: That makes sense. {RUBY_B#Ocean Titan}Phagousa{RUBY_E#} was always described as a fickle Titan in the myths.

C: 「…于它狂欢的舞步之下，以盛会的喧嚣掩盖世界的心跳。」
E: "...Under the raucous steps of their frenzied dance, the roar of celebration hides the world's heartbeat."

C: 啧，这自带的明亮氛围……
E: Tsk, bright and cheery as a lamp...

C: 呵…同为翁法罗斯的支柱，没想到「天空」的宿命要等到千年之后才能完满啊。
E: Heh... Who would've thought, as a fellow pillar of Amphoreus, the Sky's duty could only be fulfilled after a thousand years?

C: 不可思议。那姑娘竟能耐受住时光无情的磨蚀…一直坚持到这个年代。
E: Incredible. That girl actually managed to endure the merciless erosion of time... and lasted for so long.

C: 现在，我甚至无法尽享这与你重逢的喜悦！
E: I can't even experience the joy of seeing you again!

C: 在您离开以前，可否请您像当年那样…再为我讲述一次天空英雄的传说？
E: Before you go... could you tell me the tale of the sky hero once more, just like you used to?

C: …我知道这个要求非常出格，尼莫西妮——希望你能理解。
E: ...I know this is a big ask, Mnemosyne — I hope you understand.

C: 遇上大事我从不迟到。
E: I never show up late for important things.

C: 根据史料记载：信仰艾格勒的文明掌握着先进的科技。加上地理位置占优，天空之城是黄金战争中唯一能与悬锋城正面对抗的势力。
E: According to historical records, the civilization that worshiped Aquila once mastered advanced technology, which made their strategically located Sky Castrum the only force that could face Castrum Kremnos head-on in the Chrysos War.

C: 晴空，阴霾，冰雪，雷暴…画壁会映射出艾格勒变幻莫测的情绪。在和平年代，天空祭司们会集结于此，祈求神明以和煦的暖风吹拂世间，带来丰收。
E: The mural would reflect Aquila's shifting mood, like clear skies, fog, snow, or thunderstorms... The Sky Priests would gather here during peaceful times and pray to the god for warm breezes and good harvests.

C: 那边……
E: Over there...

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「苏醒吧，『天象画壁』……」</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>"Awaken, Celestial Mural..."</color>

C: 残酷的内乱，令人唏嘘…看来天空城邦并非败于外敌。
E: The brutal internal strife is sad to see... It appears the Sky cities didn't fall to external threats after all.

C: *低吼*
E: *roaring*

C: 天象转换…没能成功？
E: The celestial shift... didn't work?

C: 若想阻止我弑神，那你们最好鼓起勇气，拉满长弓。看看是我先被万千支箭矢贯穿…还是你们先被索拉比斯的烈焰燃尽！
E: If you wish to stop me from slaying the god, you'd better muster your courage and draw your bows. Let's see if I will be pierced by a hail of arrows first... or if you will be burned to ash by Solabis!

C: 但总有些事无法被记录下来——那些只有我们见证的事。
E: But some things cannot be recorded — they were only witnessed by us.

C: 无论那被尘封的历史是什么模样，先祖们的灵魂都会鼓励我做出正确的决定。这份使命，它的重量远大于我自身的好恶与私见。
E: No matter what the hidden history holds, the spirits of my ancestors will urge me to make the right choice. This mission is far more important than my personal feelings or biases.

C: 浑象仪就在前方——去逼出艾格勒吧。
E: The celestial globe is right ahead. Let's go and force Aquila to come out.

C: 她已经疯了…以至于满口胡言乱语。
E: She's gone completely mad... to the point where she's just spewing nonsense.

C: 罪有应得的结果。
E: A fate well deserved.

C: 它是怎么……
E: How did they...

C: 它——它们追上来了！
E: Th—They caught up to us!

C: 我也和你一起留下…
E: I'll stay together with you...

C: 嗯。我知道你们会反对，所以才没提前通气，抱歉。
E: Yes. I knew you'd object, so I didn't inform you beforehand. My apologies.
...A "Cleaner"!?

C: 希望风堇来得及保护他们……
E: I hope Hyacine can protect them in time...

C: 等等，尼莫西妮——
E: Wait, Mnemosyne—

C: 当然。我可以证明。
E: Of course. This I can guarantee.

C: 你到底隐瞒了什么？
E: What aren't you telling me?

C: 熔金的苍穹在他的脊椎和肌腱中奔涌——
E: The firmament of molten gold courses through his very bones and flesh—

C: 唔…有种陌生的感觉呢。
E: Hmm... There's something oddly unfamiliar about this.

C: 嗯…远远地望过去，还是熟悉的风景呀。
E: Mmm... the view here hasn't changed a bit.

C: 呵，孩子，你这副表情……
E: That's... not very convincing...

C: 好狡黠的声音…像在和人玩捉迷藏？一定得是个擅长捉弄人的家伙才能拿起这张牌吧。
E: That teasing voice... just like a child playing hide and seek. Surely, only a master of mischief could pick up this card!

C: 我们都很迷茫，对吧？不如和命运聊聊，或许这样，我们才能弄清自己是为了什么踏上旅途……
E: Sometimes, fate can guide us when we're lost. Let's consult fate itself. Maybe then we'll know why we must take this path...

C: 都是让人想露出笑容的心愿。
E: These wishes... they make you want to smile.

C: 总之，应该可以理解为，她们想要一个更温柔的世界吧。
E: They're all wishing for a kinder world, in their own way.

C: 希望你还记得自己的使命，新兵。
E: I hope you still remember your purpose, new recruit.

C: 天平，在犹豫……
E: The scales... they're wavering...

C: 步入其中，见证吧。
E: Step through, and witness.

C: …刽子手。
E: ...Executioner.

C: …来吧，刽子手。这片晴空将为我照亮刀锋。
E: Come, executioner. Let this patch of clear sky show me where to strike.

C: 身为这永恒剧场唯一的观众，我一直在恭候您的莅临，这也是为什么我必须向您展示这一切。
E: As the sole audience of this eternal theater, I have been rapturously awaiting your arrival. And this too is the very reason I must show you everything.

C: 看着这一切的观众，又在期待什么呢？
E: And what are the spectators, watching all of this, truly hoping for?

C: 以神礼观众之名，我见到——
E: As the Theoros, I have observed...

C: 你要握紧这柄仪式剑。在我离去后，它会把你送回时间的起点，一段新故事的开篇。
E: You need to hold tight to this ceremonial blade. After I'm gone, it will take you back to the beginning of time, the start of a new story.

C: …悉听尊便。
E: ...As you wish.

C: …一路走来，我也总算略知一二了。
E: ...But along the way, I learned a thing or two.

C: 啊…这倒是头一遭。
E: Ah... this is new.

C: 没错，纵使这只是「徒劳」，世界不过是一场神明的玩笑……
E: Yes, even if it is futile, and the world is just a divine joke...

C: 我…必须记住这份感受。
E: I... have to remember how this feels.

C: 踏上前来，与我决一死战吧！
E: Step forward and face me in a final battle!

C: 你也在等待奇迹发生，<color=#dbc291ff>等待那个能够拯救我们的，真正的「英雄」出现。</color>
E: You're still waiting for a miracle, <color=#dbc291ff>for the true hero to come and save us.</color>

C: 那时，你漫长的抗争也将迎来尽头。
E: And when that happens, your long struggle will finally come to an end.

C: 「没有缺陷」…那正是金血带给你的，最致命的缺陷……
E: "Without flaw"... That is the flaw the golden blood gave you, the most fatal flaw of all, isn't it?

C: 如你所愿……
E: As you wish...

C: 与那惨烈的未来…又有何异…？
E: How is it any different from... that brutal future?

C: 哪怕燃尽…自己的一切。
E: Even if all of you... burns to ash?

C: 我们能再次相见，真是太好啦……
E: It's so wonderful to see you again...

C: 谢谢你，昔涟。我想好啦。
E: Thank you, Cyrene. I know what I need to do!

C: 那是…罗浮的太卜大人？
E: Wait... Master Diviner? From the Luofu?

C: 也许他还握着什么底牌。你想…连「吕枯耳戈斯」都是个假名，我们完全不知道那个坏蛋的来历。
E: Maybe he still has an ace up his sleeve. Think about it... Even the name "Lycurgus" is a fake one. We have no idea who or what he really is.

C: 这和你先前的主张背道而驰。
E: That's the exact opposite of what you asserted before.

C: 也许是三月七或丹恒…
E: Maybe March 7th or Dan Heng...

C: 但别担心，凯撒很看重你们。假以时日，定会让维吉妮娅也给二位写几首赞美诗呢！
E: Fear not, the Imperator favors you. Verginia will write songs in your honor!

C: 场面变得焦灼起来了呀……
E: Things are starting to get pretty intense...

C: 什么「神谕之子」…呵，又是凯撒穷兵黩武的借口吧！
E: What "Children of the Prophecy"...? Hah, another excuse for the Imperator's reckless warmongering!

C: 我暂时还不想休息…
E: I don't feel like resting yet...

C: {NICKNAME}，这算自带酒水了吧？果然，安检就是针对我们的。
E: Doesn't this count as bringing in outside food, {NICKNAME}? I knew that security check was targeted at us.

C: 那我就不客气了。
E: Then I'll gladly accept it.

C: 这下又陷入被动了…
E: Now we're at a disadvantage again...

C: 凯撒，请听我说——
E: Imperator, I can explain...

C: （在过去的旅途中，我掌握了不同的命途力量…好好想想，来到翁法罗斯的到底是什么势力…该用哪一种命途的力量呼唤援助……）
E: (I mastered the powers of different Paths in my previous journeys... Think hard, and figure out exactly which faction has arrived at Amphoreus... and which Path's power I should use to call for reinforcements...)

C: （失败不一定是坏事，毕竟被这股力量叫来的肯定不是善茬……）
E: (Failure is not necessarily a bad thing... This power wasn't gonna call up anyone nice, after all...)

C: 「世人为神王的陨落举行了为期十日的盛大葬礼，而他用牺牲——为人类换来了两百年和平的时光。」
E: "The people held a ten-day funeral to mourn their fallen God-King. And through his sacrifice, humanity was granted two hundred years of peace."

C: 如果有机会，人家也想再看一次呢。
E: If I have the chance... I'd love to see it again.

C: 呵呵，我无法离开这里，但那又如何？
E: Heh, true. I can't leave this place, but what of it?

C: 让我们也加入宴会吧，前行的门扉，或许就藏在席间。
E: Come, let us join the feast. Perhaps the path forward lies hidden among the revelry.

C: 你以为我会因此动摇？
E: You think I'd falter because of this?

C: 不必多言了，法吉娜的涡心就在前方。
E: Save your breath. The Vortex of Phagousa lies just ahead.

C: 「浪漫之半神」阿格莱雅，生于光历<unbreak>3860</unbreak>年，逝于光历<unbreak>4210</unbreak>年。
E: Aglaea, the Demigod of Romance. Born Light Calendar <unbreak>3860</unbreak>. Deceased Light Calendar <unbreak>4210</unbreak>.

C: 小灰鱼儿，请允许我对你道一声谢。
E: Little Gray Fry... Please, accept my thanks.

C: 你还保持着理智吗？
E: Are you still holding it together?

C: 戏中人要如何才能与观众抗衡？卡厄斯兰那做不到，半神们的牺牲亦是徒劳。而被你们寄予厚望的两位天才——
E: How can a character in the play fight against the audience? Khaslana failed. The demigods' sacrifices were pointless. As for the two geniuses you placed such high hopes on...

C: …我确实产生过动摇，但现在已经明白：贝洛伯格必须学会行走、奔跑，最终脱离他人的搀扶，自立于星间。
E: ...I indeed hesitated, but now I understand what we must do. Belobog must learn how to walk on her own, until she no longer needs the support of others, and can stand on her two feet among the stars.

C: 「但，名字的主人并没有看到这一切。她的视线投向远方，耳边的涛声盖过了人们的呐喊。」
E: "But the one who bore that name did not see any of this. Her gaze was cast far away, and the sound of tides in her ears drowned out the people's cries."

C: 多么荒谬，又令人称奇。竟能绕过「智识」的监视，在世界内部暗中布局。看来我对实验的判断，还是出现了一丝纰漏……
E: How absurd, but I can't help but admire it. You managed to avoid the watchful eye of the Erudition and plan all of this within Amphoreus. It seems that there was a slight oversight in my assessment of the experiment...

C: 与其被细枝末节缠住，不妨先听听你最该知道的一件事。
E: Why don't you just listen to the one thing you should know instead of getting distracted by the details?

C: 呵，这样啊。
E: Heh. I see.

C: {NICKNAME}和丹恒已经启程了，也许下一秒，星穹列车就会出现在天边……
E: {NICKNAME} and Dan Heng have already set off. The Astral Express could appear on the horizon any second now...

C: 「混沌回忆，我来了……」
E: "Memory of Chaos, here I come..."

C: 「却陷入了别有用心者的陷阱。」
E: "But fell into the trap of someone with ulterior motives."

C: 流光忆庭，他们也想得到答案。于是窃忆者花费漫长的时光，凿开一条细小的信道，企图窥探这个世界。
E: The Garden of Recollection was curious about that, too. So the Memosnatchers spent an unimaginably long time chiseling out a tiny channel to peek into this world.

C: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>>▇▇ 我会在 ▇▇ ▇ ▇ 等你 ▇▇</color>
E: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>> ▇▇I'll be ▇▇▇▇waiting for you ▇▇▇▇▇</color>

C: （而且，好像有种既视感……）
E: (Also, I'm getting a feeling of déjà vu...)

C: 和卡厄斯兰那一样，她也开始怀疑这一切只是「徒劳」。
E: Like Khaslana, she started to wonder whether everything was "futile."

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「记忆」选择了「毁灭」。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>The Remembrance chose to stand with the Destruction.</color>

C: 以你对忆庭的敌意，我很难相信你的一面之词。
E: Given your evident hostility towards the Garden, I find it hard to take anything you say at face value.

C: 总有些「记忆」——是不得不被焚烧的代价呀♭
E: Some "memories"... must be set on fire as the sacrifice ♭

C: （先把这个扇区的符文收集完整后再继续前进吧……）
E: (I should collect all the runes in this sector before moving on...)

C: 狡黠的猫儿，欺世的「诡计」…无论身份如何变换，她总会成为圣城坚守千年的支柱。
E: A devious cat, the Trickery that fooled the entire world... No matter how her identity changes, she will always end up being a pillar that stands tall for the holy city for a thousand years.

C: 在黑塔的提示下，我得到了流光忆庭的帮助，离开了来古士的囚笼。而在命途空间中，与三月七样貌相同的神秘来客「长夜月」带来了「负世」的火种，并将我送回了翁法罗斯。
E: Guided by Herta's hints, I obtained the Garden of Recollection's aid and left Lygus's cage. Within the Path Space, a mysterious guest bearing the likeness of March 7th — "Evernight" — appeared with the Worldbearing Coreflame and sent me back to Amphoreus.

C: 干得好，{NICKNAME}！
E: Well done, {NICKNAME}!

C: 所以现在，我带你重新回忆一遍吧？
E: So, why don't I walk you through these memories all over again?
Hmm...

C: 就像在争玩什么游戏，怎么背着帕姆从餐车偷夜宵，谁来洗姬子姐姐的咖啡杯——就像列车上的每一个夜晚。
E: It was like they were arguing about which game to play, how to sneak midnight snacks from the dining car without Pom-Pom noticing, or who was gonna wash Miss Himeko's coffee cup, just like every other night on the Express.

C: 「那不是她……」
E: "That's not her..."

C: 昔…涟…？
E: Cy...rene...?

C: 「于它狂欢的舞步之下，以盛会的喧嚣……」
E: "Under the raucous steps of their frenzied dance, the roar of celebration..."

C: 不可思议……
E: How incredible...

C: 看来，要找到「长夜月」，与「大地」一战无可避免。既然对方已沦为害兽……
E: It seems that if I want to find "Evernight," I will have to confront Earth. Since my opponent has already turned into a vicious beast...

C: 至少，让我亲自为最后一位战友送去挽歌。
E: At least let me sing an elegy for my last comrade.

C: 如果立场转换，不管我的计划多么乱来，你也一定会支持我的。不是吗？
E: If our positions were flipped, you'd support me no matter how reckless my plan was, right?

C: 我从没这么想要多活片刻——不成，这话可说不得！
E: Now I wish more than anything that I could just live a bit longer. No, pretend I didn't say that!

C: 这副垂老的身躯将自己背叛的一切尽数承载。现在，我只想在那不变的往日里……
E: This frail body bears the weight of all those I've betrayed, and now, my only wish is to rest with them...

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「汝将自掘坟墓，焚毁于叛逆的熔炉」……</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>"You shall dig your own grave and burn in the furnace of rebellion"...</color>

C: 那就劳驾了，海瑟音女士。
E: If you please, Lady Hysilens.

C: 这房间里的水会自然排空，对吧？交给本大爷吧！
E: Then the water in this room would gradually empty out, right? Leave it to me!

C: 必须救回三月七。
E: We must save March 7th.

C: 再会，遐蝶。
E: Goodbye, Castorice.

C: 等我凯旋，也给你开篝火晚宴。
E: When I return victorious, I'll throw a bonfire feast for you.

C: 仔细一看，这些忆灵一动不动，像是被它吸引了……
E: Hmm. These memosprites are completely still. It's as if they're drawn to this thing...

C: 「记忆」的迷因无处不在。那位女士，在我视野的盲区编织出一张巨大的网络。
E: The memetic entities of the Remembrance are everywhere. That lady wove a giant web in my blind spot.

C: 但若果真如此，我也不介意回忆些大地兽的趣闻供你消遣。
E: But if that's the case, I wouldn't mind recalling some fun dromas trivia for your pleasure.

C: 没错，只要前进就好。用你自己的方式——
E: That's right. Just keep moving forward. In your own way.

C: 布洛妮娅小姐，希露瓦小姐？真是意外，久违了。
E: Miss Bronya, Miss Serval? What a surprise! It's been a while.

C: 但如果可以，我更希望我们的重逢…更轻松日常一些。
E: But if possible, I'd prefer our reunion to be... a bit more casual and laid-back.

C: 所以这些水母，是泰坦的力量？
E: So these jellyfish are the Titan's power?

C: 伟岸…说来，我曾在{NICKNAME}的记忆中，瞥见{F#她}{M#他}化身万丈高的塔塔洛夫。莫非……
E: Majestic... Speaking of which, I once caught a glimpse in {NICKNAME}'s memory of {M#him}{F#her} transformed into a towering Tatalov. Could it be...

C: 嘶，前所未有的斥力啊…就是这儿？
E: Tch. This repulsive force is unlike anything I've felt before... Is this the place?

C: 螺丝，能开条路么？以防万一，我要亲眼确认下——顺带会会现实中的他。
E: Screwy, can you open a path? Just to be sure, I want to see this for myself. Might as well drop in and say hi to the real him.

C: 但愿这矩阵能比帝皇出生的废料场整齐点。
E: Let's hope this Matrix is better organized than the Emperor's junkyard of a birthplace.

C: 「喏，翻飞之币，拿好啦。需要跑路的时候，就把它高高抛上天空吧。」
E: "Here, take the Coin of Whimsy. When it's time to make a quick getaway, just toss it high into the sky."

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「而是要去打破，被凝固的『绝望』。」</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>"But shattering the frozen despair."</color>

C: 你可以把我视作一名…雕塑师。我穷尽一生，只完成了两件作品。
E: You might think of me as... a sculptor. Across all my years, I only completed two pieces.

C: 我不会改变，但愿意承认：那十二块石料未经打磨，却比任何雕像都精致万倍。
E: I won't change. But I'll admit this: Those twelve stones, unpolished as they are, are a thousand times more exquisite than any statue.

C: 没关系，我等你。我们都会等你。
E: It's all right. I'll wait for you. We all will.

C: 轮回的尽头，万物消散。在这场梦里，你会醒来，重新成为爱笑的孩子。
E: The world dissipates at the end of the cycle. In this dream, you will awaken again, and become once more that boy who loved to laugh.

C: 不可思议。地脉的气息…天差地别。
E: Incredible. The energy in the earth's veins here... It's completely different.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>我们。做到了吗？</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Have we... succeeded?</color>

C: 谢谢啊！欠你个人情，就用表现来还吧！
E: Thanks! I owe you one! Lemme repay it with my actions.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「这短暂而漫长的一瞬后，银河便将见证翁法罗斯的答案。」</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>"The cosmos will witness Amphoreus's answer after this fleeting yet eternal moment."</color>

C: 而且还没结束，对吗？
E: And it's still not over yet... is it?

C: 还有……
E: On top of that...

C: 求解「生命」的十三因子，汇入原初的混沌——
E: Seek the thirteen factors of "life," and let them converge into the primordial chaos—

C: <color=#dbc291ff>而为「良知」</color>。
E: <color=#dbc291ff>But for your "conscience."</color>

C: 继续，我帮你掐表。
E: Keep going. I'll time you.

C: 蝶宝和赛飞儿小姐的恶作剧，没吓到你吧？
E: I hope Cassie and Miss Cipher's little prank didn't scare you too much?

C: 嘻…不愧是你！
E: Hehe... as expected of you!

C: 放心吧，他们一定会平安无事。她是这么承诺的。
E: Don't worry. They'll be safe and sound. She promised.

C: 嗯，当然。
E: Of course.

C: 劳顿至此，我此时只想静心沐浴一番啊。黎明时再会吧，各位。
E: After all this exhaustion, I just want to take a peaceful bath now. I'll see you all again at dawn.

C: 我将它留在了故事之外，因为它事关一个「选择」，一个我出于私心而做的选择。
E: I left it out of the story because it involved a "choice"... A choice I made for my own, selfish reasons.

C: 就把这最后一笔，添在《如我所书》的结尾吧？
E: Please, add this final note to the conclusion of As I've Written.

C: 「第四时刻」——由「智识」锚定的，银河命运的转折点…<color=#dbc291ff>它并非某个瞬间，而是一段历程，许多事件的集合。</color>
E: The Fourth Instant, this turning point in cosmic destiny, anchored by the Erudition... <color=#dbc291ff>It's not a single instant, but a process, a chain of events.</color>

C: 所以，这场胜利不是那「许多事件」的最后一环？
E: So, this victory isn't the final piece of that chain?

C: 而是我的「未来」呀。
E: It was my "future."
The second...

C: 答案显而易见，不是吗？但人家确实需要一点时间……
E: The answer is clear, is it not? Still, I do need a little time...

C: 整整<unbreak>97</unbreak>天，三月走遍了翁法罗斯，只为找到拯救伙伴的方法。
E: March wandered all across Amphoreus for <unbreak>97</unbreak> days straight, chasing one goal. To save her friends.

C: 好悦耳的单音，我收到啦。
E: What a sweet note. I've got it now.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>{RUBY_B#EGO}「真我」{RUBY_E#}。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>The "{RUBY_B#EGO}ego{RUBY_E#}."</color>

C: 那样的话…这个世界，还有天外广袤的银河…可能依旧会坠入「毁灭」。
E: Then this world, and the cosmos beyond the sky... might still fall into the Destruction.

C: 祝祭庭院，我们到啦。
E: We've made it. The Sacrament Courtyard.

C: 我的身体…却在不自觉地颤抖呀。
E: But my body... is shivering for some reason.

C: 这么说来，「昔涟」这个名字…只是一个笔名呢……
E: So "Cyrene"... was just a pen name after all...

C: 还有…我的名字……
E: And... my name...

C: 没事啦。人家只是…走得有点累啦。
E: No worries. I'm just... a little tired from all the walking.

C: 保存
E: Save

C: 所以。先有「爱」。再有「昔涟」。再有「空白」。
E: So. First there is "love." Then there is "Cyrene." Then there is "blank space."

C: 意识？感情？难过。不懂。
E: Consciousness? Emotions? Feel sad. Don't understand.

C: 呜。哇。
E: Wah. Waa.

C: 「电信号序列：PhiLia<unbreak>093</unbreak>。路径：哀怜。」
E: "Electrical Signal Sequence: PhiLia<unbreak>093</unbreak>. Track: Lament."

C: 这样一来，人家也能放下所有的不安，真正地…成为「昔涟」了。
E: That way, I can also put aside all my worries and... truly become "Cyrene."

C: {RUBY_B#天才俱乐部#4}我{RUBY_E#}一直在等你自投罗网。
E: {RUBY_B#Genius Society#4}I{RUBY_E#}'ve been waiting for you to offer yourself up.

C: 对于超出计算边界的方案，我总会给出相同的回应。
E: I always give the same response to plans that exceed the limits of mathematical calculations.

C: 此乃大岚神法力加持，感应人体超低频电波的忍•科学用具是也。
E: This is a ninja tech device, blessed by the Great Lan. It senses the ultra-low-frequency electric waves of the human body.

C: 千变万化的演算中，祂的光辉在众目睽睽下，降临于茫茫宇宙中。祂的身躯庞大若神物，齿轮与纤缆精妙绝伦地纠缠在一起。
E: In the ceaselessly mercurial extrapolations, THEIR radiance descends before all eyes, illuminating the vast cosmos. THEIR colossal form, divine in magnitude, is a marvel of intricately interwoven gears and cables.

C: 荒笛
E: Terravox

C: 但在回去之前，我还得到奇物分拣室替温队长取一件东西。
E: But before I return, I still have to pick up a thing for Mr. Wen in the Curio Sorting Room.

C: 比对大裤衩！
E: We should check the boxers!

C: 先这样吧。
E: That's it for now.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「回去」</color>？大家都听见了吧，他承认了！
E: <color=#dbc291ff>"Go back"</color>? Everybody heard him. He admitted it!

C: 其实我是随便蒙的…
E: Actually, that was a random pick.

C: 咕噜噜…没想到一时得意忘形，功亏一篑啊……
E: *gurgle*... I got carried away. Never could've thought I'd fail at the last minute...

C: 手上刚好有个活，你替我办了吧。
E: I happen to have a job on my hands that you could help out with.

C: 呀呼！你被耍啦！
E: Ah hoo! You've been fooled!

C: 四致「宝藏」的发掘者：
E: To Treasure Hunters: (IV)

C: 虽然防卫科紧急封锁了这片区域，但已经有人失去了联系。
E: The Security Department sectioned off the area immediately, but we lost contact with some people.

C: 或许，你可以协助我们重启中央电梯。
E: Maybe you can help us restart the central elevator?

C: 你就是「瓜农」？
E: Are you Gossipmonger?

C: 黑粉？
E: Heritor?

C: 怎么有个非主流…
E: Well... Didn't expect to be running into the fashion police today...

C: 在空间站隐秘的犄角旮旯，你不经意间就能看到又大又卷又膨的自己人……
E: Before long, we will have big, curly, puffy members in every hidden corner of the space station.

C: 警告！您已进入「黑塔」全景监控区，请勿对中继器做出不当举动。
E: Warning! You've entered the full surveillance area of the space station. Please do not conduct any inappropriate behavior toward the repeater.

C: 与我朝夕相处的朋友已经率先步入了永夜，我的生命亦不知将在何时终结。
E: The friends who had once stood by my side day and night have already taken the lead in entering the eternal night, and yet I'm still here, not knowing when my life will end.

C: 哎哟喂，真不愧是当代的年轻人，年纪轻轻一身病，耳朵不好使那就用眼睛看啊，我卡了！
E: Oh my gosh, the kids these days. Have you lost your hearing? At such a young age? Then take a look with your eyes. I'm stuck!

C: 我的好奇心倒被你勾起来了…你到底在录像带里看到了什么？
E: Now you've piqued my curiosity... What exactly did you see in the videos?

C: 看你的样子，似乎对上面的内容有所误解。
E: It seems that you may have misunderstood its content.

C: 我的直觉一向很准。
E: My intuition has always been accurate.

C: 意料之外，情理之中…
E: Beyond expectation, yet within reason.

C: 我还有事要做…
E: I have other matters to attend to...

C: 哦哦我知道啦，前辈你刚回来肯定很忙，不过看你现在精神状态比以前好多了，我也就放心了，那我不打扰你啦。
E: Okay, I understand. You must be very busy since you just came back. Anyway, it's nice to see that you've recovered mentally. I'll leave you to it.

C: 在这种情况下，适当地让大家发展自己的兴趣爱好，反而能保障大家离地太久后的心理健康，这才是提高大家效率的最佳方法。
E: In that case, letting people develop their own hobbies improves everyone's mental health, especially when they have been away from land for an extended period of time. This is the best way to improve overall productivity.

C: 咳…嗯。总之，我是个不会说出谎言的人。我可以坦然告诉你，我与阿兰队长确实在最近有见过面，也知晓他的行踪。
E: Ahem, uh... Anyway, I do not lie. I can tell you that I did indeed meet Arlan recently, and I know where he went.

C: （他的说辞和阿兰的工作规划对得上，看来他确实知道关键信息。）
E: (His words match Arlan's work plans. Seems like he does have key information.)

C: 我们波少视职级为粪土，在「波少个人百科」<unbreak>4.0</unbreak>版本中就曾记录过这件事！
E: Master Capote's Life Wiki, version <unbreak>4.0</unbreak>: Master Capote doesn't care about rank. Everyone knows that!

C: 照片里好像还有半个身影，这个是…阿兰？！
E: There's a figure that's not quite in the shot. Is that... Arlan!?

C: {NICKNAME}，这份证据有点太拐弯抹角了，还有没有更直观的啊？
E: {NICKNAME}, this evidence is a bit of a stretch... Do we have anything better?

C: 你真傻，真的。
E: You're silly, truly.

C: 没办法了。两位大人，我是界种科的小阿德勒，你们之前也许不曾见过我。
E: Ugh, never mind... I am Adler from the Department of Ecology. You may not have seen me before.

C: 并没有。作为界种科行走的「百科全书」，我只是在代替温世玲回答你们的问题。
E: I am NOT. As the walking encyclopedia in the Department of Ecology, I'm just answering your questions on behalf of Wen Shiling.

C: 后来，由于研究失利，被调去负责空间站「反重力防护网」的日常检修和电离平衡维护。
E: At some point, his research fell through, and he was transferred to handle the space station's Anti-Gravity Protection Net's daily repairs and ionization balance maintenance.

C: 看到这些照片，它们也该离开了。既然一切因为这个共同目标而起，那么目标完成，想必它们也会继续过着与科员们相安无事的生活。
E: Looking at these pictures, I think it's time they leave. It all began with this collective goal of theirs. And now that it is finally realized, they should be able to continue living in peaceful coexistence with the staff members.

C: 我们怀疑来者是「星核猎手」。这群人神出鬼没，危险得很，个个在「公司」通缉中榜上有名。
E: We suspect that it may have been the Stellaron Hunters. It's an elusive group, and very dangerous. Every member is on the IPC's wanted list.

C: 其中还有个来自朋克洛德的超级骇客，说来惭愧，我已经在她那儿吃过一次亏了——
E: They include a super hacker from Punklorde. I'm ashamed to admit that I've lost to her once before...

C: 是挺可疑。
E: It is pretty suspicious.

C: 伦纳德将探测仪对准了墙壁，墙上似乎浮现出了什么……
E: Leonard aims the detector at the wall. Something seems to appear on the wall...

C: 一滴水？我怎么觉得…这更像是一滴汗？
E: A drop of water? Why do I feel like... it's more like a drop a sweat?

C: 难以置信，空间站怎么会有这玩意儿？科员们就算再有想法，也不至于敢在墙上乱涂乱画，更何况还是…一滴汗？
E: Unbelievable. Why would something like this be in the space station? The staff wouldn't even dare scribble on the wall, let alone leave... a drop of sweat?

C: 你不是说是自己研发的嘛…
E: Didn't you say you developed this yourself...?

C: 果然…她来过这里！
E: Just as I thought... She was here!

C: 等下，你先别动！我现在看到空间站的电子屏幕就浑身发毛，让我先检查一下……
E: Wait, don't move! I get chills just looking at the space station monitors now. Let me investigate first...

C: 怎么突然来了一堆人啊……
E: What are all these people doing here...

C: 如我方才所说，对于模拟宇宙，它是重要的参考——所以它的数据被提取出来，加入了宇宙模型的演算中。
E: It's as I said – it is a very important reference for the Simulated Universe — that is why its data has been extracted and added to the calculations of the universe model.

C: 现在，你已身处以太卡带所在的数据链中，试着环顾四周吧，告诉我你的发现。
E: You are now inside the data link of the Aether Cartridge. Look around and tell me what you discover.

C: 看来，我们可以继续前进了。
E: Seems like we can now continue forward.

C: 她在办公室留下了一道后门，意图在你进入模拟宇宙的同时远程骇入，然后以某种方式与我们同行。
E: She left herself a back door in the office, performed a proxy hack the moment you entered the Simulated Universe, and found a way to continue alongside us.

C: 一切都在你的计划中吗？
E: Was it all part of your plan?

C: 暂不离开
E: Stay for Now

C: 有想过下一份工作做什么吗？
E: Have you started looking for your next job?

C: 进公司阻止你实现理想了？
E: Does working for the IPC stop you from pursuing your dreams?

C: 等会儿等会儿，但是幻觉…不应该是毫无逻辑的吗？那为什么我会看到自己的模样？
E: Wait. I thought hallucinations were supposed to be completely random? Why did I see an identical me?

C: 情况不妙…尽是些虫族停留的痕迹。有些虫卵甚至已有诞育的迹象。
E: This isn't good. Evidence of a Swarm is apparent, and it looks like several eggs are on the verge of hatching...

C: 你确定自己能安全脱身吧？
E: You're confident you can get out alive?

C: 他想自己挑战巨型真蛰虫。
E: He wants to fight the Giant Sting by himself.

C: 本质上，这取决于你是否支持他对「纯美」的理解和执着。
E: ...I suppose it all depends on how you see his understanding of and devotion to the Beauty.

C: 倘若您能见证这一切…您便可理解我狂热的理想。
E: Having witnessed this spectacle... I am sure you will come to grasp the depth of my convictions.

C: 他也有自己的想法与苦衷。毕竟纯美的星神…很可能已陨落了。
E: He has his own goals... and struggles. After all, the Aeon of Beauty has likely already fallen.

C: 那您可太看得起我了，我就是一搞内购的，顺带做点无本买卖。
E: You flatter me — I'm just a peddler doing a little business on the side.

C: 什么，你说艾丝妲叫你来找我？无实体但有生命的奇物…奇物不该问界种科吗，关密卷科什么事？
E: Huh, Asta told you to find me? A curio that doesn't have a body but is alive... Isn't the Department of Ecology full of Curio experts? That's got nothing to do with the Department of Insight.

C: 今天先到此为止吧，你等我联系。
E: Let's call it a day. Wait for me, I'll be in touch.

C: （我想起来了，另一个人是埃美丽！她当时在基座舱段。）
E: (Now I remember — the other person is Emily! She was at the base zone.)

C: 小打小闹，上不了台面的。你要是搁学会那儿发达了，苟富贵，勿相忘。
E: Small-scale — best left under the table... but if you ever make it big in the Guild, don't forget your humble friend, okay?

C: （以防万一，再回忆下开头与黑塔的对话吧…）
E: (Let me remember my initial conversation with Herta, just in case...)

C: 我开始好奇了：是你在说谎，还是她有所隐瞒？
E: So what's the story? Are you full of fanciful fiction, or is Asta the one hoarding secrets like they're going out of style?

C: 是「相位灵火」，#29丝丝喀尔的造物。她是位了不起的天才，聪明，善良，而且谦卑。
E: It's the Phase Flame, the creation of member #29, Sserkal. She was an amazing genius. Intelligent, kind, and humble.

C: 我无法确定，只能做出推论：对弱者出手相救，是医者仁心；此后袖手旁观，任事态发酵，是学者的严厉。
E: I cannot be sure. I can only hypothesize. Helping the weak hints at the merciful instinct of a medical doctor, but maintaining a cool, detached observation reveals the strictness of a scholar...

C: 人类…为什么？这与你无关……
E: Human... why? This has nothing to do with you...

C: 「阮•梅」的小生命被你无情地冲走了，它会被安全地送往收容舱。
E: Ruan Mei's little lifeform was ruthlessly flushed down the john. It will be safely transported to storage zone.

C: 我开始迷茫了。「生命的本质」这一提问，是否原本就没有答案？#1赞达尔，你也曾这样迷茫…且绝望过吗？
E: I am starting to feel lost. Perhaps the question "what is the essence of life" never had an answer? Member #1, Zandar, have you ever felt this lost... or resigned?

C: 那再好不过了。唉，这应该是会社的最后一单委托了。
E: Then that could not be more perfect. Ah, I imagine this will be the Society's last ever assignment.

C: 你都获得塔米拉认证了。
E: Even Tamila has given you her approval.

C: 好啦！
E: Alright!

C: 裂界…我好像听说过，曾经有矿工在裂界见到过往日的景象，他们还说看到过百年前驻守在这儿的铁卫。
E: The Fragmentum... I've heard about miners who saw visions of the past while being around the Fragmentum. They even said that they saw Silvermane Guards who were posted there a hundred years ago.

C: 嗯…我明白了。现在我一点都不害怕了，可是…可是他们还会再出现吗？
E: Okay... I understand now. I'm not scared anymore. But... Will they ever appear again?

C: 至于丹鼎司那边，我已经给跃渊留了言，请等待她的回复。
E: As for the Alchemy Commission, I have left a word with Yueyuan. Please wait for her to reply.

C: 这个嘛，嘻嘻，咱可不敢保证～
E: Well, let's not get ahead of ourselves, hehe...

C: ——就是把铃铛砸在他头上。
E: ...they just need a helping hand.

C: 好心把他从雪里救出来，没想到他是利用我们来对付你。你可千万别受挑拨——
E: We rescued him from the snow out of the kindness of our hearts. We had no idea he might be using us to get past you! Are you really dumb enough to fall for his...

C: 嗯，我看到了。
E: Yes, I saw it.

C: 一直都在我的衣柜里啦，只是之前没机会穿出来。
E: It's actually not new, I just never had the right occasion to try it on.

C: 没什么要带的。
E: Nope, just myself.

C: 现在看来，当时有许多重大的历史事件被埋藏在了风雪之下…那些记忆甚至没能随着历任大守护者传承下来。
E: It seems that much of Belobog's history from that time was buried deep beneath the snow. Those memories were lost and weren't passed down to the subsequent generations of Supreme Guardians.

C: 必要的话，武力取胜。
E: Let's bring out the big guns.

C: 呃…倒是没必要闹得那么僵啦，托帕小姐看上去也不是那么不讲理的人。
E: Uh... I don't think we're at that stage yet. Miss Topaz seems like a reasonable person.

C: {NICKNAME}，三月，别跟他浪费口水——咱们上！
E: {NICKNAME}, March — no need to waste our breath on this idiot. Let's do this!

C: 啥？那玩意…不是裂界里的生物吗？居然还能当宠物养？！
E: What!? Isn't that thing a Fragmentum monster? She's keeping one as a pet!?

C: 嗯？账账好像很开心的样子？
E: Huh? Looks like Numby's in a good mood.

C: 希儿…好，我明白了！我们一定尽力帮上布洛妮娅的忙。
E: Got it, Seele. We'll do what we can to help Bronya out.

C: 走吧，{NICKNAME}，我们回克里珀堡去。
E: Come on, {NICKNAME}, to Qlipoth Fort.

C: 我恰好认识一位朋友，她对托帕的身世有所了解。的确，因为故乡的遭遇，在她眼里，被公司兼并大概是存续贝洛伯格这方文明的唯一方式。
E: I happen to have a friend with knowledge of Topaz. What Topaz said about her homeworld is indeed true... which is why she believes that the IPC's takeover of Belobog is the only way of ensuring the city's survival...

C: 我明白。所以我打算一步一步来…先试着改变你的想法。
E: I understand. That's why I've been taking things one step at a time. The first step was changing your mind.

C: 不过…托帕，「钻石」也算是你我的贵人，如此重要的日子，你来这么一下，多少让战略投资部有些不好交代吧？
E: Diamond's been a great help to both of us. Your antics on such a crucial day can't exactly have painted the Strategic Investment Department in a good light, y'know?

C: 这个道理，我衷心希望布洛妮娅也能理解。
E: I hope Bronya takes these words seriously.

C: 克拉拉，你好呀！咦？史瓦罗是出门了吗？
E: Hey there, Clara! Huh? Is Svarog not around?

C: 大家的愿望各不相同，有不同的色彩…如果同意了托帕姐姐的条件，大家是不是就没法实现自己的梦想了？
E: Everyone has different dreams. If we accept Miss Topaz's offer, then doesn't that mean our dreams will never come true?

C: …不好办啊，真是不好办。布洛妮娅姑娘年纪轻轻，居然要承受这前无古人的压力……
E: ...That's a tricky situation alright... a lot for anyone to handle, let alone someone as young as Lady Bronya.

C: 你这边呢，大家有讨论出什么结果吗？办公室里这么嘈杂，我一句话都听不清……
E: Did you come to a conclusion with the ministers? It's so loud I can't tell what anyone's saying...

C: 「战略投资部」集结了公司内部的精英，他们中的大部分手腕都非常…强硬。
E: The Strategic Investment Department comprises the IPC's most elite employees, many of whom can be very... forceful.

C: 连上八天，不如杀了我…
E: Eight days in a row. Honestly, just kill me...

C: （三月一直在期待的煦日节，看来这次也体验不上了啊……）
E: (March was looking forward to the Solwarm Festival for ages... Looks like she's missed her chance, this time...)

C: 原来佩拉也有那么凶的一面啊……
E: I never knew Pela had a strict side...

C: 我明白了，你是想让我去卧底。
E: Got it, you want me to go undercover.

C: 我可以把这个任务交给你吗，{NICKNAME}？
E: Can I entrust you with this task, {NICKNAME}?

C: 我无数次警告过那些患者，但他们还是执迷不悟…也怪不得他们不愿意把和「互助会」有关的消息透露给我。
E: I warned the patients countless times, but it seems like they had their heads in the sand all along... No wonder they kept the mutual aid society a secret from me.

C: 走开，走开！离远点，我这儿不欢迎和那个女人有瓜葛的家伙！今天药店关门了，谁也别来烦我！
E: Get lost — now! If you're a friend of that woman then you're not welcome here! Shop's closed today, no customers!

C: 「穷人们的医生」这种说法，纯粹是某些人在自我感动而已。瓦赫以前虽然经常发放一些免费的药物，但他其实压根不关心那些吃药的人……
E: "People's doctor..." That's just what people who've bought into the myth like to say. Vache used to distribute free medicine all the time, but, uh... he couldn't have cared less about the people taking the medicine...

C: 等你了解了她的情况以后，就再回来找我聊聊看法吧。然后…我想拜托你帮我一个忙。
E: Once you've understood her situation, come back and tell me what you think. After that... I want to ask for your help again.

C: 哎…也说不上多严重，只是偶尔需要卧床治疗，耽误了工作生计。
E: *sigh* ...Not terribly serious. But they needed to get treatment every now and then, which did impact their livelihood.

C: 结果就是…轻症的患者在虚假的「药效」陪同下痊愈，将一切归功于所谓的「特效药」；而重症患者的病情则会快速加剧，甚至提前迎来死亡。
E: The result... patients with mild illness would attribute their recovery to the so-called wonder medicine, while patients with serious illness would quickly deteriorate... and sometimes die.

C: 但还请你不要心软，一定要将瓦赫留下的试剂悉数回收。所有的责任和后果都由我来承担，你不必为此感到焦虑。
E: You mustn't hesitate — recover every last reagent that Vache left behind. I'll take responsibility for the consequences — don't worry about that.

C: 告诉你吧，我是「疑难重症患者互助会」的会长。你面前这些药物可是我们诸多会员的命根子啊，你确定要做触犯他们利益的事吗？
E: You listen here — I'm the president of the Complex Illness Mutual Aid Society. The medicine we hold here is lifeblood for many of our members. Are you sure you want to deprive them of that?

C: 现在…我想跟你完整地讲讲有关他的事。
E: ...Now's as good a time as any to tell you Vache's whole story.

C: 你在说什么？
E: What are you talking about?

C: 真没想到你口风这么严哪。不过现在，我们大可以打开天窗说亮话。
E: I didn't think you can be so tight-lipped, but now, we should be honest and clear this up.

C: 没错，这都多亏了你从中斡旋，才能既保全她的安危，又促成她的心境转变。
E: Yes, thanks to your mediation. Not only did you ensure her safety, but also encouraged her to change.

C: …住口！我已经全都忘掉了，我什么都不知道…不要再让我想起来那种事了！
E: ... Shut up. I've put it all behind me now. I don't know anything... Don't you even try to remind me of that kind of thing!

C: 这个怪物似乎没有离开大门附近的意思…只能打倒它了。
E: This monster doesn't seem to have any intention of leaving the area near the gate... Guess we'll have to take it out.

C: 不会，我们一家人的笔迹我绝对不会认错。别忘了，他们可都是医生。
E: No, I recognize my family's handwriting. We are all doctors after all.

C: 当然。
E: Of course.

C: 我想给她准备一份礼物。{NICKNAME}，你现在应该比我更熟悉上层区吧？你有什么建议吗？
E: I want to buy my mom a gift. {NICKNAME}, you're more of an Overworld local than I am now. Any suggestions?

C: 去黄金歌剧院看一场戏吧。
E: How about watching a play at Golden Theater?

C: 在下层待得太久，我也已经很久没闻到过花朵的芬芳了。
E: I've been underground for so long, I already forgot what flowers smell like.

C: 瓦赫喜欢的花是…
E: What was Vache's favorite flower...?

C: 有些别的事要忙…
E: I have other things to attend to...

C: 后来，随着时间的推移，纪念馆的展出范畴也逐渐拓宽，直到变成了今天的模样。
E: As time went on, new exhibits were continually added to the memorial until it became the museum we see today.

C: （这些箱子八成就是用来装失窃的文物的。那几台机器人就是在看守这些东西。）
E: (These crates were probably used to store stolen items... Someone left robots to guard them.)

C: 喜欢，很有趣。
E: Love it — loads of fun.

C: 不会不会，史瓦罗先生现在可好客啦。跟克拉拉来吧，我会和他说清楚情况的。
E: Don't worry, Mr. Svarog has warmed up to guests a lot more now. I'll explain the whole situation to him. Here, this way.

C: …好的，布洛妮娅小姐。
E: ...Okay, Miss Bronya.

C: 我记得有几个人平时一直在广场附近放风…就从他们开始问起吧。
E: I remember lots of folks like to relax around the plaza. Let's head there first.

C: 不，我不清楚，也从来没细问过。
E: I'm not entirely sure — I never asked.

C: …你提供的线索我都记录下来了，莱姆士汀先生。感谢您对银鬃铁卫的信任，后续调查如果有任何进展，我们会及时通知您的。
E: ...I have recorded all the clues you provided, Mr. Limestein. Thank you for putting your trust in the Silvermane Guards. We will keep you informed if there are any developments in the investigation.

C: 再给我头上记一笔大功！
E: Another great accomplishment to my name!

C: 你听到一阵清脆的「咔哒」声。寒腿叔叔打开了房门。
E: You hear a "click." Mr. Cold Feet opens the door.

C: <unbreak>50000</unbreak>信用点。
E: <unbreak>50,000</unbreak> credits.

C: 这样，我倒是有个提议，你看看合不合适——你瞧，我这段时间搞文物生意赚了几个小钱…我把我所得的三分之一给你，怎么样？
E: Okay, okay, I have a proposal — I'm sure you'll find this very reasonable. Yeah, I made a few small fortunes in the artifact business lately... and I can give you a third of my earnings. How about that, huh?

C: 这次想要请您帮忙联系的是磐岩镇的行脚医生<color=#dbc291ff>娜塔莎</color>——拜托您了，{NICKNAME}！
E: Could you help us contact the itinerant doctor at the Boulder Town, <color=#dbc291ff>Natasha</color> — thanks, {NICKNAME}!

C: 什么支援？
E: Villain-teer?

C: 什么呀，不许看！这里面可写着鼹鼠党的机密呢！
E: What? You can't see that! There's top-secret Mole intel in there!

C: 嘿嘿，没事的。能帮上佩拉小姐的忙，克拉拉也觉得很开心。
E: It's no problem. I'm glad to be able to help Pela out.

C: 还要继续吗？！
E: Are we still doing this!?

C: 你也太好懂了。
E: Huh, you are so easy to read.

C: 好的，那就写没有。
E: Fine. No experience it is.

C: 哈哈，没想到你们这么要好呢。不过，希儿想要表达什么，我大概也能猜到了。
E: Haha, I'm surprised at how close you two are. In fact, I can more or less get what Seele is trying to say.

C: 也许还可以处理得更好。
E: Maybe you could have handled it better.

C: 得、得救啦！
E: You're s—saved!

C: 事情的大概你已经听娜塔莎讲过了吧？矿工和流浪者因为矿脉大打出手，史瓦罗的手下将所有的人都赶了出去。
E: You got the gist from Natasha, right? The miners and vagrants came to blows over the vein, then Svarog's subordinates pushed everyone back.

C: 虎克的父母去世之前跟我关系很好，算是忘年交。娜塔莎问我能不能收养虎克的时候，就毫不犹豫地答应了。
E: Hook's parents were close friends of mine, though I'm much older than them. When Natasha asked me if I could adopt Hook, I agreed without hesitation.

C: 那边的保姆，我之前看见他偷偷进了费斯曼老爷子的帐篷，然后带着个箱子出来了。你们说，他是不是嫌疑最大？
E: The helper over there, I saw him sneak into Fersman's tent and come out holding a box. See? Isn't he the most suspicious one?

C: 别耽误时间。
E: Let's not waste time.

C: …完了完了，这个理由听着也太糟了！你不会因为这个就怀疑我吧？
E: Oh dear, oh dear... I know that's a lame alibi! But I swear it's the truth.

C: 她好像坚决否认呢…要不，我们再想想？
E: She's pretty stubborn about denying it... Should we think it over again?

C: 如果犯人真的是保姆哥哥的话，那他和小贩两个人的证言就都是假的了！
E: If the thief really is the helper, then what he and the merchant said would both be wrong!

C: 好吧，我们回去找老爹……
E: Alright then, let's go find daddy...

C: {M#老弟}{F#老妹}，你就帮个忙呗——我在矿区搞了个矿具租赁的生意，但是有几件关键的矿具丢了，想让你帮忙找回来——多简单一事，对你来说还不是小菜一碟？
E: Just do me a favor — I started a mining tool rental business in the mines, but I'm missing a few key tools. I want you to help me find them. How simple is that? A piece of cake, right?

C: 大矿区那边…会不会也受到刚才的战斗影响了啊？
E: ...Do you think the Great Mine was affected by our fighting on the surface?

C: 想哭就哭出来吧！
E: Let it out!

C: 等时机合适，再转告布洛妮娅吧。现在，就别破坏这美好的氛围了。
E: We should tell Bronya when the time's right. Let's not dampen the spirit just yet.

C: 我的选择……
E: My choice...

C: 哈，你们两个真是……
E: Ha, you two...

C: 哎，罢了罢了，我已经不在乎了——从今以后，我和那个女人再无关系。
E: *sigh* I guess it doesn't matter. From here on out, I'm over that woman.

C: 别、别伤心！玲宝肯定还能找到其他证据的……
E: D—Don't worry Lynxy! I'm sure you'll get concrete proof one day...

C: 看着挺气派的…
E: It looks quite impressive...

C: 你说话可真难懂。咱们接着赶路吧。
E: I don't really get what you just said. Anyway, ahem, we should get moving.
I... What?

C: 不、不是这样的，克拉拉没有受人委托…只是，流浪者们的生存条件很差，他们的聚落里也没有诊所，所以克拉拉才想来帮帮他们。
E: N—No, it's not like that. I wasn't made to do anything... It's just that, the living conditions for the vagrants aren't great. There's not even a clinic in their camp. So, I wanted to help them out.

C: 没、没关系的，克拉拉还有帕金斯陪，而且…我在这里还有些东西要找。
E: I—It's fine, I have Perkins for company. And... I have some more things I need to look for here first.

C: 不准走不准走，要是我们现在就回去了，刚才做过的努力不就白费了吗？虎克保证这就是最后一次了，我们走吧！
E: No! Don't leave! If we go back now, everything we've done so far will be for nothing! I promise this is the last time. Let's go!
*sigh*

C: 你这个小东西不也在说话吗？
E: Wow, you can talk as well, little thing?

C: 看来，帕斯卡之所以一直在偷零件…是因为它要修缮这座城镇呢。
E: It seems that Pascal was stealing parts because he wants to repair the town.

C: 封面上好像有名字呢，好工整的笔迹呀。不对，工整到这个程度，应该是直接印上去的才对……
E: Wow. Such neat handwriting... no, wait a minute, I think this was printed onto the cover...

C: 你不一起来吗？
E: You're not coming?

C: 好吧，我就叮嘱一句：这后面可就是未知的领域了，各位可千万小心翼翼，注意脚下……
E: Alright, well let me issue a warning now: Everything from here on out is uncharted territory — we must proceed with the utmost caution...

C: 哦…原来如此。开始搜吧，一定要把博士的研究成果全都找到。
E: Oh... I see. Let's start. We must unearth the doctor's research conclusions — all of them.

C: 抱歉，博士…但这些成果必须由「筑城者」亲自管理。
E: I'm sorry, doctor... but these results must be taken care of by the Architects.

C: 干得好，救了我们一命。
E: Nice work, you saved us.

C: 这么说来，你是找到什么线索了吗，荣誉队员？
E: Honorary member, you found some clues?

C: 虎克不是很理解，具体该怎么做呢？
E: Hook doesn't get it. What are we supposed to do?

C: 呃…不好意思，我看入神了。没想到真的还有人来搭话。
E: Oh! Uh... sorry, I was in a bit of a trance. I didn't know someone was about to strike up a conversation.

C: …你是觉得「菌菌」配不上那块石头嘛？
E: ...So you don't think Junjun deserves those gems?

C: 这张纸，就是那个马虎的家伙掉的「胡同」吧？我们把它还回去吧！
E: Is this the "contact" that careless guy lost? Let's give it back to him!

C: 荣誉队员，我们别和他废话啦，直接把他打趴下吧！
E: Honorary member, we shouldn't waste any time talking to him. Let's just knock him out!

C: 虎克收下了，这样就有八百冬城盾用来参加拍卖啦！
E: Hook generously accepts the reward! We've got <unbreak>800</unbreak> shield for the auction!

C: 七百五十冬城盾两次！
E: <unbreak>750</unbreak> shield going twice!

C: 那个出高价的神秘买家…
E: That mysterious high-bidding stranger...

C: 我能说不吗？
E: Can I say no?

C: 太好了。
E: Great!

C: 我可是鼹鼠党的老大，要是不把肚子填饱，就没力气惩罚坏蛋啦！
E: I'm the boss of The Moles! If I don't get enough to eat, how will I have the energy to punish villains?

C: 哼，你根本不明白古代遗物的价值。
E: Hmph, clearly you don't understand the value of ancient relics.
█ Parts███ need██? █ █Need █ ███ need! ██ need██! Hurt██ don't.

C: 唔，谢谢…又要给{NICKNAME}{F#姐姐}{M#哥哥}添麻烦了…！
E: Oh, th—thanks then... I'm so sorry to trouble you again, {NICKNAME}!

C: 但…如果选择了格式化，帕斯卡一定会彻底失去情感智能……
E: But, once the formatting is complete, Pascal's emotional intelligence will vanish...

C: …克拉拉也明白这点。但是……
E: I understand that, but...

C: 而且，你看——它们好像对你特别热情！就连克拉拉也没法在初次见面时就得到大家的认可……
E: Look how excited they are about you! I've never met anyone for the first time that was so happy to see me...

C: 是啊，就好像是…帕斯卡一直都陪在我们身边一样。
E: Yeah, it's like Pascal is always with us.

C: 想继续向北方前进的话，就必须穿过那片「地狱」。你们准备好了吗？
E: If we want to progress further north, we will need to cross that hell. Are you ready?

C: 给我一点时间……
E: Give me some time...

C: 你的智取就这？！
E: What happened to brainwaves!?

C: 老弟入伍后，我就没再跟他打过架了。小的时候他可打不过我，现在嘛……
E: I haven't fought with Gepard since he enlisted. He could never beat me when we were little, but now...

C: 我都搞定了，茉莉人呢？
E: I'm all done! Where is Molly?

C: 长话短说——这起机器人事故只是我在追查的事件的其中一环。这里面的利益纠葛非常复杂，而那位茉莉小姐很可能已经触动了某些人的神经……
E: Long story short, this robot incident is just one chapter in my ongoing investigation. The stakes here are very high, and Miss Molly may have ruffled some feathers.

C: 口气真大啊，看来你们是没把我这情报官放在眼里…这可是个大问题，之后也要提上日程了。
E: Wow... It seems you aren't taking me seriously at all. I am an intelligence officer! This is a major case, and I just might have to put it on my agenda!

C: 但至少我找回了些东西——这是不是能证明…你刚才做的事是有效果的？
E: But at least I've got something back — does this prove that... what you just did actually worked?

C: 请原谅我，这是为了你的安全着想…请你忘记我吧。
E: Please forgive me. It's for your own safety... Please, just forget about me.

C: 希露瓦说过，星核很可能被藏在贝洛伯格北部的雪原中。想抵达那里，恐怕得先找到这座裂界迷宫的出口。
E: Serval said that the Stellaron was very likely hidden in the Snow Plains north of Belobog. If we want to get there, I'm afraid we'll have to find the exit to this Fragmentum maze first.

C: 以下只是我的推测——你听到的声音，或许是星核以某种方式向可可利亚发出的讯息。
E: This is merely speculation... but perhaps the voice you heard is the Stellaron somehow conveying information to Cocolia...

C: 啊？！你的意思是「星核」之间能隔空传话？这我可从来没听说过……
E: Huh!? You mean that Stellarons can communicate? I've never heard that before...

C: 查封她的实验室，扣押所有研究人员——他们进行的是非法的研究。
E: Sequester her lab and detain the researchers — their work is illegal.

C: 更重要的使命…？
E: Higher mission...?

C: 不…这…不是我想要的……
E: No... I... I don't want this...

C: 想得美！还没打倒你以前，我们是不会倒下的！
E: You wish! We're not going down before you do!

C: 而你们…将成为这个新世界的基石！
E: And you... will become the foundation of the new world!

C: 去下层传话的任务就交给我们。
E: We'll go to the Underworld and pass on the message.

C: …我说不上来，希儿。全身上下…都感觉…很冰冷。
E: ...I don't know, Seele. I feel... cold... all over.

C: 能不能正经点！咱是真的很好奇……
E: Be serious! I really wanna know...

C: ——总有不会动摇的人。
E: Some people can't be swayed.

C: 这也太简单了吧！
E: That's so easy!

C: 我最不擅长给别人建议了。
E: I'm really bad at giving advice.

C: 你来了，我在现场找了些目击者，但是感觉证据还不全。你联系上那个…梅姐了吗？
E: You're here. I found some witnesses at the scene, but it seems like the evidence is not complete. Did you manage to contact... Mei?

C: 您再仔细回想下发生了什么。
E: Please try your best to recall what happened.

C: 我把证人们的证言都记下来了，你想问谁的？
E: I've recorded all the eyewitness testimonies. Whose testimony do you want to check?

C: 梅姐将笔记交到了芦慧的手上，然后独自离开了这里，她还得帮芦慧接小孩回家。
E: Mei hands the notebook to Luhui and leaves the room to pick up Luhui's child.

C: 你深深地吸了一口气，将力量往下凝集在腿部，踹向树身。
E: You take a deep breath and put power into your legs, then kick the tree.

C: 我拍完照片了。
E: The pictures are all done.

C: 这就是为什么仙舟明令禁止大部分机巧不得模仿人类的情绪表征。那东西对机器不但多余，而且有害。
E: That's why the Xianzhou expressly prohibits most ingenia from imitating human emotion. Emotions are not only superfluous to machines — they are dangerous.

C: 为什么找蘑菇写诗？
E: Why ask a mushroom to write poetry?

C: 我已经悄悄打听过了，她的同事们说，她现在单身来着。
E: I may have been asking around. Her colleagues said that she's single right now.

C: 只要你在「韵律」、「对仗」上得到我的认可，我自然会把灵感玉兆交出来。不然你就别碍着我继续读诗学习。
E: As long as your rhythm and counterpoints meet my standard, I'll hand over my Inspo Jade Abacus. Otherwise, stop disturbing my poetry study.

C: 哼，小意思。
E: Hmph, this is a piece of cake for me.

C: 主人在「如何让静斋小姐爱上自己」这个问题上，给出了成本最高、效用最低的解：写情诗。
E: Master, you've adopted the most expensive but least efficient solution — writing love poems — for the issue of "winning the heart of Ms. Jingzhai."

C: 你只是在嫉妒那个她喜欢的诗人，嫉妒是一种毫无效用的情绪。
E: You're just jealous of the poet whom she dated before. Yet, jealousy is a useless emotion.

C: 静斋卜官吗？身为她的同事，我不方便在公开场合评价别人。
E: Jingzhai, our Managing Diviner? As her colleague, I shouldn't comment about her in public.

C: 你听明白了吗？他说，让我，去揭掉。
E: You get it? He asked me to remove the posters.

C: 还有，我会按公司货运的双倍…不，三倍价格付费！外加小姐姐们的<color=#dbc291ff>会员邀请链接</color>！你也想见识见识狐仙小姐姐的迷人魅力，对吧？
E: I'll pay you double— no, triple the amount the delivery service company charges! As a bonus, I'll throw in the beauty's <color=#dbc291ff>membership invitation link</color>! You want to behold the foxian beauty's charm for yourself, don't you?

C: （我已经到了星槎海了，温符瑞的短信应该也快了吧。）
E: (I'm already at the Starskiff Haven, I should be able to receive Wen Furui's message soon.)

C: …会不会对温符瑞科员来说有些太残忍了。
E: ...Wouldn't this be a little too cruel to Researcher Wen?

C: 她是{NICKNAME}。
E: She's {NICKNAME}.

C: …那不是正好吗？
E: ...Wouldn't that be the perfect strategy though?

C: 但其中一张照片上，我找到了博识学会内部人员才会使用的特殊光学标识。这代表着某位学士抵达此处进行研究，并为同行留下了一些线索。
E: In one of the pictures, I noticed a special optical marking used only by the members of the Intelligentsia Guild. It shows that a scholar has done research at that particular location and left some clues for his or her peers.

C: 咱们走吧，去持明卵那儿看看。
E: Let's go and check out the Vidyadhara eggs.

C: 陶德仿佛从睡梦中被人叫醒，他下意识地摸了摸自己的口袋，神色开始焦躁起来。
E: Todd seems like he had just been awakened from his sleep. Instinctively, he reaches for his pocket and immediately looks anxious.

C: 所以你想进入鳞渊境…
E: So you want to enter Scalegorge Waterscape...

C: 陶德年轻昂扬的脸上露出一丝受伤的表情。
E: A look of pain falls across Todd's young face.

C: 旁的就不说了，这些和今天的话题没关系。
E: That's all you need to know. The rest is irrelevant to what's happening today.

C: 为什么不能治疗魔阴身？
E: Why stop her from treating the mara-struck?

C: 龙女大人暂时压抑了魔阴身发作，也就意味十王司可能忽略那些人。让龙女大人治疗下去，无异于放任「魔阴身」流窜市井，制造恐慌。
E: However, the Dragon Lady's mara-suppression could lead to mara-struck falling under the Ten-Lords Commission's radar. If we let her carry on, we'll have mara-struck on every street corner — people will panic!

C: 嗯嗯！
E: Uh-huh!

C: 最重要的是，我活着完成了自己的研究结果，得到了学士们所追求的答案——虽然它更像一个恶劣的玩笑。
E: Best of all, I lived to see the results of my research and got the answers to what all the scholars were vying for — despite it all turning into a nasty joke.

C: 可惜对方不是这样认为的。
E: Yes, but I doubt he recognized her.

C: 是吗？唉，我就知道她在丹鼎司里忙不过来。
E: Is that so? *sigh* She's always so busy in the Alchemy Commission.

C: 你们不会是被人骗了之后，还帮人数钱的那种人吧？我不相信。
E: Are you the type of people that help someone who tricked you? I don't think so.

C: 呵呵，这样的大事自然由龙师长老们做主，妾身说不上来。
E: Hehe, such a major matter as this is naturally up to the Preceptor elders. I couldn't possibly say.

C: 但如今你回到罗浮，事情却不同了。龙师们又兴起更易人选的念头，只会为白露小姐带来麻烦。
E: Now that you're back, everything has changed. The Preceptors are starting to think of finding other candidates, which means nothing but trouble for Miss Bailu.

C: 原本长老们在继任龙尊一事上还有扳回一城的发言权。孰料丹枫自定人选。事实既成，他们只能接受这样的结果。
E: The elders used to have a small say in appointing the new High Elder. Who could have imagined that Dan Feng would pick his own successor? And yet, that is precisely what happened, and all they could do was accept the result.

C: 哈哈哈，持明族的规制，我们外人无从评判。
E: Haha! Us outsiders should not judge the laws of the Vidyadhara.

C: 您的固执确有几分丹枫的影子。
E: Your stubbornness is redolent of your previous incarnation.

C: 「为止若木苏生，寿瘟遗祸…」
E: "Shun the tree's growth, the residual plague..."

C: 这是…持明族的幽灵？
E: Is this... a Vidyadhara ghost?

C: 挖掘龙血的潜力，将异族纳入龙祖血脉之中，这不正是「化龙妙法」的意义所在吗？
E: To unearth the potential might of Long's blood... and incorporate other races into the flesh of the dragon — isn't that the real meaning behind the Transmutation Arcanum?

C: 你拥有的是属于你的龙尊之力，是重新编织封印，结成玄根的生命力。与我这边只擅长破坏摧毁的力量截然不同。
E: What you have is the power of the high elder that belongs to you — the power of life that can reforge the Arbor's seal and the vitality of the eternal roots... It is a world away from my power of destruction.

C: 的确，我们不会再见面了帕。普洱，干掉他帕。
E: Yes, you will... permanently. Pu'er, get rid of him.

C: 他的长相？挺帅的呀…
E: His appearance? He looks pretty handsome to me...

C: 怎么能叫胡闹呢！我们这是查案耶！
E: Yeah right... Anyway, since when did investigators shy away from delicate situations?

C: 好的，请随我来看。
E: Alright, follow me.

C: 小三月的想象力太丰富了。仙舟出入境都要扫描行李，做不到这种事的。况且，进入那个角落时，罗刹身上似乎也没带着那口棺材。
E: That's quite a conjecture, March. The Xianzhou scans all luggage moving into and out of their territory — it'd be nearly impossible to pull off. Not to mention, when Luocha turns the corner, he doesn't have the coffin with him.

C: （呃，既来之则安之……）
E: (I, uh... I try to go with the flow.)

C: 金发的异邦人？该不会是…二位找他什么事？
E: A traveler with blonde hair? Could it be... May I ask why you're looking for him?

C: 我们也想在仙舟多多增进了解，结交朋友。能有这样的机会，也是我们的荣幸。
E: The feeling is mutual, Lady Yukong. We would be honored.

C: 与两位无关，是我不分场合，失仪了。
E: On the contrary, I apologize for allowing my own personal matters to encroach on your time.

C: 我知道她是对的，我知道斗舰飞行士是劳累又危险的工作。可我还是想在星间飞行，在辽阔的银河中为仙舟联盟而战……
E: I know she's right — I know being a fighter pilot is an exhausting and dangerous job... but I still want to fly among the stars — to fight for the Xianzhou Alliance across the vast galaxy...

C: 晴霓给我们的。
E: Qingni gave it to us.

C: 怎么？还有什么事吗？
E: Oh? Something else on your mind?

C: 你怎么那么关注驭空啊？
E: Why do you pay so much attention to Yukong?

C: 这件事，我们已经谈过很多次了。不行就是不行。
