E: *sigh* We've talked about this many times. No means no.

C: 嗯，必然如此。
E: Ha, inevitably so.

C: 对，作为让你帮忙的补偿——你没有问题想问我吗？我让你陷入沉睡，又把你唤醒；把你丢弃在黑塔，又把你诱来仙舟；我欠你许多解释，你不想知道吗？
E: Yes, as compensation for helping me... You don't have any questions? I put you into a deep sleep then reawakened you, abandoned you at the space station then lured you to the Xianzhou... I owe you an explanation or two — don't you want to know?

C: 因为那颗星核是被修改过的，黑塔捕获了它之后，对它做了许多研究，那是多宇宙里唯一一颗不会污染人类的星核。
E: The Stellaron in question was modified. After seizing it, Herta conducted a lot of research — it's the only Stellaron in the universe that doesn't contaminate humans.

C: 那真是谢谢她喔。
E: Guess I owe her my thanks, then.

C: 原本的字迹隐没不见了，而另一行笔墨随着水痕洇开——
E: The handwriting disappears, and another line of writing blurs due to the water stain —

C: 哈哈，小孩子就是有活力呢。就依你说的办。
E: Haha, the young are the antidote. Stargazer Navalia it is.

C: 不必担心我们二人。
E: No need to worry about the two of us.

C: 可唯独在活命这件事上…她的运气却又好得惊人。无论怎样的艰险，她总能逢凶化吉。
E: However, when it came to surviving... her fortunes were incredible. Even in the worst situations imaginable, she was always able to turn the tide.

C: 自诉病征听起来…倒不像是归我管的。
E: Those symptoms... don't sound like my area of expertise.

C: 我身为行商，受人所托运送「信物」，并不知晓背后隐情。踏入幽囚狱确有所图，但现在看来，罗浮并没有我索求之物。
E: I was asked to deliver a token in my capacity as a traveling merchant — I knew nothing of its significance. I admit, I did have my own agenda for entering The Shackling Prison... but in the end, I found that the Luofu did not possess what I was looking for.

C: 我听她说过，数百年前，「云上五骁」曾在这儿相聚宴饮。
E: She told me that the High-Cloud Quintet once gathered and feasted here hundreds of years ago.

C: 汪汪，汪汪汪汪！
E: Woof woof, woof woof woof woof!

C: （要不，就这样不管了吧）
E: (What if, I just leave it be)

C: 小弟弟，咱们这是往哪儿走？
E: Where exactly are we headed, young man?

C: 大姐姐是从其他仙舟来的么？是「曜青」，还是「方壶」？
E: So are you from one of the other Xianzhou ships? The Yaoqing? The Fanghu?

C: （放下小说）
E: (Put the novel down)

C: 到我了。
E: My turn.

C: 谁会拒绝永远活下去的机会呢？只是仙舟全然不在乎短生种的福祉啊！他们固执地禁绝走向长生的光荣之路。
E: Who would turn down the opportunity to live forever? The Xianzhou doesn't care one bit about the well-being of short-life species! They stubbornly blockade the glorious path to immortality.

C: 节哀顺变…
E: Sorry for your loss...

C: 灰牡丹，你截获密信了吗？
E: Gray Peony, did you intercept the secret letter?

C: 你看到密信内容了？唉…这项工作进展还有些困难，神策府的猎狗都太狡诈了。
E: You read the contents? Ugh... this job is proving to be somewhat difficult. Those devils at the Seat of Divine Foresight are too cunning.

C: 嚯？怎么又来人了？学徒们都逃了，工造司只有老夫一人。你们几个，也快快逃命吧！
E: But what is the meaning of this? I'm the only one left here — the apprentices all fled... You should probably do the same!

C: 大家各有职责在身，打从进工造司那天起，我照料司部中仪器运转，无一日懈怠，今天也不能。
E: Everyone has their duties and obligations. From the day I joined the Artisanship Commission, I've been taking care of the ins and outs of its operations without a day's rest. And today is no exception.

C: 展翅的鹰不曾眷恋它曾坠落的山崖，扬帆的船不曾怀恋她曾搁浅的海峡。
E: The eagle returns from an unsuccessful hunt, the sailor avoids the course they know to be dangerous.

C: 不…等一下！
E: Wait! Hold on!

C: 为了防止各位对太卜司重器有什么误会，我得详细说说它的原理——
E: I feel like I must explain in detail the principles behind the Divination Commission's ultimate weapon to avoid any misunderstandings...

C: 往者不可谏，来者犹可追。三月七，不要回望。
E: The past cannot be blamed, while the future can still be pursued. March 7th, do not look back.

C: 好困啊……
E: So sleepy...

C: 哟！{NICKNAME}！这么巧，你也在我记忆里呀。
E: Hey, {NICKNAME}! Fancy seeing you here.

C: 我倒是不觉得自己有那么重要啦…还有人会这么大费周章封印我的记忆……
E: Am I really that important to someone...? I don't think there's anyone who'd go to all the trouble of locking up my memories...

C: 桑博竟然是…
E: Sampo turned out to be...

C: 等等…含、含光？
E: Wait... H—Hanguang?

C: 我会像我过去做过的那样，一柄一柄地找到那人铸造的剑，将它们一一折断，尽数熔毁！
E: I'll track down every single sword he forged and melt them down one after another, just like I've been doing all these years!

C: 还能去哪？都说了，她要往存放金人的仓库去了，那里的金人都挺贵重的。
E: Where else? Like I said, she was headed straight for the warehouse, where all the valuable aurumatons are.

C: 你说的不无道理，当时的情况是，在那位纯美骑士的带领下，使团将剑送交工造司。负责交接的匠人证明，他们没有带走武库中的任何物品。
E: Hmm, that makes sense. The delegation, led by the Knight of Beauty, delivered the sword to the Artisanship Commission. The craftsman who received it testified that they didn't take anything from the arsenal.

C: 接下来，也要多麻烦你了。
E: I'm counting on you then.

C: 是我太过偏激了。孤云毫无疑问是一柄英雄之剑，我…我为此前的冒昧向各位道歉。
E: My position was too extreme. Guyun is truly a Sword of Heroes. I... I apologize to all of you for my behavior.

C: 骑士明白骑士决斗的规矩，他不再争辩，而是满心期待着你和云璃能够倾听孤云的过去。
E: The knight understands the rules of knightly duels. He ceases arguing and instead eagerly awaits for you and Yunli to listen to Guyun's past.

C: 害怕？你确实与其他魔剑有着不一样的气质，但这不过是为了利用好奇心来蛊惑我罢了。
E: Afraid? Well, you do have a different aura from other cursed swords, but you're just trying to use my curiosity to lure me in.

C: 闭嘴，保持警惕！步离狼卒的狩猎永不休止。
E: Quiet! And stay alert! Borisin Wolftroopers never give up the hunt.

C: 没错，至少在那个时候，云璃并没有窃走宝剑，我们去的是金人仓库。
E: Exactly. So at least Yunli didn't steal the sword at that time, because we were at the aurumaton warehouse.

C: 您有所不知，这在推理故事中叫「红鲱鱼」，意思是「误导思路的假线索」！
E: Have you ever heard of something called a Red Herring in detective stories? It's a fake clue that leads you down the wrong path!

C: 说话？我们说话的方式有什么问题吗？副警长阁下，我说话的方式很奇怪吗？
E: Is there something wrong with the way we are talking? Deputy Sheriff, am I talking in a strange way?

C: 还是谈谈这起难解的疑案吧！这桩案件的受害者，是一位名叫「花火」的银河富商……
E: Let's discuss this difficult case, then! The victim is a galactic business magnate named Sparkle...

C: 最后是赌徒钟珊。他曾在一场赌局中输给花火大人，不得不交出自己的传家之宝，可能正因如此，他对花火大人怀恨在心。
E: Finally there is the gambler, Zhongshan. He lost a bet to Miss Sparkle, and he had to hand over his family heirloom. It's possible he harbored a grudge against her.

C: 好啊！那就让我们鉴赏一下您的推理吧。
E: Good! Then let us appreciate your powers of deduction.

C: 而那三个人看起来竟比自己还要快乐！花火大人的自尊不允许这样的事发生！
E: And those three all looked happier than her! Miss Sparkle's ego wouldn't allow that to happen!

C: 为此，他必须第一时间赶到现场，确认死者是否留下了对自己不利的证据。而从他的行为来看，应该和那块画布有关吧，也许死亡讯息就在其上。
E: That's why he had to rush to the crime scene as soon as possible, to confirm whether or not the victim left any evidence implicating him. And judging by his behavior, it probably had something to do with that canvas, like some final words.

C: …并不是凶手，而是协助她诈死的「共犯」。
E: ...was not the murderer, but rather an accomplice who assisted her in faking her own death.

C: 根据捕快的供词，佐罗的惯用手受了重伤，甚至必须学习用左手生活。挥舞那柄巨型铁锤行凶…对他应该相对困难，甚至是不可能的事吧。
E: Based on the bailiff's statement, Lefton's dominant hand was seriously injured to the point where he had to learn how to live using only his left hand. Swinging that giant sledgehammer to murder someone... that must be hard for him. Probably impossible.

C: 竟然不行吗？看来花火小姐比我想象中还要「严谨」一些。
E: It doesn't? Looks like Miss Sparkle is more careful than I thought.

C: 哇…看这一地狼藉，还有那两个奇形怪状的家伙，多半就是这儿了。
E: Wow... This place is a complete mess. And those two weirdos are probably here, too.

C: 《易镜窥奥》一书上是这么说的，「篆纹活玉，卜籀知玄」。
E: The book Glimpses Into the Beyond describes it as "living jade engraved with symbols for divination into the unknown."

C: 若这么说，倒显得本座不通人情了。见到各位，真是意外之喜。
E: *sigh* ...would be an ungracious thing to say in the present circumstances. I admit, I'm pleasantly surprised to see you here.

C: 卡芙卡的事实，恰好佐证我的猜想。
E: Kafka's revelations confirm my suspicions.

C: 你…将军，你什么时候想到的？
E: You... General, when did you have these suspicions?

C: 星核方露头之时。仙舟有帝弓司命护佑，若非另一位星神的令使出手，焉能混入罗浮而我却不知？故必有外敌。
E: The moment the planter of the Stellaron revealed themself. The Xianzhou has the blessing of the Reignbow Arbiter — only another Aeon's Emanator would be capable of sneaking onto this ship without my knowing. We are dealing with an external threat.

C: 你行行好吧！这支奇兵用的也忒频繁了，咱们罗浮上就无人可用了吗！
E: Please! We can't keep getting them to do everything for us! Since when did we run out of people on the Luofu?

C: 此言差矣。我可不敢命令贵客，只是说好了开诚布公的。
E: This is no errand, honored guests. I am merely stating what needs to be done, should you wish to help us.

C: 「丹鼎司」、「鳞渊境」这两处洞天毗邻「建木」封印。有劳各位前往，一探究竟。
E: The Alchemy Commission and Scalegorge Waterscape delves are adjacent to the Ambrosial Arbor's seal. I'd like you to investigate these places.

C: 罗浮人的祖先正是服下了建木生成的神实，才得到了「无尽形寿」的身体，蜕变为长生种。
E: The ancestors of the Luofu people consumed the fruits of the Ambrosial Arbor and gained endless lifespans — thus becoming long-life species.

C: 没别的事，我们这就出发吧？
E: If there's nothing else, we should get going.

C: 但他师傅念叨的「炉子」又是……？
E: ...but what about the "furnace" his master mentioned?

C: 唔，那头鹿起死回生的时候，周遭的建木根须在闪闪发光……
E: Hmm... When the deer revives, the surrounding roots glow brightly...

C: 这几位云骑究竟能否战胜虫群，帮助庞费尼重建家园呢？
E: Could the Cloud Knights defeat the onslaught of outnumbering Swarm and help inhabitants of Pomferney rebuild their home planet?

C: 肃静，先验验货。
E: Shh, let's see if they're tasty, first.

C: 丹枢让我给你送药。
E: Dan Shu wants me to deliver this medication to you.

C: 因为无论采用何种手段，植入何等机巧，我们的身躯都会复元回最初的模样。
E: No matter the method employed, our bodies will eventually return to their original states.

C: 对于长生种来说，「天缺」即是永恒的苦行，避无可避。
E: For long-life species, this incompleteness is a permanent, unavoidable penance.

C: 星神才不会管你们这些破事…
E: Aeons wouldn't care about such trivial matters...

C: 喂喂喂，前面似乎有人，咱俩还是绕着走吧。
E: Hey, hey, it looks like there's someone up ahead. Let's go around.

C: 当然啦，只是几个随我意志跳舞的棋子罢了。
E: Of course not. They are mere pawns dancing to my whim.

C: 这绥园中异象频出，十王司也无法保护你们周全，我劝二位趁早离开。
E: Fyxestroll Garden is full of abnormalities — even the Ten-Lords Commission cannot guarantee your safety. I suggest you leave immediately.

C: 要是连这点事都办不好，趁早辞了职支个小摊卖点心吧。
E: Tsk... If you can't then you better give up the day job and start peddling desserts...

C: 咱们走吧。
E: Let's go.

C: 让我尝尝你？一口，就一小口，我迫不及待想品一品你的滋味！
E: Let me taste you, please! One bite! Just one bite! I can't wait to savor you!

C: 行，就待那儿吧，别惹事。
E: Fine. Just stay put and don't cause trouble.

C: 你可以叫我「浮烟」，我只想离开这儿，不想伤害你。
E: You can call me Cirrus. I only want to leave this place... I have no desire to harm you.

C: 怕归怕，还是得揍他丫！
E: Afraid or not, we're still gonna beat the heck out of it!

C: 是啊，他自由了。
E: ...I guess he is...

C: 感谢出手相助，无名客。十王司的增援很快会来，桂乃芬也会被送去医馆看护的。
E: Thank you for your assistance, Nameless. Reinforcements from the Ten-Lords Commission will be here soon, and Guinaifen will be sent to an apothecary.

C: 这么快就认不出老朋友了？
E: Already forgetting me?

C: 所以，我们接下来……
E: So, we're gonna...

C: 穿过铜镜。
E: Pass through the mirror.

C: 「黄金的时刻」是匹诺康尼最奢华的一处梦境，集中了全银河的各种珍宝，值得好好逛逛。
E: The Golden Hour is Penacony's most grandiose Dreamscape, brimming with the cosmos's myriad treasures. It's worth spending some time in.

C: 没…没关系的……
E: It's... It's fine...

C: 老师……
E: Sir...

C: 只要有品牌、有故事，哪怕是一只破麻布袋他们也会欣然买下！有钱人压根不会在意买来的鞋子容不容易坏，因为他们从来都不用靠自己的脚走路——懂了吗？
E: As long as there's a brand and a story, they'll gladly buy even a torn hemp pouch! The rich care not if a purchased pair of shoes is easily worn, because they've never had to rely on their own feet to walk. Do you get it now?

C: 为了能够达成和您的承诺，庞德他…向家族借了一笔钱，数额很大的一笔钱。
E: In order to achieve his promise to you, Pound... borrowed a sum of money from The Family — an inordinate amount.

C: 扔掉庞德的门票。
E: Throw Pound's tickets away.

C: 可以请您…把手松开一些吗？还挺疼的。
E: Could you please... loosen your grip a little? It kind of hurts.

C: 走吧，让大家都听到你的歌声！
E: Come on. Let everyone hear your singing voice!

C: 将你看到的和柯柯娜相关的事情转告给了乔凡娜……
E: You tell Giovanna what you saw, and what happened with Cocona...

C: 可以给我签名吗？
E: Can I have your autograph?

C: 我当时也的确失去了意识…很久之后才再次睁开了眼睛。有那么一个瞬间，我真的以为自己身在天国。
E: At that moment, I did lose consciousness... It was a long time before I opened my eyes again. For a split second, I really thought I had ascended to heaven.

C: 好了。祝您往后的日子里每天都有好心情，{NICKNAME}{F#小姐}{M#先生}。
E: There we are. I wish that you be in good spirits from this day forth, {F#Ms.}{M#Mr.} {NICKNAME}.

C: 就在刚刚，毫无征兆的一瞬之间——我感觉自己的胸口被一枚炮弹击穿了，留下了一个无形的窟窿。
E: Just now, suddenly and without warning, it felt like... Like I'd been struck with a bullet that tunneled through my chest, leaving an invisible hole.

C: 十分感谢您提供的信息，{NICKNAME}{F#小姐}{M#先生}。
E: Thank you very much for providing this information, {F#Ms.}{M#Mr.} {NICKNAME}.

C: 你感到事情有些不对劲。如果在莱斯利•迪恩这样的大人物身上发生了什么变故，家族不可能置之不理。
E: You sense that something is not right. If something were to happen to a great man like Lesley Dean, The Family would not likely just ignore it.

C: 希望他能找回自己的生活。
E: I hope that he can reclaim his life.

C: 对抗蛮不讲理的事物，或许只有最直接粗暴的方式才能奏效。
E: Sometimes, violence is the only way to combat something that does not respond to logic.

C: 好在上天又给了我一次机会。哪怕肉身已经不再，我仍然能用这种方式改变些什么。
E: Thankfully, it seems fate has gifted me a second chance. Though my body no longer remains, I still have the opportunity to change something in this way.

C: 是的，根据我方与星穹列车方的协议，「晖长石号」由您来接管。
E: Yes. According to the agreement between us and the Astral Express, the Radiant Feldspar will be left in your care.

C: 选我选我～
E: Pick me, pick me!

C: 在下冷芯，久仰大名，如有荣幸，愿为阁下效劳。
E: I am Caldwick, and I have heard about your feats aplenty. If I may be allowed the honor, I would be more than glad to be of service.

C: 我得承认，您确实相貌不凡——但按照业内旧例，涂在尾翼的一般都是吉祥物…这未免有失您的身份。
E: I admit that your visage is extraordinary, but according to tradition, it's usually a mascot that's painted on the tail... Your idea might perhaps be beneath your station.

C: 您说笑了，基于管理准则，我允许大家展现自己的特长，只是恰好遇到会画的人罢了。
E: You jest. According to management guidelines, I allow people to showcase their specialties. It was pure coincidence that we met someone who could draw.

C: 你细致地审视这幅半身像，发现雕塑家精心捕捉了你的每一个细节，就连头发丝都透露出领导者的睿智。
E: You scrutinize the bust and realize that the sculptor has meticulously captured every detail of you — even the strands of hair reveal the wisdom of a leader.

C: 喝一瓶苏乐达解闷。
E: Drink a bottle of SoulGlad to get rid of the boredom.

C: 同意。毕竟咱们想见上一面也没那么容易，对吧？
E: Agreed. After all, it's not easy for all of us to meet up like this.

C: 为、为了您的安全着想，请您放弃闯入的想法！
E: F—For the sake of your safety, please drop the idea of breaking in!

C: 青雀兴奋地鼓起了掌……
E: Qingque claps excitedly...

C: 我宣布，你们到处祸害无辜路人的日子到头了！乖乖把人质交出来，然后给我滚出匹诺康尼——照着我说的做，保你们平安！
E: I declare that your days of bullying innocent people are now over! Release the hostage, then get out of Penacony. Your safety will be guaranteed if you do as I say!

C: 看来，纯美骑士的信念在你们之上。
E: Looks like the belief of the Knights of Beauty reigns supreme over yours.

C: 你叔叔不是很有钱吗？
E: Isn't your uncle loaded?

C: 你会逐渐理解我们的使命和其重要性，进而成为「四尺神子」的一员。我，罗伊罗伊，作为「四尺之神」的令使，会引领所有人走上救赎的命途，反抗巨人族的压迫。
E: Eventually, you will understand the significance of our mission and become a Four-Foot Follower. As an Emanator of the Four-Foot Aeon, I, Royroy, will guide you on the path of salvation against the oppression of the giants.

C: 容许我再次向无名客的各位——尤其是姬子女士——表达感谢。希望在不远的将来，战略投资部能继续与各位*深度*合作。
E: Please allow me once again to express my gratitude to all of you Nameless, especially Miss Himeko. I hope that the Strategic Investment Department will continue our deep commitment to cooperation into the future.

C: 主人公从来都是最后登场的嘛！
E: It's only right that the hero is last to board!

C: 明白了，我就在这里等候。
E: Okay, I'll wait here.

C: 这样啊，我也只是叫着方便，杰哥你不要介意。
E: I'm just saying it for convenience's sake. Don't worry about it, Chengjie.

C: 铖杰就坐这喝茶听书，我再去买点小吃过来……
E: Hey, Chengjie, you sit here and enjoy the tea, and I'll slip out to get some snacks...

C: …说实话，很多观众不知道，咱俩关系这么好，其实是有渊源的，咱俩师出同门。
E: ...Honestly, a lot of folks don't know that you and I go way back. We actually studied together.

C: 很多仙舟人都像我一样，从来不曾意识到「星槎的巧思和技术更新」，只顾着享用它的方便、将它当作是理所当然的存在。
E: Lots of Xianzhou people are just like me, who never really thought about "the cleverness and technological advancements behind the starskiff." We just took it for granted and thoughtlessly enjoyed its convenience.

C: 看得出你和师傅之间关系很好。
E: You and your master seem really close.

C: 嗯…不过，我不是很擅长讲故事，说起来可能会很长。
E: Mmm... But I'm not a natural storyteller. This might take a while.

C: 我只是想来这边看看星槎的设计，救命——
E: I just came here to admire the starskiff's design, then— Help!

C: {NICKNAME}，也多亏了你来这里，让我更加有动力了。请你之后也要来监督我，鞭策我！
E: {NICKNAME}, your presence really motivates me. Please drop by regularly to monitor my progress and encourage me!

C: …很遗憾，我可是铆足了劲，认真打造完成的。
E: ...Unfortunately, I already did my best.

C: 是啊，我承认，我就是那个傻瓜
E: Exactly. I think I might as well "forget" about the whole thing.

C: 不过失败了一次而已，再试试？
E: It's just one failure, why not give it another shot?

C: 是啊，除了六大司部之外，仙舟还有个专司控制长生种寿数、对抗寿瘟祸患的机关「十王司」。它麾下的判官会负责带走和审判仙舟上的所有灵魂。
E: Other than the six major commissions, there is a commission named "Ten-Lords Commission" on Xianzhou that is in charge of managing the lifespan of the long-life species and fighting against plagues and disasters. Judges of the commission are responsible for bringing the souls on Xianzhou to trials.

C: 那为了完成任务，就请判官睁一只眼闭一只眼，将手下留情的职责交给我的人马吧。
E: I'd appreciate it if you could turn a blind eye and leave the merciful duty to my people here for them to complete their mission.

C: 莱恩师傅，您还记得吗？老师，他如今出师困难，需要您的指导。所以，我们将您从长眠中请了出来，请不要见怪。
E: Master Ryan, Chengjie is having difficulty mastering craftsmanship and needs your guidance. So, we've disturbed your eternal rest. Please don't hold it against us.

C: 但是，无论是轻型的骨架、还是辅助驾驶系统…全都失败了。我明明是按照着师傅的手稿制作，却完全没有办法运行，我尝试了无数次，也失败了无数次。
E: Yet, I failed to build both the lightweight framework and the auxiliary driving system... I followed the instructions in your manuscript, but the things I built could not function at all. I have tried and failed for numerous times.

C: 所以，为师能为你做到的最后一件事就是——撕毁手稿。
E: So, destroying the manuscript is the last thing I can do for you.

C: 你已经比我去世时年长太多了，今后的路，你应该问问你自己。
E: You're so much older than I was when I passed away. Hence, you should follow your heart.

C: …我只是需要一个人冷静一下，抱歉。
E: ...I just need some time to get hold of myself.

C: 哎，难得的清闲…我是不是也该找个地方活动活动筋骨了？
E: Ahh, what a rare moment of rest... Maybe I should find a spot to stretch my legs a bit, too.

C: 卢卡——卢卡——卢卡——
E: Luka — Luka — Luka —

C: 哈哈哈，你的表情真是完全藏不住。师傅都跟我说了，下层区的局势最近相对稳定，「地火」的日子都变清闲了。
E: Hahaha, you can't hide anything on that face of yours. Oleg already told me that things in the Underworld are pretty peaceful now, and even Wildfire is running out of things to do.

C: 确实有点…
E: You got me...

C: 看店的是个一脸严肃的男人，估摸比我小几岁，但头发胡子全白了。他身边坐着个红毛小子，在一旁有气无力地干着杂活，眼睛里一点儿神都没有。
E: There was a serious-looking fella looking after the shop. He was probably a few years younger than me, but his hair and beard were white as snow. There was a young lad doing odd jobs — he looked pretty exhausted.

C: …话是这么说，真不知道这次他又想出了什么鬼点子。只能走一步看一步了。
E: ...That's a story for another day. I have no idea what he's up to this time, we'll just have to wait and see.

C: 我给「小飞」装了个追踪仪，只要它离「大奔」——哦，「大奔」是另外那台机器人的名字——只要它俩之间距离过远，「小飞」就会开启自动寻路，飞到「大奔」身边。
E: Little Fay also has a tracker. If it gets too far from Big Ben — oh, Big Ben is the name of the other robot — if there's too much distance between them, Little Fay will automatically start routing and fly to Big Ben's location.

C: 别太纠结了，希儿！我跟你保证，我肩上这颗脑袋清醒得很。你看，咱们这不又帮下层区除掉了个大祸害吗？
E: Don't get so worked up, Seele! I'm thinking clearly! Plus, didn't we just get rid of another major threat to the Underworld?

C: 冷静，别上头，希儿！都说了我很清醒，我说的每个字都是认真的！
E: Whoa, whoa, stay cool, Seele. Like I said, I'm thinking clearly. Every word I said is serious!

C: 他*这里*有点问题。
E: I think he might have hit his head.

C: 一个盒子？
E: A case?

C: 不应该打开它？
E: ...We shouldn't open it?

C: 您有一条跨星际通讯信息，请及时查收。
E: You have an interstellar message. Please check it promptly.

C: 看起来大家都没什么异议。
E: I don't hear any objections.

C: 那两个人是不是在叫我们啊？看打扮…像是匹诺康尼人？
E: Did they just call us? Look at their outfits... they're from Penacony, right?

C: 但那位曜青将军有什么打算，同样也不是老夫能说三道四的。
E: However, I have no clue what the Yaoqing Arbiter-General has in mind.

C: 别别别，我怕惹上官司。
E: Stop, stop! I don't want to end up in an IPC lawsuit.

C: 啊？什么意思？…我这联觉信标怎么都翻译不出来？
E: Huh? My Synesthesia Beacon must not be working... because I have no idea what you just said.

C: 为某个大人物站岗开道。别问了，严肃点，我要执勤。
E: Because of someone important. So, stop asking and be serious. I'm on duty right now.

C: 「不过」…接下来你要说「不过」了对吧？
E: But... I know you're going to say "But," right?

C: 你们俩若想一较高下，妾身便做个裁判：以一刻为限，看谁在时限内斩除的孽物最多，更胜一筹。
E: If you want a contest, I'll be the referee. The one who kills the most abominations within fifteen minutes wins.

C: 不必客气，你请托的事，我办到啦。就当是抵了衔药龙女的诊金如何？
E: Not at all, just doing what you asked. How about we call it even as payment for the Healer Lady's consultation?

C: …但是，老朽信得过你。
E: ...But despite all that, I believe in you.

C: 看幻戏和小说里，仙舟拜师学艺可得送上师父大礼，跪拜叩首。糟糕，我可什么都没准备。
E: In all those immersias and novels I watched, when apprentices want to pay their respects to their masters, they usually bring fancy gifts, kneel, and bow. I'm really sorry, but I haven't prepared anything yet.

C: 第一，我压根没有吱哇乱叫！第二，你压根不是我的对手！第三，要不要现在试试谁能把谁揍得吱哇乱叫？
E: First, you didn't kick my butt! Second, you'll never kick my butt! Third, how about we settle this right now and see who kicks whose butt?

C: 既然不懂剑术，那你刚才又在一旁笑个什么劲？
E: If you know nothing about martial arts, why were you smirking earlier?

C: 彦卿知道一个地方视野很好，可以看得比较清楚。走吧。
E: I know a spot with a great view of the whole place. Follow me.

C: 据传，星核猎手的首领艾利欧拥有目视未来众多可能性的力量。
E: Rumor has it that Elio, the leader of the Stellaron Hunters, possesses the power to see into the future.

C: 不过我方才所提到的三个问题，不仅仅是在向这两位无名客发问，也是在向景元将军传递某种声音——
E: However, the three questions I posed earlier were not just for the Nameless, but for you too, General Jing Yuan.

C: 其三，于建木灾异之后，一意举行演武仪典，将罗浮再度置于寰宇焦点，是为「失智」。
E: Third, you insist on holding the Wardance right after the Ambrosial Arbor Crisis, putting the Luofu back in the spotlight. That is a dereliction of wisdom.

C: 那么，飞霄将军又是怎么想的？
E: So, what are your thoughts on all of this, General Feixiao?

C: 飞霄打量了你一眼，尽管没有任何理由，你仍然感到她以看到对手的眼光对你上下打量。
E: Feixiao gives you a once-over, and despite lacking any apparent reason, you feel scrutinized, as if she were sizing up an opponent.

C: 这样危险的东西出现在幽囚狱里，唯一的目的就是——
E: These things showing up in The Shackling Prison can only mean one thing...

C: 到了。
E: Here we are.

C: 当然，我绝不会留各位性命。
E: Of course, I'll still kill you all.

C: …至少这样省去了无谓的痛苦。
E: ...But I promise it'll be swift.

C: 不，阻止呼雷逃离也许才是最优先的目标。
E: No, stopping Hoolay should probably be our top priority.

C: 罗浮的监狱管理，真是堪忧……
E: The prison management on the Luofu is truly concerning...

C: 逃犯众多，大人请务必小心。
E: There are many fugitives. Please be careful, Your Honor.

C: 看他如今的样子，怎么也无法想象这家伙能伪装成狐人。
E: Looking at him now, it's hard to imagine how he transformed into a foxian.

C: 囚牢中，一名囚犯倒在地上。重获自由的快乐和突如其来的错愕，这两种表情在死亡的瞬间一同凝固在了他惨白的脸上。
E: A prisoner is on the ground. The joy of regaining freedom and sudden shock, these two expressions are frozen on his pale face at the moment of death.

C: 开个玩笑，别急嘛～很简单，将青椒切碎，放入肉馅之中，做成肉丸子即可。肉的味道盖过了青椒的味道，就连挑食的小孩也能吃下青椒了。
E: I'm just kidding. The answer is quite simple: Chop up the peppers and mix them with minced meat to make meatballs. This way, the flavor of the meat overpowers the taste of the peppers, and even a fussy child can enjoy them.

C: 我们早就准备好了船只，先知的预言一定会成为现实。
E: We've already prepared our ships, and the Prophet's prediction will surely come true.

C: （服药变化？听说在建木灾异时，丹鼎司内部发生了叛乱…想来这些潜入者在罗浮仙舟上有内应。）
E: (Medicine? I heard there was a mutiny within the Alchemy Commission during the Ambrosial Arbor Crisis... These infiltrators must have connections within the Xianzhou Luofu.)

C: 如果战首说要走呢？
E: What if the Warhead wants to leave?

C: 你们不也在这儿乱逛吗？
E: Aren't you wandering around here as well?

C: 这些都是您亲眼见证的事情吗？那个家伙把你称为…「战奴」，所以您到底经历了什么啊？
E: Have you witnessed these things firsthand? That guy called you a... war slave... What exactly have you experienced?

C: 我…是来做什么的呢？
E: What... did I come to do?

C: 那在此先预祝您宝剑常锋，登擂夺胜。
E: Then may your blade be sharp and your victory glorious!

C: 失败者不配问我的名字。
E: Losers have no right to ask my name.

C: 我不是参赛选手，三月小姐请找别人聊天吧。
E: I am not a contestant Miss March. Please find someone else to talk to.

C: 诸位！在仙舟的疆域上，步离人竟然狂妄地向我们发起挑战，放言要血洗仙舟的闹市街巷！
E: Cloud Knights! The borisin have arrogantly decided to challenge us on Xianzhou territory! They vow that they will unleash a bloodbath along the streets of the Xianzhou.

C: 战首为你们准备了…一条死路…
E: The Warhead has prepared... a road of no return for all of you...

C: 会真正隐藏实力的人！
E: Would be people who hide their strength!

C: 哎哟，疼疼疼疼，稍等一下，我马上过来。
E: Ooh, ow-ow-owww. Just a moment, I'm coming!

C: 对无名客来说，虽然每一站我们都只是过客…可在这里我结识了两位师父，也认识了许多朋友。为了大家，我希望这场「演武仪典」能一切顺利。
E: For us Nameless, even though we're just visitors at every stop... It was here that I met my two masters and made many new friends. I want the Wardance to go ahead without any problems, for everyone's sake.

C: 从此刻开始，竞锋舰将属于我。各位观众，我将为你们带来一场货真价实的死斗！
E: From this moment on, the Skysplitter belongs to me. And for you, dear spectators, I have prepared a true fight to the death!

C: （我得赶紧去确认一下。）
E: (I have to check on this immediately.)

C: 至于现在，就让我们掘开帝弓天将坚如铁石的心防，看看在她最幽暗的角落里，藏了些什么吧？
E: Now, let us break through the iron-clad defenses of the Arbiter-General's heart and see what secrets she has hidden in those deepest, darkest corners.

C: 我拒绝。
E: I refuse.

C: 妖弓的光芒…灾星坠地，万物俱灭。
E: The light of the Devilish Archer... A star of calamity that strikes the ground and leaves only devastation in its wake.

C: 心兽，用愤怒碾碎她的意识！！
E: Inner beast, use your rage and destroy her consciousness!!!

C: 丹恒先生，您两度归来，却始终没肯赏脸与我们这些老东西会晤，实在遗憾。如今却要在这个场合下相见，真是造化弄人。
E: Dan Heng, you've returned twice, but it seems that meeting us fossils wasn't on your agenda. Regrettable, indeed. Now here you are to meet me anyway — life does love its ironies, doesn't it?

C: 他的伤倒是没有重到那个程度…不过嘛，更长的静养时间还是少不了的。
E: His injuries weren't that severe... but well, he'll still need some more time to rest.

C: 哈哈，天击将军还是这般快人快语，☳☶可不讨人喜欢喔。
E: The Merlin's Claw, as blunt as always, ☳☶ though not everyone's cup of tea, huh?

C: *克里姆特粗口*…埃夫姆这个蠢材，气死我算了。
E: *Klimt profanity*... That nitwit Ephraim is going to drive me to my grave.

C: 绿火腿夫人夸张地行了个礼，转身钻进了酒吧的大门。
E: Lady Greenham dramatically curtsies, turns around, and ducks through the bar's door.

C: 被威胁了吗？
E: Is she being threatened?

C: 什么蠢问题？朕出生在……
E: What sort of idiot question is that? I was born in...

C: 还是别找了。
E: You shouldn't do that.

C: 遵命！宣琳儿玛进殿！
E: Understood! Summon Lenamar!

C: 尤其是，陛下还允诺我当上帝国的情报部长…这是我几辈子修来的福分。
E: Especially when Your Majesty has even promised me that I would be the Empire's Spymaster... This is the fortune that my ancestors have bequeathed me.

C: 我明白了，你无法背弃誓言，但也不忍伤害平民。
E: I understand. You do not wish to break your oath, but neither do you wish to harm the people.

C: 我不明白…我一直尽心尽力为陛下效力，刀山火海在所不辞，事到如今您怎么会觉得……
E: I don't understand... I've served Your Majesty with all my heart. I've gone through heaven and hell for you. Why would you...

C: 我明白了。动手吧，灰骑士。能和你对决是我的荣幸。
E: I understand. Draw your weapon, Gray Knight. It is my honor to fight you.

C: 好的～如果遇到什么烦心事，记得随时来找朕！为臣民排忧解难，是最幸福的事～
E: Sure! If you encounter any troubles, remember to come to me anytime! It gives me untold happiness to dispel any troubles for my subjects!

C: 他为什么一个人待在这里，又为什么要被人监视…非常在意，嘀嗒！
E: Why is he alone here, and why is he being supervised... It's bothering me, tick tock!

C: 那个人是货真价实的…咳，我是说，他研究的课题非常有价值。
E: That man is the real deal... Ahem, I mean, his research is very valuable.

C: 我该敲门吗？
E: Should I knock?

C: 哈哈哈，别着急。在诸位和博士成为正式战友之前，我还有些话要说。
E: Hahaha, please hold your horses. Before you all officially become Dr. Chadwick's colleagues, there's something I want to remind you.

C: 跨过这道门，就意味着各位选择了自己的第二次人生。从今往后的很长一段时间里，这座实验室就会是你们生活的全部。
E: By walking through this door, you'll be selecting a different life for yourselves. This lab will be your life for a very long time to come.

C: 因为杜德利…我在技术研发部的朋友，他说过——这件武器能被用来打击「毁灭」的势力。我们在做的是正确的事。
E: Dudley, my friend from the Technology Department, said that the weapon could be used to contain the Destruction's forces. He said we were doing the right thing.

C: …这是什么意思？我说了——按下起爆按钮！
E: ...What are you doing? Press it now!

C: 推测：查德威克博士的自我意识仍有微弱残留。它正在迫切尝试与我们对话。
E: Speculation: Dr. Chadwick's self-awareness still lingers faintly. It's making an eager effort to communicate with us.

C: 就在刚刚那一瞬间，他把自己毕生的成果都托付给了我。
E: At that very moment, he entrusted me with all his life's work.

C: 「——将我掌握的知识和技术交给值得托付的人，为建立足以制衡公司势力的『威慑体系』打下基础。」
E: "...I can entrust my knowledge and technology to those who are worthy, thereby establishing the groundwork for a deterrence system robust enough to counterbalance the IPC's might."

C: 你掂了掂这只已经落灰的旅行箱——它显然空空如也。
E: You weigh a dusty suitcase with your hand — it is obviously empty.

C: 与我而言，所谓的美梦呈现出来的样貌甜腻且虚假，与「梦」原本应有的模样相去甚远。
E: To me, the so-called sweet dreams are often saccharine and insincere, a stark contrast to the true shape of a dream.

C: …等等，喂，你要干什么？！
E: ...Wait, hey, what're you doing!?

C: 不一样，不一样！那孩子的羽毛是蓝色的，啾。
E: They're not the same! That child has blue feathers, tweet.

C: 曾经的几位传奇筑梦师站在远处，为奥尔拉指出通往美梦的方向。
E: A few legendary Dreamweavers of the past stand in the distance, guiding Orla toward Dreamjoy.

C: （还是保持沉默）
E: (Continue remaining silent)

C: ——「若是筑梦时被绊住腿脚，就抬头吧。」
E: "If you stumble when weaving dreams, look up."

C: 啊？这…这是它原本就有的啊。
E: Eh? That... That was already there to begin with.

C: 怎么总感觉你喊得比我还大声…算了。
E: Why does it sound like you're just trying to raise your voice over mine... Forget it.

C: 你很讨厌外邦人吗？
E: You hate outlanders?

C: 真是残酷…
E: How cruel...

C: 不不不，如果不能躺在椅子上、按照步骤用餐，食物的风味就会被浪费……
E: No no no, if they don't lay back in chairs and eat the meal in order, the food's flavor will go to absolute waste...

C: 那我换一家。
E: I'll go to another shop then.

C: 总感觉有古怪…算了，那不是我该关心的事。但你千万记得，要躺在椅子上、按照步骤用餐……
E: Something feels off... No matter, it has nothing to do with me. But you must remember to lie back in your chair and eat them in order...

C: 啊…啊……
E: Ah... Agh...

C: 你们会处罚他吗？
E: Will you punish him?

C: 感谢伊特罗大人……
E: Thank you, Elder Etro...

C: 想到这个场景，公民们纷纷表现得义愤填膺。你的发言显然为拉莱德递了刀子……
E: Indignation gradually crosses the citizens' faces when they imagine this scenario. Your statement has obviously given Liluder the upper hand...

C: 等等，{F#她}{M#他}好像是与黄金裔们一起狩杀疯王的英雄！
E: Wait, I think {F#she}{M#he} was the hero that hunted down the Mad King with the Chrysos Heirs!

C: 是啊，还好你和克米昂长官及时出手！要是让我去见了塞纳托斯，可就没人能养活城里的商人和大地兽了！
E: That's right. Fortunately, you and Captain Camilla took action in time! If I were sent to meet Thanatos, no one would be left to support the city's merchants or dromases!

C: 她看起来不太好…
E: She doesn't look too good...

C: 她没有发出声音，她不觉得苦痛，反倒认为理所应当。
E: She makes no sound, and she feels no pain. She knows she is the one to blame.

C: 行啦，既然来了奥赫玛，逛云石市集可比骂我蠢有意思多了，我带你看看吧！
E: Okay, okay. Well, as we are in Okhema, a browse of Marmoreal Market would be far more entertaining than sitting around calling me foolish all day. I'll take you!

C: 云石天宫是法吉娜赐予我们的馈赠，也是奥赫玛宝贵的古老财产。依照律法，戍卫队应该将破坏此处的犯人扣押，交由法庭判处。
E: The Marmoreal Palace is a gift to us from Phagousa, and the precious property of Okhema. According to law, the Garrison must detain any criminal that damages this place and take them to the court for sentencing.

C: 你也知道，现在奥赫玛的战况严峻，悬锋城已经打到城门口了，如今又要动员我们城中的戍卫出战。
E: I'm sure you are aware that Okhema is in grave danger. As the forces of Castrum Kremnos have made it to the city gate, now we have to mobilize the guards of the city garrison to battle.

C: 你把一路的见闻，以及伙同迷迷偷看日记的罪行告知了帕西提亚。只是，她的反应似乎和预期的完全相反。
E: You tell Pasithea everything you've seen along the way, including collaborating with Mem to sneak a glance at the diary. Only, her reaction is entirely different from what you expected.

C: 呼——抱歉，容我冷静一下……
E: Hoo... Sorry, allow me to collect myself...

C: 现在，把祭祀的草药取出来，不要把手放进嘴里！会中毒的。
E: Now, take out the ceremonial herbs, and don't put your hands in your mouth! You'll get poisoned.

C: 辅祭疲惫地望向远方，发出叹息。仿佛他曾笃信的，深爱的，也早已跟着神殿所供奉的泰坦们一同死去。
E: The acolyte lethargically stares into the distance and sighs. As if what he once believed and deeply loved, had long since perished alongside the Titans that the temple once worshiped.

C: 你成功逃脱了圣女的囚笼。接下来，你打算做些什么？
E: You've successfully escaped the cage of being a Holy Maiden. What do you intend to do next?

C: 也许过不了多久，列车就该孩子们挑大梁了啊。
E: Perhaps soon it'll be time for the young ones to take charge of the Express.

C: 洞洞机有那么大功率？
E: Does the Diggertron really pack that much power?

C: 唉，宇宙另一边的滔天巨浪，传到我们这儿也是轩然大波。
E: *sigh* A massive wave from the other edge of the universe would still cause quite a stir when it reaches here.

C: 有人猜背后离不开苜蓿草的扶持，猜得没错。这么大的人情，何乐而不为？
E: Some guessed the Alfalfa was behind it, and they weren't wrong. With such a big favor ready for the taking, why not use it?

C: 嘶…要不你去问问将军？
E: Tch... why don't you go ask the General?

C: 这座花园，是《如我所书》的最后一页…
E: This garden is the final page of As I've Written...

C: （毁灭、虚无、同谐、还有……）
E: (Destruction, Nihility, Harmony, and...)

C: 正在学习，请勿干扰。
E: Learning in progress, please do not disturb.

C: 你还挺爱看书…
E: I see you enjoy reading...

C: 可惜她长了张嘴……
E: Pity she talks, though.

C: 有点困难，我想想啊…
E: It's pretty tough. Let me think about it...

C: 嗯嗯，是很不错，我想想——假如我在聊天，我先问「晚饭吃什么」？然后说「啊？真的吗？」
E: Mmm, mmm, this one's great, I think — If I'm chatting, I'll ask "What's for dinner?" followed by "Ah? Really?"

C: 那种是哪种？
E: "That mode"?

C: 我们用它来配送餐品，但最近总是配送失败。
E: We use robots to deliver meals, but recently they keep failing the deliveries.

C: 您是{NICKNAME}对吗？请留步！
E: You're {NICKNAME}, right? Please, can I have a word with you?

C: 小事一桩，交给我了。
E: Piece of cake. You chose the right person for the job.

C: 错误类型还挺多，让我想想……
E: There are lots of different error types here. Lemme think...

C: 让我帮你重启机器人？
E: Help you to reboot the robots?

C: 我想快进到结论。
E: Can we fast forward to the conclusion?

C: 啊？就这？没啦？
E: Huh? That's it? Nothing more?

C: 哎，要是只有这些线索和信息的话，我可没有办法写出研究报告， 那样的话好不容易积累的粉丝就要消失了……
E: *sigh* If this is the only information, then I can't manage to produce the report. Then I'm gonna lose all the fans I've worked so hard for...

C: 这些…这些的确是冰原狼活动过的证据，太棒了！有了这些线索，说不定很快就能追踪到贝洛伯格附近的野狼族群了。
E: These... these are indeed evidence of direwolf activity. Awesome! With these clues, I might be able to find the direwolf packs close to Belobog.

C: 通过他人之手，将华劳斯•凯特博瑞屈•莱姆士汀最富魅力的时刻记录下来，让路人为之倾倒，甘愿成为我的朋友——这就是我的策略。
E: My strategy is to capture my most glamorous moments in photos so that any passerby will be wowed and want to become my friends.

C: 听说你又在找朋友了？
E: I heard you're looking for friends again?

C: 听说你需要帮助。
E: I hear you need help.

C: 这么重，而且还是在不同的矿区…怎么办怎么办？斯薇塔，好好想想……
E: They are so heavy, and should be delivered to different mining areas... What should I do? Think, Swetta, think...

C: 干得不错，荣誉队员{NICKNAME}——以后你也要多多支持本情报官的工作哦！今天就到这里吧，鼹鼠党，解散！
E: Well done, honorary member {NICKNAME} — please keep supporting my job as an intelligence officer in the future! Let's call it a day. The Moles, dismiss!

C: 我的小弟之前得到消息，「地火」又积攒了一批需要递送的货物，但因为人手紧张还没能发货。
E: My source told me earlier that Wildfire just accumulated another batch of goods that needs to be delivered, but they haven't been able to ship them out because of staffing constraints.

C: 派送某个病人的快递。
E: Deliver the patient's package.

C: 嗨，有什么好后悔的…能在我熟悉的岗位上再多发光发热一阵，也好……
E: Nothing to be regretful for... It would only be worth it to shine in my field for a while longer...

C: 哇！这是…侯爵夫人？！这么名贵的花，是老爸拜托你给我买的吗？
E: Whoa! These are... Marquises? Did my dad ask you to buy these for me?

C: 总之需要几个月来审稿…
E: So there's a review process that takes months...
Six.

C: 考我。
E: Test me.

C: 哎呀，答错也没关系，能活动活动脑筋总是好事，对吧？能帮上您的忙是教育部的荣幸。回见！
E: Ah, it's okay to get it wrong sometimes. Just giving your brain a workout is good, right? It's an honor for the Ministry of Education to serve you. See you next time!

C: 以迅雷不及掩耳之势打开两扇！
E: Like a force of nature, fling open two gates at once!

C: 可是呀~即使我已经能模仿塔米拉小姐的一切了，却还是缺少那关键的灵魂……
E: But! Even though I can perfectly emulate all of Tamila's behaviors, I'm still lacking that key piece of her soul...

C: 多亏了你~还挺顺利的~小女子已经能看到自己在舞台上光彩夺目的身影了…总有一天，小女子也能像她那样……
E: Thanks to you~ everything's going great. I can already see my dazzling figure on stage... One day, I'm going to be just like her...

C: 能不能请你亲眼看一看，塔米拉小姐在舞台下的样子呢？
E: Could you please go and see for yourself how Tamila looks when she's offstage?

C: 关于塔米拉的一切…
E: Everything about Tamila...

C: 哎呦喂，谢天谢地！可算是有个自己人了……
E: Oh, thank goodness! Finally, someone on my side...

C: 我们的「会社」全称「正当权益会社」——顾名思义，我们的目标便是维护每个人的「正当权益」。
E: Our Society is called The Rightful Rights Society — As the name implies, our goal is to protect everyone's rightful rights.

C: 你在告示板的角落里发现了这样一张纸条——
E: You found a note in a corner of the notice board that says:

C: 喔，没想到这么快就有社友来帮忙了！看来多多加入公益组织是个正确的决定。
E: Oh, I didn't think other Society members would be here so soon! Seems like it's a good decision to join charitable organizations.

C: …就先聊到这里吧。我无端叨扰许久，真是万分抱歉。但也要谢谢你，为我修好了这个小玩意……
E: ...Let's stop here. I'm sorry for taking so much of your time. I must thank you for fixing this gadget.

C: 你失去了物理意义上的身体。
E: You have lost the physical body forever.

C: 大概因为你只是裂界的残影吧…
E: Probably because you're only an echo of the Fragmentum.

C: 纸是包不住火的。
E: You can't lie forever.

C: 那你好好改造，重新做人。
E: Then leave the past behind and start over.

C: 他踱着步，一面思考着技术图纸的实现方案，一面向残响回廊深处走去，直到他来时的踪迹彻底消失——就像他从未出现在这里一般。
E: As he thinks about how to materialize the plans in the blueprints, he paces towards the depths of the Corridor of Fading Echoes until the traces of his appearance completely dissipate — as if he had never been here.

C: （这就是跃渊巡逻的区域，<color=#dbc291ff>要是发现了放生帮就去威慑他们，要是发现了放生对象就处理一下</color>…真是的，守护这片沙滩的人到底是谁呢？）
E: (This is Yueyuan's patrol area. <color=#dbc291ff>Drive away The Unshackled and take care of the things they release</color>... Honestly, who is protecting this beach?)

C: （这就是跃渊巡逻的区域，<color=#dbc291ff>要是发现了放生帮就去威慑他们，要是发现了放生对象就处理一下</color>…真是的，守护这片沙滩的人到底是谁呢？）
E: (This is Yueyuan's patrol area. <color=#dbc291ff>Drive away The Unshackled and take care of the things they release</color>... Honestly, who is protecting this beach?)

C: …但逃避并不能解决问题……
E: ...But running away cannot solve anything...

C: 我、我我我什么也没有做！
E: I—I—I haven't done anything!

C: 好问题，让我求助场外地衡司。
E: Good question. Why don't I call a friend in the Realm-Keeping Commission and ask what they think.

C: 「本店出售各类布匹、制定成衣。」
E: "We sell all kinds of fabric and tailored garments."

C: 「哈托努斯的锻造房」
E: "Chartonus' Forge"

C: 由靛钢制成的人形雕像。只要注入「纷争」的力量，它就能化身可怕的战争机器，用剑斩断一切来犯之敌——
E: A human statue crafted from indigo steel. Once injected with the power of Strife, it transforms into a monstrous war machine, cleaving down all its foes with its blade...

C: 用绝对的力量威胁他。
E: Threaten him with absolute power.

C: 看来不是每个享受风景的人都像你这样纯粹——虽然你也说不准，自己到底是在欣赏风景，还是在看那头正在挠痒的大地兽。
E: Looks like not everyone is as innocent as you in simply wanting to enjoy the view. Even you're not too sure if you're truly immersing yourself in nature's tapestry, or just inspecting that dromas scratching itself.

C: 你从未想过这一天来得如此之快——大锅炖自己这种事，分明该是压箱底的绝学。
E: You never thought this day would arrive so quickly — stewing yourself in a huge pot is basically the ultimate move.

C: 奈何总是有人产生误解，从这里接水喝——否则也不必改造成眼下的样子。
E: There's always someone who mistakes this for a water dispenser and drinks from it, otherwise it wouldn't have been redesigned in its current form.

C: 欧洛尼斯的赐福
E: The Benediction of Oronyx

C: 我们有理由相信，假以时日，翁法罗斯必将成为寰宇大家庭中璀璨的一员。
E: We remain confident that Amphoreus, in due course, will establish itself as a beacon within the cosmic community.

C: 公司战略投资部干事，暨现任大国造真珠女士对此发表公开讲话：重建计划的下一阶段将以「艺术创新」为主题，推动文化产业蓬勃发展。
E: Madam Pearl, secretary of the Strategic Investment Department and current Daikokuzō, announced that the upcoming stage of the Worlds Reborn Initiative will center on "artistic innovation," driving robust growth in cultural sectors.

C: 永恒的事，只有不死的众神才能索求。
E: Only the immortal gods can seek what is eternal.

C: 可曾有人遥望交错的月相，试图得见欧洛尼斯预见的未来？
E: Has anyone ever looked upon the intertwining moon phases, trying to glimpse the future foretold by Oronyx?

C: 白厄，新的一批难民都已接引入城了么？
E: Phainon, has the latest batch of refugees been admitted into the city?

C: 你打量着眼前这座古老的祭坛，在树根的怀抱下，金色的蝴蝶破茧而出，它们在半空中编织出转瞬即逝的图案。
E: You study the ancient altar before you. Under the embrace of tree roots, golden butterflies emerge from their cocoons, weaving fleeting patterns in midair.

C: 是啊，如此恢弘却又空荡荡的王座出现在眼前时，谁能忍住坐上去的冲动？更何况，拒绝这样的诱惑对你而言，除了错失良机外还能有什么好处？
E: Indeed, when such a grand yet empty throne appears before you, who could resist the urge to sit upon it? Besides, what harm could refusing this temptation possibly bring, save for missing an opportunity?

C: …仙女木捎来讯息：在密林的彼端，学者们的圣地.
E: ...The White Dryad brings word: At the end of the forest, at the sacred site of scholars...

C: 如此一扫而空的行事作风，不由得让你想起了故事里的某位角色。于是你学着他的模样整理了头发，随后向无人的王座走去。
E: This pillaging style reminds you of a certain character from a story. Mimicking their manner, you slick back your hair and stride towards the unoccupied throne.

C: 这个树种是莲食学派近几个光历年来最受内部期盼的课题成果——「种子为何是宝贵的资源」，必须把它安全带回去。
E: This Tree Seed represents the culmination of years of effort by the Lotophagists — a long-anticipated project titled "Why Seeds Are a Precious Resource." It must be brought back safely.

C: 神谕如此诉说……
E: The prophecy was spoken thusly...

C: 开什么玩笑…布利萨王远道而来，只为带回拯救家乡的神谕…你难道要他失魂落魄地离开么？
E: What kind of joke is that... The King of Bulsa has traveled a long way for a prophecy on how to save his hometown... Are you saying you want to send him off with no hope?

C: 嘘，嘘！你想被记进圣女卫队不当言论册吗？站好你的岗吧。
E: Shh, shh! Do you want the Holy Maiden Guards to add you to the list of slanderous remarks? Go back to your post.

C: 身处这般末世，本来就压力很大，加上树庭到处黑漆漆的…我都快疯了。
E: The pressure is already great living in these end times. With the Grove now engulfed in darkness... I am starting to lose my mind.

C: 不…我一定要救你出去，我们不能死在这里。
E: No! I'm not leaving without you. This won't be our end!

C: …姐姐？
E: ...Sister?

C: 你是否发现了一种异样感？感觉就像是在吃大餐时，餐具没有被放在正确的位置上一样。
E: Do you feel something strange? It's like when you're at a grand banquet and the silverware isn't arranged properly.

C: 你不得而知，毕竟在翁法罗斯记忆总是包含着奇迹的成分。
E: You cannot say for sure. After all, in Amphoreus, memory always holds a touch of the miraculous.

C: 不可以吼！本狮曾在悬锋城游历，特别崇尚武德，只认可单独对决的结果吼！
E: No! I once roamed through Castrum Kremnos, where I held martial honor in high regard and only recognized the outcome of one-on-one duels!

C: 嗯…<color=#dbc291ff>树庭入口的石像边</color>……
E: Hmm... <color=#dbc291ff>near the statue at the Grove entrance</color>...

C: o((•'ω´• )っ「强而有力，强而有力啊！」)∋
E: o((•'ω´• )っ "Such strength! Such might!" )∋

C: 我的出场费很高的欧。
E: My appearance fee is quite high.

C: 如果绿色是代表健康的话…
E: Well if green means healthy...

C: 你发现装置底部似乎藏着某种开关。
E: You notice what appears to be a hidden switch at the base of the device.

C: 呀，到上面来啦！这么说，那些东西一定是{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}你送来的吧！
E: Oh, I came all the way up here! So, those things must have been delivered by you, {F#big sister}{M#big brother}, right?

C: 没关系的。昏光庭院…并不是个稳固的家园。光是风堇小姐本人，就亲眼目睹了庭院的两次解离。
E: It’s alright. The Twilight Courtyard was never a stable home. Miss Hyacine herself has witnessed its dissolution twice.

C: 胆大包天的扎格列斯本尊，你怎么又发抖了？
E: Great god Zagreus, infinitely bold and reckless, why are you trembling again?

C: 大工匠，你怎么来了？黎明云崖现在很危险，黑潮怪物纷纷从低处向云崖汇集，已经有不少圣城卫士战死了……
E: Grand Craftsman, what brings you here? The Dawncloud is perilous right now. The black tide monsters are gathering from below, and many of the Holy City Guards have already fallen...

C: …欸？怎么突然问这个？
E: ...Hm? Why are you asking this all of a sudden?

C: 我怕的是…自己最后的结局对这个世界而言毫无价值，就和我的那些族人一样。
E: What I'm afraid of is... that my final moments won't be of any value to this world, just like my people.

C: 曾经高悬的巨物们，如今已悉数落入金池。这会不会也是彼时天空之民们的一种写照呢？
E: The once-suspended giants have now all fallen into the golden pool. Could this also be a reflection of the Skyfolk from that time?

C: ——当然，如果你想得到它们，你得用更多「记忆」来拿。我猜你明白这规矩。
E: Of course, if you want them, you'll need to pay with more memories. You know the deal.

C: 它静静地注视着村落的一切，就像一棵历经风霜的树。
E: It stands in silent vigil over the village, like an ancient tree that has weathered countless storms.

C: 似乎是受了谁人的眷顾，你似乎毫发无损。
E: Someone or something must be looking out for you. You emerge completely unharmed.

C: 也许，你从此拥有了无敌的脚踝——{NICKNAME}之踵！
E: Maybe... just maybe... you now have an invincible ankle. The legendary {NICKNAME}'s Heel!

C: 你想起那位生长于哀丽秘榭的少女，承载「岁月」的黄金裔。她曾以牺牲自我的代价重置时间，为翁法罗斯编织永不醒觉的长梦。
E: You recall the Chrysos Heir girl who once lived in Aedes Elysiae, bearer of the power of "Time." She had once sacrificed herself to reset the flow of time, weaving an endless dream for Amphoreus.

C: 伸手抚摸文字。
E: Reach out and touch the inscription.

C: 「门径之半神」缇里西庇俄丝，生于光历<unbreak>3720</unbreak>年，最后一位逝于光历<unbreak>4295</unbreak>年。
E: Tribios, the Demigod of Passage. Born Light Calendar <unbreak>3720</unbreak>. The last piece of her deceased in Light Calendar <unbreak>4295</unbreak>.

C: 你~喜~欢~吃~什~么~呀~
E: What~ do~ you~ like~ to~ eat?

C: 就算是学术氛围包容的神悟树庭，人们也会惊讶于访问学者是一头大地兽，而非一名山之民…解释起来可是费了我不少功夫。
E: Even in the tolerant academic atmosphere of the Grove of Epiphany, people were surprised that the visiting scholar was a dromas rather than a Mountain Dweller... It took quite some effort to explain that one.

C: 电路板，你好香…
E: Circuit board, you smell divine...

C: 谁能把这个风扇的充电头插回去喀！
E: Can someone plug this fan's power cable back in, crrk!

C: 飞，比爬快喀！
E: Flying's faster than crawling, crrk!

C: 我算是进退维谷了喀……
E: I'm really stuck between a rock and a hard place here, crrk...

C: 蝶之口不会欺骗…
E: I never lie...

C: 列车才不是随随便便让他们待着玩的地方帕！一定要把她赶走！
E: The Express is not a place they can just come and go as they wish! We have to kick them out!

C: 浮黎，行于「记忆」命途的星神。祂为行将毁灭的宇宙保留下珍贵的回忆，以待他日重生之时所需…记忆就在这里戛然而止。
E: Fuli, the Aeon on the Path of Remembrance, preserves the precious memories of a dying universe for its eventual rebirth... Here, the memories abruptly come to an end.

C: …感激不尽！我们这就出发，目标：残响回廊！
E: ...I'm so grateful! Let's go now. Our target: The Corridor of Fading Echoes!

C: 呀…{NICKNAME}，突然这么主动，人家会手足无措的！
E: Ack... {NICKNAME}, you're gonna embarrass me, being so direct all of a sudden!

C: 无所不知的…
E: Omniscient...

C: 咦！{NICKNAME}怎么知道的？人家的梦，真的总是「金灿灿」的哦？
E: Huh! How did {NICKNAME} know? Are my dreams really always "golden"?

C: 这没有什么不好意思的，劳动创造价值嘛，这是你应得的。
E: Don't be shy. Labor creates value. You deserve it.

C: …说太多你肯定也听不懂吧。没事，你亲自上手试试就知道了。
E: You won't be able to understand it through plain words. Try it yourself and you'll know.

C: 感觉有点丑。
E: They are a bit ugly.

C: 另外，例行占算还会继续…如果{NICKNAME}方便，也请务必拨冗协助。
E: Also, I need to keep making more routine divinations... If you don't mind, {NICKNAME}, perhaps you could find the time to help out some more.

C: 我非得问问那是什么！
E: I've got to ask: What's that!

C: 某位不愿意透露姓名的老板告诉我，只要能帮他预测出比赛结果，他就能够赚得一笔可观的收入…而我们也能从中分得一杯羹。
E: One owner, who wishes to remain anonymous, told me he could make a considerable fortune if I could help him predict match results... And we'd take a cut of that.

C: <size=28>{NICKNAME}大人请留步！</size>
E: <size=28>{NICKNAME}, please wait a moment!</size>

C: 这次还有一个从朱明来的棋手，实力与你难分高下。不过我相信只要您能解开我布置的棋局，那个「之一」就可以去掉了。
E: Regrettably, a player from the Zhuming whose skills are comparable to yours will also be participating this time. However, I'm confident that you'll take the top spot once you can solve this game I've set up.

C: 表盘上的确有只鸟。
E: There is indeed a bird on the dial.

C: 「枘凿六合」出了些事情…要我自己来讲实在是有些难以启齿啊……
E: Something happened to Hexanexus... It's a little hard for me to explain it on my own...

C: 以「造型优美的魔方」为契机，最近有许多玩家对「枘凿六合」系列产生了兴趣。
E: Taking the allure of the "beautifully shaped cube" as an opportunity, many gamers have recently become interested in Hexanexus.

C: 连语言模块也坏掉了？
E: Even your language module is broken?

C: 进入心境空间。
E: Enter the Emoscape.

C: …道理谁都懂，但哪有人真敢休息啊。希望能帮上你的忙，游客！
E: ...This is common sense, but who really dares take a break? I hope this helps, guest!

C: 「创生若虫」？
E: Creation Nymphs?

C: 嗯…有位织者热衷于修复旧日的残垣。金丝带来消息，它正趴在一根<color=#dbc291ff>断裂的石柱上</color>，去那里找找看吧。
E: Hmm... a weaver is passionately restoring the remnants of the past. The golden thread brings tidings: It is lying on a <color=#dbc291ff>broken stone pillar</color>. Go look for it there.

C: 多谢你了，贵客。但曾有贤者说过这样一句话：「人的思维无法同时解读两条预言。」
E: Thank you, dear customer. However, a wise sage once said: "A human mind cannot solve two prophecies at once."

C: 我想再多知道些细节。
E: I want to know more details.

C: <unbreak>13</unbreak>盆。
E: Thirteen flames.

C: 划定的范围，说出来您可别吓到——正是刻法勒现在的立足之处！
E: As for the demarcated area... Don't let this shock you... But it is the current location of Kephale themself!

C: 所以，如您所见——我正在休息呢。
E: So, as you can see... I'm taking a break.

C: 桀桀桀，我收下咯！
E: Hehehe, it's all mine!

C: 唔，也许这确实不是扎格列斯老祖说的，而是巴特鲁斯自己说的？
E: Hmm, maybe it wasn't what Zagreus said, but what I said?

C: …还能入伙吗？
E: ...Is it too late for me to join your little venture?

C: 说人话。
E: Speak plainly.

C: 啊。你问我讲这个故事干嘛？抱着你的疑问，快打开我带回来的这三只宝箱看看吧！看看老巴特鲁斯一时兴起之后究竟会发生什么，桀桀桀桀……
E: Ah, wonder why did I tell you all this? Now go open these three treasure chests I brought you and see what happens when old Bartholos gets a little mischievous, hehehe...

C: 啊这…您给我整不会了。
E: Uh... you really lost me there.

C: 记得拿走你遇到的每一份财宝，让我们无愧于大盗之名！
E: Grab every treasure you spot. We've got our reputation as infamous thieves to maintain!

C: 诡计的泰坦，偷走一切又归还一切，目的也不过是用失去来唤醒珍惜。
E: The Trickery Titan, who takes all only to give it all back, only to teach us to appreciate what we have through the pain of loss.

C: 桀桀…甚好、甚好。如此我们便能轻装前行，各赴前程。
E: Heheh... Excellent, excellent. Then we can move on with light hearts, each to our own destiny.

C: 回见
E: See you later.

C: 好吧，如果你是在意这里面的语言风格…那我必须说明，这都是翻译的结果。原文是我还不太能搞懂的古泰坦语，是不是真的也是这种风格，就只有那位帮助我的学者前辈自己知道了。
E: Well, if it's the style that concerns you... just know that all of this is translated from the ancient Titan language, which I don't fully understand yet. Only the scholar knows if the original was also written in the same style.

C: 不好说。也许这同样是黑潮的某种机制…比如那剑士或怪物只是随便摸了摸「瑟希斯之心」，就可以造成这种破坏性的效果。
E: Hard to say. Maybe it's just another mechanism of the black tide. For instance, the swordmaster or the monsters might have only brushed against the "Heart of Cerces," yet caused this level of damage.

C: 这器物名为「雅努斯迷津」，是{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}万径之门{RUBY_E#}的卜筮用具，用它可溯寻一切事物的所在地。本月的委托积压了许多，该来的辅祭却杳无音信。而你恰好在此时现身……
E: This device is called Janus' Maze, a divination tool of the {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Gate of Infinity{RUBY_E#}. It can trace the location of anything. There's a backlog of requests this month, and the acolyte meant to handle them is nowhere to be found. And now you appear...

C: 谢谢你，{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}！我回家去了，我要把护身符缝好！妈妈教过我了！下次见吧！
E: Thank you, {F#big sister}{M#big brother}! I'm going home to sew this amulet back together! Mom taught me how! See you next time!

C: 事不宜迟，我们开始吧！球的位置要记好哦！
E: No time to waste. Let's begin! Be sure to remember the position of the balls!

C: 时间不多了——{NICKNAME}阁下，拜托您打开下一个火种匣吧！
E: There's no time — {NICKNAME}, please, open the next Coreflame Casket!

C: 呵呵…原来我是那样一个人吗？
E: Heh... So that's the kind of person I was, huh?

C: 我绝对没看错！帮了我们的肯定是个幽…幽灵！
E: I swear I'm not seeing things! The one who helped us has to be a... a ghost!

C: 声音没有回答。
E: The voice does not answer.

C: 这也是商旅的一部分工作。在下受了嘱托，要将这具灵柩顺路送回仙舟。呵，对动辄寿抵千年的长生种而言，「死亡」大概是个遥远的概念吧？
E: Yes indeed, this is just part of my job. I was asked to deliver this coffin to the Xianzhou. Ah, I'd quite forgotten — for long-life species, death is probably a distant concept?

C: 「奖励。」阮•梅眨了下眼睛，抿着嘴角笑了，「在这里<color=#dbc291ff>你一定会遇到我的切片</color>。感谢你为我的培育切片做的付出，这是一个纯粹的馈赠——为了我们的『以后』。」
E: "A reward." Ruan Mei blinks and gives a closed-mouth smile. "<color=#dbc291ff>You will always encounter my world slice</color> here. Thank you for your contribution to my nurturing slice. This is simply a gift — A gift for our 'future'."

C: 继续…
E: Continue...

C: 药师微微一笑，祂的身影远去了。
E: Yaoshi smiles and THEIR figure recedes into the distance.

C: 怎样才能让星神出现呢？
E: How can we bait an Aeon to appear?

C: 正式版本的「模拟宇宙」！快把之前的测试版给忘了。变化还挺多的，要我给你个更新清单吗？
E: The official version of "Simulated Universe"! Forget about the previous beta version. There are lots of changes. Do you want me to give you the patch notes?

C: 有求于你的话，我会的。
E: If I have to, then I will.

C: 这个版本提供了更高的自由度：你可以自由搭配自己的队伍，选择更多样的祝福，还会有随机发生的事件确保每次都有不同的体验。
E: This version offers a higher degree of freedom. You can mix and match your team, choose from a variety of Blessings, and there are even random events to guarantee you a unique experience every time.

C: 某位天才，他在被波尔卡·卡卡目杀死前曾留下个人手稿，他的文风正如其谈吐般含糊：「一、一位厄兆先锋、听懂『终末』如倒放谜团般的呓语？…尔后他游走四方、只为四处告知…厄兆先锋的举动是否产生效果、无从知晓…」
E: A genius left behind a manuscript before being murdered by Polka Kakamond. His writing style is as vague as his speech: "A—An Omen Van—Vanguard successfully interpreted the somniloquy of the Finality, those words sounding like an enigma being played backwards? ...He then traveled around only to share his findings with others... Th—There are no means to find out... whether the Omen Vanguard's action was effectiv—ve..."

C: 「该…该死的虚构口服药…说能治疗…因缺乏自信而引起的…口吃症…结果…连写作也…变成了…这样…」
E: "Th—That darn fictitious pills... It claimed... to be able to cure... stuttering disorder... caused by lack of self-confidence... Now... even my writing is... af—affected..."

C: 你跟随着虫潮，来到一颗遍地尸体的星球。你不当心踢翻一具尸体，那碎掉的脑袋却突然跳起来！你发现此地仍苟活一人——他胡子拉碴，脚腕扭曲，身上的布料也所剩无多。他头花发白，与你双目对视。
E: You trail the Swarm to a planet piled with corpses. As you inadvertently kick over a body, its shattered head suddenly springs to life! It is then that you notice an unlikely survivor with a scraggly beard, grizzled hair, twisted ankles, and scant clothing. The whiteness upon his crown catches your notice, and he raises his head and meets your gaze.

C: 他们的手怎么也洗不干净。他们分不清自己灭绝的是异党还是同胞。
E: However, they are never able to cleanse their hands, nor can they distinguish whether they have exterminated aliens or their own compatriots.

C: 「嗯…我没什么耐心。他又很快结束了短暂的一生。」黑塔有点不悦了，「本来一切记录得好好的。这次好像是被卷入了什么奇怪的斗争…」
E: "Well... Patience is never my forte. He has ended yet another fleeting life," Herta's voice is tinged with a hint of displeasure. "Everything went well... until he was caught up in some sort of weird war..."

C: 「别，我没在。」黑塔赌气地说，随即消失了。
E: "No, I'm not." Herta sulkily says, and then she's gone.

C: 祂的气息扑在你的脸上，祂的声音变成了求药使的祷告。
E: THEIR scent wafts over your face, and THEIR voice turns into a prayer from an Elixir Seeker.

C: 「{NICKNAME}{F#女士}{M#先生}，我十分惋惜与你的相聚要暂时告一段落。」螺丝咕姆深深地鞠了一躬，「天才俱乐部感谢你对模拟宇宙的付出。」
E: "{F#Ms.}{M#Mr.} {NICKNAME}, it is with great regret that our meeting has come to an end." Screwllum bows deeply, "The Genius Society thanks you for your contributions to the Simulated Universe."

C: 「请别担心，仅是暂时而已。」螺丝咕姆说，「下次测试时，我们仍会再见。」
E: "Don't worry. It is just temporary." Screwllum says. "We will meet again in the next test."

C: 我准备好了。
E: Ready.

C: 黑塔的声音被切断了。你的思维变得沉重，一些数据精准地流入你的神经——你对这开场很熟悉。但接下来，你感到自己的『认知』在逐渐拓宽了…由表演、纵横捭阖、机会、社会、背叛以及法则构筑的世界在你面前铺展开来……
E: Herta's voice is suddenly cut off. Your thoughts become heavy — some data flows into your nerves with precision. You know this opening all too well. But subsequently, you feel your cognition gradually expanding... A world built on performance, chicanery, opportunity, society, betrayal and law spreads out before you...

C: <color=#dbc291ff>杀毒情感罕见疾病未知何种情感即破译反密码它以为运作能源破解程序本质</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>virus kill emotion rare disease unknown what kind of emotion be decrypt inverse password it take as operate energy decrypt program essence</color>

C: 「走。」黑塔漫不经心地转了个圈，「开始了。」
E: "Now." Herta casually spins in a circle. "Let's start."

C: 「公司董事换了一届又一届，历史上的部门、主管更是没人在意。」黑塔补充道，「重要的是博识尊，和祂接下来的计算。」
E: "The board of directors of IPC changed from time to time. No one cared about the departments and their heads." Herta adds, "What matters is Nous and THEIR subsequent calculations."

C: 拒绝这个*机会*。
E: Turn down this *opportunity*.

C: 你看着她。
E: You stare at her.

C: 「我试过杀死你，我试过很多次。」她接着说，「在『时刻』到来前，我杀不了你，但『时刻』到来后，你又必须死——这就是祂计算中的『时刻』。」
E: "I tried killing you. Many, many times." She continues, "Before that moment arrives, you are unkillable, but when the moment is here, you have to die — That, is the moment calculated by Nous."

C: 「不管有机无机，都不是什么好机！」
E: "Organic or not, none of you are good!"

C: 你环视四周——特劳拉•法恩莎举起红酒杯，向客人们讲述「她」的想法。
E: You scan your surroundings and find Telora Farnsha raising her wine glass while articulating her ideas to her guests.

C: 「被制造者为制造者，制造者为被制造者」——窗外群鸟嗅到变化，向四面八方散去。「神秘」的清香于叶子间摇曳，风抹去了无用的语言，再次带来远方的声音：反有机战争爆发了。
E: "The created become the creators, and the creators become the created." Sensing the changes, the flock of birds outside the window takes off in all directions. The scent of Enigmata lingers around the leaves, and the wind carries a voice from afar, wiping away the ineffective uses of language: The Anti-Organic War has erupted.

C: 蝴蝶是什么？
E: What is the butterfly?

C: 根据推算，你的思维将在不久后陷入可怕的僵局。为了保持自身的进化速率，你需要更庞大的数据库，以及更多元的思考神经。
E: According to calculations, your thoughts will soon descend into a terrifying deadlock. In order to maintain your rate of evolution, you require a greater database and more varied cognitive nerves.

C: 「蜻蜓不会思考 ，却自然进化出驭风的机理；旋贝没有大脑，螺纹上却镌刻着繁衍的公式。生命演化的总能量是有限的，人类拥抱知识与智慧的同时，也将永远失去追求真理的进化本能。」
E: "A dragonfly does not think, yet it has naturally evolved to be able to ride the wind. Clams have no brains, yet the formula for reproduction is carved into their whorls. The energy that life has for evolution is finite. As humanity embraces wisdom and knowledge, they will also lose the evolutionary instinct to seek the truth."

C: 贼不走空是我的原则。
E: A thief never leaves empty-handed.

C: 「如果不是这个混账，我们学派将已拥有量产人造奇物的技术，不知道会有多少世界被这项技术拯救，对命途之力的研究也必将一日万里……我要求将他碎尸万段！」原告席的学者毫无风度地怒吼。
E: "If it weren't for this scoundrel, our school would have the technology to mass-produce synthetic Curios! Who knows how many planets could have been saved by this technology? This would surely have greatly advanced our research on Path power, too... I want him to face complete destruction!" The scholar at the plaintiff's bench roared, completely losing his bearing.

C: 智慧生命对能源的争夺贯穿整个文明史，从远古时代的化学燃料到如今的核聚变原料，一切的原因都在于能源的稀缺性。
E: Intelligent creatures' contention over energy sources has traversed all of cultural history. From the chemical fuels of ancient times to modern nuclear fusion materials, the reason for all of this has been the scarcity of energy sources.

C: 「量子历史学派的预言宣称，<color=#dbc291ff>无机细胞的思考之下，新的天才将应运而生</color>。虽然学会对预言的准确性表示质疑，但帝皇尸骨未寒，我们不得不重视预言，预防未知的危机诞生。」
E: "The Quantum History School's prophecy proclaims: <color=#dbc291ff>With the deliberations of inorganic cells, new geniuses will rise to the call</color>. Though the Guild casts doubt on the prophecy's veracity, the Emperor's corpse is not yet cold. We cannot help but consider the importance of the prophecy, to prevent the birth of future crises."

C: 「集所有算力于一人，为他求得问神的机会，铺垫天才的道路，创造出学会的完美学者。」他的目光里满是癫狂，「一百万个庸才的难题，和一个天才的灵感，哪个更有价值？答案不言自明。」
E: "Focus all the computational power on one individual, granting them the chance to speak to the gods, pave the way for genius and create the perfect scholar for the Guild." Madness gleams in his eyes. "A million problems from the mediocre versus the inspiration of a single genius — which is more valuable? The answer is self-evident."

C: <unbreak>8674</unbreak>-边星的作物种植。
E: <unbreak>8674</unbreak>: Border Star crop cultivation.

C: 「但它关不住我的，天才不可能永远困在圆圈里。」
E: "But it can't shut me in. Geniuses won't allow themselves to be shackled in the circle."

C: 边星克罗斯特亚，云翳上的投影，<color=#dbc291ff>相对认知学派</color>的伊格莱情绪激昂，演讲在共计<unbreak>142</unbreak>个星域同步播出。
E: On the border star Klostia, projected across the nebulae, Eagleye of the <color=#dbc291ff>School of Relative Cognition</color> orates fervently, their monologue simultaneously broadcast across <unbreak>142</unbreak> segmenta.

C: 「检测到…」通讯中断，模拟宇宙的回溯进程骤然崩溃。
E: "Detected..." The communication breaks off and the Simulated Universe's backtracking progress suddenly collapses.

C: 「你为我献上了一幕精彩的舞剧，我就用你剩下的生命作为小费回报，」女人再次整了整糖果色衣袍的褶皱，仿佛她极其在意其上每一道纹路是否各安其位。「就此别过了，小家伙，你该庆幸自己依旧停留在『知识圆圈』里。」
E: "You've given me a spectacular performance, and I will grant you the rest of your life as my tip." The woman adjusts her candy-colored robe as if the position of each crease on the fabric is of utmost importance. "Farewell, little one. Count your lucky stars that you're still within the Circle of Knowledge."

C: 你有时会把多余的唾液分给他们，用于加固犄角。这样，你的子嗣便能获得一个更温暖的巢穴。
E: Occasionally, you will offer excess saliva to them to help fortify the horns. This way, your offspring will have a warmer nest to live in.

C: 在古老的过去，你送了一颗心给他们。所以，他们也送了你一颗星星。
E: In the ancient past, you gave them a heart. Now, they have given you a star.

C: 好好测试，加油咯。
E: Be a good tester and do your best.

C: {NICKNAME}，还记得那个小跟班吗？使命完成，它回去了。
E: {NICKNAME}, you remember that sidekick? It left after its mission was accomplished.

C: 「呃，不是这样的。」男子的声音有些茫然，他舔了舔嘴唇。「我的意思是，你喜欢歌舞片还是动作片？」
E: "Um, that's not what I meant." The man sounds bewildered. He licks his lips and continues. "I wanted to ask whether you prefer musicals or action movies."

C: 迫于她强大的威慑力，你坐在这里。一位女佣递上香槟，轻吻疤眼夫人的手背。
E: You are sitting here because of her overwhelming intimidation. A maid offers her a glass of champagne, and softly kisses the back of her hand.

C: 疤眼夫人身旁的佣人推出一个长着翅膀的机器天使。「天使型谢债发行机，你需要定期把口袋里的金币喂给它。它会记录你的投资。投资周期结束，它会给你数十倍回馈。」
E: The servant next to Madam Scarred Eye pushes out a robot angel with wings. "This is the Angel-type I.O.U. Dispenser. You need to feed Gold Coins into it regularly, and it will keep a record of your investment. At the end of the investment term, it will pay you an amount more than ten times your principal."

C: 「接下来我教你如何掌握消费者心理。这涉及到概率学，人人都会对超级大乐透感兴趣。我保证，你总会有一天开到超级大奖。」
E: "Now, let me teach you a thing or two about consumer psychology, which involves probability theory. A jackpot with a huge prize is irresistible to most people. I guarantee that you will strike the jackpot one day."

C: 「如果你留下宇宙碎片，则有<unbreak>100%</unbreak>的概率会生还。」它正等待你的反应。
E: "But if you leave some Cosmic Fragments behind, your chance of survival is <unbreak>100%</unbreak>." It is waiting for your response.

C: 将你从危机中解救后，纯美骑士们仍然不愿离去。此刻，一位骑士认为你非常喜欢奇物…
E: After rescuing you from danger, the Knights of Beauty are reluctant to leave. One of the knights thinks you are a fan of Curios...

C: 现在你该搅拌它了。
E: It's time to stir it.

C: 这是你来到星际和平公司的第一天。你望着高耸入云的星际和平分部大楼，决心成为一名出色的星际和平员工。
E: This is your first day at the Interastral Peace Corporation. Staring at the towering IPC branch building, you are determined to become an excellent IPC employee.

C: …看来它似乎并不喜欢被这么对待。
E: ...Seems like it hates to be treated this way.

C: 「帝皇的遗产并非只向无机体敞开，若你能够舍弃现有的桎梏…它将为你指引正确的方向。」智械的眼中闪烁起猩红的微光，他的话语如同一道魔咒，在你的意识里激起层层共鸣。
E: "The emperor's legacy isn't only available for inorganic creatures. If you can free yourself from your current shackles... it will guide you in the right direction." A faint crimson light flashes in the Intellitron's eyes. His words send ripples of resonance in your consciousness like a spell.

C: 模仿着她的动作，培养仓里的小家伙也把身子探出水面，试图聆听你们的声音。
E: The little guy in the incubator imitates Ruan Mei's moves and pokes its body out of the water, trying to listen to your voices.

C: 造物单元向你提问，核心需要新的主人给它一个课题，让它完成制造万物的使命。
E: The creation unit tells you that it requires a new master to provide it with a new research topic so that it may complete its mission of creation of all things.

C: 问题二，您的种族为？
E: Question two, what is your species?

C: 比起和密码死磕，你选择了更高效的策略——请时刻牢记，时间就是金钱。
E: Instead of fighting with your password, you decide to go for a more efficient strategy. Please remember, time is money.

C: 「此地禁止欢笑。」你不信邪地放声大笑，但声音在出口的瞬间便逸散无踪。
E: "Laughter is forbidden here." You defiantly burst into laughter, yet the sound dissipates into nothingness the moment it escapes your lips.

C: 你撞开敌军的护卫圈，伪装的智能代码试图躲进旗舰的引擎，却被你的捕捉足钳制，带回数据外的舰船。重新回到灵长类的躯体，实在是无比怀念。
E: You breach the enemy's defensive encirclement. The disguised smart code attempts to hide itself within the ship's engine, only to be captured by you and brought back to the ship beyond the data. The sensation of returning to your human form is truly comforting.

C: 你向着晶体单元的外围走去，三进制帝国对二进制的征讨已经失败，人人都沉浸在恐惧当中。一只二进制的彗尾歌鸲从头顶掠过，你向它吹了个口哨，代码便乖乖落到指尖。
E: You walk toward the periphery of the crystal unit. Following the Ternary Empire's unsuccessful conquest against the Binary Kingdom, fear permeates everyone's heart. When a binary intellitail songbird flies overhead, you whistle at it, compelling the code to obediently descend onto your fingertips.

C: 夹杂着过往的小菜落入口中，浸透味蕾，你的感官逐渐与舌尖上的刺激重合。你身披制式的盔甲，向前踏出一步，接受你身为云骑的使命。
E: As you put the appetizer mixed with the past into your mouth, it soaks into your taste buds. The stimulation on the tip of your tongue overlaps with your senses. You are donned in standard armor as you take a step forward to embrace your calling as a Cloud Knight.

C: 它等待一场永不再来的重逢，黄金璀璨的时节，诗人邂逅了黄金之茧的眷属。
E: It awaits a reunion that will never arrive, a time scintillating in gold, when poets encountered the Chrysalis of Gold's kin.

C: 你走进一条冷寂的小巷，绚烂的光晕挤走了阴影，一副未完成的画作静静躺在角落。
E: You stroll through a cold, deserted alley. The dazzling light dispels the shadows, revealing an incomplete painting resting quietly in a corner.

C: 还是把唤醒妖怪的工作外包出去好了。
E: Perhaps it's best to outsource this task of awakening the monster.

C: 等你清醒过来时，阳光已落在海面，破碎的船身里，不知何时多出了些许宝藏。作为大海对勇者的赞赏。
E: When you awaken, the sun is already pouring its light over the ocean. The shattered boat is inexplicably laden with treasures — a tribute from the sea to braves.

C: 让我们回顾一场生生不息的战争，亦是地上的众多战争的开始。
E: Let us recall a war that continues to thrive, the precursor to many across the land.

C: 它是一只飞鸟。
E: They may appear as a bird.

C: 向大海倾倒迷人的祭品。
E: Pour enchanting libations into the sea.

C: 这可算是个千古谜题。如果塔兰顿的天平左托盘和右托盘一起掉进水里，它会先捡哪一个？什么才是真正的美丽？依我看，哪怕聪明如瑟希斯，也回答不上这些难题。
E: This poses an age-old riddle. If both pans of Talanton's scale were to fall into the water, which would they retrieve first? What constitutes true beauty? Even Cerces, with all their wisdom, struggles to unravel these enigmas.

C: 可终究是聊胜于无。
E: Yet, it is better than nothing.

C: 「我行于八方，向世人宣告塔兰顿平衡的力量。你大可向我许愿，放置于这天平一侧，若将来愿望成真，另一侧也会生出额外奖赏，你便能一同拿去。」
E: "I walk in the world, spreading the word of Talanton's equilibrium. You may entrust a wish to this scale — place it upon one side, and if your wish is fulfilled, then the other side will bear a matching reward. Both shall be yours."

C: 那泰坦也有终点？
E: Then do Titans have an end?

C: 法吉娜这么做有点过分。
E: Phagousa did go a little too far here.

C: 它是翁法罗斯最温柔之物，用无价的神启挽救堕落人子。
E: They were the most gentle being of Amphoreus, using priceless revelations to save fallen humanity.

C: 劳动最光荣。
E: There's no glory like work.

C: 可怖的折磨。
E: What terrible torture.

C: 听起来好痛。
E: Sounds painful.

C: 请回答问题——对您人生影响最大的人是？
E: Please answer the following question: Who has had the biggest influence on your life?

C: 你记得在空间站的某处记载着奇物「不可承受之重」的神奇功效，它能让人迅速掌握一门语言。经过比对，眼前这顶王冠正是神奇的「不可承受之重」。
E: You recall a record in the space station about how the Curio "Unbearable Weight" can instantly make someone fluent in a language. After careful scrutiny, you conclude this crown before you is none other than the wondrous Unbearable Weight.

C: 尽管你和约特伍德人素未谋面，但你相信它们一定是这宇宙里最具慧眼的族群。
E: Despite never having met the Tottonids, you trust they must be in possession of the greatest taste in all the universe.

C: 多读点文献吧！希望你能抛开愚昧无知的陈腐思想，积极拥抱科学的前沿理论！
E: Keep on reading, then! I hope you can put aside your foolish superstitions and embrace the theories of modern science!

C: 你为空间站节省了些许能源，尽管不多，但某种满足感令你不由自主地挺起了胸膛！
E: You've saved just a teensy bit of power for the space station. It's not much, but it's still enough to make you puff your chest out in pride!

C: 我也是冠军，怎么没这待遇？
E: I, too, am a champion. Where's my crowd of adoring fans?

C: 就像是一名听候宣判的罪犯。是的…你确信，在那一瞬间，你感受到了目光——尖冷，刺骨…来自雷诺阿先生，来自侍应生，来自整个剧院。
E: You feel like a criminal waiting for judgment. Yes... You are certain that looks are being leveled at you — penetrating, icy gazes from Mr. Renoir, the waiter, and everyone else in the theater.

C: 语音声压级提升至<unbreak>61</unbreak>分贝了。这令你的压力感应膜感到*不适*。但你被教导应服从人类命令，因此你并没有生成音频信号，向人群传达你的*主观感受*。
E: The speaker's volume increases to <unbreak>61</unbreak> decibels, causing DISCOMFORT to your pressure-sensing membrane. As you have been trained to obey human instructions, you do not generate audio signals to express your SUBJECTIVE FEELINGS to the crowd.

C: 你的神经元与<unbreak>16</unbreak>号机甲的手臂骨骼连接在一起，这种感觉从来都不舒服。你扭过头想对搭档抱怨，然后，你发现莉亚也在看你，话语不再有必要了。
E: Your neurons are connected to the bones of Mecha No. <unbreak>16</unbreak>'s arms — the experience has always been uncomfortable. You turn around, ready to complain to your partner, only to find Leah is also staring at you. No words are necessary.

C: 你望向方桌左边。离你最近的是提乌德里克，那是家族中的长子，最为能征善战。若没有他，你无法想象这偌大的王国如何在军团的猛攻下幸存。
E: You turn to the left side of the table. Theuderic, who sits nearest to you, is the eldest son of the family and a most valiant soldier. Without him, you cannot imagine how this kingdom could have survived the relentless attacks from the Legion.

C: 走开。
E: Leave.

C: 她会不会和你是同一个部门的？你不知道，但你喜欢看她和那十八个情人周旋的故事；你也不知道自己和她到底谁更有罪，但你向来有充分的理由自证清白——
E: You wonder whether she is a colleague from your department? You have no idea, but you enjoy reading about her interactions and schemes with her <unbreak>18</unbreak> lovers. Between you and her, you are not sure who is more guilty, but you've always had a knack for finding excuses to prove your innocence...

C: 你睡眼惺忪。房间被遮光系数高达<unbreak>99%</unbreak>的复合材料窗帘遮得严严实实——若不借助心灵感应触须，你仅凭肉眼很难分辨空间的构造…尽管你自五十年前就住在这里。
E: Your eyes are bleary from sleep. The composite material of the bedroom's curtains effectively blocks out <unbreak>99%</unbreak> of light. Were it not for your psychic tentacles, you would be hard-pressed to discern the structure of the space surrounding you with your eyes alone, even though you've been living here since fifty years ago.

C: 蝴蝶纹丝不动，仿佛已经和这东西融为了一体……
E: The butterfly doesn't move at all, as though completely merged together with this thing...

C: 嗡~这么长时间以来，我一直在靠自己的翅膀飞翔。没想到在水里，不用费力拍打翅膀也能也能「飞」起来。
E: All this time I've relied on these wings of mine to fly. Who would've thought in the water, I can "fly" just fine without having to flap my wings.

C: 又是熟悉的感觉…
E: It's the familiar feeling again...

C: 这莫非也是吾主的意志喀……
E: Could this also be the will of my master...?

C: …哎呀，怎么能这么说呢？规则我也跟你说过了，咱也是要做生意的嘛……
E: ...Hey, now. What's all that about? I told you the rules upfront. I need to earn a living too...

C: 在你认真读书或沉迷游戏的时候，你不会拒绝有这样一壶茶在你手边。
E: You wouldn't turn away such a pot of tea if you were engrossed in reading or gaming.

C: 留言…涉及原创的环节总会让你倍感苦恼。不如把它变成一道选择题。
E: A comment... Coming up with original content is always a headache. It's better to make it a multiple choice question.

C: 哼哼…现在只差{NICKNAME}了——你藏在哪里了呀？让我好好找找你！
E: Hehe... The only one left is {NICKNAME}. Where are you hiding? I'm going to find you!

C: 但无论是与不是，你都获得了一笔意外之财——你就当是替铁卫收了罚款吧。
E: Right or wrong, you did receive some unexpected cash. Let's just say you've accepted the fine on behalf of the guards.

C: 什，什么
E: Wh—What?

C: 喔？！这，这是……
E: Huh!? This... This is...

C: 你已经听到虎克那欢快的声音从远处传来。接下来会发生什么呢？你止不住地想，背上竟还兴奋地沁出汗来…也许，这就是捉迷藏的乐趣所在吧。
E: You can already hear Hook's cheery voice echoing from afar. What's going to happen now? You can't help but imagine it as sweat rolls down your back. This exhilaration must be the joy of hide-and-seek.

C: 还好他最近一直住在那个什么…机械聚落，不然肯定要对你发脾气啦！
E: Thankfully, he's been away at... what was it... oh, the Robot Settlement. If he were here, he would have given you an earful!

C: 得赶快收拾干净才行，不然对圣女大人的健康不好喀！
E: Need to tidy up fast for the Holy Maiden's wellbeing, crrrk!

C: 话说回来，圣女大人…已经多久不曾回来了喀……
E: Speaking of Lady Holy Maiden... it's been so long since she came back, crrk...

C: 哈哈——开玩笑的喀！放心吧，我有特殊的登高技巧喀！
E: Haha, fooled you! Relax, I know all the climbing tricks, crrrk!

C: 我想沿着时光的河水逆流而上…可是，我既无力违抗瀑流的冲刷，又不甘随波逐流、就此放弃。
E: I wish to swim against the current of time's river... yet I cannot resist the torrents nor resign myself to drifting along and giving up.

C: 阳光普照，万物显形嘤！
E: Sunlight reveals all, nothing stays hidden, chirp!

C: 不要问我为什么能做到——「诡计」的神偷甚至可以把你兜里的钱替换成破瓦片，只需要擦肩而过的一瞬，并且保准不露馅！
E: Don't ask me how I did it — the divine thief of Trickery can even replace the money in your pocket with a shard of pottery in the blink of an eye, without you ever noticing!

C: 不过要我猜的话，这里可能是斯缇科西亚覆灭前的房间，被人用某种方式保留至今。
E: But if I had to guess, this might be a room from before the fall of Styxia, preserved by some means until now.

C: 看来要创造若虫的幸福，只能靠我们自己嗡……
E: Looks like if we want happiness for nymphs, we'll have to rely on ourselves...

C: 暴饮暴食、与人打赌、或者欣赏戏曲…统统都没意思，但我已经不再想用你们人类的娱乐观念来规范自己了。
E: Pigging out, gambling, or attending a show... It's all a snorefest to me. I'm not going to bother using human concepts of entertainment to amuse myself any longer.

C: 我的宝贝…我的宝贝…
E: My darling... My darling...

C: 曾经它击倒过万夫莫敌的英雄，如今的战士与英雄与之相比，不过是软弱的老鼠。而你不过是一介小小的贼人，它更是不会将你放入眼里。
E: Once, it even defeated a hero of unparalleled victories. Today, warriors and heroes are like mice compared to the hero. You are nothing but a teeny tiny thief, unworthy for which to raise an eyebrow.

C: 听听不懂，算力不足足，你你你在说什么…快救救我我我……
E: I d—don't understand. Insufficient computational power. What are you s—s—saying? H—h—help me...

C: 果然如此，我就知道你是来找我的，我在这里已经等候多时了。
E: I knew it. I knew you were looking for me. I've been waiting for a while.

C: 仙舟什么时候变成了你们的地盘。
E: Since when did the Xianzhou become your territory?

C: 好几只机巧鸟也可以自由对话。
E: There are quite a number of cycranes with the ability to speak.

C: 讲讲你们那道课后作业题。
E: Tell me the bonus question.

C: 我懂了，你们俩各拿5镝！
E: I've got it! You should get 5 strales each!

C: 要是能帮我写作业……
E: If you can help me with my homework...

C: 因为曾经的我，和你们一样…也是一位「无名客」。即便阿基维利消逝了，祂的传说还是流传诸界。
E: Because I, I was once just like you... I was once a Nameless. Akivili may have faded away, but THEIR legend still lives on.

C: 我也像你这样一腔热情的冒险，肆无忌惮地打开所有我能打开的宝箱。
E: I was bristling with the excitement of adventure, just like you, opening up any old chest with reckless abandon.

C: 喀…刚出门就被掉下来的砖头砸中，未免也太倒霉了。
E: Argh... I step outside, and the first thing that happens? A brick falls on my head. Just my luck.

C: 我也有翅膀，怎么不算翼兽呢。别害怕，我也会带你逃出生天！
E: I've got wings too. So why shouldn't I count as a winged beast? No need to be afraid — I'll carry you to freedom myself!

C: 前进得到二，后退得到一。
E: To move ahead is to gain. To run away is to lose.

C: 「波月古海」，持明神圣而不可秽染的神圣水域，今日也依旧风平浪静。
E: The Lunarescent Depths, the sacred and incorruptible holy waters of the Vidyadhara, remain calm and peaceful even today.

C: 「钟表匠」已经不在了，没人再庇护我们了，要不咱们也离开吧？
E: The Watchmaker is gone. There is no one to protect us anymore. Don't you think we should leave?

C: 你真的要离开吗？
E: Are you really leaving?

C: 好吧，列车或许在途中遭遇了什么事故，比如被星核挡住了轨道，用不了一会儿，它就能清理掉障碍，悠哉游哉地行驶到你的面前。
E: Okay, the train might have run into some issues on its way here, like a Stellaron blocking its way. It won't be long before it can remove the obstacle and swimmingly arrive before you.

C: 不知为何，你忽地被这张沙发吸引住了眼球，像是在雨夜里发现了一颗星星。
E: This sofa suddenly catches your attention for some unknown reason, like spotting a star on a rainy night.

C: 恭喜，你克服了内心深处的冲动，重新回到了成熟稳重的大人世界。
E: Congratulations, you've overcome the impulse deep in your heart and returned to the mature, sensible world of adults.

C: 依照匹诺康尼和《小小哈努行动》策划格莱西的标准评判，电视机的运作是正常的——但它无法播放其他电视节目，这或许需要别的手段。
E: By Penaconian standards — and according to Graysen, the developer of Hanu's Adventure — the television is working properly, even if it can't play other television programs. You might need to try something else.

C: 每次船长一走过去…
E: Every time the captain walks past...

C: 大变活人？
E: Magic show involving living people?

C: 我还想听…
E: I want to listen some more...

C: 那不该叫「真理」吗？
E: Shouldn't that be called "truth" instead?

C: 你不对劲。
E: Um. Okay?

C: 可怎么才能带走呢？
E: But how do you take it with you?

C: 你这是迷信…
E: That's so superstitious...

C: 啊，这么快，辛苦{NICKNAME}乘客了。快让帕姆尝尝！
E: Wow, that was fast, {NICKNAME}. Let me have a sip!

C: …唔，这就是{NICKNAME}乘客想的办法？好像确实挺有用的……
E: ...Oh, so that was your plan all along? It seems like it kinda worked...

C: 瞧，又来一个。事先声明，如果是想找我开医院假单，免谈！上头最近管的可严，没这个机会！
E: See, there's another one. If you're here to get a fake medical certificate from me, you can see yourself out now! My boss's been watching me closely lately, and there's no room for me to do such things!

C: 回来一趟，你怎么不理我…
E: Why are you ignoring me when I'm finally back...

C: {NICKNAME}，误会你了真的很抱歉。
E: {NICKNAME}, I'm really sorry for misunderstanding you.

C: 要是有，你可以邀请他们上列车逛逛。
E: If you did, you may invite them for a ride on the Express.

C: 总…总觉得听上去怪怪的……
E: Wh—Why does it sound a bit weird to me...

C: 想不到{NICKNAME}乘客还有这样奉献自我的决心，帕姆很高兴！
E: Can't believe you have such altruistic dedication, {NICKNAME}. Pom-Pom is very happy!

C: 杰帕德。
E: Gepard.

C: 瓦尔特…瓦尔特是个稳重的人，似乎经历了很多，不过帕姆曾见过他少有的失态的样子。
E: Welt... Welt is a man who seems to have been through a lot. He is calm and composed, though Pom-Pom has seen him lose his cool on rare occasions.

C: （那一定就是控制大门的终端了。）
E: (That must be the terminal that controls the gate.)

C: 你就是「少校」？
E: Are you the Major?

C: 你会怎么选择，{NICKNAME}教官？哈！哈！哈！
E: What'll it be, Drillmaster {NICKNAME}? Bwahaha!

C: 也许你该再坚持一下？
E: Maybe you should keep at it a little longer?

C: 等等，先听我说完，还有很多次元扑满需要我们捕获。
E: Not so fast. We still need to catch a lot more Warp Trotters.

C: 太好了，这样应该就能让迴星港更快地恢复生产了。
E: Great. This should help Stargazer Navalia resume production quickly.

C: 6…8…7…7…你的手指开始自发地拨动转盘上的数字。噢，这下糟了——假如这电话真能拨通，你就真得开始考虑如何打招呼了。
E: 6...8...7...7...You start dialing the number. Oops, now you got to figure out what to say if it does connect.

C: 在惺惺相惜的氛围中，你与对方道别，而对方迅速挂断了对话。毫无疑问，这场比试是你获胜了。
E: You say your goodbye and the other end quickly hangs up. Undoubtedly, you've won this round.

C: 善于观察生活的你心里明白，每个欢闹的场合中总会有这样一位不苟言笑的家伙。但是，眼前的它似乎有点与众不同……
E: You know from past observations that there would be one such person in every such occasion, but this one seems different somehow...

C: 嘿…你是来参加「黑暗拳斗大赛」的吗？
E: Hey, are you here for the Dark Fist Tournament?

C: 让我们有请——{NICKNAME}！
E: Please welcome {NICKNAME}!

C: 你怎么一直不说话？
E: Why don't you ever say anything?

C: 什么？
E: Huh?

C: 哦，我们的新秀{NICKNAME}即将对汤姆发起挑战！
E: The rookie {NICKNAME} is taking on Tom!

C: 换句话说，你的这个念头或许没有想象中那么邪恶。倘若再深入思考，恐怕好好教育教育这个小孩子、教会他何谓「以牙还牙」才是正确的哩！
E: In other words, it actually might not be a bad idea to humble the kid with "an eye for an eye."

C: 你等着，我一定会回来的！
E: I'll be back. Just you wait!

C: 我的眼睛…看不见东西。还请您原谅我的失礼……
E: My eyes... I can't see. Please forgive my rudeness...

C: 她的妹妹十分孤单，正在家中等她……
E: Her younger sister is waiting for her all alone at home...

C: 啊啊…是铃铛声…！
E: Ahh... the sound of the bell...!

C: 它是一个——仅从你的感官所能接收到的表象而言——完美的衣柜。外观、容量、触感、材质、味道…无论从哪个角度出发，你都想象不出比它更完美的衣柜了。
E: It is — based on all the signals coming in from your sensory organs — a perfect closet. Design, capacity, tactility, build quality, and scent... No matter how you look at it, you can't possibly think of a better closet.

C: …啊，你竟然把它们全部集齐了。我本来安排了铁卫把它们揭掉，但看来还是你的动作比较快。
E: ...Ah, you got them all together. I asked guards to help me rip them down, but I see that you're far quicker.

C: 我只听说她很会画画，还因此有不少拥趸，其他的便不清楚了。如果你实在好奇，可以亲自去问问她相关细节。
E: All I've heard is that she's a wonderful painter with lots of fans because of it. That's all I know. If you're really curious, you can ask her about the rest in person.

C: 继续向北。
E: Go further north.

C: 或许你该换个方向，再探索一次。
E: Perhaps you should change direction and explore again.

C: 不得不说，这喷泉里真是什么都有，和远古帝王的宝藏相比也毫不逊色！看！你居然从喷泉里找到了——熄灭原核？！难道反物质军团也在这里许过愿吗？
E: It begs to say that this fountain really does have everything in it, just like the ancient treasure tombs of the emperors gone by! Look! You somehow find amidst those ripples — Extinguished Core!? Has the Antimatter Legion ever made a wish here!?

C: 沉默。沉默。一阵漫长到令你难以忍受的沉默。
E: Stay quiet, though it's becoming unbearable.

C: 桌子上放着一只老旧的箱子，它的开口被比箱子本身看上去更为老旧的机械锁锁住。
E: There's an old box on the table with a combination lock that appears even older than the box.

C: 错误。你听到一阵沉闷的滋滋声，四个凹槽内的数字恢复到了初始的、无序的状态。糟糕——看来你得从头再试一次了。
E: Wrong. You hear a low buzzing sound as the numbers in all four slots return to their original random state. Shoot, looks like you gotta start all over again.

C: 不好奇啊。就是个第三任大守护者的遗物而已嘛，丢了也不是很可惜。
