E: Not really. It's just an artifact left behind by the third Supreme Guardian. Won't be that big of a loss anyway.

C: 男人带着一脸不可思议的表情，收下钱，迅速消失在街角。
E: He looks at you incredulously, before taking the money and scarpering off around the corner.

C: 没有损失。
E: No losses.

C: 你决定——
E: You decide to...

C: 哎，也怪我，当时借给邻居家的狐人小孩玩了一会儿。结果送回来的时候就多了一些乱七八糟的东西……
E: *sigh* It's my fault. I lent it to the neighbor's foxian kid to play with. When I came back, it was stuffed full of this junk...

C: 你把手放到罐口，却无论如何也放不进去。你没摸到任何阻碍物，但那股强大的抵抗力却是货真价实的。
E: You try putting your hand into the vase, but can't seem to do it. You don't feel any obstacles, but the force resisting you is definitely real.

C: …是的，先前的来信与你写成的去信双双消失在那脏兮兮的小盒中。取而代之的则是一崭新的信件——
E: ...It worked. The previous letter and your reply have both disappeared from that filthy little box. Instead, a brand-new letter has taken their places —

C: 信中人似乎对于在千百年后再度收到「逍遥先生」来信感到有些忧伤，信中所述的悲剧也令你感到五味杂陈。你想再回复些什么，却无论如何都不是滋味。
E: This correspondent seems a little sad to have received another letter from Mr. Carefree after millennia, and the tragedy outlined in the letter leaves you with mixed feelings. You want to reply, but can't find the right words.

C: 总而言之，您只要找到丢失的货物，拍照给发给我就可以了！剩下的事情交给我们。
E: In any case, all you need to do is find the missing goods, take pictures, and send the pictures to me. We'll take care of the rest.

C: {NICKNAME}，夕葵大人，走这边，这边能把他们逼进死胡同。
E: {NICKNAME} and Lady Xikui, please head this way and force them to a dead end.

C: 「*不连续的机械噪音*这里...机巧鸟，请...快...救援。」
E: "*Intermittent mechanical noise* Here... Cycrane, please... send... help."

C: 怎么感觉头顶有风声？
E: How come I can hear the wind blowing above my head?

C: 相信夕葵大人也和你说了，鹤运物流运输中的很多货物都丢失了。
E: I believe Xikui has told you that many Heron Express cargo have been lost in transit.

C: 还有别的事…
E: I have other things to do...

C: …没有「忆泡」，等等，这是照片…戒指…还有一封信。
E: There's no Memory Bubble... Hang on, here's a photo... A ring... And a letter to someone.

C: 打扰了，你们继续…
E: Don't mind me, as you were...

C: 我看看…没问题，你的货是这件。不过，你的这件货物是货到付款的。价格…需要<unbreak>1000</unbreak>信用点。
E: Let me see... Not a problem, here you go. But you do know this item is cash-on-delivery, right? It's... <unbreak>1000</unbreak> credits, please.

C: 其他维度？现在已经有「虚」和「实」了，除此之外…还能再增加花纹。
E: Extra dimensions? We already have Virtual and Real. And... We could also put in some more decorative patterns.

C: 怎么样，怎么样，「枘凿六合」变得更好玩了吗？
E: How about it, then? Is the Hexanexus even more fun now?

C: 欺负？这年头连说实话都违法了吗？既然它敢放出这样的广告，就早该做好被骂的准备！
E: Bullying? Is merely telling the truth enough to get you canceled nowadays? Since it dared to display these ads to the world, it should also be prepared to get chewed out!

C: 要是不嫌弃的话，您若什么时候得了空闲，可以替我陪陪她吗？
E: If you don't mind and if you have any free time, would you please keep her company for me?

C: 就像是煤灰堆下隐约透出的暗火。
E: Just like a smolder of flame burning dimly beneath a pile of soot.

C: 怎么，还有什么想知道的？这个够了吗？
E: Why, is there anything else you'd like to know? Is that enough?

C: 那一杆打得并不好。飞船发出的物体没有按照预想回弹，而是像没头苍蝇一样乱撞一气，反过来加速了信标的沉没。
E: The shot was no good. The missiles did not rebound as expected, but instead smashed around like a headless fly — which then accelerated the sinking of the beacon.

C: 有兴趣的话，之后再给你讲点其他的动作戏…等我花点时间编下细节。
E: If you're interested, I can spin a few more action stories for you later... just let me come up with some of the details first.

C: 走投无路的韦兰自然不会放过任何一根救命稻草，对虚空鲸的屠杀自此拉开序幕……
E: At his wits' end, Wyland could not help but clutch to any last straw that might save his life. And so began the massacre of the void song whales...

C: 好在我也参与了那场战斗…以运输舰驾驶员的身份。
E: Luckily, I also participated in that battle... as the pilot of the transport vessel.

C: 在赏金交到手里之前，我们可不会轻易让出这个位置。
E: Before the bounty is in our hands, we won't just give up this position.

C: （小声）我知道，你没必要当着{M#他}{F#她}的面跟我说。
E: (Whispering) I know. There's no need for you to tell me in front of {M#him}{F#her}.

C: 所以，我才当了个海盗。
E: That's why I became a pirate.

C: 你认为他们缺少同情心？
E: Do you think they lack any empathy?

C: 当天晚上，每个人都分到了一块多汁的肉排。大家对它的味道赞叹不已，但我一口也没吃。
E: Later that night, everyone enjoyed their own juicy cutlet. Everyone raved about how delicious it tasted, but I didn't take a single bite.

C: 漫长的黑暗为奥特兰带来了安全，却也足以把人逼疯……
E: The long darkness brought security to Outerland, but also madness...

C: 我是班尼——对，就是那个班尼，你没猜错。很高兴认识你，伙计！
E: My name is Benny... Yes, THAT Benny. It's a pleasure to meet you, buddy!

C: 现在的逐梦客，什么场面没见过？只靠生硬堆料吸引眼球的时代已经过去了…奇迹本杰明的那套做法过时了。
E: Dreamchasers nowadays have seen it all. Gone are the days when you can easily grab attention by piling different ideas together stiffly... Miracle Benjamin's style is just outdated.

C: 满分十分，给个分数吧。
E: Please give it a score out of ten.

C: 总、总之…我叫波奇，是星际和平公司的员工，隶属于市场开拓部。
E: A—Anyway... My name is Bocchi, and I work in the Marketing Development Department of the IPC.

C: …你们大人的世界可真黑暗。
E: ...The world of adults sure is dark.

C: 我刚刚看到新闻了，我那个好伙伴…竟然被抓了，还被扣上了「诈骗犯」的帽子！
E: I saw the news just now. My partner... was arrested and labeled a fraudster!

C: 等会儿，这是什么？「长效专利捍卫一纸通」…什么乱七八糟的？
E: Hold on, what's this? Indefinite Patent Operative Omnifier... What kind of nonsense is this?

C: 赶紧完成他给你布置的任务，回去领取你违背良心换来的奖励吧。
E: Just get the task done already, so you can go back and grab the reward for selling your soul.

C: 你对上他的眼睛——浑浊、红肿、血丝遍布，好似两汪泥泞不堪的水坑。
E: You meet his bloodshot eyes, all hazy and muddy like puddles.

C: 她的名字叫科蒂。万万没想到…踏进匹诺康尼的第一分钟，我就立刻堕入了情网。
E: Her name's Coty. I never thought in a million years... the moment I stepped into Penacony, I was head over heels.

C: 没良心，开除他！
E: Just fire that ungrateful brat!

C: 我从没有觉得她不在乎我的前途，相反，她很想让我成功，让我的事业一帆风顺，成为她的骄傲。
E: I've never felt that she doesn't care about my future. On the contrary, she really wants me to have a successful career and make her proud.

C: 他还会继续当演员的。
E: He'll still be an actor.

C: 亲爱的{M#先生}{F#小姐}…您觉得知更鸟前辈这样的歌手会有和我一样的痛苦吗？
E: Dear {M#sir}{F#lady}... Do you think Robin has experienced the same pain as I do?

C: 卢•阿彻冷静了下来。她的眉眼平常自带一股威严，只是伤感时看不分明。
E: Lew Archer composes herself. She has a piercing gaze that makes it hard to tell when she is in grief.

C: 是啊，你说得对，我该努力取得更高的成就、狠狠打他们的脸。
E: You're right. I should strive for greater achievements to prove them wrong!

C: 喜悦有时也会带来眼泪。
E: There are tears of joy, too.

C: 原来的你是什么模样？
E: What were you like from before?

C: 当我醒来时，战争仍在废墟上继续进行。人们给尾巴系上不同颜色的布条，手持枪支和棍棒互相攻伐。
E: By the time I woke up, the war was still ongoing at the ruins. People tied cloths of different colors to their tails as they attacked each other with guns and sticks.

C: 感觉真是悲哀。
E: Sounds disheartening.

C: 有时我就搞不明白了，明明宇宙中的宜居星球那么稀少，却总有人变着法子破坏它们——到底是图什么呢？
E: I'm baffled. There are already so few livable planets in this universe, yet there are always people finding ways to destroy them. What are they trying to achieve?

C: 仔细想想，我其实没有能力阻止战争、防治污染，也不能让爱与和平充满宇宙——或许只有星神才可以。
E: Now that I think about it, I know I don't have the power to stop wars, prevent pollution, or fill this universe with love and peace. Aeons are probably the only ones who can.

C: 格-蕾的表情没有变化，但她的情绪肉眼可见地消沉了下去。
E: There is no change in Go-Ray's expression, but you can sense her despair.

C: 一道锐利的目光刺穿漆黑的镜片，落在你身上。那目光中并无敌意，却仍令人胆颤心惊。
E: A sharp gaze pierces the jet-black lens, and Whisper's eyes descend on you. Her gaze is not hostile, but is frighteningly chilling nonetheless.

C: 能够来到匹诺康尼、能够在梦里遇见她——这或许是我此生最大的幸运了。
E: To be able to meet her in a dream on Penacony ... This might be the most fortunate thing to happen to me.

C: 罗斯玛丽是谁？
E: Who's Rosemary?

C: 麦考…麦考……
E: McCoy... McCoy...

C: （照片上又多了一个人……）
E: (There's now another person in the photo...)

C: 当然，毕竟我们之前已经说好了。
E: Of course, as I had promised.

C: 废话少说，你在盛会海选的比赛中作弊了吧，是不是偷偷买通评委了——我告诉你，别想狡辩，你的所作所为我可都看在眼里！
E: Stop this nonsense. You cheated at the festivity auditions, didn't you? Did you bribe the panel? I'll warn you to stop denying it. I've got my eye on every move you make!

C: ——单就这点而言，你已经输了，知道吗！
E: ...You've already lost just based on this singular trait. You hear me!

C: 难道是催眠？不、也不对…可恶，明明不过是个从未窥见过「完美」的庸俗之辈，{F#她}{M#他}那蛊惑人心的手段到底是怎么回事！
E: Could it have been hypnosis? No, not possible... Damn, it was obviously some boorish buffoon who'd never even glimpsed "perfection" before. What exactly did {F#she}{M#he} do to charm everyone!?

C: 咕咕…说得是呢，看来老鸟有些太过心急了。
E: Hoot, you're right... It seems I got ahead of myself.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>哈里森</color>、<color=#dbc291ff>查德</color>和<color=#dbc291ff>尚恩</color>。这三个孩子，根本听不进我的话…也许你能让他们迷途知返？
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Harrison</color>, <color=#dbc291ff>Chad</color>, and <color=#dbc291ff>Shawn</color>, three obstinate kids who don't heed my advice... Perhaps you will be able to make them see the error of their ways.

C: 时代曾经属于我们，后来属于你们，但终将属于他们。无论多么挂念，你我也没法替他们走向下一个琥珀纪。
E: The era that once belonged to us eventually became yours, and now it will soon become theirs. No matter how much you worry, neither you nor I can help them find their path into the next Amber Era.

C: 校长的表情变得相当复杂，里面蕴含着等量的喜悦与苦涩。
E: The dean has a complicated expression on his face, one that seems to contain equal amounts of joy and bitterness.

C: 对上，各大家系都密切关注着折纸大学的发展，那些权贵可不是校长能得罪起的……
E: Above the dean, the various Lineages are closely monitoring the developments in Paperfold University. The rich and powerful are not people that the dean can offend...

C: 对下，专业的师资总共就那么些，校长敢摆架子，教授就敢跳槽……
E: Beneath the dean, there are only so many professional teachers. The professors will leave if they are unhappy with anything...

C: 这三个学院的课你都可以去看看，说不定还能学到最新的「忆泡工业管线」知识，这在别的地方可学不到。
E: You can go check out the classes for all three academies. Perhaps you might even learn something about our newest subject, Industrial Pipeline of Memory Bubbles. This is knowledge that you'll not be able to obtain anywhere else.

C: 说到底，一个人究竟要怀着怎样的信念与爱才会执着于每一件能互动的物品？
E: After all, how much obsession must one possess to interact with every random object they come across?

C: 从山巅俯瞰山脚的战斗，真能提起兴趣吗？
E: Can you really enjoy a battle unfolding at the foot of a mountain while standing at the summit?

C: 你搞清楚谁才是船长没有？
E: Do you even know who's captain here?

C: 亦或是个实验舱？藏匿着「繁育」的虫卵，莽撞的外来者在不经意间将危害世界的灾难释放出来……
E: Or is it a research pod? One holding Propagation eggs that any reckless outsiders could inadvertently unleash to imperil the entire universe...

C: 最先消失的是视觉，而后你听见一阵脚步声传来。
E: Your vision goes first. You then hear the sound of footsteps approaching.
Ahhh...

C: 再想想。
E: Let's keep thinking.

C: 他们真有吗......
E: Do they really have that...?

C: 想获利，先种地。等到环境恢复之后，外面肯定有大块的土地等待我们耕作。
E: If you want to reap rewards, you must first plant seeds. When the environment recovers, there is sure to be a large amount of land out there, waiting for us to cultivate.

C: 啾…差点被憋死……谢谢客人啾。
E: Tweet... I almost suffocated... Thank you, dear customer. Tweet.

C: 提前换班了。
E: It's an early shift change.

C: 据说黄金公子准备扩建金叶广场啾…
E: I hear Young Master Gold is preparing to expand the Goldleaf Plaza, tweet...

C: 银河球棒侠无所不能！
E: The Galactic Baseballer is omnipotent!

C: 没想到你的动作这么快啾…这就是银河球棒侠的力量吗！
E: You're faster than I thought, tweet... Is this the power of the Galactic Baseballer!?

C: 「一枚硬币换一条提示」，这可是比试的规则啾！
E: "Exchange one coin for a hint" — this is the rule of the competition, tweet!

C: 啾啾——孩子们果然是跑到施工区域里了啾！
E: Tweet tweet, the kids did run in the construction site!

C: 哼哼…没错，有个胆小的助手一受到风吹草动就会躲在树叶里，或许可以在<color=#dbc291ff>广场花坛的边上</color>多看看啾？
E: Hehe... That's right. There's a cowardly helper that hides among the tree leaves when it gets startled. Maybe you can take a look <color=#dbc291ff>by the flowerbeds at the plaza</color>?

C: 炫耀羽毛！
E: Flaunt feathers!

C: 啾啾…
E: Tweet tweet...

C: 可怜的人！这世上可有不少比纸片更珍贵的东西啾！
E: Pitiful one! There are many things in this world more precious than pieces of paper, tweet!

C: 黄金公子说这么讲话比较有气势——啾！
E: Young Master Gold says that speaking this way makes you sound impressive... Tweet!

C: 真的吗？你真是个好心的人！
E: Really? You really are a kind person!

C: 咻噜噜噜，看什么看？没见过喝水的小鸟啾？咻噜噜噜……
E: *slurp* What're you looking at? Never seen a bird drinking water, tweet? *slurp*...

C: 甚至是同一个颜色。
E: It's even the same color.

C: 把他们赶出小镇！
E: Run them out of town!

C: 再见，也该到我出马的时候了，「愿荣耀伴我左右啾。」
E: Goodbye, it's also time for me to deploy. Glory will be with me, tweet.

C: 偷偷告诉你，就连那个无敌的赤红大哥都没拿过冠军啾。
E: I'll tell you a secret, even that undefeatable Boss Red has never been the champion, tweet.

C: 感觉脏脏的…
E: Feels dirty...

C: 哎，像你这样的普通人，怎会理解小鸟的爱恋啾。
E: *sigh* How would an ordinary person like you understand the love of birds, tweet.

C: 噗噗噗，可不要小看折纸小鸟的胃口啾。
E: Fufufu, don't underestimate an origami bird's appetite, tweet.

C: 最后是合唱啾！
E: Lastly, everyone together, tweet!

C: 苏乐达！
E: SoulGlad!

C: 我年纪小，要多吃水果啾！
E: I'm young. I gotta eat more fruits, tweet!

C: 今日，我在此见证…
E: Today, I am here to witness...

C: 讨厌你，我要再去找个坐骑了啾——
E: I hate you. Now I have to go find another mount, tweet...

C: 可我有点重…
E: But I'm a little heavy...

C: 「1分」是满意，「3分」是很满意，「5分」是非常满意啾。
E: One point indicates satisfactory, three points indicates very satisfactory, and five points indicates extremely satisfactory, tweet.

C: 有点像，有点像啾…
E: Looks like, looks like, tweet...

C: 但这里显然没有什么植物，目光所及之处，只有半死不活的杂草。
E: But obviously there are no plants here — only half-dead weeds as far as the eye can see.

C: 抱歉，我以为是杂草。
E: Sorry, I thought these were all weeds.

C: 对了，你不是上次来找《要药分剂》的人吗？上次我有帮到你，请问你能帮帮我吗？
E: Oh, aren't you the one who asked for the Compendium of Remedies last time? I helped you last time, so could you do me a favor in return?

C: 你没事吧？快醒醒！
E: What happened to you? Please, wake up!

C: 稍等我片刻啊，我改造一下占卜用的玉兆。
E: Wait for a while. I'll need to modify the jade abacus for divination.

C: 你不做决定，霉运不会改变。
E: Time to make a decision. Your jinx is in your own hands.

C: 琴师与化外民结为知音，决定以余生合力，补全这首曲子。
E: The two of them became close friends, the guqinist and the outworlder, and they decided to spend the rest of their lives together working on this song.

C: 你的出场方式别人用过啦！
E: Someone else has already done it!

C: 我是梗小鬼，就算人类不喜欢，我也不会停下来的，嘿嘿。
E: I'm Memey the Imp, and I'm not gonna stop doing something just because a human doesn't like it. Teehee!

C: 为了这小小香炉考虑，也为了让强迫症能好受一些，应该将它往里面再推一些。
E: For the sake of this wee little incense burner — and also to alleviate my intrusive thoughts — we should push it in a little more.

C: （我什么都不会做的）
E: (I'm not doing anything)

C: 别别别，听我说完，我只是想让你带我过去而已……
E: Wait no, listen to me. I just want you to bring me over there...

C: 这家伙只是随便差遣人类，真搞不懂这有什么好玩的。
E: This guy just sends humans on errands after errands! I really have no idea what the fun in that is.

C: 是吗？怪不得你这么厉害……
E: Really? No wonder you're so amazing at this...

C: 智械压根不是有机生命，怎么能用皮糙肉厚来形容呢——应该是钢筋铁骨才对。
E: Intellitrons are not organic life at all. How can you call them tough-skinned and meaty — they're made of steel.

C: 「绘梦的夏洛特」？唔…是外号吗？听着像是个画家，还是雕塑家？
E: "Charlotte the Dream Artist?" Hm... Is that a nickname of some kind? They sound like a painter or a sculptor?

C: 那…总之…就祝之后经过这里的家伙们好运吧。
E: Well... Anyway... Let's just wish anyone else who passes through here good luck.

C: 不会真是他吧…
E: That can't really be him...

C: 旅途罹患
E: A voyage through peril, fraught with woe,

C: 取款机发出痛苦的哀鸣。出钞口卡顿几下，紧接着，无数{RUBY_B#信用点}苜蓿币{RUBY_E#}喷涌而出！
E: The machine groans agonizingly. After a pause, countless {RUBY_B#credits}Alfalfa credits{RUBY_E#} gush out from the dispenser!

C: 「叮呤哐啷——」有什么东西一路顺着管道叮当下落，落在出钞口的盘子里。
E: "Clink... clank..." Something clinks all the way down the pipe and lands on the tray of the dispenser.

C: 水晶杯的腔调里充满了鄙夷和嫌弃。
E: The crystal chalice's tone is laden with contempt and disgust.

C: 你为什么要追求水晶杯？
E: Why are you pursuing the crystal chalice?

C: 阴差阳错间，我又回到了匹诺康尼，又遇到了它。但我们已经分离太久，我还认得它，它已不记得我。我们的经历和身份都差太多，我不敢奢求什么。
E: By a twist of fate, I returned to Penacony and came across the crystal glass again. It no longer recognized me as we were separated for too long. Now, there's a huge gap between us in terms of our statuses. I'm not expecting anything in return from it.

C: 该死，你忘了自己已经被缩小了——现在的你，身高还顶不过它的一根鸟毛。你真希望地上能长出一根豌豆藤，供你爬上去狠狠薅它一把。
E: Shucks, you completely forgot that you've been shrunk! At your current size, you're no bigger than one of its feathers. If only there was a beanstalk that would sprout from the ground and allow you to climb up and give it a good tug on the feathers.

C: 你已经醉了。
E: You're already drunk.

C: 不必不必，若有朝一日，你二瓶的才能得人赏识，被装进谐乐大典的酒杯里，勿要忘了曾有我这个黄便是。
E: Fear not, fear not! One day, your talents will receive the recognition they deserve and you shall fill the glasses of the Charmony Festival! When that day comes, just make sure that you do not forget about your friend, Yellow.

C: 今天，我就要和各位一起，在这「朝露的时刻」，发烂发臭！
E: Today, in this Moment of Morning Dew, we finally will expose who is truly rotten and putrid together!

C: 亲爱的，你消消气，万一被谁听见，当心把你当凶手抓了！
E: Sweetheart, calm down. What if someone hears you and thinks you are the murderer?

C: 机会难得，你想让你的朋友们试试看吗？
E: As you're here already, do you want to call your friends to give it a try?

C: 当然！让我看看…
E: Of course! Let me think...

C: 姬子…？
E: Himeko...?

C: 你就想想，同样是铁桶之神，一个长得堪比银河巨星，一个长得像个垃圾桶，你更容易上谁的当？
E: Think about it. If you have two God of Iron Cans, and one looks like a cosmic superstar while the other looks like a typical trashcan. Which one are you more likely to believe in?

C: 桶王带走了祂的信徒，只留下一片死寂。
E: The King of Cans left with THEIR disciples, leaving an atmosphere of profound stillness.

C: 不不不，是被你的个人魅力与实力深深地折服了！
E: No, no, it's not that! We are simply just bowled over by ya strength n' charm!

C: 沉默装酷。
E: Stay quiet and act cool.

C: 双手叉腰。
E: Put your hands on your hips.

C: 别看我们现在这么不靠谱，流梦帮以前可是这条街的守护者——那时的流梦礁还有很多居民，大家自发地组成帮派，响应「钟表匠」的号召守卫流梦礁的自由。
E: Don't judge us by what we look like now. The Dreamflux Gang used to be the guardians of this street... There were loads of citizens in Dreamflux Reef back then, so we responded to the call of the Watchmaker n' formed a gang on our own to protect the freedom of Dreamflux Reef.

C: 该死，看看这些全新的气泡，虽然你这招很老套，但效果确实不错。
E: Darn it, look at these fresh bubbles. That may not have been very original, but it was effective.

C: 苏乐达企业可是匹诺康尼首屈一指的惠民企业，产品在数千年间都保持物美价廉，有没有良心你说的可不算！
E: The SoulGlad enterprise is one of the top public benefactors in Penacony! Their products have maintained excellent quality with low prices for millennia, and you say they are heartless!?

C: 我们…本该一起飞向天空的。
E: We were supposed... to fly into the sky together.

C: 家人，要是连新专辑都舍不得买，是要被开除粉籍的。
E: Fam, you'll be booted from the fan club if you're not even willing to stump up and buy the new album.

C: 好的好的，谢谢老板！
E: Of course! Thanks, boss!

C: 我看您不在里面，我还在想直接放里面是否有点不合适…正好您来了，哈哈。
E: I didn't see you, so I was wondering if it'd be okay to leave it inside... Haha, but you came at the right time.

C: 大大方方地播就是了！
E: Just do it!

C: {F#她}{M#他}是假的，我是真的。
E: {F#She}{M#He} is a fake. I'm the real one.

C: 好了，我已经心中有数了。
E: All right. I already know the answer.

C: 没事，其实你做事分寸很好。
E: It's fine. It's good that you are doing your job.

C: 正好，谛听也在路上了，我们开始吧。
E: The Diting is already on their way. Let us begin.

C: 但是，罪名到底是什么呢？
E: But what exactly is the charge?

C: 赤衣大人推荐了你「简单性原理」，希望你删繁就简得到更简洁的结论，那么——
E: Chiyi recommends the "principle of parsimony," hoping you'll cut through the clutter and find a more concise conclusion. In that case...

C: 竟然没有被我虚张声势吓到……
E: You weren't intimidated by my bluff at all...

C: 呵呵，您说笑了，我这人不谙刀兵。
E: Heh-heh, surely you jest, I am unskilled in combat.

C: …你可以是，你最好是。
E: I think you are... And I hope you are.

C: 看来你果然是懂的，就靠你来引导我了！
E: I knew you would know what to do! Alright, I'm counting on you to lead the way.

C: 集装箱探索，开始！
E: Freight container exploration, let's do this!

C: 就在这里，你确定周围没有狱卒对吧？来这里。
E: Over here! You're sure there aren't any prison guards nearby? Come on, this way.

C: 请你出去！
E: Please leave the area at once!

C: 这还能怪谁，彩蛋藏得太深了！
E: Well, who can you blame for that? Your talents are clearly too well hidden.

C: 听声音是个好头。
E: Sounds like we're off to a head-start.

C: 没错，我这孙子修习的正是「补天神功」。一旦发动，恰如补天司命降世临凡，谁也无法伤他分毫。
E: That's right. This grandson of mine practices the technique of Skymending. As soon as it is activated, he is like the Firmamend Arbiter among mortals. No man can harm him!

C: 我与五弟配合，一个能驾驭天雷，一个可以操控流水。想不到这贼人竟能使我两兄弟联手，这真是他的荣幸！
E: Brother Five and I have the perfect combination. One of us controls water and the other conducts lightning. I cannot believe this kidnapper has forced us to join forces. This is truly an honor for him!

C: 就不允许我勤奋好学吗？
E: Am I not allowed to be hardworking?

C: 唉，果然欢乐的时光总是短暂的，说起来…我有个不情之请不知该不该讲……
E: *sigh* Time flies when you're having fun. Speaking of which... I have a request that I'm not sure if I should say...

C: 你是谁？你可是大明星知更鸟的好朋友，列车留声机的忠实听众，作曲这点小事能难得倒你吗？
E: Who are you? You are a good friend of the superstar singer Robin's, a loyal listener of the Express' phonograph. Would composing a mere melody be any challenge to you?

C: 经费真就这么少？
E: The budget is really this tight?

C: 哈哈，现在的电影讲究的就是人设突出、标签清晰！这下可不会有观众来抱怨说分不清角色谁是谁了——他该去看医生，而不是看电影！
E: Haha, movies nowadays are all about obvious character traits and clear stereotypes! The audience won't be griping about not being able to differentiate between characters this time — such people should be seeing a doctor, not a movie!

C: 请先完成旁边的拼图…
E: Please finish the jigsaw puzzle at the side first...

C: …糟了，该不会将奥赫玛的公共设置弄坏了吧？你对此感到担忧，但某种突如其来的睡意袭来。
E: ...Oh, no. you didn't damage Okhema's public installations, did you? You feel great worry about this, but a sudden sleepiness comes upon you.

C: 还是别乱碰了。
E: Don't touch it.

C: 毕竟来都来了，总不能空手回去，哪怕是失败的尝试，但摸一摸，带走一手灰也是好的。
E: Since you're here anyway, you can't go back empty-handed. Even if this attempt fails, rubbing away some dust from the candle still lets you claim something.

C: 故事书里的只是故事…等等，我明白了，你老是向刻法勒大人许愿让它帮你写作业，这肯定是泰坦降下的惩罚。
E: A story is just a story... Wait, I get it. You're always asking great Kephale to help you do your homework. This must be a punishment from the Titans.

C: 你不明白在浴池里摆出这种装置的用意，这是某种室内烤箱吗？亦或者是壁炉？
E: You're not sure why such a device has been placed in the bath. Is it some kind of indoor oven? Or a fireplace?

C: 谁家时尚单品是外骨骼啊！
E: What kind of fashion item is an exoskeleton!?

C: 虽然这次测试不太顺利…但我们总该给新技术一些宽容与时间，不是吗？
E: This assessment didn't go well... But we should always give new technology some tolerance and time, shouldn't we?

C: （躺在床上）
E: (Lie in bed)

C: 还是不睡了吧。躺下休息一会儿就够了。
E: I won't sleep. I'll just lie down for a while.

C: 吼吼吼！瞧瞧，是谁又来拜访本狮了？是异乡的勇士啊。
E: Ho-ho-ho! Let's see, who has come to visit my majestic self again? A warrior from outlands!

C: 瞧瞧，是谁来拜访本狮了，是异乡的勇士啊，又想要接受智慧的考验了么？
E: Look who's come to visit this lion, a brave outsider. Back for more brain-teasers?

C: 瑟希斯在上，让本狮用一个绝妙的题目考考你，对智慧的掌握程度究竟如何吧！
E: By Cerces, allow me to test you with a stumper. We shall see how your grasp on intellect fares!

C: 除非是特别粗心的信使，把东西弄丢了。这样的话，收信人和寄信人两边都是两手空空、一无所有啦！
E: Unless it's a very absent-minded messenger who lost the parcel. If that's the case, the sender, and receiver will both be empty-handed, left with nothing!

C: 缇宝她们的答案暂且记作参考，再问问其他人的想法吧。
E: Let's take the girls' answer into consideration, and seek another's opinion in the meantime.

C: 哼！又是这群招摇撞骗的狮子，它和它的同类还没放弃用谜语来折磨别人吗？
E: Hmph! More shenanigans from this bunch of trickster lions. Haven't they and their kind given up on torturing others with their despicable riddles?

C: 来吧！让你考考我。
E: Alright! Let's do this.

C: 白厄，帮帮我。
E: Phainon, help me.

C: 在你途经的某些世界里，狮子牙齿会被摸得发亮，路过的人很难忍住把手放进去的冲动。所以，你打算——
E: In some of the worlds you traversed, the lion's teeth are usually rubbed smooth by touching hands. Passersby can't help but feel an urge to thrust their hands in its mouth. You decide to...

C: 好。得到了想要的东西，小火苗更加强大了。给你，给你。
E: Good. Excellent and desired. The dim flame is stronger. Here, for you.

C: 垃圾袋。
E: A trash bag.

C: 天凉了，该让家族破产了。
E: It's getting chilly. Time to bankrupt The Family.

C: 这个垃圾桶双手抱臂，桶盖翘得比其他桶都高上几分。虽然垃圾桶并没有能被称为眼睛的器官，但你似乎察觉到了他不屑的目光。
E: This trashcan has its arms crossed, with its lid slightly lifted compared to other trashcans. Even though it lacks any eye-like features, you can almost feel its disdainful gaze.

C: 发明创造，收专利费。
E: Invent, create, and earn royalties and patents.

C: 师傅，快教教我呀！
E: Master, hurry up and teach me!

C: 只要能在一个琥珀纪之内背完三千本书上的七十万种病例就能毕业！没时间让你在这浑浑噩噩了，赶紧实习！
E: As long as you can memorize all seventy thousand illnesses across three thousand books within an Amber Era, you will definitely be able to graduate! No time to muddle around right now, you need to get to interning!

C: 塔塔洛夫说过——「享受美好的校园生活时，记得要时刻敲响警钟，毕竟校园同样是容易滋生恶念的苗床。」
E: Tatalov once said, "While enjoying your lovely school life, remember to always keep a vigilant eye. After all, the campus is a ripe breeding ground for malicious intentions."

C: 你在这干什么呢？
E: What are you doing here?

C: 欢迎你一直来玩。如果愿意留下来，我们会给你送好吃的，你会长得比这棵大树还高……
E: You're welcome to visit anytime. And if you ever decide to stay, we'll bring you lots of yummy treats. You might even grow taller than that big tree over there...

C: 就算是熟悉的人，一起平躺下来，侧着脸看向对方，也会感觉十分不同哦？
E: Even if it's a close friend, lying down and looking at each other from the side will feel very different.

C: 讲讲空间站「黑塔」的见闻。
E: Talk about Herta Space Station.

C: ——你的呼喊没有起到任何作用，反而让他们把搬运的速度加快了！
E: — Your calls were completely ineffective. In fact, it just got them moving you even faster!

C: （描述悬锋报名官的外观）
E: (Describe the appearance of the Kremnos registration officer)

C: 我…不知道。雅努萨波利斯是所有神驹的起点，我们聚集在这里，再分散到世界各处。若是回不来，想必是雅努斯为我锁上了门吧。
E: I... wish I knew. Janusopolis is our gathering place — every divine foal starts its journey here before departing to distant lands. Should I fail to return, Janus must have locked me outside their door.

C: 「相信」
E: Yes

C: 你还好吗？
E: Are you alright?

C: 抱歉，请来尝尝这些菜品吧，希望这次你能从中找到独属于自己的乐趣。
E: My apologies. Please, come and try these dishes. I hope this time, you can find your own enjoyment in them.

C: 感谢你，全知的天父。千载之久，你沉默地背负所有、注视所有、记下所有。
E: Thank you, all-knowing sky father. For a thousand years, you have silently borne everything, watched everything, and recorded everything.

C: （这是…来古士观察它时的记忆？）
E: (Is this... Lygus's observation memory?)

C: 并非自相矛盾的胡言乱语。推测：此一系列定义全部都是「某一时刻」发生过的「事实」……
E: Not incoherent ramblings. Speculation: This sequence of definitions reflects "facts" from "discrete temporal instances"...

C: 佩佩！ 佩佩！ 佩佩！
E: Peppy! Peppy! Peppy!

C: 相逢就是缘。更别提小友青年才俊，此段对话，是你我之间命中注定。
E: It's our destiny to meet. For a talented young person like yourself, this conversation is meant to be...

C: 何等荒谬？生命岂能因为外显的形式不同，就出现高低贵贱之分呢？
E: How ridiculous? How can anyone segregate life into different levels just because of their external forms?

C: 不过你可别打波少的主意！我可是空间站的头号波少粉丝！
E: But don't you dare to do anything to Master Capote! I am his number-one fan on the space station!

C: 综上所述，这场入侵可谓是一把双刃剑！不然我哪儿有时间像这样放松自己，感受生活啊？
E: To sum up, this invasion is a double-edged sword! Otherwise, I wouldn't have time to relax and enjoy my life!

C: 这年轻时候的爱情就是炽热，我怀疑伯纳德那老东西，就是在洛奇身上，看到了自个儿年轻时候的影子吧，嘿。
E: Young love is always full of passion. I guess Bernard just saw his younger self in Rocky, haha.

C: 你平时很忙吗？
E: Are you busy most of the time?

C: 法政科的理查去哪儿了？
E: What happened to Richard from the Department of Galactic Geopolitics?

C: 嗯好，那我们回头再聊！
E: All right, till next time then!

C: 哦，是你啊，怎么，有事吗？咱们得长话短说——没办法，我的日程表总是排得满满当当。
E: Oh, it's you. What can I do for you? We'll have to make it quick. I have a busy schedule, you know.

C: 怎么了，有点眼力劲儿行吗？没见我正忙着修复机器人吗？
E: Are you having trouble seeing? I'm busy fixing this robot, you see?

C: 哇咔咔，你给我道歉了，我还真没想到你会放下你高贵的身段来跟我道歉！
E: Mwahaha, you just apologized to me! I didn't expect your noble self would be willing to do that!

C: 即便丢下命运重渊的断崖也完全无伤，即便被一百头大地兽踩踏也纹丝不动，即便{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}来到它面前，也将哀叹自己的无力。
E: It can't be damaged even if it were hurled off the cliff of the Abyss of Fate. There wouldn't be a scratch on it, even if a hundred dromases trampled over it. Even {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#} would sigh in resignation in the face of this shield.

C: 你挤过人群，来到了热闹的最前线——
E: You squeeze past the crowd and emerge in the fray of the commotion...

C: 得。你的判断很明智，谁都没猜对，这些钱全归你了。我就不该看这个热闹的。
E: Bah, your prediction was most astute. No one got it right. The money's all yours. I shouldn't have gotten involved in this ruckus to begin with.

C: 诡辩是好奇心与探索精神的大敌，要是将知识局限在感官接触的范围内，那我们永远都无法走出奥赫玛。
E: Sophistry is the enemy of both curiosity and the spirit of exploration. If we limited knowledge to what we can sense, we would never have been able to set foot outside Okhema.

C: …振作起来，波瑟芬妮，振作起来…趁他们还没下定决心对你动手……
E: ...Pull yourself together, Possephone. Come on now... before they've decided to do away with you...

C: 呵呵，那就叫他们看吧，最好是睁大眼睛看好了，他们引以为傲的宝贝女儿，与他们最不耻的悬锋小子相爱的样子，准叫他们气得当场发疯，哈哈哈！
E: Teehee, then let them watch as much as they want. The sight of their pride and joy, their darling daughter, falling in love with the Kremnos kid they hate the most... That ought to drive them nuts, haha!

C: 哎，谢谢你愿意与我分担这愁苦……
E: Hey, thank you for sharing all this with me...

C: 受死吧——
E: Die...!

C: 房间内立刻有了动静：带着锁链的脚步声急切奔向门口，很快，传来了熟悉的女声……
E: There's movement inside the room instantly: Footsteps dragging chains in a hurry towards the door, followed very shortly by a familiar female voice...

C: 多好的天气啊，{F#女士}{M#先生}，请问你打算听几个重磅新闻？
E: What a great day, {F#miss}{M#mister}. How many breaking news alerts do you plan on listening to?

C: 嘿嘿，多谢惠顾，那我要开始讲了……
E: Tee-hee, thank you so much. Well then, I'll begin...

C: 黑潮难道就不会迷路吗？
E: Do black tides never lose their way?

C: 唉…谢谢你，真是个好孩子…要是你现在不忙的话，就陪老头子我聊聊天吧？
E: Ohh... Thank you, such a kind child... Do you have some time to chat with an old man if you're not too busy?

C: 非常感谢，年轻人，但请千万别为了我这种糟老头子，置自己的安危于不顾。
E: I really appreciate it, young one, but don't put yourself in danger for an old grandpa like me.

C: 库娜涅…快逃吧……
E: Run, Cynane... Save yourself...

C: 之前军团入侵，我们科有个老哥去世了，这让我有些触动……
E: Back before the Legion invaded, an old departmental veteran passed away. It really stirred up some feelings...

C: 不太符合常态。
E: Acting rather out of it.

C: 我还是不太明白……
E: I still don't really get it...

C: 我说你小子，这串数据还没跑完呢，慌什么。
E: Kid, I told you this data string hasn't finished running yet. Don't panic.

C: …再找只大地兽来就解决了！
E: ...Bring in another dromas and call it a day!

C: 你瞧，它又来了。我都懒得去拦…咦，这次还不一样？
E: Look, it's coming again. I don't even bother stopping it anymore... Huh? Something's different this time.

C: 科可波阁下，请做出你的判断吧——
E: Kokopo, make your choice —

C: 你怎么还在。
E: Why are you still here?

C: 可是，翁法罗斯的每一位吟游诗人都会说，刻法勒是全知的父、是众生的守护神。
E: But every bard in Amphoreus says Kephale is the all-knowing father, the guardian deity of all beings.

C: 可恶，没得签了吗？
E: Darn it, no autograph this time?

C: 啊，是您！{RUBY_B#天空之泰坦}艾格勒{RUBY_E#}开眼，终于有救了！
E: Ah, it's you! {RUBY_B#Sky Titan}Aquila{RUBY_E#} has opened their eyes — salvation is finally here!

C: 记得第一次听到刻法勒的回应时，我激动地快要哭出来。如果他们两个能听到，一定也会相信——神谕中的再创世会到来，我们都会得到负世泰坦的庇护。
E: I almost burst into tears the first time I heard Kephale's voice. I want them to hear it, too, so that they believe. So that they know when the Era Nova in the prophecy comes, we'll be protected by the Worldbearing Titan.

C: 而到了下一个门扉时……
E: When the next Entry Hour arrives...

C: 「他的重量，压住了鸟儿的翅膀…和萌动的心。」
E: "His weight presses down on the bird's wings... and the stirring heart within."

C: 我想问问这瓶蜜酿…
E: About this honey brew...

C: 我感受到了，祭台似乎重新焕发出了活力……
E: I can feel it. The altar seems to have come back to life...

C: 唔…我还得研究研究……
E: Interesting... I'll have to have a closer look some time.

C: 「列车有很多列车朋友，它要去找它们玩儿。」
E: "The Express has lots of Express friends, and it wants to find them and play together."

C: 喔，原来荣誉队员平时就住在游乐园里，羡慕死虎克啦！
E: Which means... you live inside a warp-jumping candy theme park! Not fair!

C: 你看，列车上到处都金灿灿、亮堂堂的…这个石头地板还能照出虎克的脸呢！
E: Everything is so shiny and sparkly... I can see my face in the floor!

C: 唔…虽然{NICKNAME}{F#姐姐}{M#哥哥}也这么说，但克拉拉还是想试试看……
E: Mm... are you sure, {NICKNAME}? I still want to give it a try...

C: 你不会想把它拆了吧？
E: You're not going to take it to pieces, are you?

C: 哟，{NICKNAME}！来得挺巧，我刚和姬子小姐聊完天呢。
E: Right on time, {NICKNAME}! I just finished chatting with Himeko.

C: 你说得对。自动机兵可以成为我们在太空中的炮台——就像姬子小姐的藏品那样。
E: Exactly — the automatons would be our turrets in space. That's also how Himeko uses her satellite.

C: 出来玩还是放松些吧！
E: Thanks, but you're supposed to be off work!

C: 还是感谢阿基维利吧。
E: Better to give thanks to Akivili.

C: 下次来点昂贵的。
E: Then, next time, bring me more valuable stuff!

C: 穿过玉界门来到星穹列车，就会经历一段失重，而失重是能让人长高的！
E: I passed through the Jade Gate on my way to the Astral Express. The Jade Gate makes you weightless, and weightlessness can make people grow taller!

C: 又见面了，怎么样，最近有和呜呜伯聊天吗？
E: We meet again. How have you been? Chatted with any Wubbaboo lately?

C: 但我的眼中，只看到了粉丝们恐惧的脸庞——被泪水打湿的玫瑰固然有别样的韵味，但倘若馥郁的香气变为了苦涩的愁郁，那岂不是末日的光景？
E: However, I only see the horrified faces of my fans. Though roses moist with tears hold a special scent, it would be apocalyptic for such thick and sweet aromas to turn sour with sorrow.

C: 智库。
E: The data bank.

C: 哎呀，光是想想，就觉得心潮澎湃。
E: Haha, just the thought of it gets my blood pumping!

C: 真不用，让我一个人静静吧。再见！
E: You really don't have to. I'd like to hang out on my own. Bye!

C: 你说话听起来好复杂…
E: That was really complicated...

C: 人呢……
E: Where did she go...

C: 在沙发上休息会儿吧。
E: Go rest for a while on the sofa.

C: 真的吗？我觉得他好像不太爱说话……
E: Really? I get the feeling he doesn't like to talk...

C: 不过，在具体实施方案上，我们产生了一些分歧。
E: However, we had a difference of opinion regarding the execution.

C: 我可是高手。
E: I'm a master at it.

C: 对了，我此次是以私人身份前来拜会丹恒，还有列车上的诸位。若有什么我要遵守的规矩，{NICKNAME}记得告诉我。
E: I forgot to mention — this is a personal visit to see Dan Heng — and everyone else on the Express. If there are any rules that I should follow, do let me know, {NICKNAME}.

C: 有幸受各位之邀登上列车，不可失了礼数。
E: I wish to express my gratitude for the invitation to the Express.

C: 呜啊，原来是{NICKNAME}呀。这让我稍稍松了一口气。
E: Ah! Oh, it's you, {NICKNAME}... That's a relief.

C: 我听列车长说……
E: I heard the conductor say...

C: 要在漫长的旅途中提供舒适的体验，列车的保养、维修和清洁工作，也一定很辛苦吧。
E: I bet it's a lot of work to keep the Express running smoothly over such long distances. It must need a lot of maintenance and cleaning.

C: 有股动人心魄的力量。
E: It has a breathtaking power.

C: 那…我想拥有你的签名！
E: Then... can I please get your autograph?

C: 我想有一天，我们还会在「开拓」的某一站遇见。
E: I believe that one day, at some stop on the Trailblaze, we will meet again.

C: 真的？没骗我？
E: Really? You're not kidding, are you?

C: 对呀~我先前听到一些消息，说星穹列车有一个专门的合作对象储备库。
E: Yeah! I heard some buzz about this special Partner Database on the Astral Express.

C: 记得有一次，我在夜晚寻得了一处散落在玫瑰园中的记忆碎片。当我以为四处无人而后现身时，吓晕了一位正准备告白的先生……
E: I remember one time when I found memory fragments scattered among a bed of roses. I showed up when I thought no one was around, and almost scared a man to death who was about to confess his love...

C: 当然可以，但是要做好很快入睡的准备哦。
E: Of course you may, but you'll have to be prepared to fall asleep very quickly.

C: 那时，我在宇宙中捕捉到了一丝「纯美」的气息，并循着气息找到了一个充满废墟的大孔洞。还未等我彻底靠近，就被一股力量吸了过去。若不是他及时抛出了绳索，恐怕现在……
E: At that time, I had caught the scent of a sliver of Beauty in the universe, and followed that scent to a Macro Void full of ruins. But before I could get close, I was sucked in by a powerful force. If he hadn't tossed me his rope in time, I might've been...

C: 是！哪里能买到呢？
E: I was! Where can I buy it?

C: 好了，我去写计划表了。不会让你们因压力倒地不起的！
E: Alright, I'm going to write out the schedule. I promise I won't make you collapse under the pressure!

C: 不怕恩公笑话，小女子从姬子小姐处听到这段时确实心生澎湃。
E: To be completely honest, I did get very excited when I heard it from Miss Himeko.

C: 你请他写过信。
E: You asked him to help with a letter.

C: 诶诶诶诶诶，别、别踩！我刚扫的！
E: Ehhhh! Don't bring the dirt in here! Pom-Pom just swept!

C: 我想问…
E: I want to ask...

C: 盖完章之后，请去克里珀堡一楼的<unbreak>155</unbreak>号窗口排队领预约证明，正式处理通常需要在预约发起一个月以后。
E: After stamping, please head to window <unbreak>155</unbreak> on the first floor and wait in line for the proof of appointment. The formal processing usually takes one month after the appointment has been made.

C: 想想人类迄今为止的写作技巧都被我拿来堆砌字数，实在是悲哀啊。
E: To think that the ways of great writers accrued through the ages are used by me to simply bloat word count... How pathetic.

C: 很简单——只要在这张请愿表上留下您的签名，再附上一句您发自内心的肺腑之言就好。
E: Simple! Just sign this petition form and add a comment about what you think.

C: 你在看什么呢？
E: What are you looking at?

C: 还在写《雪国冒险奇谭》？
E: Are you still writing the Tale of the Winterlands?

C: 我是在放假没错，但现在我每天除了练歌以外，还在私下筹备着一个项目……
E: Yeah, I'm taking a break, but I am also privately preparing for a project on top of practicing singing every day...

C: 嗯嗯～那小女子就继续开嗓了啊。
E: Well, I'm gonna keep warming up my vocals then.

C: …算了，我也不是没有自觉。但我跟你保证，这不是我的常态……
E: Forget it. I assure you that this is not how I normally am.

C: 最近过得怎么样？
E: How have things been?

C: 你很讨厌流浪者？
E: You seem to hate the vagrants.

C: 不过，如果一定、一定要送给我的话，人家也可以勉为其难收下的……
E: But if you really, really want... I guess I can take it... but I don't wanna...

C: 这是怎么回事呢？
E: Why?

C: 睡前熏一熏，家里诸事顺利，睡得安心，熏得放心！
E: Use before bed — then a good sleep and a peaceful mind are guaranteed!

C: 那个铁卫姐姐叫布洛妮娅。
E: Her name is Bronya.

C: 还债？
E: Pay off the debt?

C: 你可以去上层区找她。
E: You can go up to the Overworld to look for her.

C: ……哎、哎？！你什么时候凑过来的？没听到我刚才说的话吧……
E: ...Hmm? When did you get here? Did you hear what I just said...?

C: 顺带一提，古代遗物拆解之后都有无法复原的风险。
E: By the way, once the relics are disassembled, there is a risk that they can't be reassembled.

C: 那你矿场的工作怎么办？
E: What about your job at the mine?

C: 能聊聊和公司打交道的事吗？
E: Can we talk about dealings with the IPC?

C: 哈哈哈，开个玩笑。我这机械屋的生意嘛，说多不多、说少不少，收入基本和我日常开销持平吧。
E: Haha, just kidding. There's not much to say about our workshop's business. I make about as much as we spend each day.

C: 有些连我都犯难的问题，她三下五除二就解决了。你说她是不是天才？
E: Some things that even I have trouble with, she can resolve meticulously. If that's not genius, what is?

C: 哈哈，谢谢你。今后也请你多关照啦。
E: Haha, thank you. Make sure you look after me now~

C: 那我接着说。那天，戍卫官杰帕德来后方例行巡查。那个邓恩，平时有事没事就在军队里把弄他那把琴…结果你猜怎么着？
E: I'll go on. Two days ago, Dunn played his guitar as usual, and Officer Gepard came to the rear for a routine inspection... Guess what happened?

C: 我是她的键盘手…我们两人向来配合得相当好。我一直觉得我俩…咳，没事。
E: I was her keyboardist... and the two of us always worked quite well together. I always felt like we were... Ahem, nothing.

C: 哎…只可惜可可利亚大人她…她为了守护贝洛伯格选择了牺牲自己。真是伟大。
E: *sigh* If only Madam Cocolia hadn't... Hadn't needed to sacrifice herself to save Belobog. What a noble woman.

C: 如果他们真的密谋对贝洛伯格不利，我会第一时间提醒大守护者的。
E: If they really are conspiring against Belobog, I will alert the Supreme Guardian immediately.

C: 我就和你简单说说吧，省得你操心。
E: I'll tell you how she's faring, so that you don't have to worry about her.

C: 很高兴能看到她慢慢好起来…当然啦，这部分功劳你也要占大头哦。
E: I'm glad to see her slowly brighten up... Of course, much of it was thanks to you.

C: 戍卫官都负责什么样的工作？
E: What are a Captain's duties?

C: 你说是那就是。
E: Whatever you say.

C: 你怎么和姐姐说一样的话…我到底哪里让人觉得别扭？
E: Why do you say the same thing as Big Sis... How am I making anything awkward?

C: 他最后的笑容，预示着黎明将现……
E: On his face one last smile, a sign the sun always rises

C: 照进孩子的眼，驱散了过去的悲伤
E: Empowering our children and dispelling their sad plight

C: 如果你真能取得冠军的话，我可以代表个人给你一些奖励。
E: If you manage to win the championship, I can give you some rewards on my own behalf.

C: 我没有需求了，谢谢你。
E: I don't need anything else. Thank you.

C: 「哞哞」的新品酸奶油太贵了，可我家那小子又想吃薄饼……
E: The new Moo-Moo Sour Cream is too expensive. But my son's hungry for pancakes...

C: 我在政务部有一朋友……
E: I've got a friend in the Administrative Department...

C: 不知道啊，我也想喝。
E: I don't know. I want a cup too.

C: 好像有小说写过这宾馆呢……
E: I think there's a novel written about this hotel...

C: 这我该怎么拖回去啊……
E: How am I going to drag it back...

C: 我吃剩的岩烧洞螈呢……
E: Where is my leftover stone-grilled olm...

C: 再讲一个，再讲一个！
E: Another, another!

C: ~挺过七百年暴风雪~
E: Through seven hundred winters' cold~

C: 呵呵，那可真是个特别的爱好。不过，这里毕竟是博物馆——难得来一趟，你不妨去参观看看。从这里出门向右，经过前台便是展厅了。
E: Hah, what a unique hobby. However, this is a museum after all. Since you're here, might as well have a tour. Head out then turn right, the exhibition hall is past the reception counter.

C: 不过，闲着也是闲着，我也就干脆来这儿出份力了——有什么要帮忙的，随时喊我！银鬃铁卫老兵奥列格，随时乐意为你效劳！
E: But then again, I do have the time, so I might as well help out... If you need anything, just give me a holler! Silvermane Guard veteran Oleg is always ready to help!

C: 亲爱的，声音小一点…
E: Darling, please keep your voice down...

C: 老板您下次再来，要是运势不好，小店是可以帮您转运的。
E: Come back again, esteemed customer. If you're down on your luck, I'll be here to help you turn it around.

C: 这前后逻辑是？
E: What's the logic behind this?

C: 咱光是看着那个东西，就觉得有些毛骨悚然。它不疾不徐地生长起来，从容地仿佛天地之间只有它一棵树一样……
E: Just looking at that thing made my skin crawl. It grew at this weird, steady pace as if it were the only tree in all of existence...

C: 你们化外民对旧物的价值判断和我们不同，所以周围很多朋友都暗搓搓劝我提高些价格…可旧物就是旧物嘛。
E: These outworlders value artifacts differently to us, so my friends keep telling me to up the prices but... well, it's just old stuff, isn't it?

C: 「真实的不太有趣，有趣的不太真实。添油加醋是常事，不清不楚有味道」。这就是他写在腰封上的话。
E: "Reality isn't interesting, and what's interesting isn't real. Adding flourish is normal, and vagueness adds flavor." He's got this phrase etched onto his belt.

C: 工造技术也能用于写诗。
E: Artifex skills can also be used to write poetry.

C: 没有。
E: No.

C: 就这样打住吧，正好你也冷静冷静。不好意思，让你见笑了。是有什么事情要说吗？
E: Let's stop there, for you to get calmed down. Sorry to make you laugh. Have you got anything you'd like to say?

C: 当然了，这长乐天要是真出了什么事，我其实也是非常可靠的执事官大叔。
E: Naturally, if anything actually happens to Exalting Sanctum, you'll find me to be an extremely reliable officer.

C: 有些事情想要咨询一下。
E: I've got a few things to ask.

C: 哎！我若是当初投胎在仙舟，现在高低是个优秀企业家！
E: *sigh* If only I had been born on board the Xianzhou! I would be a successful entrepreneur by now!

C: 这么实惠了还考虑什么呀！这位{F#女士}{M#先生}还有什么想知道的，尽管问！
E: At this price, what are you waiting for? C'mon, {F#Miss}{M#Mister}, what else would you like to know? Just ask!

C: 去去去，我还有公务在身，你要是没别的事就别给我添乱了。
E: Go go go, I've still got my official duties to do. Unless you've anything else, please don't cause me any grief.

C: 哎，你爱怎么说怎么说吧。
E: Tsk, whatever you say, sis.

C: 最后一个问题是怎么回事？
E: What's that last thing you said? The one about the age?

C: 这个答案你总能满意了吧。
E: Has the answer sated your curiosity?

C: 静斋卜官最近和以前一样，工作认真、做事井井有条的，感觉挺好的呀。
E: As usual, Jingzhai is dedicated to her work and very organized. I think she's doing quite well.

C: 看来您对地衡司执事的工作也不是真的很感兴趣。
E: Looks like you aren't really that interested in the work of Realm-Keeping Commission officers.

C: 不用，我只是路过而已。
E: Nah, I'm just passing by.

C: 想问你点事。
E: I'd like to ask you something.

C: 我还有事，先走了。
E: I'm busy, so I'll be heading off.

C: 我们之前见过吗？
E: Have we met before?

C: 我没什么想问的了。
E: I don't have any more questions.

C: 我没什么想问的了。
E: I don't have any more questions.

C: 说吧，你肯定是有什么事情来找我的吧？
E: Go on, you must have come looking for me for a reason, right?

C: 可可爱爱，人畜无害。
E: She's cute and wouldn't hurt a fly.

C: 现在…我虽只是个普通药商，但我想做个好人。
E: But now... I'm just a normal medicine trader, but I'd still like to be a good person.

C: 没什么事了。
E: I have nothing else.

C: 垂髫未必真童子…你来仙舟时间也不短了，怎地还不明白，在这儿「以貌取人」是最要不得的？
E: Don't let my appearance fool you... You have been aboard the Xianzhou long enough to understand that we do not judge others by their appearance around here.

C: 唉，我与同僚守护了二百年鳞渊境，到头来还是目睹着它乱成一片……
E: *sigh* My team and I have guarded Scalegorge Waterscape for over two hundred years, but we still have to witness it crumble to pieces in the end...

C: 想和你聊聊天。
E: I'd like to have a chat with you.

C: 我不敢犹豫，于是我…我动手了。我用云吟术指挥武器，将那三人…将那三个人击倒在地。他们再也无法蜕生了。
E: I didn't dare hesitate, so I... I took action. I used cloudhymn magic to direct my weapon at those three and I... I struck them all down. They won't have another hatching rebirth ever again.

C: 是吗？确实有很多化外民都觉得仙舟医学很奇妙。
E: Really? I guess lots of Outworlders usually do find Xianzhou medicine to be rather wonderful.

C: 咦，你来这里是有什么事吗？
E: Hey, what brings you here?

C: 算了，我没什么想问的了。
E: Forget it. I don't have any more questions.

C: 好吧，那你找我是有什么事吗？
E: Now, what can I do for you?

C: 我才不管是不是圈套呢，只要让我有机关和谜题破解就行。不得不说十王司确实有两把刷子，每次都把我绕得七荤八素的。
E: I don't care if it's a trap. I'm happy as long as I have some mechanisms or puzzles to crack. I have to hand it to the Ten-Lords Commission, though. They really leave me scratching my head every time.

C: 具体什么事…呃，我自己都记不清了，但我一不会偷二不会抢，所以肯定犯的不是大事。
E: Ah... I don't really, uhhh, remember. But I'm not a robber or a thief, so it can't have been anything serious.

C: 有点好奇，同僚是如何评价你的？
E: I'm curious about what your colleagues have to say about you.

C: 其次就是注意观察，哪怕是再固若金汤的监狱也一定存在破绽，只是有的监狱的破绽很隐秘。
E: Another thing is careful observation. Even the most tightly guarded prisons will have weak spots, but some of them are better hidden than others.

C: 但是我从不在意常人的标准。
E: But honestly, I've never cared about that.

C: 这是件好事，你不必再继续打听了。
E: This is good news. You don't need to know anything more.

C: 这样既不会破坏当地的生态循环，又能积攒功德，于人于己都是大善事，随喜赞叹！
E: They won't disrupt the local ecology, and I can still accumulate virtue and remove karma! A great deed for both yourself and the environment! Praise be to happiness' dedication!

C: 哟～这不是我最喜欢的{RUBY_B#我自己}{NICKNAME}{RUBY_E#}吗？找我有什么事吗？
E: Why, if it isn't my favorite version of {RUBY_B#me}{NICKNAME}{RUBY_E#}. What can I do for you?

C: 世间无价宝，尽在我…哟，今儿这刮的是什么风，竟把客官您给请来了？
E: All the most priceless treasures are in my... Oh, what a pleasant surprise! What brings you here today?

C: 装修成本都省下来砸在货源上，这样才能收到好东西嘛。
E: Cutting costs on decorations so I can buy genuine stock is the secret to getting the best stuff.

C: 其次我不是红泥粘土人。那玩意儿就是坨融化的冰激凌，赶上下雨天搞不好都会被冲进下水道里，一点美感都没有。
E: Secondly, I'm not a Red Clayform. Those things are just like piles of melted ice cream. One rainy day and they'll end up getting washed into the sewers. No aesthetic at all.

C: 我只是想平静地生活在金人巷里，没有手脚也没有什么不便，哈哈哈。
E: Now I just want to live a peaceful life in this Aurum Alley, and losing my limbs is an acceptable price to pay. Hahaha.

C: 哈哈哈哈，我知道你心地善良，不过倒也不必为我操心。
E: Hahaha, thank you, kindhearted traveler, but don't worry about that.

C: 挺顺利的，现在生意也越来越好了。化外民游客说是来这边观光，结果没少在我这里买药。
E: It's going pretty well. Although the Outworlder tourists are here to travel, they contribute a lot to my medicine sales.

C: 你、你就是老师在说过的那位…我的{F#师妹}{M#师弟}！
E: Y—You are my... my {F#junior soror}{M#junior frater}! Master told me about you!

C: 噢对了，刚刚太激动了，忘记做自我介绍了，有些失礼，抱歉抱歉。
E: Oh! Where are my manners? I'm sorry. I was got a bit too carried away.

C: 但这个课题是老师最后的心血…我再想想吧，或许能有个折中的方案。
E: But on the other hand, I can't just give up Master's project and his legacy... I need some time. Maybe I'll come up with a solution.

C: 幽囚狱现在情况如何？
E: How's The Shackling Prison faring?

C: 结果这一回可「有趣」了…唉，要不是有您和另外几位英雄在场，真不知道事情会如何收场……
E: And lo and behold, things got real "lively" this time around... If you and the other heroes hadn't been around, who knows what would have happened in the end?

C: 不过大部分时候，幽囚狱里还是专业的人在做专业的事。比如这里关押的很多妖魔鬼怪，我看着都觉得害怕，更别提对付它们了……
E: For the most part, however, it's the professionals who do what they do best that keep the Shackling Prison running. For instance, you know how this place has scores of monsters and fiends locked up? I'm afraid of even looking at them, let alone fighting them...

C: 还有别的事，先不聊了。
E: I got to go. Talk to you later.

C: 不过还是要说…虽然小桂子杂技水平很强，但最近对本职工作越来越不上心了，开始沉迷搞什么网络直播，搞什么「整活儿」…唉，年轻人终究是年轻人。
E: Still, I want to remind her... Despite her excellent acrobatic skills, she has recently slacked off on her performance, shifting her focus to live streaming and garish bells and whistles... Well, she's still so young after all...

C: 没有其他想问的事儿了。
E: I don't have any other questions.

C: 此象得主英武无双，勇气过人。对于你所问之事——你拥有过人的意志力，保持积极进取的心态，披荆斩棘不畏险阻方有所得。切勿因急于求成而盲目屈从，切记做人做事需有始有终。
E: The bearer of this sign possesses unparalleled courage. As for the question in your mind — stay positive and brave forward, and you will overcome all difficulties with your unwavering willpower. Do not blindly follow others because you are in a hurry to achieve your goals. Make sure you always finish what you start.

C: 但加入药王秘传后，很多事情就变得简单多了～有了药王秘传这层地下关系网，连请假的审批流程都快了很多～
E: But after I became a disciple, things became much less complicated. After I gained access to the underground connections afforded by the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus, even the approval process for taking time off work was much quicker!

C: 首席技术研发官是做什么的？
E: What are your responsibilities as the Chief Technical R&D Officer?

C: 说笑了。我除了在此处理公文外，大部分时间需要与六御中其余几位磋商罗浮事务。若有元帅的军令，我也得亲自出征远星。
E: No, I'm just kidding. Besides dealing with the paperwork here, I spend most of my time discussing Luofu affairs with a few members of the Six Charioteers. If ordered by the Marshal, I must also travel to distant planets and go to battle.

C: 偶尔会尝试下星间流行的棋类玩法，算是乐在其中。
E: I'll occasionally dabble in chess games that are popular from beyond the stars, and I enjoy them.

C: 我想问…
E: I'd like to ask...

C: 反正我娘说了，提不动也得提，练剑就跟练字一样，要从一笔一划练起。不过要我说，还是练字要难得多……
E: My mom always says, "Even if it's too heavy to lift, you still gotta try. Practicing swordplay can be as easy as practicing handwriting, you start with each small stroke." But if you ask me, practicing handwriting is so much harder...

C: 金人巷真是不容易啊…
E: The Aurum Alley has been through a lot...

C: 将军一职，干得过瘾吗？
E: Do you enjoy the general's position?

C: 很好，很好学。
E: I'm pleased to see you have a thirst for knowledge.

C: 那个「停云」一直是幻胧假扮的？
E: Has that "Tingyun" been Phantylia all along?

C: 太卜大人吗？唉……
E: The master diviner? Ahhh...

C: 我没办法为我个人的执念去动用天舶司的力量大费周章地搜寻线索。毕竟，从官方角度来看，停云已经殉职了。但我心中仍然存着一些侥幸……
E: I can't abuse the resources of the Sky-Faring Commission for my private ends and go on a massive hunt for her. After all, Tingyun has already been officially declared dead. Yet I still harbor a glimmer of hope...

C: 感谢你坦诚的讥讽，可憎的有机体。这将增强「我们」摧毁一切有机体的信念。
E: We appreciate your blatant insult, loathsome organic lifeform. This will strengthen our resolve to eradicate all intelligent organic lifeforms.

C: 下次见，小神医。
E: Catch you later, miracle doctor.

C: 想和藿藿再随便聊聊。
E: I just wanted to chat with you.

C: 我问过尾巴，岁阳这样的生物即便被关在「方寸天地」之间也不会觉得束手束脚，它们和我们这样的有形之物不同。
E: I asked Tail before, he said that even if heliobi were trapped in a confined space, they would not be bound. They differ from material creatures in this way.

C: 先不聊了。
E: Talk to you later.

C: 且慢，你，哦不对，您、您认识景元将军？！
E: Hang on, you, no wait- esteemed customer, you know General Jing Yuan!?

C: 玉兆肯定比舟外科技要厉害。
E: A jade abacus is far superior tech compared to anything outside of Xianzhou.

C: 好的呢亲，有什么其他需要随时找我聊啊。
E: Sure thing, dear. Just talk to me if you need anything else.

C: 将「旧物」装成典质品出给化外民？反其道而行之也不是不行。但有二不可——
E: Present old items as ancient pieces and sell them to Outworlders? Well, that's possible, I suppose, except for two things:

C: 没有什么想问的了。
E: I don't have any other questions.

C: 那是什么团啦！听起来就不是什么好鸟！我可是守法公民，从没做过任何非法的事情。
E: What sort of group is that? That doesn't sound like anything nice! I'm a law-abiding citizen who has never harmed a fly.

C: 到底是哪一家不好吃啊？
E: Which restaurant tastes bad, exactly?

C: 如果你现在肚子稍微有些饿的感受，我建议你立刻另寻他处，以免被饥饿感绑架，被迫在这里的餐厅受苦。毕竟，这实在是不值得。
E: If your tummy is even the least bit hungry, I suggest you find another place this instant, or you will be hostage to your hunger, and you will be forced into suffering in this place. It is simply not worth it.

C: 没有严格挑选的食材，没有充分思考的处理，这样随随便便做出来的东西我是不会认可的。
E: Without stringent selection nor prudent handling of ingredients, I refuse to accept food that has been made haphazardly.

C: 嗯？被人听到了啊…真是丢死个人，本仙我…咳咳，是…是谁偷听我自言自语？
E: Hm? I was overheard... How embarrassing. I... Ahem, who... who's eavesdropping on my monologue?

C: 筋肉会回应所有锻炼者的呼唤，等我开启了筋肉命途，你的肌肉会感应到共鸣的。
E: Muscles always respond to the call of the bodybuilder. Once I pave the Path of Brawn, your muscles will surely resonate with it too.

C: 这是你太客气了。我知道，这就是所谓「谦逊」对吧，「天不言己高，地不言己厚」。
E: You're too kind. I know this is the famous "humility," right? "The dragonfruit never sings about its sweetness."

C: 不知道你有没有听说过，仙舟有一种材料名为「息壤」。按照古籍的说法，这是指神话里自己生长、膨胀的土壤。
E: I don't know if you've heard this before, but have you ever heard of something called "Fallow Earth"? According to ancient texts, it's a kind of legendary soil that grows and expands by itself.

C: 想和你聊聊天。
E: I want to have a chat with you.

C: 没别的事了。
E: I have nothing else to ask.

C: 你是说哪一方面呢？
E: In what way?

C: 你在干什么？
E: What are you doing?

C: {F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}！之前那段唱词，春分最近又练了很久，你听听看有没有进步！
E: {F#Miss}{M#Sir}! I've been practicing that elegy you heard last time. Does it sound better now?

C: 这不是在耍我吗！她怎么敢这么跟我说话。
E: How dare she speak to me like that!

C: 嗯…可以，客人聊完了之后，还请多光顾一下小摊的生意吧。
E: Mm... of course. After you're done, please take a look and buy something.

C: 来，深呼吸…
E: C'mon, take a deep breath...

C: 太好了。希望您别嫌我啰嗦，苏乐达这样的好饮料本来也不需要费劲推销的。
E: Great! I know I'm starting to sound like a broken record, but beverages as good as SoulGlad? They don't even need promoters — the taste is enough to speak for itself!

C: 这…四百二十年？
E: Uh... four hundred and twenty years?

C: 他们应该是为了逃走！
E: They were probably trying to run away!

C: 听起来在消耗大家的善心。
E: Sounds like you're just draining everyone's compassion.

C: 这次司部的差事要去的是个丛林世界，啧，那儿会不会虫子特别多？
E: This time around we're going to a jungle world. Tsk, do you think there'll be loads of insects there?

C: 不好意思，我迷路了。
E: Sorry, I got lost.

C: 它帮助了我，让我走出低谷。
E: It helped me out before when I was at rock bottom.

C: 我兄弟在星际和平公司…
E: My brother works at the IPC...

C: 唉，不工作才活不下去啊。只有反物质军团去过的世界，人们才不用工作。
E: Ah, you can't live without work. The only worlds on which you don't have to work are the ones that've been "visited" by the Antimatter Legion.

C: 嘿！我在乎吗？再好看的招式，打不过就是花拳绣腿，劫匪可不会因为你的招式漂亮就乖乖自首。
E: Hmph! Do I look like I care? No matter how flashy your moves are, if you don't win, you're just punching air! Bandits won't just surrender because your moves look cool.

C: 说实话，我不觉得自己有资格在竞锋舰比赛，再说了，我的所有武学都是为了对付暴徒的，而不是那些武林中人，那些真正的高手。
E: To be frank, I don't think I'm qualified to compete on the Skysplitter. Besides, all my martial arts are angled towards dealing with thugs and not those martial arts experts. They are the real masters.

C: 来求教，那就让老夫凭附在你的身体上…启发你的潜能。
E: If you're here to learn, then let me take possession of your body... and inspire you to your full potential.

C: 老子一开始陪他玩的起劲，但时间久了，也是被这厮的戾气辣到吃不消了，就寻思换换口味，尝些清淡点的人类
E: At first, I had great fun playing together with him. But as time went by, I got a bit choked with that brat's salty spite and couldn't stand it any longer. So, I decided it was time to change flavors to a more bland variety of human.

C: 这样的生不如死的感觉，你能理解了吧？
E: That kind of fate is worse than death... can you understand it?

C: 我在那里认识了许多的朋友。
E: I have made many friends there.

C: 我想做好完全准备之后，再离开这里。感谢您和我聊天，再见。
E: I want to be completely prepared before I leave here again. Thank you for chatting, and see you later.

C: 说实话，你让我有点恶心。
E: Honestly, you're grossing me out.

C: 他挥舞长枪，举止优雅，招式华丽。最关键的是他从一群木人桩里，一眼相中了人家，全是发自内心地赞美！天呐，人家简直是受宠若惊！
E: He wielded a long spear, his poise was elegant, and his moves brimming with splendor. Most importantly, he spotted me among a group of wooden dummies — his eyes were full of heartfelt admiration! Heavens, I felt simply pampered!

C: 我认为这样的评价很准确。别看我常年混迹于业余选手、赛场新人之间，好像也是新人。但不才已经坚持击败新人上百年了。江湖抬爱，称我为「新人杀手」！
E: I think that is a fair assessment. I may seem like a hobbyist contender, a compatriot among newcomers. But I have persevered in beating down newcomers for centuries. My beloved moniker by the community is "Newbie Killer"!

C: 都是为了仙舟…
E: We do it for Xianzhou...

C: 你看到了吧？那棵树…
E: Can you see it? That tree over there...

C: 书里写过这种事情对吧？
E: This is covered in the book, right?

C: 不过也合理。毕竟我们才是仙舟的栋梁。
E: But it's reasonable. We are the backbone of Xianzhou.

C: 说说货箱里面都有啥…
E: Tell me what's inside the crate...

C: 真的吗？看不出来呀…
E: Really? I can't tell...

C: 魁首大人决不会失败！
E: The master primus will never fail!

C: 不懂医术，略懂拳脚？
E: You're not much of a doctor, but know a thing or two about throwing punches?

C: …那我还能说什么呢？换位思考一下，我叫你宝宝你会开心吗？
E: ...Well, what would you have me say? Put yourself in my shoes, then. Would you be happy if I called you "baby"?

C: 悬锋人的字典里，没有「受苦」二字。
E: There is no word for "suffering" in the Kremnoan language.

C: 可嘴馋的圣女大人，每次都能找到我藏的甜饼…看着怎么也藏不住，就只好放任她吃了。不过我们也约定好，晚上睡觉前要好好刷牙。
E: But our sweet-toothed Holy Maiden always manages to find my hidden cookies... Since there's no way to keep them hidden from her, I've just given up and let her have them. Though we did make a promise — she has to brush her teeth properly before going to bed at night.

C: 对不起，就是想试试…
E: Sorry, I just wanted to try that out...

C: 原来你们的感觉真是互通的。
E: So all of you are really interconnected.

C: 无需在意礼数，畅所欲言吧。
E: Don't worry about formalities, just speak your mind.

C: 替老爸砍柴火，为伽尔巴叔叔制弓，和皮西厄斯老师讲讲树庭的见闻…还有闹着让我讲故事的披索和莉维娅，要满足他们的好奇心，可得费些功夫。
E: Chopping firewood for Dad, making bows for Uncle Galba, sharing tales from the Grove with Mrs. Pythias... And then there's Piso and Livia, always pestering me for stories. It takes quite some effort to satisfy their curiosity.

C: 这个地方还不赖吧？
E: Not too shabby here, huh?

C: 之前在哀地里亚，晚祷以后，孩子们为彼此梳洗头发时，总看到你坐在一边看着。
E: Back in Aidonia, I always saw you sitting aside as you watched the children groom each other's hair after evening prayers.

C: 就从麻花辫开始吧！我来编左边！
E: Let's start with braids! I'll do the left side!

C: 可架不住总有人闲不下来，要找些有趣的事情做呀。你们说是不是，缇安老师，飞宝？
E: But some people just can't sit still and are always looking for something fun to do. Isn't that right, Trianne, Ciphie?

C: 她们就这么走了？
E: They just left like that?

C: 我要求不高。
E: I'm not asking for much.

C: 「宁失金玉，不进幽狱」…
E: "Better to lose your gold and jade than to enter the Shackling Prison."

C: 唉，这可不成啊。
E: *sigh* This will not do.

C: 全拿来上班了。
E: I spent all my time working.

C: 长官，你能不能先告诉我，幽囚狱的待遇怎么样？
E: Sir, can you tell me what the treatment in the Shackling Prison is like?

C: 你吃饭是不是还有什么忌口？
E: Then do you have anything that you don't eat?

C: 你抢劫哪有我诈骗效率高？你说说，你抢了那么多银铺，抢了多少？
E: Is robbing ever as efficient as defrauding? Tell me, just how much have you gotten from robbing so many silver stores?

C: 唔…坏了，这下更解释不清了。
E: Um... bother. Now it's even harder to explain the difference.

C: 请您有序排队，等待安检。
E: Please line up and wait for security inspection.

C: 姐，你就是我唯一的姐！
E: Ohhh, you're the best ever!

C: 擂台上的比赛真精彩啊。
E: The matches in the ring are so exciting.

C: 进场的办法有点离谱。
E: You'll never guess how I got in.

C: 年纪轻轻就一把年纪了。
E: You're so young, but your heart's so old!

C: 我是～跳舞的囚犯！
E: I am~ The dancing convict!

C: 怪异的山水画。
E: A haunted landscape painting.

C: 星历<unbreak>8012</unbreak>年
E: Star Calendar Year <unbreak>8012</unbreak>

C: 你听瓦尔特说起过，银河中的某个哲人国度将鸟笼视为冠冕——但他们究竟是怎么把脑袋塞进去的？
E: According to Welt, some philosopher country in the cosmos regards the birdcage as their crown. How on earth do they fit their head into the thing?

C: 眼下的情况刻不容缓！
E: The situation at hand is urgent!

C: 希望未来在匹诺康尼的零售商店里，不会出现苏打豆汁儿口味的限量款苏乐达。
E: The hope is that Penacony's snack stores won't carry limited-edition mung bean soda flavored SoulGlad in the future.

C: 我很看好那个用大剑的。
E: I have a good feeling about the one who uses the huge sword.

C: 仙舟的「论坛」好复杂啊…
E: Xianzhou's forums are so complicated...

C: 我愿终生茹素！
E: I'm willing to be a vegetarian for life!

C: 不去说评书可惜了。
E: It's a pity you're not a storyteller.

C: 一尊造型古典的香炉。
E: It is an incense burner with a traditional design.

C: 此阵名为「宙合」，是大衍穷观阵的阵基之一，与其他阵基一同演绎着大衍万化之道。
E: This matrix is called the "temporal plane," and it is one of the base terminals of the Matrix of Prescience Ultima. Along with other base terminals, it carries out the way of all change.

C: 工造司曾经指定谛听负责工造司重地守备，但它实在是过于可爱，便很快被凶恶的金人淘汰掉了。
E: The Artisanship Commission once appointed Diting to be in charge of the defense of the commission. However, it was soon replaced by the intimidating-looking aurumatons for looking too adorable.

C: 你信手抽出其中一枚卷轴。展开时，一个丝绢质感的合成声音自你脑内成形。
E: You pull out a random scroll. When you open it, a synthetic voice as smooth as silk forms in your mind.

C: 「所有世界的灭亡都归结于同一个原因：内部信仰体系的冲突、精神支柱的幻灭、弃绝希望。」
E: "The destruction of the worlds stem from the same reasons: Conflict of their internal belief system, disillusionment with their pillars of support, and the lack of hope."

C: 司辰宫员工会在下班后利用沙盘进行战棋游戏。目前，司辰宫全体公认的最强玩家是一名清洁工——此人曾经三次击败驭空，被誉为「扫地军神」。
E: The workers at the Palace of Astrum use the sandpit to play warchess after work. Now, the best player hailed by the entire Palace of Astrum is a cleaner, who has defeated Yukong thrice and gained the title of "Broom Sage."

C: 我跳得怎么样？
E: How were my moves?

C: 「如我感受到溪流穿过山谷在洞天之间穿行，带来永狩原的秋风拂面而过！我感受到你！」很有诗意。
E: "I can feel your presence like the breeze blowing against my face when the streams flow along the valley and run across the delves!" How poetic.

C: 古树粗壮的树干宛如黑龙蜿蜒而上，抬头望去，耳畔隐隐有风雷声呼呼作响——随后你迅速意识到，那只是你用力抬头后的耳鸣而已。
E: The sturdy and thick trunk of the ancient tree rises upward like a black dragon. When you look up at the tree, you hear a faint sound of wind and lightning. Soon, you realize that you are just having tinnitus after lifting your head too quickly.

C: 长乐天很大，很繁华，足足十万只物流机巧鸟在不间断地飞行，维系着城市的脉搏。你辨认得出长乐天的每一只物流机巧鸟，只要看一眼，你就背得出它的编号。
E: The Exalting Sanctum is large and bustling. About one hundred thousand express cycranes are always out and about to meet the needs of the city. You can recognize every single express cycrane. Just one look and you would be able to recall its serial number.

C: 曾经有客人来到杜氏茶庄，连饮数杯烈焰浓茶，美其名曰「干大事前必须喝点」。
E: We once had a guest come to Du's Teahouse and drank many cups of Flaming Potent Tea, before mysteriously stating: "I always need this before doing great things."

C: 曾有人说过「在尚滋味吃饭就像被一记重拳击中面部」，结合燕翠师傅的拳法，这个说法的可信度上升了。
E: Someone once said that eating at Spices Supreme is like being punched in the face. Taking into account chef Yancui's fighting skills, this review is suddenly a lot more trustworthy!

C: 杜氏茶庄的「茶罐」。你也许不信它装着「茶」，路人也不信它装着「茶」。
E: A "Tea Canister" from Du's Teahouse. You may not believe that there is tea inside, and neither will anyone who passes by.

C: 与鲜花一起的，还有一封信：
E: Alongside the flowers, you find a letter:

C: 地衡司执事让你离包裹远一些，他们很快就会派人来处理。看起来，又有一桩大案被扼杀在了萌芽之中。
E: The Realm-Keeping Commission instructs you to stay away from the package and that they will send someone to deal with it immediately. It seems you've nipped another big case in the bud.

C: 跳到音乐结束！
E: Dance till the music stops!

C: 你愕然，一张纸条上竟然能写下这么多数字。你随手掏了掏箱子，里面另有一张字条。
E: You are stunned to see so many figures written on a single piece of paper. You run your hand around the inside of the box to find another note.

C: 我是阿往，这位是阿来....
E: I'm Forth, and this is Back'n...

C: 我打算换个人附体了。
E: I've decided to switch hosts.

C: 不过十王司要是真的「无纸化办公」了，没有这些像模像样的书架，你会觉得他们是在这里办公吗？不会的。至此，你已经理解了书架的意义。
E: But if the Ten-Lords Commission were to go "paperless," do the people here look like they are seriously working without these presentable shelves? Certainly not. At this moment, you suddenly realize the meaning behind the existence of these shelves.

C: 房间里没有传来任何声响。
E: Not a whisper comes from inside the room.

C: 但你没有任何收获，厚重的房门像是堵无法逾越的高墙，将所有秘密全部吞噬。
E: Alas, to no avail. The heavy door is like an insurmountable wall, devouring all secrets within.

C: 堆满房间的粉红气球，象征着玫瑰般似火的热情。
E: Red balloons fill the entire room, symbolizing the fiery passion of roses.

C: 你伸出手、踮起脚，试图从中摘下自己的一束幸福——成功了，你抓住一根气球的尾巴，将它牢牢攥在手中。
E: You reach out and stand on your tiptoes, trying to pluck your own little bundle of happiness... Success! You grab the tip of a balloon and grasp it firmly in your hand.

C: 这样的门连接着一间间侧厅——酒店的五脏六腑。但梦境显然比它们更值得开拓。
E: Doors like this lead to one side room after another — the heart and soul of the hotel. However, the dreamscape is clearly much more worth exploring.

C: 「条条大路织美梦，往来交通有球笼。」
E: "All roads lead to dreams, all travels use Spheroids."

C: 无论这张桌曾经的主人是谁，他肯定不爱整理卫生。
E: No matter who the master of this table was, he was definitely not a kempt person.

C: 扭曲如漩涡的钟表，它所指的时间也混乱如麻。
E: A watch that swirls like a vortex — the time it tells is also a jumbled chaos.

C: 都市传说一则：在有些夜晚，这盏灯会在天空中投射出巨大的有翼哺乳动物剪影——这说明有一位暗夜英雄即将出手。
E: According to urban legend, on certain nights, this lamp casts the silhouette of a giant winged mammal in the sky — a signal that a superhero of the night is poised to strike.

C: 视野绝佳的观景台，几乎能将整个筑梦边境的景色尽收眼底。
E: This observation deck has breathtaking views. You can almost see the entire Dream's Edge at a glance.

C: 「混蛋，不要散布紧张情绪！我们有人，也有武器，可以应付……」
E: "Fool, stop spreading anxiety! We've got men and weapons. We'll manage..."

C: 「谁也不会来！谁也不会来！罪人不配拥有救星，只配被■■永远奴役！」
E: "No one will come! No one will come! Sinners do not deserve saviors, and they only deserve to be enslaved by ■■!"

C: 这种时候还有谁会想要使用这些载具呢——惊梦剧团、还是忆域迷因？
E: Who would even use these vehicles at a time like this — the Dreamjolt Troupe, or the Memory Zone Memes?

C: 家族能够在匹诺康尼取得如此成就，得益于从一开始就选对了方向。我们第一时间发现，肆意蔓延的情绪能量正在摧毁梦域，它们必须受到控制。
E: The Family has been so successful in Penacony because we chose the right direction right from the start. We were the first to discover the need to control the rampant emotional energy, as it was destroying the Dreamscape.

C: 路易斯先是深吸一口气，然后缓缓吐出。
E: Louis takes a deep breath and lets it out slowly.

C: 好好听着，前几天营业部来了位大客户。具体有多大…这么跟你说吧，负责接待的那个小子，从他身上捞到了一整年的业绩！啧，明明资历比我浅，真是阳寿换来的运气！
E: Listen up. A major client came by the sales department a few days ago. How major? Let me put it this way — the kid who serviced this client hit his KPI for the entire year! Tsk... I've got years of more experience than that brat! Did he trade in his life for this sort of luck or what?

C: 就不告诉你。
E: Not telling you.

C: 我是一名调查记者。之所以来到匹诺康尼，是因为我想揭穿藏在美梦表象之下的阴谋。
E: I am an investigative reporter. My presence on Penacony is to reveal the conspiracy behind this facade of splendor.

C: 但是…呵，您肯定明白，每个人都有自己的使命和坚持。而我坚持的东西恰巧名叫「真相」。
E: But... Heh, you must understand, everyone has their own calling and tenacity. And mine is coincidentally fueled by the "truth."

C: 那就赶快走！别挡着我看街景了——就是说，长得高不意味着能为所欲为！
E: Then clear out! Don't block my view of the street — I mean, just because you're tall doesn't mean you can just do whatever you want!

C: 呜…没想到有天，皮皮西人的身份…会让我感到如此地悲伤。
E: *Sob*... I never thought I'd see the day that my identity as a Pepeshi... would leave me feeling so depressed.

C: 呜呜，呜呜呜。
E: Woo-woo, woo whoooo woo.

C: 谛听嗅了嗅你的手指，随后咬住了你的鞋带，轻轻拉扯着，似乎想带你去某个地方。
E: The Diting sniffs your fingers and then nibbles on your shoelace, softly pulling at it as though dragging you off somewhere else.

C: 谛听嗅了嗅你的手指，随后咬住了你的鞋带，轻轻拉扯着，似乎想把你带去某个地方。
E: The Diting sniffs your fingers and then nibbles on your shoelace, softly pulling at it as if wanting to drag you off somewhere else.

C: 说到底，为什么你要故意惹怒一头熊呢？
E: Why would you want to deliberately annoy a bear, anyway?

C: …但我从未被压力击垮过，一次都没有。我的每一次演出都是完美的。他们说我就是为歌唱而生的，说我就是声乐本身。
E: ...But I was never overwhelmed by pressure, not even once. Every performance was perfect. They said that I was born to sing, that I was the voice of music itself.

C: 我创造的每个音节都能激起人们的共鸣，我时常能瞥见人群中眼含泪光的观众。我能在他们的目光里捕捉到纯粹的「梦想」——那个时代很不一样……
E: Every syllable I created resonated with people, and I'd often catch glimpses of teary-eyed audience members. I could capture the purity of the "dream" in their eyes — that was a really different era...

C: 不管你出身哪个星系，这样盯着人看都称不上礼貌。
E: No matter which galaxy you come from, staring at people like that is not going to be considered polite.

C: …就这？
E: ...That's it?

C: 它们就像我的…伙伴？唉，越说越可悲……
E: They are like my... partners? Boy, now I sound so pathetic...

C: 要是客人有猎奇心理的话，还可以让他们体验亲手训练道具的感觉……
E: And if the customers are keen to try new things, I can always let them experience the feeling of training props...

C: 你是猎犬家系的吗？
E: Are you a member of the Bloodhound Family?

C: 我的母亲…她是一位体贴、善解人意的家庭妇女。不过从前的她比现在要潇洒许多。
E: Mom... she's a considerate and kind housewife, but she used to be a dashing young lady.

C: 那时起我就对他们心生憧憬，希望有朝一日能回报他们的恩情。
E: From that day onward, I looked up to them, hoping that one day, I can repay their kindness.

C: 后来我才终于明白，我从来不知道自己真正想要什么。我能做的只有一直画下去，直到梦境破碎，生命终结。
E: Later, I finally understood. I never knew what I truly wanted. All I can do now is to keep painting until the Dreamscape shatters and my life ends.

C: 我一直有一个愿望…我想画出我心里的梦想之城，它真正该有的样子。
E: I always have a wish... I want to paint the city of my innermost dreams — the way it truly should be.

C: 家人…到底意味着什么呢？
E: Kinship... what exactly does it mean?

C: 你还是做好服务生的工作吧。
E: You should focus on your work as a waiter.

C: 我从小看着他长大，我们就像彼此的家人一样。
E: I've been accompanying him since he was a child. We are like family.

C: 除了我们猎犬家系外，还有橡木、苜蓿草、隐夜鸫和鸢尾花四大家系。各个家系分别负责不同的工作，彼此亲密无间。
E: Apart from us Bloodhound Family, there are also four other major lineages of Oak, Alfalfa, Nightingale, and Iris. Each family is charged with different jobs and is very tight-knit.

C: 哦…哦哦哦！不知道为什么，我突然感觉心情变顺畅了——就像刚参与了一场群架，而我是最后一个站着的人！哈哈哈！
E: Oh... Oh oh oh! I don't know why, but I suddenly feel much better — like I just joined a bar brawl, and I'm the last one standing! Hahaha!

C: 已经没有这样的人了。大家都是想哭就哭，想笑就笑。
E: There's no one like that anymore. Everyone cries when they wish, and laughs when they want.

C: 虽然不知道怎么回事，但我觉得这样也挺好。有句话怎么说来着：「若哭泣不自由，则欢笑无意义」。
E: I don't know what's going on, but I think it's a good thing. How does that saying go again? "If you're not free to cry, then there's no point in laughing."

C: 什么报酬？
E: What reward?

C: 去聆听吧，去感受吧，去了解艺术真正应有的样子吧！
E: Hear it, feel it, and experience art as it should be!

C: 麻烦死了，啧……
E: This is a real pain, tsk...

C: 请别客气，有关酒店的任何问题我都乐意为您解答。为您服务是全体「家族」成员的荣幸。
E: You're welcome. I'm ready to answer any questions you may have about the hotel. It is an honor for all The Family's members to serve you.

C: …谁说必须懂规则才能看比赛的？狭隘！
E: ...Who says you must know the rules to enjoy the game? So narrow-minded!

C: 您初来乍到，想必对于酒店还不太熟悉吧？那么请让我为您提供一些小小的建议吧——
E: Since you are new here, I assume you are not familiar with the hotel. Please allow me to offer some suggestions.

C: 看看你都卖些什么。
E: Let's see what you have.

C: 你开始给爱德华医生讲述你的狂野梦境。
E: You start describing your wild dream to Dr. Edward.

C: 「窥梦电话」是什么？
E: What is a "Dreampeek Call"?

C: 晚上好，尊贵的客人！您今天是否有兴趣打一通神奇的「窥梦电话」？
E: Good evening, esteemed guest! Would you be interested in making a Dreampeek Call today?

C: 叮铃铃——感谢您使用窥梦电话服务！欢迎您下次再来！
E: *ring* Thank you for using the Dreampeek Call service! Please come back next time!

C: 嘟…嘟…嘟……
E: *dial tone*

C: 问得好，问得好！初来乍到的客人，还不知道「窥梦电话」的神奇之处！
E: A wonderful question! Please allow me to introduce you to the wonders of the Dreampeek Call, dear new guest!

C: 窥梦电话已拨通——您将会听到：托帕的梦境。
E: The Dreampeek Call connected. You are about to hear Topaz's dream.

C: 我曾经操控过大机器人。
E: I've already done that.

C: 棒球棍。
E: Baseball bat.

C: 明白了。这就为您启动出行程序。
E: Understood. I will now initiate the travel program for you.

C: 您的设备电源余量过低，无法正常行驶。请您在完成充电后再尝试启动。
E: Your device is running low on power. Please charge your device and try starting the engine again.

C: 啾，满意了？
E: Tweet. Happy now?

C: 什么是折纸小鸟？
E: What is an origami bird?

C: 读道具描述是吧？老套路了。
E: I have to read the item description, right? That's an old trick.

C: 明明你没说话，但面前的迎宾员似乎却已明白了一切。
E: You did not say anything, but the usher before you seems to have completely understood the situation.

C: 公馆的工作太简单了，每天上班就只想着「今天吃什么」……
E: Work at the pavilion is so easy... all I think about while I'm at work is "what should I have for dinner tonight..."

C: 现在想来，过去的我是多么愚蠢…艺术的背后永远都少不了钱与权的影子，谁又能只靠一腔热情生存下去？
E: Now that I think of it, I was so dumb in the past... The shadows of finance and power are always pulling the strings behind the glamor of the art world. Who would be able to survive with just passion?

C: 作为梦境的造物，它们在服务宾客方面丝毫不逊色于我们人类，是很可靠的小帮手。
E: Although they are Dreamscape creations, they're just as good as us humans when it comes to serving the guests. They're quite reliable assistants.

C: 哈，你也对我的战甲感兴趣了？
E: Ha, you're intrigued by my armor, aren't you?

C: 无名客四海为家。
E: For a Nameless, the whole world is my home.

C: 呼…真的非常抱歉，但我现在感觉不太好，可以让我稍微歇一会儿吗？
E: Phew... I'm so sorry. I don't feel very well. Could you give me a moment to rest?

C: 起初，故乡是个很具体的词，一幢房子，也可以是一颗星球。随着时间流逝，它会变得越来越模糊，几个你还叫得出名字的人，小时候没吃到的那颗糖…都可以是故乡。
E: At first, home is a word with a very clear meaning. It could be a house, or it could be a planet. But, as time goes on, the meaning becomes more and more blurred. It could be those friends whose names you still remember, or that sweet you never managed to have as a child... They can all be your home.

C: 算了，我不想听。
E: Forget it, I don't want to hear it.

C: …您？向搭讪对象询问这种直接的话题，您还真是不懂得循序渐进的道理呢。
E: ...You? That's a real direct way of speaking to someone you're chatting with. You really don't seem to grasp the concept of taking it slow.

C: 嗨，这位观众真是问了个好问题！这里是酒吧，讲出来的话当然要符合氛围才行。
E: Hey, a member of the audience has asked a fine question! As this is a lounge, your words have to fit in with the atmosphere.

C: 哼。看在你没有站着跟我说话的份上，就勉为其难地聊聊吧。
E: Humph. As you're not standing over me while we talk, I guess we can make conversation.

C: 人类根本不值得相信，非得等到被抛弃了才明白——当然，麦克斯除外。
E: Humans don't deserve any trust — except for Max, of course. But those fools just remain blind to this fact until the very day they are abandoned.

C: 算了！想这么多干嘛，相同用途的「美梦剧团」都长一个样，不需要专门去分辨！
E: Ah, forget it! Same-purpose Sweet Dreams Troupe members all look the same! Why bother distinguishing them?

C: 欢迎上车！热烈欢迎！
E: You'd be welcome aboard!

C: 我为这个问题准备了一百个答案，但都不太适合你。不过，既然你是大剧院事件的亲历者…我倒是可以稍微和你聊聊。
E: I've prepared a hundred answers to this question, but none of them would really suit you. That said, I suppose I could talk with you a bit... since you experienced the Grand Theater incident firsthand.

C: 黑爪女士笑盈盈地看着你，不变的嘴角弧度让你脊背发凉。
E: Lady Black Claw looks at you pleasantly, but the way the arc of her lips is constantly frozen in the same smile sends shivers down your spine.

C: 照现在这样子过下去，不吃不喝干上五百年，也赶不上人家开到剧院门口的一辆车。
E: If I keep going the way I have, even if I don't eat or drink for five hundred years, I still wouldn't be able to afford the kind of car people are driving up to the main door of the theater.

C: 那是颗崇高的星球，是自由的殿堂、是理想的黄金乡——
E: That is a sublime planet, a sanctum of freedom, a utopia of ideals...

C: 朋友们，我们要不还是别白费力气了……
E: Friends, how about we stop wasting our energy...

C: 这是我摸鱼时候研究出来的小技巧，可以通过体感来控制灯光。你看，顺时针挥手是渐暗，逆时针是渐亮……
E: This is a little trick I came up with while I was slacking off to control the lights by using hand motions. You see, waving clockwise dims the lights, while counterclockwise brings them up...

C: 还有些一看人创作者出名了，就热火朝天地挖黑料好证明对方「德不配位」，怕不是在梦境里长时间见不到太阳，内心阴暗到看什么都是黑的。
E: And then there're those people who gleefully dig up scandalous histories to try and cancel someone as soon as they learn they're famous. These people have either been kept out of the sun too long inside Dreamscapes, or they're so depressed that they only see pessimism everywhere they look.

C: 哎唷，口气还不小呐？哪部作品找你当主角，制片人怕不是要把家里的地板都给赔光了吧？
E: Oh, you sure talk a big game — who picked you to be their lead? That producer's gonna lose their shirt, let alone all their worldly possessions.

C: 你看着还挺闲的，那这几个艾迪恩硬币你拿去吧——记得替我多赢点奖品！
E: You seem to have plenty of time on your hands. How about you take a few of these Aideen tokens with you — and try to win me as many prizes as you can!

C: 为什么广告牌上面会有我的形象？这也太奇怪了吧。不可能，绝对不可能！
E: Why would I be on a billboard? That's not possible. There's no way!

C: 「有只广告牌在中央车站前等你，它会一直等下去的！」
E: "There is a billboard in front of the Golden Central Station waiting for you. It will always be waiting for you!"

C: 虽说在这过得不错，虽说塔利亚也不是个什么好地方…但有时候啊，还是会怀念从前。
E: Although I don't have a bad life, and Talia really isn't some glamorous paradise... Sometimes, I still miss my past.

C: 我还想听你的故事。
E: I want to hear more of your stories.

C: 这一句要舒缓地唱，就像星星在夜空中缓慢亮起，船只从月光照耀的港湾出航……
E: This line should be sung gently, like stars slowly lighting up in the night sky, or like a ship slowly setting sail from a moonlit harbor...

C: 流梦礁发生什么了？
E: What is happening to the Dreamflux Reef?

C: 除了担任守卫之外，我一直在搜集与钟表小子创作相关的物品，希望能在未来为钟表小子建立一座博物馆，但最重要的原画稿却始终不见踪影。
E: In addition to my job as a guard, I've been collecting items related to the creation of Clockie, hoping to build a museum for Clockie in the future. However, I cannot find the most important item — the original artwork of Clockie.

C: 直到不知道多少年以后，我们来到了刻满了故事的行星环上。我看见，他们对我说「陌生人，感谢你的到来」。
E: It wasn't until many years later that we arrived at the ring system carved with stories were the engraved words: "Thank you for coming, stranger" conveyed.

C: 关于清醒村…
E: About Rouseville...

C: 他是最厉害的鸟儿，也是我们最好的教导者，我最崇拜他了啾！
E: He's the most amazing bird there is, and our best mentor too. I respect the heck out of him, tweet!

C: 连练习振翅的魄力都没有，以后还怎么叼更多石头来扩充小镇啾。
E: They don't even have the discipline to practice flapping their wings, how will they even bring back more stones in the future to expand the town?

C: 只有像我这样厉害的小鸟，才能抢到大树顶端的宝座，不说黄金公子，就连钟表小子和哈努兄弟也飞不过我啾。
E: Only an awesome bird like me can claim that throne atop the Great Tree. Forget about Young Master Gold... even Clockie or Brother Hanu could not outfly me, tweet.

C: 接到隐夜鸫的盛情邀请后，我与好友一同来到匹诺康尼，投身筑梦事业。
E: After receiving the Nightingales' cordial invitation, I came to Penacony with my friends and embarked on a Dreamweaving career.

C: 他永远怀揣理想，即使是在最黑暗的日子里也从没放弃过希望。他有太多没能做到的事…但他从未因惧怕失败放慢追逐自由的步伐，或犹豫是否该向求救之人伸出援手。
E: His ideals were always close to his heart. He never lost hope, even on the darkest days. He had too many things he could not do... but that never stopped his pursuit of freedom, not from fear of failure. Neither did he hesitate to lend a helping hand to those in need.

C: 呵呵，那东西还没做好呢，以后再来吧。
E: Hehe, it's not made yet. Come back next time.

C: 但他的勇敢与反抗拯救了更多的人，不该被简单地判定为罪人。
E: But his courage and resistance saved even more people. He should not have been simply branded as a criminal.

C: 就这样吧，拜拜。
E: That's all. Bye-bye.

C: 瞧，正如我手中的这碗米粒…任何角度的稍加调整，都能让它就此开始千变万化。
E: For instance, observe this bowl of rice in my hands... Even a slight adjustment in angle will cause it to change in a myriad of ways.

C: 要让未来在他们眼中保持神秘，这样，才能产生不安。
E: An unknowable future breeds uncertainty.

C: 全银河仅一家牧场产出此级别的牛排。雪花纹路均匀遍布，像红宝石上结的霜。只能做三分熟，多一分都是暴殄天物。
E: "In the entire cosmos, only one ranch can produce such a high-grade steak, with evenly distributed marbling that mirrors frost on a ruby. It should be cooked to medium rare at most to maintain its exquisite quality."

C: 当你落入星际监狱，临刑前最后一顿随你所愿，星际快递来的家乡菜就是美食。
E: When you're thrown into Interastral Prison and given your choice of a last meal, the food delivered from your home planet becomes gourmet.

C: 当你饿得快被造物主回收灵魂时，你模糊的视界中爬过一只闪着白光的甲虫。它的壳太美了，像深海的白珍珠，可它更像救命的食物。
E: "Teetering on starvation, with your spirit fading, a luminous beetle emerges before your blurred eyes. Its shell is mesmerizing, reminiscent of a pearl in the depths of the ocean. Yet, to you, it is nothing less than a lifeline."

C: 你有些在意……
E: It bothers you somewhat...

C: 你们怎么这么没用……
E: Why are you all so useless?

C: 嗯…这确实是美食，你很有品味，说着我都想家了。
E: Hmm, it does sound delicious. Your taste is excellent, and I'm feeling homesick now.

C: 咳咳…那…那来一杯荨麻酒好了，<unbreak>143</unbreak>种药草配方的那款。
E: Ahem... C—Could I please have a Chartreuse? The one made with <unbreak>143</unbreak> herbs.

C: 其实…都是因为我抽中的这份豪华旅游套餐。
E: It's... about the luxury travel package I won.

C: 这完全就是商业欺诈！
E: This is an outright business fraud!

C: 哈，参与项目的可都是大人物…这种机密你还是别乱问了，我可不想被公司保安拎着丢出去。
E: Hah, everyone on this project's a big shot... Let's keep classified information off limits. Getting escorted out by IPC security isn't exactly something on my bucket list.

C: 方便透露一二吗？
E: Can you divulge a thing or two?

C: 噢，你可能在我的同行口中听说过我的名字。我姑且算是这一行的「老油条」了吧，哈哈。
E: Oh, you might have heard of me from the other lawyers. I guess I can be considered a seasoned veteran in this field, haha.

C: 请恕我拒绝。
E: Please allow me to refuse.

C: 太感谢客官了啾！一点小小的礼物，请务必收下啾~
E: Thank you so much, tweet! This is a token of my appreciation. You must accept it, tweet~!

C: 这个广告牌该不会只有复读功能吧？怎么一直在复读我的话？真不知道该说什么好了。
E: Is this billboard only capable of repeating what others say? Why does it keep copying what I say? You really have no idea what else to say.

C: 哎，还是您本人的嗓音更好听…我还得加油努力，多多练习才行。
E: *sigh* Your voice is still more beautiful... I'll have to work harder and practice more.

C: 饮料虽好，但宠物不能喝，小朋友不能多喝，汪。客人您也要注意不要过量饮用，汪！
E: Our drinks may be good, but pets mustn't have them and kids shouldn't drink too much either, woof. You should also note how much you're drinking so you don't overindulge, woof!

C: …听起来是他在勒索。
E: ...It sounds like he's trying to blackmail you.
