C: 如果我能一直跟在您身边，给您打工…搞不好以后会被我遇到那种「见证历史的时刻」。四舍五入也算历史留名了吧？光是想想就让人兴奋！
E: If I'm lucky enough to continue working for you... I may even get the chance to witness a historic moment when it happens. I would've made my mark in history too, wouldn't I? Ooh, the thought alone is enough to excite me!

C: 好的，我这就吩咐他们去更换！
E: Alright, I'll ask them to change the design according to your instruction!

C: 我没什么想问的了。
E: I don't have any more questions.

C: 谢谢，先不用了。
E: Thank you, I'm good for now.

C: 来聊会儿天吧。
E: Let's have a chat...

C: 哈哈，别看我现在耳聋眼瞎，摇滚乐风靡折纸大学的年代，我可是全校最受欢迎乐队的主唱呢，甩着齐腰的卷发，穿着大敞胸口的衬衫。
E: Haha, even though I'm quite blind and deaf now, back in the day when Rock 'n' Roll was all the rage at Paperfold University, I was the lead singer of the most popular band on campus. I had waist-length permed hair and wore shirts that opened all the way down my front.

C: 在匹诺康尼有什么办法消除一个人的记忆？你有门路吗？正规的、不正规的都行。
E: Do you know anyone in Penacony who can erase memories? It doesn't matter if they're reliable or not.

C: 当然认识，那也是个自称*派对高手*的家伙。可惜啊，还是不如我。
E: Hmph, you bet I do. Too bad that self-proclaimed party connoisseur's nothing compared to me.

C: 我没什么想聊的了。
E: That's all for now.

C: 哪个学院会赢得球笼赛？
E: Which academy's going to win this Spheroid race?

C: 谁谁谁，谁和那种玩意搭！
E: Wh—Who would want to be compared to someone like that!?

C: 对此我大为震撼，甚至装作学生去听了他好几堂课，结果嘛……
E: I was absolutely shocked! I ended up actually going to a few of his classes and, well...

C: 哈…为了研究我可以奔赴险恶的荒野，深入未知的雨林，可以不吃不喝好几天去观察去记录…可他呢？
E: Ah... For the sake of my research, I would be willing to traverse the dangerous wilds or go deep into unknown rainforests. I could go without food or water for many days to observe and record... But what about him?

C: 嘶…好家伙，我这是撞大运了？快快快，给我讲讲！
E: Ah... I knew it! Have I hit the jackpot? Quick, quick, tell me everything you know!

C: 七大不可思议…
E: The Seven Wonders...

C: 虽然因为植入广告的事，在折纸论坛上被骂得有点惨，但那只是梦泡经过夸张处理后的效果，现场表演不是那么回事。
E: Although we got massively chewed out for product placement on the Paperfold Forum, it was just because of the exaggerated effects added when our performances were converted to dream bubbles. The live performances were never that bad.

C: …是吗？我也这么觉得！从站上舞台的时候开始，我就想把余生都奉献给音乐了！
E: ...Really? I think so too! From the moment I stood on stage, I knew I wanted to give my life to music!

C: （写下幽默的寄语）
E: (Write a witty message)

C: …学院代表很诚恳地向我道过歉，我也相信他并非是出于私心。「缭乱」的音乐确实不符合学院推崇的规范，他会做出这样的举动…我能理解
E: ...The academy representative earnestly apologized to me, and I'm sure he wasn't acting out of personal interest. The Dazzling's music flouted the academy's recommended regulations, resulting in his actions... I can understand that.

C: 有区别吗？都是提需求的大人物，都是学校的贵宾，我可惹不起！
E: Does it make a difference? All of you are important figures making proposals and VIPs of the school. I can't afford to offend any of you!

C: 但在跟老爹坦白了这一切之后…我觉得很多事情我看到的只是一层表象——比如说，哪怕格拉克斯大道多么光鲜亮丽，早霞工厂的流水线也沾不上一点光。
E: But after coming clean to my old man about all these... I feel that I'm only seeing the surface of many things. For example, no matter how dazzling Glaux Avenue is, its shine will never get to rub off on the Dawn Factory's production line.

C: 容许我再给自己的账号打下广告——请关注嘉宝娜！关注嘉宝娜谢谢蕉！
E: Please allow me to advertise my account once more... Please follow Gabbana! Follow Gabbana, thank you, bana!

C: 容许我再给自己的账号打下广告——请关注嘉宝娜！关注嘉宝娜谢谢蕉！
E: Please allow me to advertise my account once more... Please follow Gabbana! Follow Gabbana, thank you, bana!

C: 哟，甘饴•忍徒！
E: Yo, Ninja Initiate Patissier!

C: 总、总之…如果想吃甜品的话，欢迎随时来找我！
E: A—Anyway... if you want some desserts, you're always welcome here!

C: 最近我的甜品在学校里很受欢迎，听说是芮克先生的新片里有关于我甜品摊的内容…嘿嘿，真感谢你们拍的电影啊。
E: My desserts have been a hit at school lately. I hear Mr. Reca's new film has some content about my dessert stall... Hee-hee, I'm really grateful that you guys shot the film.

C: 比如之前，我就给自己安装了「杀敌算法免安装绿色正版补充包」，能精确识别数千公里外的多个敌对目标，迅速计算电磁脉冲炮弹道，进行火力压制。
E: For example, I previously installed the "Official Enemy Elimination Algorithm Green Update Pack — No Installation Required" that can accurately identify multiple enemy targets thousands of kilometers away, quickly compute EM pulse cannon trajectory, and execute suppression fire.

C: 您理解了吗？「天击」与「添肌」谐音，令人忍俊不禁。
E: Do you get it? Because she's a foxian? It's a funny pun.

C: 在比星神还古老的时代，人们可以用「魔法」操控自然万物。一个人对自然的认知越少，能操纵的事物就越多。
E: In an era older than the Aeons, people could use "magic" to control the natural world. The less a person understood about nature, the more they could manipulate it.

C: 关于列车上的同伴…
E: About the companions on the Express...

C: 这种沙发的材质相当有趣，当承受外力时会自动向下倾斜，何不一试呢？
E: This couch's material is rather interesting. It will incline by itself when an external force is pushing against it. Why not give it a try?

C: 球形救生艇，看上去和气泡弹珠机的发射方式极为相似——倒也合理，逃生本来就是极限运动。
E: An orb-shaped lifeboat. Its method of launch looks similar to a bubble pinball machine — that makes sense, since fleeing for your life is a kind of extreme sport unto itself.

C: 可别再乱跑了！不然我就将你拉入泳池黑名单！
E: Don't let me catch you running around again! Otherwise, I'll blacklist you from the swimming pool!

C: 说话别那么凶嘛！
E: You don't have to be so fierce!

C: 这里曾踞坐着残骸，他的手心仍残余着无数次挥舞侵晨时的麻木感，与漫天风沙一同破碎。
E: Here the corpse once sat hunched, his grip locked in numbness from countless swings of Dawnmaker, crumbling into the swirling wind and sand.

C: 清新而婉转的悠扬，似乎有着与药草同等的疗愈之效。这也是那位好医生特别喜欢哼歌的原因。
E: A fresh and soft tune that seems to be as soothing as medicinal herbs. This is why that kind doctor loves to hum.

C: 不要站着和我说话！
E: Don't talk while standing over me!

C: 所想即所得。
E: What you think is what you will get.

C: 嘘！小点声！
E: Shh! Keep your voice down!

C: 感情厚，喝不够！
E: Let's have another round! To our companionship!

C: 大小钟表匠，王炸！
E: Red and black Watchmakers! Gotcha!

C: 买礼物的人可真多…
E: So many people out here buying gifts, ...

C: 让生活慢下来。
E: Let your life slow down for a while.

C: 我要喝苏乐达！
E: I want to drink SoulGlad!

C: …别的反应。
E: ...Something else.

C: 哎哟，有票看就不错了！要是这次没去上知更鸟的演唱会，之后有你后悔的。
E: Hey, you should be grateful we've even got tickets! You'll definitely regret it if you miss Robin's concert!

C: 克、克劳迪娅小姐！啊啊啊——是活的克劳迪娅小姐！
E: C—Claudia! Oh my god! It's Miss Claudia in the flesh!

C: 这些乱象终会被斧正。在此之前，我们应当保持对{RUBY_B#「同谐」}神主{RUBY_E#}道路的坚定。
E: This chaos will all be righted eventually. Until then, we must maintain our resolution to the path of the {RUBY_B#"Harmony"}Great One{RUBY_E#}.

C: 这属于商业机密…
E: That's a trade secret...

C: 我在家的时候老是失眠，来这儿之后好了很多…一沾枕头就困……
E: I had a hard time sleeping when I was at home. My condition has improved since I came here... I get drowsy as soon as my head hits the pillow...

C: 目前还在搜查中…姐，咱们这儿请的都是家族的贵客，您体谅下，怕得罪人，搜查不易啊！
E: The search is still in progress... Madam, everyone here an esteemed guest of The Family — Please cut us some slack. We're having a hard time with the search because we don't want to offend any of them!

C: 别吵别吵……
E: Don't bug me...

C: 也就翻了三倍吧！
E: Only threefold, that's it!

C: 不知道，等见到问问吧。
E: I don't know. Let's ask when we meet them.

C: …文学社。
E: ...A literature club.

C: 呼…喊出来后舒服多了啾。
E: Phew... I feel much better after yelling it out, tweet.

C: 你怎么还会核嗓的？
E: How'd you know how to do a death growl?

C: 「窥梦电话」是什么？
E: What is a "Dreampeek Call"?

C: 叮铃铃——感谢您使用窥梦电话服务！欢迎您下次再来！
E: *ring* Thank you for using the Dreampeek Call service! Please come back next time!

C: 「窥梦电话」是什么？
E: What is a "Dreampeek Call"?

C: 这一世，我发誓要夺回属于自己的一切……
E: In this new life, I vow to reclaim what is rightfully mine...

C: 在我哥这个大学者眼里，我写的这些穿越、逆袭之类的爽文不够入流。要是被他知道了，肯定又要说这种冒险故事有悖于瑟希斯的理性精神，会触犯泰坦之怒。
E: My brother, the great scholar, thinks my made-up stories about underdogs and reincarnation are indecency. If he found them out, he'd probably say that they don't match Cerces' notion of rationality and could provoke the Titans.

C: 不信仰瑟希斯不就好了？
E: Why not just give up your faith in Cerces?

C: 这种紫纱最早起源于自东方的皮利亚城邦，那里的农户会专门喂养一种能吐丝的柞虫。他们将虫丝纺织成纱料，然后用螺旋贝制成的特殊粉末将它们染成紫色。
E: This purple silk originally came from the city-state of Pyria in the east. Farmers there specialized in raising a unique worm that produced silk. They spun the strands into silk and dyed it purple using a special powder from spiral shells.

C: 身为一名厨师，我非常乐意虚心听取食客们的意见，但前提是绝对不可以糟蹋食物。
E: As a chef, I really appreciate hearing what customers think, as long as they show respect for food.

C: 比起其它秘酿的繁琐制作流程，它只需要一个极为简单的仪式，就能通过法吉娜的赐福快速得到救命的良药——不但洁净无害，甚至含有人体必需的营养成分……
E: Unlike other brews with elaborate manufacturing processes, this one's a life-saving medicine that can quickly invoke Phagousa's blessing with an extremely simple ritual. It's safe, clean, and even packs essential nutrients...

C: 毕竟，您眼中的世界倘若如此散乱，实在不符合美观。我已尽力效劳。
E: After all, if the world you see is in such disarray, it would hardly be beautiful. I've done my best to assist.

C: 「先入为主」对于新信息的理解影响显著…你很难在短时间内向别人解释清楚你就是{NICKNAME}…当然这没关系，{RUBY_B#海洋之泰坦}法吉娜{RUBY_E#}的神威很快就过效了。
E: "First impressions" can significantly influence how new information is understood... It's hard to convince others in a short time that you're {NICKNAME}... but that's fine, the power of {RUBY_B#Ocean Titan}Phagousa{RUBY_E#} will soon wear off.

C: 嗨，这不就是自己骗自己，下次还要再喝这什么破盲盒嘛。
E: Hey, isn't this just fooling myself? Why should I drink that Blind Box again?

C: 好呀，欢迎你随时再来，年轻人。
E: Sure! You're always welcome here, young one.

C: 你剥开紧实光滑的果皮，只见颗颗红宝石般的饱满籽粒堆叠镶嵌，好似某种别致的工艺品。
E: You peel back the smooth and tight skin, revealing the ruby-red seeds neatly arranged like an intricate artifact.

C: 好在，没有浪费。野生大地兽，被吸引来了，现在住在城里。
E: Good thing it wasn't wasted. It attracted wild dromas, and now they live in the city.

C: 就算长棍面包在{RUBY_B#大地之泰坦}吉奥里亚{RUBY_E#}沉睡之时踪迹难寻，{RUBY_B#海洋之泰坦}法吉娜{RUBY_E#}也一定会为我们颁赐甜蜜的戚风蛋糕。
E: Even though baguettes are hard to find while the {RUBY_B#Earth Titan}Georios{RUBY_E#} slumbers, rest assured, because the benevolent {RUBY_B#Ocean Titan}Phagousa{RUBY_E#} will certainly bless us with their sweet chiffon cakes.

C: 算了吧。
E: Forget it.

C: 是啊，每个人都有稚趣盎然的时候，但终究会随着{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}的步伐流逝，只存于追忆之中。
E: That's right. We were all young. However, those days shall eventually pass with the march of {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#} to exist only as memories.

C: 呵…看来你和奥赫玛的居民们一样，都很喜欢吾师。她们确实是黄金裔中最受奥赫玛平民欢迎者，平日里热衷于与街坊打交道，帮人们解决生活中的疑难琐事。
E: Hah... I see you are just as fond of my teachers as the citizens of Okhema are. They indeed enjoy enormous popularity among the people of Okhema. They spend their days deeply committed to communicating with their neighbors and helping people with both great troubles and trivial affairs.

C: 我自幼离乡，虽流淌着一脉相承的悬锋之血，但对那座王都没有那么眷恋。
E: I left my hometown at a young age. Though I carry the blood of Castrum Kremnos, I bear no affection for that kingdom.

C: 就讲这么多吧。如果你有兴趣，也可去找那些真言狮口再问些悬锋孤军的事迹。不过切勿轻信——那群家伙最爱东拼西凑、搬弄是非。
E: That is all I will say for now. If you are interested, you can go to those Verax Leos and ask about the achievements of the Kremnoan Detachment. But do not trust their every word... They love to piece together stories to stir the pot.

C: 你在祈祷什么？
E: What were you praying for?

C: …黑潮来的时候，我正在给花园浇水。谁知道那会是最后一次照看那些薄暮玫瑰呢。
E: ...When the black tide came, I was watering the garden. Who knew that would be the last time I tended to those dusk roses...

C: 这杯水是由法吉娜虔诚的信徒——我最好的朋友为我准备的，她在每个晨露初现的时刻向法吉娜祈祷，经过复杂的仪式，才能得到宝贵的「祝福」，庇护我的口舌永不打结。
E: That glass of water was prepared for me by my friend, a devout disciple of Phagousa. Every morning when the dew hits, she completes a complicated ritual and prays to Phagousa to receive this precious "blessing." The blessing protects me from ever becoming tongue-tied on stage.

C: 如果你能在复杂的人际关系中有一些独特的技巧，或许你就能改变自己的生活——又或者，你能改变的不仅仅是你个人的生活。而这，正是奥赫玛的魅力所在。
E: If you have a unique skill for navigating complex social relationships, there is a chance that you could transform your entire life... Perhaps you will transform even more than just your own life, too. This is where the true charm of Okhema lies.

C: 这点利衡币您收好，我以后再也不说自己这卖的是什么「西尔菲翁肥皂」了…不过说它是黑潮前的高级肥皂总没错！是我妈妈在自家后院里亲手做的！她过世以后这东西确实绝版了！
E: Take these Balance Coins, and I'll never claim that what I'm selling is Silphion soap ever again... But it's still fine to claim that it's top-notch pre-black tide soap! Homemade by my own mom in the backyard! Now she's passed, this really became something you can never get again, y'know!

C: 哦，这个也算是奥赫玛独特的景致了。
E: Oh, this is another unique worldview native to Okhema.

C: 又到了动物交配的季节…
E: Time for another mating season...

C: 虽然大地兽们最近的表现是有些反常，但不管怎么说，大地兽是吉奥里亚赐予我们的礼物！
E: Despite the dromases behaving a little abnormally these days, they're still our gift from Georios no matter what happens!

C: 目前我正在进行一项课题研究，旨在探讨法吉娜祝福的泉水对植物生长与发育的具体影响。
E: I'm currently conducting a research project into the precise effects of fountain water that has been blessed by Phagousa on plant development and growth.

C: 只要能活下来，战火的淬炼就会把你变成独当一面的老兵。倘若积累了足够的荣耀，你还能得到一面属于自己的盾牌。
E: If you are able to survive, the flames of war will temper you into an elite veteran. If you accumulate enough glory, you will even be granted your own shield.

C: 战斗结束得非常迅速——看似瘦弱的报名官仅用一回合就将那斗士摔倒在地。后者连滚带爬地逃走了，狼狈不堪。
E: The battle is over in an instant — the seemingly feeble officer needs only one stroke to topple that gladiator. The latter stumbles away frantically in retreat, a most miserable sight.

C: 好渴…好渴啊……
E: Parched... So parched...

C: 盆中的水面开始泛起涟漪…翻涌不息…潺潺的水声诉说着喜乐，荡漾的波纹像是小小的浪花，仿佛这方寸也成了汪洋——
E: Ripples start to form in the bowl... rolling endlessly... The murmuring water whispers of revelry, the undulating tidal patterns like tiny waves, like this small space has also become a roiling ocean...

C: 需要畅饮秘酿吗？
E: Need an ambrosia?

C: 你的意思是…就像法吉娜不会迷醉于自己的神力一样…体内流淌着法吉娜血脉的人理应也不会……
E: You mean... just like how Phagousa does not get drunk over their own divinity... those whose bodies course with Phagousa's blood technically also won't...

C: 你很勇敢，再来一口……
E: What courage! Try another sip...

C: 你只好匆匆逃离浴场，留下一只鞋子供人思念……
E: You have no choice but to flee the bath in a hurry, leaving behind a shoe for others to remember you by...

C: 我想跟你聊聊…
E: I'd like to chat with you...

C: …朋友，告别向来尤为艰难。
E: ...Friend, saying goodbye is always hard.

C: 无妨，{NICKNAME}{F#女士}{M#先生}。白日漫漫、长夜无垠，我们还会再见的。
E: It's okay, {F#Miss}{M#Mister} {NICKNAME}. The days are long, the nights are endless, and we'll see each other again.

C: 他连头都没转。
E: He doesn't even turn his head.

C: 亲爱的帕门弥德。请告诉我：你是谁，你从哪里来，向哪里去？
E: My dear Parmenides. Please, tell me: Who are you? Where have you come from? Where are you going?

C: 很好，你的回答极其详尽。那么我又要发问了：你所述说的阿卡索斯城，与我所知的那座城邦是否为同一物？请别急着反驳，仔细思考我的提问。
E: Very good. Such detailed answers. Then allow me to ask you one more thing: This city of Icatus that you speak of... Is it the same as the city that I know of? Do not rush to refute me. Think carefully about what it is that I am asking.

C: 这位朋友，你旁听我们的论辩有段时间了，想必也是位热爱智慧的学者。有兴趣的话，不妨参与到讨论中来，让在场各位都听听你的高见？
E: My friend. You have overheard this dispute for some time. You must be a fellow scholar and lover of wisdom. If you are interested, why not join our discussion? We would all be interested in hearing your view.

C: 但谁能保证我们的想法，不是扎格列斯开的某个玩笑呢？
E: But who can ensure that our thoughts and beliefs are not simply just a trick played on us by Zagreus?

C: （质疑：前提有误。）
E: (Question: Your premise is flawed.)

C: 这样啊，有点可惜…不过这种事，倒也不好勉强你，都怪我太冒昧了。
E: That's a pity... but I shouldn't impose. It was presumptuous of me.

C: 总之，很高兴见到勇士阁下你！后面要是阁下想投喂大地兽，或者单纯想和它们说说话，都可以来找我！
E: It's great to see you, great warrior! If you ever want to feed the dromases or just chat with them, feel free to stop by!

C: 传信石版上的那人说，他是在大家都休息的「幕匿时」看见的。
E: The post on the teleslate said the person saw it during Curtain-Fall Hour when everyone else was resting.

C: 所以，悬锋人都练什么项目？
E: What kind of training do the Kremnoans do?

C: 最近在造什么？
E: What have you been creating recently?

C: 要是我告诉你，一千个光历年来，城门口那些吉奥里亚的图样，实际上最早是艾格勒的故事，你能想象吗？
E: If I told you that the symbols of Georios at the city gates, which have been there for a thousand Light Calendar years, were originally the story of Aquila, could you imagine that?

C: 哈哈，到我这个年纪，最不缺的就是时间。你说吧，年轻人。
E: Haha, at my age, the one thing I have plenty of is time. Go ahead, speak your mind, youngster.

C: 还好，看来母亲教的技巧还没有生疏。
E: Phew, looks like I still haven't lost the skills that Mother taught me.

C: 虽然奇美拉很乐意帮人们干活，但看到它们劳累的样子，我还是有点心疼……
E: The chimeras may be all too happy to help with work, but seeing them so exhausted, I can't help but feel a little sorry for them...

C: …唉，现实如此，由不得人抱怨。至少奇美拉很有用、也很讨人喜欢——这就足够啦。我和你说这些，也不过是一个学者的自怨自艾罢了。
E: ...*sigh* It is what it is, so we can't really complain. At least the chimeras are useful and likable — that's enough. I'm only speaking to you from the capacity of scholarly self-pity.

C: ——嗷呜！
E: ...Awoo!

C: 「世界很简单，但人类很复杂。经过慎重考虑，我决定放弃和人类相处，这可能是我最后一次联系你。老师…再见。」
E: "The world is simple, people, not so much. After a lot of thought, I've decided to stop dealing with humans. This might be my last message to you, teacher. Goodbye."

C: 没啥想听的，算了。
E: Not interested in listening to anything else.

C: 结果现在他们弄了几十只机巧鸟，一天二十四小时在岸边巡逻，见着行为可疑的人就报警，一点机会也不给啊……
E: But now they've deployed dozens of cycranes to constantly patrol the shore, sounding the alarm at any hint of suspicious activity — leaving no opportunity for us.

C: 我至今还记得，当年的圣女大人边吃边称赞的样子，她说，这甜点吃起来很暖心。
E: I still recall how the Holy Maiden once savored these desserts, calling them "heartwarming."

C: 没事没事，你先忙你的吧，这年头能有人愿意听老婆子唠叨已经很难得了。
E: No worries. You carry on with your day. It's rare these days for anyone to care for an old lady's stories.

C: 就拿这埃杜利亚的羽笔来说吧，用的可是艾格勒身上掉落的羽毛！那城邦离得多远啊？让大地兽吃撑了全速赶路，都得从纷争月走到机缘月去。
E: Take this feather pen from Idilia, for instance. Made from feathers shed by Aquila! That city-state is miles away. Even if a dromas gorged itself and ran at full speed, it would have to leave in the Month of Strife and only get there in the Month of Fortune.

C: 唉，虔诚信徒所行之路，总是遍布荆棘啊。
E: Ah, the path of a faithful disciple is always riddled with thorns.

C: 如今，我如愿来到雅努萨波利斯，但却被告知身份不够，无法进入圣殿。幸蒙父母赐我的健硕身躯，得以成为卫士，供奉薪饷的七成给泰坦，继续践行我的信仰。
E: Now, I have come to Janusopolis as I wished, but was told I am not eligible to enter the sacred temple. Fortunately, my robust physique allowed me to become a guard, dedicate seventy percent of my salary to the Titans, and continue the practice of my faith.

C: 早有预谋是吧？
E: So you've been planning this, eh?

C: 唯有蝶，向来无需我耗费心力——
E: Only Cas has never needed my concern —

C: 阿那克萨戈拉斯，我与他积怨已久，也原以为这样一位渎神的学者会一直是逐火之旅的阻力。
E: I've held a grudge against Anaxagoras for a long time, and I once thought that such a heretical scholar would always be a hindrance on the Flame-Chase Journey.

C: …呼，抱歉，我有些失态了。近来，我的状态总不大好。
E: ...Phew, sorry, I lost my composure. I haven't been feeling well lately.

C: 很久很久以前，在艾格勒的空中堡垒里，生活着不同部族的空中子民。
E: Long ago, in Aquila's sky fortress, there lived Sky denizens from various tribes.

C: 唔…实在想象不到，棺材该怎么用于治疗……
E: Hmm... I really can't imagine how coffins could be used to cure people...

C: 想找你聊聊天。
E: I want to chat with you.

C: 有的搭档，有的。预言中的黄金裔当然不止一个了，一共有十二位，都是能够归还火种、承袭泰坦神权的英雄。
E: Yes, partner, there are. The prophecy speaks of way more than one — twelve Chrysos Heirs in total, each a hero capable of returning the Coreflames and inheriting the divinity of the Titans.

C: 你坐下，群星般的光芒在你面前荡漾，水波璀璨，空气中仿佛有阵阵回响。
E: As you sit down, the light of the stars begins to ripple before you, the waves shine, and the air seems to resonate with echoes.

C: 都怪我选专业的时候光顾着看哪个老师长得帅了。
E: Well, it's my fault for choosing a major just because the professor was good-looking.

C: 那是一座看不见的城市，但她是我们灵魂的的永恒归宿…我有生之年最大的愿望，就是以自己的家乡为原型，创造一部永世流传的伟大戏剧。
E: It's an invisible city, one that serves as the eternal resting place for our souls. My greatest wish in life is to create a timeless play inspired by my homeland.

C: …啊，难道你其实没有石板？难道你…其实没想要我的签名？难道我…自作多情？
E: Wait, don't tell me you don't even have a teleslate? You... you didn't actually come for my autograph? Was I... imagining things?

C: 先不聊了，祝你好运。
E: I gotta run. Good luck with everything.

C: 诗人父亲在临终前询问自己的诗人儿子，「告诉我，亚历山大，凭着你的灵魂和良心，你相信我死后所有的作品仍将流传下去吗？」
E: Before his death, a poet asked his poet son, "Tell me, Alexander, on your soul and conscience — do you believe my works will be passed on after I die?"

C: 「{NICKNAME}下线了。」
E: "{NICKNAME} Has Gone Offline."

C: 讲讲英年早逝的人…
E: Those that died young...

C: 哎，马尔库斯…我现在渐渐理解他了…也许他真的能听到某些神秘的呼唤吧，只可惜……
E: Ah, Marcus... I'm starting to understand him now... Maybe he really can hear some mysterious calls. It's just a shame...

C: 我们已经吹响了集结的号角，但愿更多士卒和民兵赶来后，能让我们有一丝喘息的时机。
E: We've sounded the call to arms. With any luck, reinforcements will arrive soon and we might finally have a moment to breathe.

C: 又见面了，{NICKNAME}阁下。你看上去还挺精神的。找我有什么事？
E: Well, hello again, {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}. You're looking rather spirited. What brings you here?

C: 外加「金织」女士离世、万帷网崩溃，战线间信息传递相当迟缓，给我们的战斗带来了相当大的麻烦。
E: And with Lady Goldweaver gone, and the World Wound Web collapsed, information barely travels between battle fronts, creating considerable difficulties for our efforts.

C: {RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}，你究竟是为何要抛下我们！为什么你会无动于衷啊！
E: {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#}, why have you deserted us! How can you stay silent!

C: （…倒是符合他们的人设。）
E: (...Well, but it does fit their character.)

C: 您居然和老师开了同样的玩笑…莫非这是某种黄金裔之间才懂的暗喻？
E: You actually made the same joke as my teacher... could this be some kind of metaphor only understood between the Chrysos Heirs?

C: 夺得了天空的火种。
E: We took the Coreflame of the Sky.

C: 金丝在人台周围凝聚，构成了一个包裹它身体的茧。
E: Golden threads gather around the mannequin, forming a cocoon that envelops its body.

C: 哈哈…我恐怕很长时间都没法帮你和老妈收麦子了啊。
E: Haha... I'm afraid I won't be around to help you and Mom harvest for a long while.

C: 瞎操心。我俩身体结实得很，就算少了你，咱这个家日子还是照样过……
E: Don't worry about it. Your mother and I are still strong as a pair of oxen. Even without you, we'll keep this household running just fine...

C: 没关系，就算决定不离开也无所谓，我都会支持你的想法。冒险能增长见识，但留下来过平稳的生活也是种选择。
E: But it's okay. Even if you decide to stay, I'll still support you. There's value in adventure, yes — but living a quiet, steady life is also a choice worth making.

C: 是不是觉得身体被旋律洗涤，心灵轻盈地就要飞了起来？
E: Can you feel the melody washing over you? Like your soul's about to take flight?

C: 然后，还有等待。等待预言实现，等待命运真的降临我们身边——等待是最重要的工作哪。
E: And above all, there's the waiting. Waiting for the prophecy to come true. Waiting for fate to draw near. Waiting, you see, is the most important job of all.

C: 这是…屋檐上的灰尘。迷，为料理增添了几分岁月的沉淀。
E: This is... dust from the rooftop. Memi, a sprinkle of time's essence added to the stew.

C: 这位{F#少女}{M#少年}，我看你双眼炯炯有神，来玩个游戏吧！
E: You there, {F#young lady}{M#young man}, those eyes are shining bright! Let's play a game, shall we?

C: 预言中还提到「风铃」和旋律，也许与这只勾着风铃的若虫相关。
E: The prophecy mentions a "wind chime" and melody too. Perhaps it's related to this nymph carrying a wind chime.

C: 哈哈，这也是没办法的事。我们还要留些经费供来日军用，毕竟还有好几个泰坦得讨伐呢。
E: Haha, it can't be helped. We still need to save some funds for the forces in the coming day. We do have several Titans to deal with, after all.

C: 给我增设些垃圾桶吧。
E: How about you add some trashcans for me.

C: 比起听聒噪的狮子脑袋喋喋不休，眼下毫无疑问还有更重要的事好做。
E: You undoubtedly had more important things at hand, than listening to a chatty lion's rambling.

C: 没见过这么大的吊灯吧？差点把我砸死嘤……
E: Ever see a chandelier this big? It nearly crushed me, eep...

C: 好奇怪的墙，像是一夜之间冒出来的一样。它的背后到底有什么呢？好好奇啊……
E: What a strange wall, it's as if it had appeared overnight. I wonder what lays behind it? I'm so curious...

C: 衣匠接过记忆残晶，将它投入汹涌的洋流。
E: The Garmentmaker receives the Memory Crystal Shards and casts them into the surging current.

C: 不会吧，你难道怕生？哦，哦！我知道了，是不是过敏？听说因为它们所包含的生物信息繁杂，这种事还挺常发生的…
E: Huh, are you afraid of unknown creatures? Ooh, ooh, I know, you're allergic to them? I hear it's because they have a complicated genome, making the allergy of yours fairly common...

C: 大哥哥唱的…真的是命运吗？听上去好悲伤啊……
E: Is he really... singing about destiny? It sounds so sad...

C: 大哥，是你说这份工作能见到圣女大人，可这都过了多少个月，我连影子都没见着呢。
E: Well, you promised me that this job would let me meet the Holy Maiden, but it's been months, and I haven't seen even a glimpse of her.

C: 咕咕——是你呀，了不起的新同学。
E: Hoot hoot... It's you, the distinguished new student.

C: 阿德勒_日常
E: Adler_ daily

C: 这些思想实验可以锻炼大家的思维，同时也能让我更加了解大家，与科员们相处。
E: Thought experiments can exercise people's mental capacity and help me understand them. It helps me to get along with the researchers.

C: 来到空间站的人，本就有一些是失去了家园的流离之辈。空间站对于他们而言，就是第二个家园。
E: Some people came to the space station because they lost their homes. The space station is like their second home.

C: 黑塔•万有应物科？
E: Herta Department of Implement Arts?

C: 但这些都不重要！重要的是，袭击发生后的现在空间站会发生什么样的改变！
E: But none of this matters! The only thing that matters is the changes brought to the space station by this attack!

C: 虽然辛苦，但是多复习几次，肯定不会再出错了。
E: Although it's hard, I believe practice makes perfect.

C: 在空间站的无数奇物藏品中，生命其实不止存在于人类这个载体。
E: Among the countless Curio collections of the space station, life does not only exist in the human receptacle.

C: 什么，你说现在也是工作时间？你这人还真是意料之外的死板。工作时间与非工作时间，难道是被时间表框定的吗？你这样的人很容易在三十岁前发际线就跑到头顶上去的。
E: What? Are you saying this is working hours too? You are surprisingly stubborn. Do you think working hours and non-working hours are specified by a timetable? At this rate, your hairline will recede before you turn <unbreak>30</unbreak>.

C: 好威风呀~
E: Looking mighty impressive~

C: 为什么要待在水里…
E: Why stay in the water...

C: 一直充电可真舒服
E: Charging up like this feels so good

C: 感谢你，贵客。我虽仍未找回自己的记忆，但你的付出值得肯定。接下来，我会着手解封众多预言中的一则……
E: Thank you, honored guest. Though I have yet to recover my memories, your efforts shine undimmed. And now, I shall begin to unfurl one of the many prophecies...

C: 贵客若能赠我<color=#dbc291ff>「记忆残晶」</color>，我必将为你献上它们的音讯。
E: If you, dear guest, could bestow upon me a <color=#dbc291ff>Memory Crystal Shard</color>, I shall surely reveal their secrets to you.

C: 当茧褪去时，唯余一块金丝织成的锦缎漂浮在空中。衣匠伸手一挥，它便分作两半，其中一半飞进了你的手里……
E: When the cocoon fades, only a piece of golden brocade remains floating in the air. The Garmentmaker waves a hand, and it splits in two, with one half flying into your grasp...

C: 那也有控制风险的手段，比如，先收一部分定金……
E: Well, there are ways to control the risk, like getting a deposit upfront...

C: 咳，简单来说，就是开一家主题餐厅，另外再定期搞点活动什么的宣传宣传。目前考虑的风格有：奥赫玛、悬锋城、雅努萨波利斯、斯缇科西亚、神悟树庭……
E: *ahem* Long story short, I'm thinking of opening a themed restaurant and promoting it with some regular events. The styles we're considering include Okhema, Castrum Kremnos, Janusopolis, Styxia, Grove of Epiphany...

C: 诸位战士听好，庆功宴还差最后一道食材——谁敢同那悬锋的王一样，去弑杀冥海的霸主，让它曾拍碎巨舰的触手成为我们宴席上的佳肴？
E: Listen up, warriors! Our victory feast lacks one final ingredient. Who dares to follow in the Kremnoan king's footsteps and slay the overlord of the Sea of Souls? Let's turn those ship-crushing tentacles into tonight's delicacy!

C: 好吧，那我也歇一阵子好了。和来自其他城邦的人聊聊，探望故友，在花园里散散步，也不必担忧哪天黎明再也不会到来……
E: Alright then, I'll take a break too. Chat with folks from other city-states, visit old friends, take strolls in the garden... and not have to worry about the dawn never coming again...

C: 至于你，年轻的先生，考虑到你资历尚浅，我建议你还是帮这二位多跑跑腿吧。
E: As for you, mister, with your limited credentials, I think you're best suited as the assistant to these distinguished gentlemen.

C: 黑黄配比七三，门扉时和离愁时各一次，另寻悬锋土。同意？
E: Mix black and yellow at a ratio of 7:3. Use it once during the Entry Hour and once during the Parting Hour. Then find some Kremnos soil. Agreed?

C: …还以为是什么要紧事呢？
E: ...And here I thought it was something important.

C: o((■ω■- )o「桀桀，是{NICKNAME}啊！豹正在进行阳光浴，从前的豹█渴望██吞噬一切，现在不知道为何，我变了███」
E: o((■ω■- )o "Hehe, it's you, {NICKNAME}. I'm basking in the sun. The old me used to be ████ hungered ███ to devour all. But now, I've changed ███ ███ ██████ somehow."

C: 好像嗅到了一丝不妙的味道。
E: I've got a bad feeling about this.

C: 你赢了。许多年以后，人们还记得翁法罗斯的第<unbreak>33550338</unbreak>次永劫回归，和一群酝酿出了「毁灭」欲的小海豹。
E: You win. Years later, people will still remember the <unbreak>33,550,338</unbreak>th Eternal Recurrence of Amphoreus, and those baby seals who birthed the desire for "Destruction."

C: 呃？！糟糕，你给我做局是吧！
E: Huh!? Darn it, you're setting me up!

C: 可以开始练习了！
E: Let's start practicing!

C: 哼哼，那她可算是找对人了。要论经营的智慧，这城里可没人比得过我——就连那个树庭男孩都不行！
E: Heh heh, then she's definitely found the right person. When it comes to business smarts, no one in this city can match me, not even that Grove boy!

C: 如果是白厄，想必会在鉴宝手册那里流连忘返。顺便，我还需要送他一本《如何读懂悬锋城的空气》。
E: If it's Phainon, he'd probably get lost in the appraisal manual. By the way, I should also get him a copy of How to Read the Air in Castrum Kremnos.

C: 诶嘿嘿，是吗？没有吧，没有啦！
E: Hehe, did we now? I don't think so, not at all!

C: 啊！这个，我想到一个口号：「缇宝快递！使命必达！」
E: Ooh! I've got one for that: "Tribbie lives to deliver!"

C: 嗯，对也不对，人家明明是更成长了一些哦。
E: Hmm, yes and no. I've actually grown up quite a bit, you know~

C: 海的那边是什么？已经有答案啦！还是海，广袤无垠的星海。
E: What lies beyond the sea? We've got the answer! More sea! The vast, endless sea of stars.

C: 那么，你希望汲取哪份石板中的力量？
E: So, which tablet's power would you like to tap into?

C: 「永恒圣城」。
E: The Eternal Holy City.

C: 细小的疏漏，数据的赘生…我所不知的专业领域里，有许多描述这类存在的词汇。
E: Tiny oversights, redundant data... There are many terms for such beings in professional fields unknown to me.

C: 谢啦，丹恒。
E: Thanks, Dan Heng.

C: 沟通引发的误会，文化差异造成的敌意，以及心怀不轨的敌人。困难不外乎这几种，但总会有点新花样。
E: No matter what world we were on, some difficulties remain constant — misunderstandings caused by communication, enmity caused by cultural differences, and enemies with malicious intentions. But there is always something new.

C: 总之，是在多年以前，当时我和帕姆受黑塔小姐的委托，去往被遗弃的废墟世界萨尔索图寻找一种被称为「回音玻璃」的材料……
E: Many years ago, Pom-Pom and I were tasked by Herta to go to the abandoned and ruined world of Salsotto, looking for a special material called Cadence Glass...

C: 我找不到，你再帮帮我。
E: I don't know where to look. Help me.

C: （查看一下它的操作面板吧……）
E: (Okay, let me take a look at its control panel...)

C: 你找到了矿车用阻车器。它可以经由巧妙设计的机械结构及时将矿车车轮抱死，防止矿车冲出轨道。
E: You've found the Mine Cart Blocker. Its clever design enables it to prevent any cart from running off the track by clamping its wheels almost immediately.

C: 但凡有点脑子的都早该学会了！操作控制器、换轨道、前进、再操作控制器、然后倒车。这有什么难的？
E: Anyone with any shred of intelligence should have mastered this a long time ago! Operate the controller, change the track, move forward, operate the controller again, and then reverse. Where's the difficulty in that?

C: 如果矿车需要<color=#dbc291ff>装卸地髓</color>的话，就得在<color=#dbc291ff>地髓矿堆旁的泊位</color>进行装卸了。
E: If a mine cart needs to <color=#dbc291ff>load or unload the Geomarrow</color>, it needs to be moved to the <color=#dbc291ff>stop next to the Geomarrow pile</color> first.

C: 行，那你回头再来。
E: Okay. Come back later, then.

C: 老头对我也挺好的。我知道他怕我没个傍身的手艺，将来在这贝洛伯格吃不开，这才把调度矿车的活计传给我了。
E: The old man has been very good to me. I know he's worried that I wouldn't be able to make a good living in Belobog without the right skills. I guess that's why he decided to pass his skills to me.

C: 滴、答……
E: Tick, tock...

C: 要我说，就该把墙面都贴上金子，再用宝石给每个人做床铺——居然没人赞同我？
E: If it were up to me, I'd plaster gold all over the walls, and give everyone a jewel to sleep on... Why is no one agreeing with my brilliant ideas?

C: 滴、答，您看上去真是气宇非凡，想必一定是哪个星球领主或家族高干吧！
E: Tick, tock, now you look like a real big shot! You must be a planetary ruler or some kind of Family boss, right?

C: 刚刚在你修复我的时候，我一直在想自己究竟是真的摆脱了剧团的控制，还是被古怪的积木所操控…但我想明白了，无论有没有积木，我都要坚持做我自己！
E: When you were repairing me just now, I kept wondering if I had really escaped the clutches of the Troupe's control, or I was being possessed by that strange building block... But I understand now — building block or not, I have to keep being myself!

C: 如你所见…我中了对方的陷阱！
E: And as you can see... I fell right into their trap!

C: 哦，我还写了个脚本，可以没日没夜地拦截那些垃圾短信。虽然办法原始了点，但多少也能发挥点作用。
E: Also, I wrote a script to block off those spam messages all day, every day... It's a little primitive, but it'll still be useful to some extent.

C: 你知道监控室变成了街机厅吗…
E: Did you know the monitoring room has become an arcade...

C: 但现在空间站还在恢复期，我不想与此无关的大家有额外的烦心事，所以先别让这件事继续扩散啦，帮我保个密，好吗？
E: But now that the space station is under maintenance, I don't want to add any undue stress to staff who aren't involved. So let's not spread this news yet, okay? Let's keep things hush-hush, alright?

C: 必须教育一下伦纳德。
E: Leonard must be taught a lesson.

C: 啊，站长真是这么说的？太好了，看来我不用引咎辞职了…谢谢你告诉我这些，我一定不会辜负站长的期待！
E: Ah, she really said that? That's great... Looks like I won't have to resign, after all. Thanks for letting me know about all this. I won't let down our lead researcher!

C: 她说她不关心。
E: She said she didn't care.

C: 我来帮忙收集展品了。
E: I'm here to help collect the exhibits.

C: 不过，画是画完了…鄙人总觉得哪里好像欠了些什么。既然您也是懂艺术的，还烦请您给掌掌眼——您觉得，这画作究竟如何？
E: It's finished, but... I can't help but feel like it's missing something, somewhere. Seeing as you're someone who understands art, could you give this a once over? What do you think of this painting?

C: 另外，托我给于尔丹带个话——我们搞艺术的，每一次拖稿都是值得的！别再成天催稿了！
E: By the way, send a message to Uldan for me. We artists procrastinate our art for a reason, and it cannot be rushed! So quit bugging me about it!

C: …不错，不错。想必雷比尼会很喜欢这个名字，就它吧。
E: ...Not bad. I bet Rebini himself would love this name. So be it.

C: 我将如实陈述：她功过参半。
E: I will state the truth: She had both merits and faults.

C: 这不会是真家伙吧？
E: Is this thing real?

C: 一幅摄影作品，记录了铁卫禁区的能源中枢。
E: A work of photography that captures the energy hub of the Silvermane Guard Restricted Zone.

C: 解说词到此结束了。
E: The narration ends.

C: 打招呼的方式挺新颖啊。
E: That's an innovative way of saying hi.

C: 你还和船上的人有过交谈。
E: You had even talked to the people on the starskiff.

C: 其实我还不太确定…
E: Well, I'm not so sure myself...

C: 驭空…驭空，你终于来了。
E: Yukong... Yukong, you're finally here.

C: 我明白。
E: I know.

C: 我先挑了一张在列车上拍的受损相片。你可以先尝试一下，有不明白的再问我吧～
E: I picked out one aboard the Express as our starting point. You can try it first and come find me if you have any questions~

C: （拍摄的目标似乎是十分巨大的东西……）
E: (The photo subject seems to be something enormous...)

C: 电视，好看。
E: TV, good.

C: 但多一个人又有什么关系嘛，作为到处吃喝…咳，外出看诊的名医，我对仙舟各地有什么好吃好玩的地方了如指掌，雇了我可绝不会让你吃亏的！
E: But the more the merrier, right? I go out all the time to see patients, so I know the food establishments around here like the back of my hand. I'm the best tour guide you could hope for!

C: …只记得查宝的广告非常烦人。
E: ...All I know is its Findie ads are really annoying.

C: 来一份「苏打豆汁儿」。
E: I'll have some mung bean soda.

C: 我想帮助金人巷商会，想帮他们守住金人巷，拜托你了！
E: I want to help the Merchant Guild, I want to help everyone at Aurum Alley... please help me help them!

C: 追问
E: (Continue questioning)

C: 商会缺乏上谈判桌的资本。
E: The Guild lacks the necessary capital to get to the negotiating table.

C: 谢谢驭空大人！
E: Thank you, Madam Yukong!

C: …不必了。
希望我们接下来也能合作愉快，各位辛苦了，我还有事就先回码头了。
E: I'll head back to the dock for now. Thanks for all the hard work by the way — hope things work out just as smoothly down the line.

C: 会长，我要是你，我会将个例变成普遍案例。
E: If I were you, Mr. President, I would think of ways to translate the success of that one sample into something that can benefit everyone.

C: 你忘记了斯科特代表了吗？
E: You still remember Skott, right?

C: 这是白露和尚滋味联动！
E: Cool! A Bailu-Spices Supreme crossover!

C: 简而言之，就是尚滋味推出「特色联动套餐」，食客们可以从套餐里获得金人巷购物券。
E: In short, Spices Supreme will release a series of crossover meal deals. Customers get Aurum Alley shopping coupons when they place an order.

C: 我读书少，你帮我想一句口号。
E: We need a slogan to go with the picture. Ugh... I wish I'd read more books. Any ideas?

C: 感觉自己还挺多余的……
E: Sounds like I'm not needed here...

C: 拜托了，就这最后一句了。
E: Last one, please!

C: 别人叫我搬，我就搬了，我也没想到里面装着故障机巧，这件事和我没有关系。
E: I was told to move something, and I did. I had no knowledge of the presence of an ingenium. This matter has nothing to do with me.

C: 再说了，要是以后这里彻底被公司接管了，肯定也没有我的一席之地了。我可以与商会建立正式的合作，不过嘛，需要一个建立信任的过程。
E: Besides, there's no place for someone like me once the IPC swallows up this place. I can draw up a formal treaty with a guild, but you see, it requires a process of building trust.

C: （莫名其妙……）
E: (Beyond words...)

C: 我认为孽物不太能做成食物。
E: I don't think abominations should be used as food ingredients.

C: 看到这孽物腐肉的瞬间，我脑子里闪过了一些灵感，也不能算是一无所获。可是与此同时，我也受到了精神创伤，可能需要休息一下。
E: The moment I saw this abomination, a flash of inspiration struck me and that's not nothing. But then again, I was also traumatized and might just need a rest.

C: 对，就是这个。
E: Yeah, that's it.

C: 辛苦你了{F#小囡}{M#小伙子}。今天的客人很多，一个人在外流浪谋生，肯定很不容易。这点辛苦费你一定要收下。
E: That was some hard work, {F#young lady}{M#young man}. It was a busy day today. Poor thing, life must be hard for a wanderer like you. But worry not, I take care of my employee. Here, take this.

C: 好家伙，报应隔天就到。丹鼎司怀疑我的从业水平，让我再次参加丹士资格考试能力检测。哎，不会再有下次了，随便编一个病症是行不通的。
E: But no good deed goes unpunished. The Alchemy Commission suspected I faked my medical qualification and told me to resit my alchemist exams. Well, it won't happen again. Making up a random name won't work.

C: 「不治之症」是个什么症？
E: What is this "incurable disease"?

C: 你看看这个。
E: Take a look at this.

C: 云骑军出来执行公务，却没有任何正式文件和通知，我为什么要配合你。
E: Cloud Knights out on official business? Then where's the official permit and documentation — why should I listen to you?

C: 没人可以质疑云骑军。
E: Nobody questions an officer of the Cloud Knights.

C: 我会接着送货，并且再也不会遭遇任何一场交通事故。
E: I'll keep making deliveries, and never have another accident again.

C: 要怎么救你？
E: What am I supposed to do?

C: 在它耳边轻声说「下班了」。
E: Whisper "you can get off duty" into its ear.

C: 喏，作为实验助手，我也给你备份了一下这段时间我写的实验报告。不可商用，但作为其他研究用途是没问题的。
E: Look, I've put together some copies of the research I've done recently. You can have these, but they're for research purposes only, not for commercial use.

C: 你，你别吓我啊！
E: D—Don't scare me!

C: 一脚下去，只有蓬松的积雪，并没有踢到什么实际的东西。
E: You kick the Snow Drift and only find purchase on soft, fluffy snow. There is nothing solid in there.

C: 反正这里不是博物馆…
E: This isn't the museum anyway...

C: 没听过。
E: No idea.

C: 根据我的「小宇宙时间隧道」理论，宇宙是多个相互关联的平行实体。
E: My small universe time tunnel theory holds that the universe consists of multiple interconnected entities that are running in parallel.

C: 你这个理论我知道。
E: I know about your theory.

C: 精彩！打得太精彩了！我都不困了！
E: Wow! This is interesting! I'm not even sleepy anymore!

C: 那个异常现象变成了你！
E: That anomaly turned into you!

C: 这是匹诺康尼最经典的传统小吃之一。传闻这种做法最早诞生于大逐梦时期，由伟大逐梦客「钟表匠」发明：在物质匮乏的梦境开拓时代，一份切片蛋糕就是劳动后最好的犒劳。
E: It's one of Penacony's most classic traditional snacks. Legend has it that this method was originally created during the age of the Great Dream Expedition by the renowned Dreamchaser known as the Watchmaker. In a time when resources were scarce during dream exploration, a slice of cake served as the ultimate reward after a day's labor.

C: 大量物资源源不断地送进了临近的分区：食物、武器、服装…当然，还有最重要的苏乐达。
E: A steady flow of supplies that include food, weapons, clothing, and most importantly, SoulGlad is provided to the neighboring division.

C: （哦呀，密钥居然被藏在了折纸小鸟身上？真是令人意想不到呢~）
E: (The key is hidden on that origami bird! How unexpected!)

C: 你还挺有文采的。
E: He's quite eloquent, huh?

C: 再稍等我一会儿。
E: Please wait for me.

C: 这些迷宫，好像变得越来越复杂了……
E: These mazes... They're getting more and more complicated...

C: 明明这么纯情…
E: You're pure and innocent deep down...

C: 不用着急，我就在这等你。
E: No need to rush. I'll be here waiting for you.

C: 汪！我们是有很重要的事要去做哇！
E: Woof! We've got something super important to do!

C: ——怎么回事？
E: ...What's going on here?

C: 没有威吓的意思，但或许各位可以给鸢尾花家系一个面子？
E: I don't mean to intimidate, but perhaps you could do the Iris Family a favor?

C: 汪…没有责怪你的意思哇。
E: Woof... I didn't mean to blame you.

C: 你一路走来，不断前进，不断发生意外，不断做出选择…这跟「强手棋」很相似，在我的诠释下，「遥祝启程」就变成了这样。
E: On your journey, you have continued to press forward, encountered unexpected moments, and made countless choices... It's much like Cosmodyssey. Through my interpretation, the Graced Voyager has turned out this way.

C: 听起来，你之前来过列车？
E: It sounds like you've been on the Express before?

C: 初次见面，你比我想象的要年轻不少。
E: Pleased to meet you. You are much younger than I thought.

C: 这人是谁啊？
E: Who is this person?

C: 您一定是一位充满好奇心、观察力敏锐、极具谋略与智慧的选手！
E: You strike me as a contestant who has keen curiosity, astute powers of observation, and is full of tactics and intellect!

C: 传说中，热砂会场的建造者在不为人知的地方藏了宝物，等待着像您这样优秀的选手去发现。
E: Legends speak of how Scorchsand Hall's builders concealed a treasure within its walls, awaiting discovery by an exceptional contestant like yourself.

C: 可恶……
E: Darn it...

C: （出示「钟表匠」的礼帽）
E: (Present the Watchmaker's hat)

C: 「钟表匠」没画第五部？
E: The Watchmaker didn't create the fifth film?

C: 他来不了。
E: He can't make it here.

C: 对了，倒是你们两个，怎么认识的？
E: By the way, how did the two of you meet?

C: 天哪，他还好吗？！
E: Oh my goodness! Is he doing okay?

C: 等我一会儿。
E: Give me a moment.

C: 快看，是钟表小子的新电影！
E: Look! That's Clockie's latest film!

C: 滴答，是石头老板的手下！他们正在看守着苏乐达，快把他们干掉吧！
E: Tick-tock, it's Boss Stone's lackeys! They're guarding SoulGlad. We have to get rid of them quick!

C: 嗷嚎两声就有片酬，当狗就是好！
E: All I hafta do is woof like a dog to get paid — it's awesome playing a dog!

C: 皮斯先生跟我提过您——久仰大名，我来自苏乐达™的宣传部门，正好与您聊聊本次的广告方案——<color=#dbc291ff>《爱汽水的钟表小子》</color>！
E: Mr. Pisce mentioned you — it's an honor to finally meet you! I'm from the SoulGlad™ Advertising Department, just here to chat with you about the current commercial proposal — Bubbly Clockie!

C: 请跟我前往放映室吧——我来带你看看「钟表匠」先生留下的作品。考虑到您也许是第一次接触<color=#dbc291ff>剪辑</color>，我会引导您进行一些基础操作。您准备好了吗？
E: Please follow me to the theater... I'll show you the work Mr. Watchmaker left behind. Seeing that this is your first time doing any <color=#dbc291ff>editing</color>, I'll guide you through the basics. Are you ready?

C: 许多观众对《美梦往事》翘首以盼，让我们继续剪辑的工作吧！
E: Many fans look forward to Dreamjoy Memoir. Let's keep up the editing!

C: 好吧，让咱换个版本——
E: Cool, let's shake it up a little...

C: 为了搞清楚哈努努到底是何许人也，我收集了很久的信息，但却调查出了三个截然不同的说法！
E: I spent a long time gathering up info to find out what kind of person Hanunue actually was, but I somehow turned up three different stories!

C: 非常感谢大家的支持。
E: Thank you very much for all of your support.

C: 朋友，谨慎是好事儿——但也可能让你错过许多乐子！
E: My friend, caution is a good thing — but it can also make you miss out on a whole lot of fun!

C: （…银河好人，或许平平淡淡才是真。）
E: (...A cosmic altruist. Maybe it's for the best if they're someone ordinary.)

C: 那盘录像带就在沙发上，麻烦你了，我们的盛会巨星！
E: That tape is on the sofa. O, our heroic Festive Superstar, please save us.

C: （心灰意冷地离开）
E: (Leave dejectedly)

C: 快起来啦…没有人靠磕头打商战的吧……
E: Get up! No one wins a trade war by kowtowing...

C: 前方一共有三座舞台，每座舞台上都有一场挑战。挑战的敌人都是电影《逐梦往事》中的反派角色。干脆利落地打倒敌人，创造新的记录吧！
E: There are a total of three stages up ahead, each with their own challenges. The enemies you will contend against are antagonists from the film Once Upon a Time in Dreams. Defeat them swiftly and decisively to set a new record!

C: 无论多么漫长的战斗，你都坚持了下来，打倒这位强敌，便能峰回路转，迎来成功！
E: No matter how lengthy the battle, you always persevere. Topple this powerful opponent, and the tides will turn, paving a way to success!

C: 「天哪，我第一次看见你蹲下。」——你很想对筑梦绅士这么说，但根据人物设定，你现在只能发出一声很酷的*哼*作为回应。
E: "Gosh, this is the first time I've ever seen you crouch down." You really want to say this to the Dreamweaver Gentleman, but given your character's design, you can only respond with a cool *hmph*.

C: 你们也和其他挑战者一样，想要深入我的内心吗？那就请进吧。但你们不会有任何收获…因为我只是一个失败品。
E: You guys are just like the other challengers. You want to enter my inner self? Then please, be my guest. But you won't find anything worthwhile... I'm just a failed piece.

C: 事已至此，只好使用「钟表把戏」了——
E: Since it's come down to this, I'll have to use Clockwork...

C: 谢谢你，钟表小子…如果不是你，我永远也无法像这样好好地和人交流——是你帮助我重新认识了我自己！
E: Thank you, Clockie... If not for you, I'd never be able to connect with people like this — you helped me find myself again!

C: 不客气，身为美梦小镇的守护者，这是我应该做的！
E: No problem at all! As the guardian of Dreamville, it's what I'm here for! Tick-tock!

C: 你确信其中有一个就是那位失踪的包裹安检员。另外一个，应该是本应在此处的引导员。
E: You are certain that one of them is that missing package inspector, while the other should be the local guide.

C: 亲爱的主角，这部影片即将结束，感觉如何？
E: Beloved protagonist, the end to this film will soon arrive. How do you feel?

C: 希望你不会将自己演绎成如此无趣的作品，我的镜头会继续注视着你…不要辜负我，更不要辜负我们的观众。
E: I hope you won't give such a boring performance. My lens is upon you... Don't let me down. And more importantly, don't let the audience down.

C: 既然是无名的英雄，没人记得他的名字也很正常啊。
E: Well, if he's a nameless hero, then it seems perfectly normal that no one should remember his name.

C: 「芮克先生」
E: "Mr. Reca"

C: 我该怎么做？
E: What should I do?

C: 你还搜集了哪些末日的忆泡？
E: What other Memory Bubbles of the apocalypse are in your collection?

C: 不过，关于烛墨学派的公开数据库，那位先生其实弄错了一点。我和这批资料的接触时间，比他想象中要早上许多。
E: However, regarding the public database of the Candelagraphos, that gentleman was mistaken about one thing: I had come into those documents much earlier than he presumed.

C: 哪怕蝴蝶的翅膀足以撼动飓风，它的美丽也需草木点缀。在你测试期间，我借用「差分宇宙」的资源为晖长石号 / 开拓之尾号 / 塔塔洛夫号 / 飞翔时针号大厅增添了些许装饰。
E: Even if the wings of butterflies can sway a hurricane, its beauty needs to be adorned with foliage and flora. During your test, I borrowed the Divergent Universe's resources and spruced up The Radiant Feldspar / The Trailblaze's Stern / The Tatalov / The Soaring Clock Hand lobby.

C: 三月小姐天资聪颖，有学剑的天赋。
E: You're definitely talented, Miss March.

C: 「要想击倒对方，最好的办法就是用爆能枪。」我在幻戏里听过类似的话！大侠还说习剑能将人的体能推向最高的极限。
E: "The best way to take down your enemy is with a blaster gun." I heard a hero say something like that in an immersia! He also mentioned that sword training can push a person's physical abilities to their ultimate limit.

C: 时间回到三月七与斯科特立下赌约之后。\n三月七需严格按照日程练习剑术，十五日内通过三次试剑……
E: Time rewinds to when March 7th made the bet with Skott.\nMarch 7th needs to practice swordplay strictly according to schedule and pass three trials in fifteen days...

C: 公司的，你要是动手，就别怪我砸了那些废铁。
E: Make any funny moves, and I'll smash those hunks of scrap metal.

C: 啊，对了，你也别拜师了，就来拜我吧，我来教你开机甲！
E: Oh, and if that's the case, just forget about your master and become my apprentice instead! I'll teach you how to pilot a mech!

C: 你怎么就断言我肯定没问题…
E: How can you be so sure about me...?

C: 解开工巧机关？
E: Unlock an ingenious enigma?

C: 我得让父老乡亲们听个明白，今天在这里学小畜生的，不会是我，而是你——！
E: They'll see that it won't be me squealing like a pig today, but YOU!

C: 什么意思嘛，我本来就是练武的奇才。
E: What'd you mean, huh? I'm a born martial genius.

C: 老子提出的建议不错吧。
E: My idea's pretty decent, eh?

C: 什么人会在家里点绿灯啊？他们家真的蛮不正常的。
E: Seriously, who lights a green lantern in their house? Those guys must be nuts.

C: 7、8年了吧？怎么了？
E: Around seven or eight years? Why?

C: 我们一起工作了这么多年，竟然才发现老家离得那么近，哈哈，你说离谱不离谱。
E: We've been working together for so long, and I just realized our hometowns are so close to each other. Haha, talk about a coincidence.

C: 此药名唤「押不芦」，只消吃上三钱，就能屏蔽人体感官，让人不觉疼痛。
E: Here, this medicine is named "Yabruh." A tiny dose can numb the body's senses and alleviate any sensation of pain.

C: 来，把你的剑给我。
E: Here, give me your sword.

C: 不能，恰恰相反，在将我接入您的武器时，银狼粗糙的焊接技能使得剑体的抗冲击性能下降了百分之十二。
E: Quite the opposite, actually. When Silver Wolf installed me into your sword, her terrible welding skills reduced the sword's impact resistance by <unbreak>12</unbreak> percent.

C: 我是不是听到她的剑在说话？是幻觉吗？
E: Did I just hear her sword talking? Are my ears playing tricks on me?

C: 精彩，第一次看到斯科特才说三两句话就被激怒了。
E: Wow, you really got under Skott's skin with just a few words.

C: 你再好好想想，你把公司当作家，公司有把你当作家人吗？你爱公司，那公司爱你吗？
E: Think about it. You consider the IPC your family, but does the IPC consider you a family member? You love the IPC, but does the IPC love you back?

C: 不夜侯的小老板娘梦茗，她辛苦地备好茶水，安排好桌椅，就是为了让你我这样身不由己的打工人能够适当休息，找回属于自己的生活！
E: Mengming, the owner of the Sleepless Earl, went to great efforts to set up her shop, all so that workers like us can catch a break and find some joy in our lives!

C: 青雀当面批驳了斯科特小人得志的想法，并让他重新认识到劳动者应为自己创造价值。
E: Qingque directly refutes Skott's idea of petty success and re-acquaint him with the idea that laborers should create value for themselves.

C: 唔，既然三月小姐有心求药，下次见面的时候，我会带来你想要的「灵丹妙药」，你可千万不能拒绝呀。
E: Mm, since you're earnest in finding the right medicine, the next time we meet, I shall bring you the miracle elixir you want. You'd better not reject me then.

C: …那我吃下这些就能提升剑术功力了吗？
E: ...Then will my swordplay improve if I eat all of this?

C: 哦，这不是{NICKNAME}吗，三月七小姐也在这里，你俩还真是形影不离。
E: Oh, isn't this {NICKNAME}. Miss March! You're here too. You two really are inseparable.

C: 公输公输…别忘了…阿休……
E: Gongshu... Gongshu... Don't forget... A-Xiu...

C: 阿休…你的…好朋友……
E: A-Xiu... Your... best friend...

C: 你们终于来了…对了，三月七你回去之后没感到什么异常吧？
E: You two are finally back... Oh yes, did you feel anything abnormal after you returned home that day, March 7th?

C: 至少你可以复制「阿休」的以太灵留作纪念。
E: At least you can replicate A-Xiu's Aether Spirit as a keepsake.

C: 当然，前人对武学的开发也是在不断进步的，你瞧瞧这批注——
E: Of course, the martial research of our ancestors was always making progress, look at this note here...

C: 三月，你能穿越时间回到过去？
E: March, can you go back in time to that moment?

C: 幸福是真的，不幸也是真的。
E: Blessings are real, and so is misfortune.

C: 垃圾桶！
E: A trashcan!

C: 我来罗浮仙舟也有一段时间了，对仙舟长生种的漫长生命算是略知一二。他们中许多人在同样的生活模式里循环往复，像是被困在琥珀里的标本。
E: I have been on the Xianzhou Luofu for some time now, and I have a rough understanding of the endless existences of long-life species. Many of them repeat the same life patterns over and over, like samples encased in amber.

C: 哄人的话，你倒是一套一套的，伤人心的事没少干吧！
E: You know how to sweet talk when you need to. You must have broken many hearts in your time!

C: 一阵金光闪过，小桶宝力获得了布洛妮娅的「友谊魔法」。
E: With a bright flash of light, Litter Pony obtains Bronya's Magic of Friendship.

C: （进入战斗）
E: (Enter Battle)

C: 那么我的世界应该已经有一个…被扭曲过的你啦！当然，这一切都只是理论而已，哈哈哈！
E: Then there must be... a distorted version of you that already exists in my world! Of course, this is all purely theoretical, hahaha!

C: 等击退黑影生物后，我想帮玲宝也要一份签绘，你说…宝力先生会答应吗？
E: Once we've defeated these dark shadows, I want to try and get an autographed picture for Lynxy too. Do you think... Mr. Pony will agree?

C: 那倒不是，因为我是智械。
E: Well, not exactly. It's because I'm an Intellitron.

C: 总之，输了赖你。
E: Bah, it'll be your fault if we lose.

C: 我的状态…有些奇怪。刚才我看到那些云骑士兵突然变得张牙舞爪，和一群妖怪似的。
E: I feel... a little strange. I just saw those Cloud Knights grow fangs and claws, like they were demons.

C: 喂，你这人有没有武德？怎么赢了还骂人呢？
E: Hey, show a little sportsmanship! You've already won, so what's with the insults?

C: 且不论战力，认知的差距不是短时间内能被抹平的。
E: Forget strength... even the gap in everyday knowledge isn't something I can get past overnight.

C: 卢卡，你来了啊。
E: Luka, you're here.

C: 陪她玩一局吧，速战速决。毕竟已经让玲可等了我很久了……
E: Play one round with her, and make it quick. I've made Lynx wait for me too long...

C: 你说的对，喊了这么几嗓子，我心里自信多了。
E: Hey, you're right! All that shouting made me feel much more confident.

C: 我可是仔细研究过杰帕德先生的招式的！
E: I've been hard at work studying how Mr. Gepard moves!

C: 别难受了，走吧，我们该去克里珀堡和大守护者见面了。
E: Chin up. Let's go. We should head to Qlipoth Fort and meet with the Supreme Guardian.

C: 就这样，在夕葵小姐的善意之下，我总算没有出师未捷身先死——这句仙舟古话是这几天刚学会的——成功登记成为了演武仪典的参赛选手。
E: And just like that, by the grace of Miss Xikui, I didn't "die before achieving success" — I just learned this old Xianzhou saying a few days ago. I've successfully become a competing fighter in the Wardance!

C: 抱歉，我想…我想一个人待一会……
E: Sorry, I... I want to be alone for a while...

C: 唉…卢卡选手这么沮丧，我们还是先别打扰他了。
E: ...Luka is so depressed. Let's not bother him anymore.

C: 靠你了，尾巴大爷。
E: I'm counting on you, Mr. Tail.

C: 稍等一下。
E: Just a minute.

C: 嗯嗯！卢卡哥哥真的太厉害了！那三个大块头出来的时候，我都吓坏了…结果你还是把他们都打败了！
E: Yeah! You're just too strong! I was so scared when those three big guys came out... But you managed to beat them all!

C: 哈哈哈哈！不行，卢卡哥哥！那是打败坏人时的台词！
E: Hahaha! Not that, Luka! That's the line when you defeat the baddies!

C: 也可能你只是忘记了自己的年龄。
E: Or maybe you've just forgotten your age.

C: 行，你不怪我就行。咱们说第二件事——我想劝你退赛。
E: Okay, glad you ain't mad. Let's get to the second reason — I think you should pull out of the competition.

C: 船舱里的<unbreak>102</unbreak>条人命可不是误会。
E: The <unbreak>102</unbreak> corpses on the ship are no misunderstanding.

C: 丹轮寺…我听过这个寺庙的名字。一群步离人与世隔绝，遵守严苛的戒律，禁止杀生，他们建造了一座躲避战火的寺庙——这听起来比童话还美好。
E: Claretwheel Temple... I've heard of this temple's name. They are a bunch of borisin, isolated from the outside world, adhering to strict commandments and forbidding killing. They've built a temple to escape from the flames of war — this sounds more beautiful than a fairy tale.

C: 奢摩在摇头。我识别了她的表情拓扑结构，那是「哀求」。她不希望我为此破戒。
E: Samatha is shaking her head. I have identified her facial topography — it is one of "pleading." She does not wish me to break my commandment for this.

C: 让我来鉴定一下吧！是他的「铁盾」硬，还是我的「铁臂」更硬！
E: Then let's see if his "iron shield" is tougher than my "iron arm"!

C: 哈哈，等一下就知道了！
E: Haha, we'll find out in a bit!

C: 当然是来看看你的状态啊。你们人类管这叫什么来着？「诊后随访」，对吧？
E: I'm here to check on your condition of course. You humans call this "post-visit follow-up," right?

C: 前排左手边第二位。
E: Front row, second from the left.

C: 没有人雇佣我，这算是我的假期作业，给《水晶日报》投稿。
E: No one hired me. This is my summer assignment: To submit articles for the Crystal Daily.

C: 请这位记者朋友提问。
E: Please ask your questions.

C: 我明白了，比赛还没有彻底结束，还不能透露你的战术目的。
E: I get it. You can't reveal your tactical objectives before the tournament truly ends.

C: 啊？从没考虑过…
E: Ah? I've never considered that...

C: 你直接去问银枝啊…
E: You can go ask Argenti yourself...

C: 对手再次袭来！卢卡选手，你要如何应对！
E: The opponent strikes again! How will Luka react?

C: 卢卡，保持大脑清晰。
E: Luka, keep your head straight.

C: 滚回公司
E: Get your arse back to the IPC.

C: 多拨点预算？哈哈，我喜欢你的幽默。
E: Raise more funds? Haha, you sure are funny.

C: 没错！困难模式当前的速通冠军是银狼小姐！亚军会花落谁家呢？真令人期待啊！
E: That's right! The speedrun champion for hard mode is Miss Silver Wolf! Who will our runner-up be? How exciting!

C: 现在的学生都很有个性呢。和他们接触的时候，总是会怀疑是不是自己的想法过时了。
E: Students now sure have plenty of personality. When I interact with them, I always wonder if I'm outdated.

C: 你是怎么看的呢？
E: What do you make of this?

C: 至于维护流派声名，言传身教，更是在下应尽之责，诸位尽可安心。
E: As for upholding the repute of my school, it is my utmost duty to champion honor with word and action. Please rest easy.

C: 你们觉得这个领队靠谱吗？
E: You sure this leader is reliable?

C: 咦，不应该呀，我以前从来没见过乱破小姐，难道这就是所谓的忍•隐身术？
E: Huh? That can't be right. I've never met Ms. Rappa before. Could it be because of those so-called ninja stealth skills?

C: 虽然…学校那边是有些反对的声音，但不用管他们。那群老师就是什么都看不惯，和他们想法不一样的就要批评。哎呀，谁叫这里是学校呢。
E: Although... there are some voices of objection from the school, but don't mind it. That bunch of teachers just cannot tolerate anything that's different, and they criticize anything that doesn't align with their views. Oh well, that's why it's a school.

C: ——盛会巨星！音乐派对还没有结束哦，特意到舞台旁边来，是有什么事吗？
E: Festive Superstar! The music party hasn't ended yet. Is there something you need since you specifically came by the stage?

C: 佩佩用好奇的眼神望着你，仿佛想问为何你会突然到访。
E: Peppy gazes at you with curious eyes, as if asking why you are suddenly visiting.

C: 或许是某个外来的地下乐队吧，你可以去看看。
E: It could've been a foreign underground band. You can go take a look.

C: 这种心情我也能理解啦。新组建的乐队，名气小，原创曲也少，刚开始都很艰难的。
E: I understand where you're coming from. A newly formed band with little fame and few original songs — starting from scratch is always hard.

C: 回去吧，你的使命不在这里。但要记好了——音乐，是没有差别的！
E: Go back. Your destiny doesn't belong here. But remember — there are no differences in all music!

C: 你们觉得这个领队靠谱吗？
E: You sure this leader is reliable?

C: 作曲啊，也太累了。那个谐乐学院的大小姐或许会有兴趣，但我不喜欢。
E: Composing sounds exhausting. Maybe that Charmony Academy belle would be into that, but I'm not.

C: ——散而重聚，失而复得。悲歌无须慷慨，且看音忍来将对手尽数击败！
E: ...Separation and reunion, becoming lost and found again. Sad songs need not be overwhelming. Watch as the sound ninjas defeat all enemies!

C: 无论出于何种理由，言而有信，信守承诺，乃是忍者的立足之根。
E: Regardless of reason, keeping one's word and honoring promises are the cornerstones of a ninja's creed.

C: 真能阴阳怪气。
E: You sure are passive-aggressive.

C: 就这么说定了！学校应该会派人过来巡视，我可以帮你们望风，但要是真追究起来，这件事和我没关系啊！
E: It's settled then! The school should be sending someone over to observe the show. I'll keep a lookout for you guys, but if word gets out, this has nothing to do with me!

C: ——各位，遇到麻烦了么？
E: Everyone, is there any trouble?

C: 你是…舒翁？鸢尾花家系的…那个躲在梦境酒店里和剧团玩过家家的人？
E: Are you... Siobhan? The one from the Iris Family... hiding in the hotel in the Dreamscape and playing house with the troupe?

C: 乱破忍首——
E: Head Ninja Rappa!

C: 虽然她是被那个外校生带坏了，但不管变成什么样，她都是我最自豪的学生！
E: She may have fallen under the delinquent influence of exchange students, but no matter what, she's my most prized pupil!

C: 接受苏乐达天团永不言败的挑战吧！
E: Accept the SoulGlad Idol Group's never-say-die challenge!

C: 太好了。看起来那只小动物被同伴接纳了，我们应该…是做了件好事吧？
E: That's fantastic. Looks like this little buddy has been accepted by its companions. We probably... have done a good thing, haven't we?

C: 把想要的东西拿到手就好，纠结这种事没什么意义。别想太多了。
E: All that matters is getting what you want. There's no point to hesitation. Stop thinking so much.

C: 支持你们！要顶住压力，坚持自己的风格！
E: We support you! You've got to hang in there and stick to your guns!

C: 哈哈哈哈哈，别在意细节。咱们也是老相识了，你就当再帮我一个忙呗。
E: Hahaha, don't fret on the details. We're all old friends here. How about lending a hand, eh?

C: 嘿，我就知道你是懂行的！
E: Ha, I knew you were a smart one!

C: 咱们做生意，讲究的就是把东边的买卖到西边去。您别说，这迷因在贝洛伯格没啥用处，但换个地还真有人喜欢得不得了。
E: Business people like us are all about buying things from one place and selling them to other places. You might think that this meme isn't working out in Belobog, but someone might actually love it on some other planet.

C: 别来无恙，亲爱的无名客——虽然我们每天都在见面。今天的商品有点特别，你绝对想不到<color=#dbc291ff>火之翎</color>和<color=#dbc291ff>基本食材</color>能变成什么。开始吗？
E: Salutations, my dear Nameless — though we meet every day. Today's product is a bit special. You'll never guess what <color=#dbc291ff>Feathers of Flame</color> and <color=#dbc291ff>Basic Ingredients</color> can be combined into. Shall we begin?

C: 「列车基金」攒了多少了？一个月有多少零用钱？年纪轻轻的，正是奋斗的年纪，别把时间花在休息上。明天和本姑娘一起值日吧！
E: How much is there in the Express fund? How much petty cash do we have in a month? We're all young and sprightly. It's the best time of our lives to be working hard, not wasting our time on breaks. Come with me for Express duty tomorrow!

C: 不是就在他脸上吗？
E: Aren't they on his face?

C: 不过，我以故乡的真实事件为蓝本，制作了几集短篇动画，倒是可以先让你们解解馋。
E: However, using real events that happened in my home as blueprints, I created a few animated shorts. These can probably tide you over for a while.

C: 其实空间站用的是「黑塔特供版」，没有这些广告，我就把这事给忘了…稍等我联系一下经销商，给你们改成特供版就好。
E: But the space station uses the "Special Herta Version" which doesn't have ads, so I forgot about this... Hold on. I'll contact the vendor to switch you guys to the special version.

C: 受风暴影响，邻近宙域将出现空间序列扭曲，并伴有局部高能粒子雨。
E: Due to the storm's influence, spatial sequence distortions will appear in neighboring system spaces, accompanied by localized high-energy particle rain.

C: 护送战争孤儿。
E: Escort the war orphans.

C: 可惜在公司的地盘，就算起诉他们也占不到什么便宜。只能下次多留个心眼了。
E: We're in IPC's territory though. We wouldn't gain anything by indicting them here. Just have to be more prudent in the future.

C: 一个诡异的「玩偶」正紧盯着你。
E: A creepy doll is staring at you.

C: 这个笑话还差点火候，你要继续努力。
E: This joke lacks some fire. You should keep working on it.

C: 没问题，在「业务交流」期间，「炒饭<s>天才</s><unbreak>123</unbreak>号」将鞍前马后，追随「闭嘴」前辈，学习「幽默」的真意！
E: No problem. During this professional exchange, Cooking <s>Genius</s> No. <unbreak>123</unbreak> will be hot on Shush's heels to learn the true meaning of humor!

C: 用取景框对准摄影对象，等相机识别出拍摄目标，再按下快门就行啦。
E: Aim the aperture at the subject, wait for the camera to identify the photo subject, then just hit the shutter.

C: 「报名资料准备就绪。最后一步，填写参赛名。」
E: "Registration information is ready. The last step is to fill in your name."

C: 你和三月七挖地三尺，终于找到了花火娃娃的踪迹……
E: You and March 7th look everywhere you can, eventually finding the trail of Sparkle Doll...

C: 呜啊，什么东西在说话！！！
E: Wahhh!!! Something's talking!!!

C: 「娃娃花火不会受伤」。
E: "Sparkle Doll Takes No Wounds."

C: 知更鸟！知更鸟！
E: Robin! Robin!

C: 藿藿郑重地将「镜头万花筒」收进锦囊，牢牢扎紧袋口。
E: Huohuo solemnly places the Camereidoscope in her pouch and ties it up tight.

C: 云璃姑娘之前冠冕堂皇地声称要带我的剑「修炼」，如今一看，却是跑来偷懒。
E: Miss Yunli grandly claimed that she was going to borrow my sword for "training," but it's quite obvious that she's come here to goof off.

C: 听闻二位摄影技巧了得，彦卿有一事相求——请将这番<color=#dbc291ff>证据</color>拍下，免得到时她又抵赖。
E: I've heard that you two have superb photography skills, so I've a favor to ask — please take a picture of this <color=#dbc291ff>as evidence</color>, so that she can't deny it again.

C: 嘿嘿，多谢两位师傅！奖项会在闭幕式上公布，如果有好消息，一定第一时间向你们报喜~
E: Hee-hee, thank you! The awards will be announced at the closing ceremony. You'll be the first to know if I have good news!

C: 等下…那是…新型号的悬锋战士？！
E: Wait... They're... the new Kremnos Warrior models!?

C: 妙！太妙了！不愧是黄金裔，奥赫玛的大英雄！
E: Wonderful! Simply wonderful! That's a Chrysos Heir for you, Okhema's great heroes!

C: 想扮英雄，又不愿意花钱？奥赫玛哪有这么好的事。
E: You want to play hero and not pay a dime? There's never a free lunch in Okhema.

C: 咦，是因为队伍的表现太过出色，所以吸引了其他小奇美拉来加入吗？
E: Hmm, do other chimeras wish to join because of your squad's stellar performance?

C: 我们队伍组建已经有段时间了，成绩也很不错，各位都是最初就在团队里的资深成员，你们的付出自然不该被忽视，必须好好奖励才行。
E: Our squad has been formed for a while, and we've achieved great results. Everyone here has been with the squad since the start. Your contributions will not go unnoticed, and they must be rewarded.

C: 哎，行吧…{NICKNAME}你就速战速决，彻底让他们死心吧。
E: Alright, {NICKNAME}, just finish this quickly — make sure they understand they don't stand a chance.

C: 恭喜{NICKNAME}选手获得「银盏徽章」，成功晋级！请收下这枚徽章。
E: Congratulations to {NICKNAME} for earning the "Silver Chalice Badge" and advancing to the next stage! Please take this badge.

C: 戳到痛处了？算了，我也给你交个底吧——
E: Did I hit a nerve? Forget it, I'll be honest with you —

C: 这是一件郑重的事情，一年的欢喜月又到了——信仰{RUBY_B#法吉娜}欢宴之神{RUBY_E#}的密底斯泰歇人打算在三季海庭举办一场<color=#dbc291ff>水上狂欢节</color>。
E: This is serious business. It's the Month of Joy once again — followers of {RUBY_B#Phagousa}the God of Banquets{RUBY_E#} from Mythemis are planning to hold a <color=#dbc291ff>Water Carnival</color> at the Court of Seasons.

C: {NICKNAME}选手，你可来了。你听说了吗？最近{RUBY_B#海洋之泰坦}法吉娜{RUBY_E#}的预言被传得沸沸扬扬的，说着什么，「金杯终破碎，无人成冠军」。
E: {NICKNAME}, you're finally back. Did you hear? Lately, {RUBY_B#Ocean Titan}Phagousa's{RUBY_E#} prophecy has been making waves. It went something like, "the golden trophy shatters with no champion."

C: 按照*我们*的想法，与其为预言担惊受怕，不如堂堂正正地摆出来。退一万步，还有阿雅的金线呢！
E: According to our idea, instead of being worried and afraid of the prophecy, display it openly. If all else fails, we still have Agy's golden thread!

C: 不，比赛的冠军还是得通过比赛决出。
E: No, the champion has to be crowned through the competition itself.

C: 解除金线好说，不过奖杯的位置这么显眼，要是不想被人发现我们的动作……
E: Dispelling the golden thread is straightforward, but the trophy is so conspicuous — if we don't want anyone to notice what we're up to...

C: 我们愿意为您提供专属训练、赛车支持和额外奖励，这报名报得多值呀！
E: We're willing to provide exclusive training, race car support, and extra rewards. What a deal this registration is!

C: 你跟我一样，最懂怎么享受生活了——这正是「十三幺」最欣赏的特质。
E: You're like me — a pro at living life. That's what Thirteen Orphans loves most.

C: 你们准备好奖金了吗？
E: Got the prize money ready?

C: 对哦！要是能留在你这里，它岂不是想玩多久就玩多久。
E: Oh right! If it stays here, it can play all day long.

C: 它必须在我的街机厅打工赎罪！
E: It has to work off its crimes at my arcade!

C: 怎么办，{F#姐妹}{M#兄弟}，我可一点都不想变成折纸小鸟啊……
E: What do we do, {F#sister}{M#brother}? I really don't want to turn into an Origami Bird...

C: 哼哼，「匹诺康尼股东亲手调饮」，多有价值的噱头！账账，你也闻到商机的味道了吧？
E: Ooh, "Have your drink mixed by a Penacony shareholder!" Now that's marketing gold! Numby, don't you smell a business opportunity?

C: 马上就来，我的天使投资人。
E: Coming right up, my angel investor.

C: （有些事情不能想得太深…先把名字和效果记录下来吧。）
E: (Better not think too deeply about this... Just record the name and effects first.)

C: 免得你问个不停，我事先作个说明吧。
E: Before you start ceaselessly asking questions, let me explain.

C: 「龙尊角里的力量就是角动量吗？」「岁阳是绿色的是不是能光合作用？」「到底是锤子还是胸口碎的大石？」
E: "Is the power in the high elder's horn just angular momentum?" "Heliobi are green, can they perform photosynthesis?" "Was it the hammer or the chest that smashed boulder slabs?"

C: 而你…有非常大的进步空间。
E: And you... have a great deal of room to improve.

C: 既然你一心求教…我这里有几门课程，只要精熟其中一门，就足以让你受用终生。
E: Since you're so eager to learn... I have a few courses here. Master even one of them, and it'll serve you for a lifetime.

C: （附赠一个冷笑话。）
E: (An eye-rolling joke as a bonus.)

C: 总是声称要拿黑洞作藏品，其实资金预算才是最大的黑洞，早晚要把空间站吞下去。
E: She's always claiming she wants to collect black holes, but the real black hole is the funding budget. Sooner or later, it's going to swallow the entire space station.

C: （暂时离开）
E: (Leave For Now)

C: 这位顾客，久等了！调酒大师花火的倾情巨献，要细细品味哦。
E: Thanks for waiting, dear guest! Here comes a handcrafted masterpiece by your master mixologist Sparkle. Sip it slow.

C: 每个人都能实现自己的梦想汪！
E: Here, anyone's dreams can come true, woof!

C: 我打听到了它的出生年月、星座血型、饮食忌口，将军想听哪一个？
E: I even found its birthday, zodiac sign, blood type, and food allergies. Which one do you want, General?

C: 那还用说，当然是掏一掏咯。
E: Isn't it obvious? Gotta dig in and see what's inside.

C: 最近在控糖…
E: I'm cutting back on sugar recently...

C: <size=36>想都别想！</size>
E: <size=36>Don't even think about it!</size>

C: 不过，每一次未经审批的信息泄露都可能引发轩然大波，我是一个成熟的职场人，对于所有问题，我的答案都只有一个——「无可奉告」！
E: However, every unauthorized information leak could cause a huge uproar. As a seasoned professional, I have only one answer to all questions — "No comment"!

C: 是《曲空间引擎原理》，《真蛰虫显隐基因遗传学》，还是《忆质能量转换方程》？
E: Is it Curved Space Engine Principles, True Sting Larva Dominant-Recessive Gene Genetics, or Memoria Energy Conversion Equations?

C: 还有更重要的事，稍后再来调饮吧。
E: There are more important matters to attend to. We'll work on the drinks later.

C: 当然是来谈一笔大生意的。
E: I'm here to discuss a lucrative partnership, naturally.

C: 我的英明指挥。
E: My brilliant leadership.

C: 呜呜呜，你们不要我了！
E: Boohoo, you don't want me anymore!

C: 托帕和砂金离开了……
E: Topaz and Aventurine left...

C: 就为了这点小事叫我过来啊…
E: You summoned me for this triviality?

C: 「正可谓无巧不成书，这位{NICKNAME}，就恰恰是初代司鼎数千年前所盼望的那位大英雄！」
E: "In a curious twist of fate, {NICKNAME} was none other than the heroic one prophesied by this first Cauldron Master of the Alchemy Commission some thousands of years ago!"

C: 初代司鼎也太狠了…
E: Sheesh, that first Cauldron Master was ruthless...

C: 幻戏做不到的我能说，幻戏不敢编的我能说。反正吹牛不上税，说出来的话就像一阵风……
E: I can say all the stuff they can't do in immersia. And I can say what they don't dare say in immersia. Anyway, there's no tax on bragging, and words have a habit of disappearing like the wind...

C: 可惜啊！经此大难之后，我的转世之身又要重新干起了……
E: What a pity! After this disaster, my reincarnated body has to keep working...

C: 你身上…有那可恶的龙尊的气息…可恶啊啊啊啊！我好恨啊啊啊啊！
E: You... You have the stink of that cursed high elder about you... How terrible! I hate it so much!

C: 你们也体谅一下我的苦衷…我都五百多岁了，身体不长个，我就只能一直演些孩童角色啊。
E: Please also try to understand what a difficult situation I'm in here... I'm already five hundred years old, but I've stopped growing, so child roles are all I can do.

C: 我对你的编剧才能感到绝望…
E: There's no saving grace for your screenwriting skills...

C: 「天降无根水，烈火复熔金。坎离方既济，木德始化育。玄根沐天霖，顽铁生剑心。锋芒摧星垓，玉界绝尘埃。」
E: "Heaven Rains Aqua Vitae, Flames Forge Veritas Aureliae. Aether Tilts Askew, Arbor Sprouts Anew. Root Bathes in Empyreal Dew, Iron Grows With Ephemeral Hue. Blade Shatters Starscape, Jade Eclipses Agroshade."

C: 大结局了！
E: The grand finale!

C: 尾巴无毛——
E: You make an ill-timed joke...

C: 好勒，您慢点走，回去替我们给店主阿姨说声谢谢嗷。
E: Yeah, take your time, and please convey our thanks to her.

C: 咦，这么看来这个比例是没问题的。我明白了，之后的新品我就在这个比例上慢慢调整口味和配方吧。
E: Looks like this recipe is just right. I see. I'll make further adjustments based on this one, then.

C: 怎么说，砸就完事了？
E: So, all I need to do is to smash them all?

C: 银鬃铁卫在此，前方禁止通行！
E: Silvermane Guards, reporting for duty! No passage up ahead!

C: 咦？那不是……
E: Is that...?

C: 但他好像没有恶意，还挺平易近人的。你怎么看，{NICKNAME}？
E: ...but he seems friendly enough, right, {NICKNAME}?

C: 在修复这里的过程中，我们发现了许多条尘封的自动机兵流水线。几百年前，贝洛伯格人就是在这片场地里测试机兵性能的。
E: While renovating this place, we stumbled upon quite a few automaton production lines, all covered in thick layers of dust. Several hundred years ago, the people of Belobog tested the performance of their combat automatons here.

C: 这游戏也太简单了吧？
E: This game is way too easy.

C: 不过，你说了算～还是说，你想要再考虑考虑？
E: It's up to you... Do you wanna try something different?

C: 嘿，乔瓦尼先生！我们又见面啦。
E: Mr. Giovanni, I didn't expect to see you again so soon.

C: {NICKNAME}，时候不早了，今天就先回客栈休息吧。明天再向下一个目的地进发～
E: {NICKNAME}, it's getting pretty late. Let's call it a day and head back to the hotel for some rest. We'll head for our next destination tomorrow~

C: 理解万岁！那么，恕我先失陪了——祝你们顺利取得下一枚资格徽章，也希望我能在最后的锦标赛中一睹二位的英姿！
E: I'm glad to hear it. With that said, please forgive my departure — I hope to catch a glimpse of your remarkable skills in the championship!

C: 你们磨蹭什么呢——还玩不玩游戏了——我赶着做研究啊——！
E: What's the hold up? I have some serious research I could be doing right now. Are you gonna play or not?

C: 那我想喝红的。
E: Can we have a tea party?

C: 正因如此，它在返回空间站之前擅自逃跑了——逃跑的同时还顺便带走了以太硬币。
E: It's precisely due to this fact that they escaped before they could be returned to the space station. Interestingly, they somehow managed to grab an Aether Coin during the escape.

C: …哎，我不知道该怎么选了。虽然于情于理，咱们都应该把次元扑满 / 扑满 / 泡泡 / 毛球 / 白色恶魔 / 肥大 / 扑满侠 / 扑神还给艾丝妲……
E: I'm really torn... but I suppose returning Warp Trotter / Trotter / Bubbles / Puffball / Ivory Menace / Chunky Chops / Turbo Trotter / Trotterlord back to Asta is the right thing to do...

C: …不准商量！
E: ...No talking!

C: 嘿嘿…好像确实该多谢两位通情达理。
E: Hehe... Thanks to both of you for understanding.

C: 所以，你们需要<color=#dbc291ff>操作「自动机兵•蜘蛛」</color>，<color=#dbc291ff>在那些捣乱的员工身边引发爆炸</color>，驱散他们——
E: You must <color=#dbc291ff>operate Automaton Spiders</color> to <color=#dbc291ff>trigger an explosion in their vicinity</color> and disperse these disruptive people.

C: 是时候使用排除法了。
E: Time to employ the process of elimination.

C: {NICKNAME}，要不要跟我来场对决试试？
E: You fancy a battle with me, {NICKNAME}?

C: 下次再说吧。
E: Another time.

C: 但我在上次失败后可是进行了一番特训哦！来吧，这次我可不会再失败了！
E: But I've been doing special training since my last defeat! Bring it on, I won't fail again!

C: 来，这次的福利也是<color=#dbc291ff>「以太拓展芯片」</color>，好好使用吧。
E: Here, your reward is another <color=#dbc291ff>Aether Expansion Chip</color>, use it wisely!

C: 哈哈，真是…沸腾起来了！
E: Haha, things are heating up!

E: Oh, so you're here to take part? Well if we bump into each other out there you'd better be ready. This time we're gonna show you what we're really made of!

C: 我看很有可能。
E: It's quite possible.

C: 让你看看我们的「决心」吧！
E: Buckle up, you're about to see what we're really made of!

C: 这是要聊什么？
E: What do you want to discuss?

C: 我们从今天起，就是「开拓者后援团」了！
E: From now on, we're known as the "Trailblazer Support Squad!"

C: 我…我明白了，藿藿一定会不辱使命的。
E: ...Th—That's right. I won't let us down.

C: 所以还是得亲自上前线确认咯？
E: So we still have to go out and fact-check the leads?

C: 等办完差再来收拾你喔！
E: We have to run some errands first — be patient!

C: 数十年前，十王司收到请求，有个狐人小姑娘的尾巴被一团无源怪火给吞噬了，于是我等奉命出巡，镇伏妖物。
E: Decades ago, the Ten-Lords Commission was asked to investigate an unusual case — a foxian girl's tail had been consumed by a strange fire of unknown origin... so we set out, ready to subdue whatever foul demon awaited us.

C: 眼下占卜的工作正进行到重要关头，容不得他人扰乱。就算是十王司的判官，星穹列车的客人，也不得在这儿放肆！
E: The current divination has reached a delicate stage, and no one is permitted to disturb it — not even a judge of the Ten-Lords Commission or a guest from the Astral Express!

C: 那就随我移步吧。
E: Then follow me.

E: I've been browsing through some of the stories on Ghostly Grove myself — they make for good reading.

C: 太卜大人，谜题不止你一人可以设计，而命运的道路上也绝不只有我一个人独行。
E: Master Diviner, you're not the only one who can design a puzzle, and I don't tread the path of destiny alone.

C: 你刚才说了吧，太卜必须日复一日、日复一日地捋清纷繁复杂的命运之线，才能保全这座巨舰。
E: You were right when you said that as Master Diviner, you must comb through the complex threads of destiny day after day, all for the preservation of this giant ship.

C: 在挑选今天的行动吗？
E: Have we planned out our next steps yet?

C: 唉，我宁可自己猜错了。
E: I knew it...

C: 这份信心并非相信他终将胜利…而是相信他终有一日会从胜负中挣脱出来，意识到自己挥剑的真正理由——为快乐也好，为救人也好，为杀敌也好……
E: This confidence is not a belief that he will win every contest... It is a belief that he will one day break free from the paradigm of victory and defeat and realize his true reason for wielding the sword... The pleasure of swordsmanship, the saving of life, and the dispatchment of enemies...

C: 大、大人？你还是叫我藿藿吧。
E: C—Captain? You can just call me Huohuo.

C: 啧啧，迟钝的十王司判官终于回来了？
E: Tsk, tsk, if it isn't the judges of the Ten-Lords Commission — sluggish as ever.

C: 隐去受害人姓名，只留下咱们几个镇伏鬼怪的英姿，拍些激烈战斗的留影，再配个带点刺激性的标题……
E: We won't reveal the names of any victims. We'll just post some pics and videos of the squad engaging in fierce battles with the supernatural! And then come up with some dramatic titles...

C: 没完了是吧，怎么又拐到我这来了！不过，我承认你说的很有道理。

C: 也许应该将剩下的人一起带回藿藿身边。
E: Maybe you should take the rest of the people back to Huohuo.

C: 尾巴附身于两人，试图将他们一起带回藿藿身边。
E: Tail possesses the two and tries to bring them back to Huohuo together.

C: 很神秘。
E: It's very mysterious.

E: (I should head back and seal the heliobus in the suppression tower...)

C: 给我个地址，我会去实地调查。
E: Give me an address. I'll go and check it out.

E: No, you may not. Even a blind person could tell what our relationship is.

C: 我想向你道歉。
E: I want to apologize to you.

C: 这是…「万寿无情丹」？
E: Is this... Longevity Pill of Cruelty?

C: 不了不了，我们还有很多事要做呢………
E: No no, we still have lots to get done...
Huh!?

C: 你是否感到热血沸腾、胸膛左侧正在隐隐作痛，它正在雷鸣般地喊出你的渴望——
E: Don't you feel your blood boiling? A faint pain in the left-hand side of your chest? Your desire is screaming out like thunder—

C: 不会吧，她还没说完她的创业计划……
E: No way, she still hasn't told us her business plan...

C: 今天怕是不成了。下次见，青雀小姐。
E: I'm afraid I can't do today. I'll see you another time, Miss Qingque.

E: You have a point, Mr. Tail. Ahem, Miss Fu Xuan of the Dynasty... Corp... Would you be able to take us to meet with President Qingque?

C: 这…这里是司辰宫吧？
E: This... is the Palace of Astrum, isn't it?

C: 这么多年过去了，{NICKNAME}，你一点都没变，真好啊！
E: Even after all these years, you haven't changed a bit, {NICKNAME}. What a pleasure!

C: 但统统都让大爷给打发了！
E: But I defeated them all!

C: 住什么住？！得亏我搬出及时，不然我早就魔阴身了。
E: What do you mean? Continue living there!? If I hadn't moved out when I did, I'd have fallen into mara-struck long ago!

C: 1、3、2、8，你已经猜到了，密码应该是在「T」九宫格上的笔顺。
E: You've guessed "1," "3," "2" and "8" so far. The password must be the stroke order for the letter "T" on a nine-square grid.

C: 可是…普通的魔阴身会用玉兆吗？
E: But... can the mara-struck actually use jade abaci?

C: 那里是不是有一个人？
E: Is someone there?

C: 我？怎么会？你们上次不是都给我测过了嘛…
E: Me? How can it be? Didn't you test me the last time?

C: 好耶！就像查案一样。
E: Great! Sounds like we're investigating a case.

C: …还是说，你也有后悔的时候？
E: ...or do you?

C: 我既然选择了，就决定不后悔。
E: When I made the decision, I've also decided never to regret it.

C: 上次听到这种话还是云骑训练的时候……
E: The last time I heard this kind of talk was back during the Cloud Knights' basic training...

C: 因为…条件、时机都刚好，我既能在镜头前表演，又能和大家实时互动，挺热闹的，我也很喜欢，你们不觉得靠这个谋生挺酷吗？
E: Because... the timing and circumstances were just right. I can perform in front of a camera, and I get to interact with everyone in real-time, so it's exciting. And I like it! Don't you think it's kind of awesome to make a living like this?

C: 我还没成年呢，问这些不好吧！
E: I'm still a minor. You shouldn't be asking!

C: 是怎么个纪念法？
E: What kind of commemoration were you thinking?

C: 有个帖子我很在意，你们帮我鉴定一下！
E: There's a post that's on my mind. Can you help me parse it out?

C: 你刚才是在盯着我们看吗？
E: Were you just staring at us?

C: 我怀疑这俩应该是同一个人。现在已经证实两条帖文都是假消息，也就是说——这人是故意在捣乱爆假料。
E: I suspect they're from the same person. We've confirmed now that both posts are totally fake news. That means: This person is deliberately spreading disinformation.

C: 尊敬的特邀测试员，欢迎您参加「未知生命体嗅觉诱导的感知与幻觉专项测试」。请注意，测试数据由界种科独家提供，切勿外传。
E: Dear Special Test Candidate: Welcome to our Unknown Lifeform Smell-Induced Perceptions and Hallucinations Special Test. Please note, this test data has been provided exclusively by the Department of Ecology and may not be shared externally.

C: （赶紧跟保姆机器人说下，让它清理下这里吧。）
E: (Hurry over to the Helper Robot and get it to clean up in here.)

C: 你太谦虚了，你做得比所有人预想的都更出色。
E: You are so humble, and you always manage to exceed everyone's expectations.

C: 嗯哼，长得挺高的，还行吧。
E: Hmm, pretty tall. Nice.

C: 询问现况
E: Ask about its situation

C: 放心吧，这事很简单。
E: Don't worry, this is really easy.

C: 这个故事到此就结束了。
E: Our story ends here.

C: 底层是黑色？
E: Is the bottom layer black?

C: （好像不太对，再想想吧。）
E: (No, that doesn't seem right. Think again.)

C: 又开始废话了。
E: Let's just get straight to the point.
...Waaaah!!

C: 「左边的门代表*是*，右边的门代表*否*。」
E: "The door on the left means 'yes,' and the one on the right means 'no.'"

C: 下次记得，被欺负了及时去找你们的管理员啊。我先走啦，小家伙们。
E: And remember, if you get bullied next time, just come to me. Cheers, buddy.

C: 那为什么，你还留在梦境酒店里？
E: Then why are you still staying at the Dreamscape yourself?

C: 哇嘎嘎嘎嘎！是新来的朋友。听好了，在这家酒吧里，你们都得按我说的去做。
E: Mwahahahaha! Some new friends! Alright, listen up, in this lounge, you all do what I say.

C: 唉，果然，最后还是要欺负我。
E: *sigh* I knew someone would bully me in the end.

C: …幸福么？
E: ...A true blessing, right?

C: 站住，这位小姐，你是如此地美丽，可否许我……
E: Greetings, my lady! You're absolutely stunning. Would you mind if I...

C: 舒翁，最后的步骤就交给你来完成。
E: Siobhan, I'll leave the final steps to you.

C: 啥？没听见。
E: Huh? What'd you say?

C: 跟你说也不顶用。<color=#dbc291ff>再给我来个小杯的，甜的，颜色层次清晰的饮料</color>。我的眼光好得很，看不得那些缺乏美感的玩意。
E: It's pointless to tell you. <color=#dbc291ff>Just give me a small glass, I want it sweet with clearly colored layers</color>. I've got a great eye that's allergic to things that lack aesthetics.

C: （掏出骑枪。）
E: (Take out the lance.)

C: 你在这里当调饮师，想要的是什么？没有客人，没有收入，就像那些卖不掉的剧场票。
E: What's the point of being a drinksmith here? There are no customers, no revenue, much like those unwanted concert tickets.

C: 罢了。为那种无聊的事生气，不值得！做好你的本职工作，给我来杯饮料。
E: Well, forget it. It's not worth getting worked up about such nonsense! Just do your job and get me a drink.
Phew...

C: 哼。还算有点水平。
E: Hmph. Seems like you are quite something.

C: 嘿嘿。作为奖励，能为我再调杯饮料吗？这次想要<color=#dbc291ff>大杯，味道强烈的，口感浓厚的那种！还是多分几层颜色！</color>
E: Hee-hee. As a reward, can you make me another drink? This time I want <color=#dbc291ff>a large glass, with a strong taste and thick texture, and with a few more layers of color!</color>

C: …冰块？
E: ...Ice cubes?

C: 味道不错，我观察了很久，你越来越有调饮师的样子了。
E: It tastes great. I've been observing you for quite a while, and you're becoming more and more like a skilled drinksmith.

C: 来份<color=#dbc291ff>大杯，破碎感的饮料吧，有点甜味的同时，要有浓厚的口感。</color>我现在很想尝尝。

C: 可是……
E: But...

C: 曾有位朋友告诉我，「个体间存在的差异，远比有机和无机生命间的差异更大。」
