C: 唯王权可终结王权，\n唯纷争可终结纷争，
E: For only the authority of a king can end another king,\nAnd only strife can end strife.

C: 他命令自己的军队袖手旁观——\n那是<color=#9e5738>王储</color>与<color=#9e5738>英雄</color>，最初的会晤。
E: He ordered his troops to stand aside —\nThat was the first meeting between <color=#9e5738>hero</color> and <color=#9e5738>prince</color>.

C: 「战不旋踵，他侵夺着我们的荣誉。」\n这句军中的碎语，\n时常落在男人不摧的心端。
E: "Never turning back in war, he seizes all our glory."\nThat rumor in the war camp of fury,\nOften casts a shadow on the man's heart, indestructible and fiery.

C: 「我们虽无剑锋之利，」\n「却能带你们走遍这片土地。」
E: "Though we lack the might of swords and shields,"\n"We can take you to walk every part of this world."

C: 孩童已经走出迷津，\n也不再恐惧命运的雾，\n「诸位且听，门扉传出的声音——」
E: The child has already conquered her confusion and fear,\nNo longer before the mists of fate will she cower.\n"Harken to the sounds that the doors whisper —"

C: 妹妹望向高悬的月之茧，\n筹措起奔赴人间的远行。
E: The younger sister gazes at the Moon Cocoon high above,\nAnd plans a trip to the mortal realm, a distant flurry.

C: 所以，你开始发芽。\n随后，逐渐绽放。
E: And so, you begin to take root.\nSlowly, quietly, you bloom.

C: 君王亲自执笔： 「我爱世人，正如世人爱我！」 剑旗则在酣饮的间隙喃喃， 「我只爱…永远。」
E: With her own hand, the ruler writes: "I love the world, just as it loves me!" Between hearty swigs, the knight murmurs under her breath, "I only love... eternity."

C: 好事的诗人详尽探询，\n却发现相遇时的种种细节，\n就连亲历者也复述不清。
E: Curious poets ask up and down the land,\nOnly to find that the details of these encounters\nAre difficult to recount even for the witnesses themselves.

C: 但总有人不解风情地提出质疑：
E: But someone always questions, unable to read the air:

C: 「我觉得是剑，能一下劈开一座山。」 ——{NICKNAME} 「少看点幻戏。」 ——丹恒 「为了不用弓，本姑娘一直刻苦用功。」 ——三月七 「和我一起成为武器大师吧。」 ——{NICKNAME}
E: "I'd say the sword. It can cleave a mountain in half!" — {NICKNAME} "You've been watching too many immersia." — Dan Heng "I've been working my butt off just to avoid using a bow." — March 7th "Come on. Let's become weapon masters together." — {NICKNAME}

C: 铡刀落下，夺去元老的性命。\n絮语弥散，胜利的天秤斜倾。
E: The guillotine fell, severing the elder's life.\nThe whispers dissipated, and the scales of victory tipped.

C:
洞穴狭缝的光芒撒下，
那是穿透海面的日华。
她难以遏制趋光的渴望，
向裂缝摆尾游荡。
E:
A sliver of light fell from a crack on the cave's ceiling,
A blazing ray pierces the surface of the sea.
An aching urge to chase the light wells within her,
And with a flick of her tail, she drifts toward the breach.

C: 可名为风堇的少女想起父亲的篝火，\n想起行走诸邦时，\n每一个晴日雨日。
E: But the girl known as Hyacine recalled her father's fragile light in the dark,\nThe journeys into lands unknown,\nMarked by endless sunlit days and restless winds.

C: 「不。天空须应冷酷。」\n「烧灼奸邪、熔铸软弱，」\n「以神性审判人性诸恶。」
E: "No. The sky must be merciless\nIt must scorch the wicked, temper the fragile,\nAnd pass divine judgment upon all human wickedness."

C: 「那么，请来我的庭院坐坐！」 一缕微光温柔地渗入， 天象画壁再度熔铸一体， 向大地投下久违的庇佑。
E: "Then please, come sit in my courtyard!" A gentle ray of light seeped through, The celestial mural now fused anew, Once more, the land knows favor and boons.

C: 可他的真名实姓……\n或许不会再有人提起。
E: Yet his real name...\nmay never be heard in this world again.

C: 也有人在启程之初，\n<color=#9e5738>便失却了昨日的自己。</color>
E: Some, too, losing themselves,\n<color=#9e5738>at the very beginning of their journey</color>

C: 它能写下不绝的诗篇，\n然而代价，\n却是自身的磨灭。
E: It may bring wisdom to light and illuminate efforts,\nBut the word's more common meaning,\nIs nothing less than the end.

C:
一腔孤勇，
他试着向命运反抗，
可普照众生的烈阳，
一旦坠落，
便将焚毁大地，变作金色的死亡。
E:
Fueled with lone courage,
He attempted to resist fate,
But the burning sun that shines upon all creatures,
Once fallen,
Will incinerate the land, becoming golden death.

C: 「不必考量本心，不必渴求胜利。\n若我生来就是罪恶的容器…」
E: "There is no need to question your heart, no need to crave victory.\nIf I am born to be a vessel of sin..."

C: 可若他睁开双眼，\n怒火便将投下阴影——
E: But were he to open his eyes,\nThe fury would cast a shadow—

C: 恼羞成怒的输家大吼一声，抄起板凳扑了过去，一片混乱中，被误伤的看客哄笑着加入混战。那乐师在人群中肆意穿梭，宛如一尾捕食的游鱼——当然，无人伤亡，这里不值得她认真出力。
E: The sore loser roared in rage, snatched up a stool and lunged forward. In the ensuing chaos, bystanders who got caught in the crossfire joined the brawl with gleeful laughter. The musician weaved through the crowd like a predatory fish — of course, no one was seriously hurt, as she didn't see any reason to use her real strength here.

E: Records of cycles <unbreak>176,200</unbreak> to <unbreak>28,371,273</unbreak>, conducted with hominids of the genus Homo designated as the initial variable and based on insights from Phase Two.

C: 球棒什么时候才能成为新的时尚单品，能帮忙预测一下吗？顺便求推点换季的潮流搭配……
E: When will a baseball bat become the latest item of fashionability? Can you predict that? Also, I'd like some tips on some seasonal trends...

C: 蒙塔娜，你一直都走在追求潮流的路上。但是我觉得，同学们都愿意和你接触，并不是因为你很潮，而是因为大家喜欢热情满满的你，喜欢你为所有人带来的活力与乐趣。试着去坚持自我，说不定会有新的收获哦？
E: You've always had an eye for trends, Montana. But the way I see it, your classmates want to hang around you not for your fashion, but because people love your passion and enthusiasm, and they love how much energy and joy you bring. Keep trying to be yourself, and maybe you'll just get something unexpected and new, eh?

C: 你的演奏技术给我留下了深刻的印象，更令人钦佩的是你作为财富学院的学生，敢于与学院代表抗争的勇气。即便以后不从事音乐相关的工作，我也相信你能不惧前路，大步前行。
E: Your performance left me with deep impressions, but what is more astonishing is how you're willing to stand against the academy as a student of Fortune Academy. Even if you don't do anything related to music down the line, I trust that you'll be able to take bold strides ahead and see the road through.

E: Penacony's Wardance

E: Rise of the Eyas

C:
你！竟！敢！喝！掉！我！的！冰！淇！淋！！！！

乱用你的冰箱是我不对，但你也不至于一口气都喝光吧！好歹给我留点嘛（,,Ծ‸Ծ,,）

但怎么样？味道一定很不错吧？真不愧是我～

我后来又做了一个，送给你尝尝看，味道肯定比冰棍水更好<(￣︶￣)>
E:
How! Dare! You! Drink! My! Ice! Cream!!!

It's my fault for using your refrigerator without telling you, but you shouldn't devour it in one gulp! At least leave some for me (,,Ծ‸Ծ,,)

But what about it? It must taste good, right? That's me alright~

I made another one for you. It definitely tastes better than popsicle water <(￣︶￣)>

C: 说起难忘的冒险，那就不得不提起旅途的第一站了。雪厚得没过胸口，我们冻得脚趾僵硬。被蒙蔽的统治者誓要夺走我们的性命，听从她号令的巨像遮天蔽日，向我们和大地施以雪崩般的万千吨伟力……\n今天就先说到这里。
E: Now, speaking of unforgettable adventures... I have to mention the very first stop on my journey. Snow deep to the chest, our toes were frozen stiff. A ruler, blinded by ambition, was bent on taking our lives. The Colossus at her command blotted out the sky — bearing down with the crushing force of a thousand avalanches...\nLet's leave the rest of that tale for another day.

C: 金血如露，海晏河清。
E: The golden blood is like dew, and the sea runs as clear as a river.

C: \n\n辛克尔提到的信任危机问题让我有点在意。我与艾丝妲聊起了这个话题，却意外得知空间站最近有科员连续失踪事件发生。但我总觉得这中间漏掉了什么，自己应该向<color=#dbc291ff>密卷科的埃美丽</color>也咨询过失踪奇物的线索。
E: \n\nThe confidence crisis Hinkel mentioned concerned me a little. Asta and I chatted about this topic, and I unexpectedly learned that there had been a series of researchers' disappearances on the space station recently. But I keep feeling like something has slipped between the cracks. <color=#dbc291ff>I should ask if Emily from the Department of Insight</color> has also sought any clues regarding missing Curios.

C: 请勿服用助眠药物。入梦池中的梦液自带快速助眠效果，无需药物辅助。若您在全身浸泡状态下仍长时间无法入梦，请联系酒店工作人员。
E: Please do not ingest any hypnotics beforehand. The dreaming fluid in the Dreampool is already a fast-acting sedative and does not need external pharmaceutical assistance. If you cannot enter the dream despite having soaked in the liquid for a long time, please contact the hotel staff.

C: 「这个遗迹居然有这么多层，真气派啊——决定了！荣誉队员，快把坏家伙全都从这里赶出去，虎克要把这里变成鼹鼠党的新基地！」
E: "There are so many floors to these ruins. How magnificent. I've made up my mind! Honorary member, quick, drive all the bad guys out of here. I want to turn this place into the new headquarters for the Moles!"

E: — Enemies around here have all noticed you and are showing up in droves... Maybe an Ancient Bomb can help you out.

C: <color=#f29e38ff>「闭境自守」</color>具有「镇守」能力的敌人，会根据周围的区域强化自身，击败它后可获取门卡。
E: <color=#f29e38ff>Lair Protector</color>: Enemies with the Garrison ability will strengthen themselves according to the surroundings. Defeat them to obtain the Door Card.

E: <color=#f29e38ff>Safe House</color>: In this level, there will be no enemy encounters.

E: Elite: Support Ability

C: 进阶装备的同名强化版本，除了具有更强力的数值属性外，独特的战斗效果也会被强化。
E: The enhanced version of advanced equipment with the same name. In addition to having more powerful stats, its unique combat effects will also be strengthened.

C: 如何找到想要的角色：根据角色的费用，在刷新概率最高的等级刷新商店。\n例如：以2费角色为主输出角色的阵容，应停留在6级刷新商店寻找该角色，此时有<unbreak>40%</unbreak>概率刷新到2费角色。\n例如：以4费角色为主输出角色的阵容，应尽快升到8级后，再刷新寻找该角色。
E: How to find a desired character: Based on the target character's cost, refresh the Store at the level where the chance for the character to appear is highest.\nFor example: If your lineup has a 2-cost character as the main DPS stay at level 6 and refresh the store, where there is a <unbreak>40%</unbreak> chance of encountering 2-cost characters.\nAnother example: For a lineup with a 4-cost character as the main DPS, reach Level 8 as soon as possible before refreshing the store to find that character.

C: 收集到指定数量的贴纸后，可以在收藏夹中领取对应的收集进度奖励
E: Once you have collected the required number of stickers, you may claim progress rewards on the "Collection" page.

C: 特殊的区块具有传送功能，经过其中一块时会被传送至另一相同区块处，请多加注意。
E: You can use certain blocks to teleport. When you tread on one such block, you will be teleported to another one of the same color. Be careful how you use them.

C: 同一时间只有一种颜色生效。当<color=#f29e38ff>配控装置</color>的开关亮起，与其对应颜色的<color=#f29e38ff>斥力桥</color>就会出现。
E: Only one color can be turned on at any given time. When the switch on the <color=#f29e38ff>control device</color> lights up, the <color=#f29e38ff>repulsion bridge</color> of the same color will appear.

C: 通过<color=#f29e38ff>特定顺序</color>点亮燃灯，可解除鳞渊境中对应封印。
E: By lighting them up in a <color=#f29e38ff>specific sequence</color>, the corresponding seals in Scalegorge Waterscape can be removed.

C: 折纸小鸟们叼来树叶和宝石建造城市，但调皮的它们常<color=#f29e38ff>化作羽毛</color>躲在自己搭建的各种角落中。
E: The Origami Birds bring branches and precious stones to build the city. However, these mischievous entities often <color=#f29e38ff>turn into feathers</color> and hide in the various corners among the places they've made.

C: 翁法罗斯各地都有身怀赐福的若虫，靠近后交互即可收起若虫，将它的赐福带给阿格莱雅。
E: Nymphs with blessings are everywhere in Amphoreus. Approach and interact to collect the nymphs, and bring their blessings to Aglaea.

C: 部分角色的技能可以让目标的行动<color=#f29e38ff>提前</color>或者<color=#f29e38ff>延后</color>。对敌方目标造成<color=#f29e38ff>弱点击破</color>时，也会使目标行动<color=#f29e38ff>延后</color>。
E: Some characters' abilities can cause actions to be <color=#f29e38ff>advanced forward</color> or <color=#f29e38ff>delayed</color>. Inflicting <color=#f29e38ff>Weakness Break</color> on enemies will also cause their action to be <color=#f29e38ff>delayed</color>.

C: 展品可以带来额外的增益和特殊效果加成！
E: Exhibits can bring extra benefits and special boosts!

C: 依次挑战四个决胜乐园的试炼，战胜冠军候补后可获得徽章，集齐4枚资格徽章即可参加大赛
E: Successively challenge four Victory Zone trials and defeat the championship contenders to win Mastery Marks. Collect 4 Mastery Marks to qualify for the tournament

C: 在「惊梦电视台」活动中，共有<color=#f29e38ff>5处</color>信号被劫持的电视屏幕，找到对应屏幕，<color=#f29e38ff>进入战斗</color>并击败幕后黑手。
E: In the Dreamjolt TV event, a total of <color=#f29e38ff>5</color> TV screens have been hacked. Locate the screens and <color=#f29e38ff>fight the culprits</color> to foil the mastermind's plan.

C: 我方角色在施放<color=#f29e38ff>终结技</color>或<color=#f29e38ff>追加攻击</color>后，将根据命中的目标数量获得相应的<color=#f29e38ff>【星光】</color>层数，从而提升<color=#f29e38ff>全体增伤</color>效果。
E: After an ally character uses an <color=#f29e38ff>Ultimate</color> or <color=#f29e38ff>launches a Follow-Up ATK</color>, they gain corresponding <color=#f29e38ff>"Starlight"</color> stacks based on the number of targets hit, increasing <color=#f29e38ff>the team's DMG boosting</color> effect.

C: 每次通过<color=#f29e38ff>习剑奇遇</color>完成故事后，三月七都会获得<color=#f29e38ff>历练体悟</color>，在开启新一轮练剑时，获得属性提升。
E: Each time the story is completed through a <color=#f29e38ff>Swordart Escapade</color>, March 7th will gain <color=#f29e38ff>Trialed Insight</color>, which will enhance her stats when she starts a new round of training.

C: 值日小队的领队拥有独特的<color=#f29e38ff>「领队特质」</color>，可以在值日中提供帮助。
E: Every Duty Squad's leader will have a unique <color=#f29e38ff>Leader Trait</color>. This can be useful during duties.

E: Anomaly Arbitration is a series of <color=#f29e38ff>extremely challenging</color> stages that regularly updates its content and rewards.

E: <color=#f29e38ff>Curios</color> with various effects can be encountered in the Simulated Universe. Collect Curios to <color=#f29e38ff>Enhance</color> your team.

C:
大地深处囚着远古的低喃，亘古的眼眸将岁月望穿。
当巨龙的脊背嵌满苦痛的悲鸣，
万千生灵求存的渴望将凝成最后的逆鳞——
对命运的僭叛，是守护者最后的巍冠。
E:
Deep within the earth lies a whisper from ages past, where ancient eyes gaze through the river of time.
As the giant dragon's back becomes riddled with cries of sorrow,
The will of countless souls to survive condenses into one final reverse scale —
Defiance of fate is the final crown of the guardian.

C: 有咱俩在，那就见一个打一个喽~
E: You're coming with? Hmph, I'm keeping score.

C: 不知道为什么，虽然相处的时间不长，我们马上成了无话不谈的好朋友。上一次在她的庭院，我们从泰科铵聊到翁法罗斯，喝了一壶又一壶的花茶，吃了一块又一块蜜饼，最后，连小伊卡也困睡着了…还是觉得意犹未尽！
E: I don't know how, but we became super good friends even though we haven't known each other for a long time. The last time I went to her courtyard, we talked about everything from Taikiyan to Amphoreus, and drank pots and pots of floral tea, and ate one honeycake after another. Little Ica even fell asleep... but we still didn't feel like that chat was long enough!

C: 缇宝老师，「岁月」的祷言，我记得可牢啦！
E: Lady Tribbie! I still remember all the prayers to Time!

C: 不用担心，我会照顾好自己的！
E: Don't worry! I'll look after myself!

C: 瓦尔特先生，对此你有何指教？
E: Mr. Yang, do you have any advice on this matter?

C: 都给我闭嘴。
E: Be silent.

C: 既不解题又不写稿，那就别怪自己的人生无趣咯？
E: If you're not solving problems or writing up contributions, then don't blame me if your life is boring.

C: 到我了？真是够忙的。
E: My turn? So much work.

C: 可靠的同伴！正确的判断。
E: A reliable friend and the correct judgment.

C: 可别大手大脚，省着点花。
E: Don't spend it all now.

C: 从黄金歌剧院内传来若有若无的歌声，清晨人们匆匆的脚步声，还有夜晚宁静的克里珀堡，虽然听起来有些矛盾，但我都很喜欢。
E: The faint singing that emanates from Golden Theater, the sound of hurried footsteps in the early morning, the night-time tranquility of Qlipoth Fort... I know they might seem contradictory, but I like all of them.

C: 我们都是第一次看见贝洛伯格真正的天空…同一片天空。
E: It was the first time both of us had seen Belobog's real sky... the same sky.

C: 虎克？怎么不在家里睡觉…跟紧我，别走远。
E: Hook? Shouldn't you be in... *sigh* Fine, just stay close.

C: 纠缠不清。
E: What a headache.

C: 我的药剂还很充足。
E: I have plenty of medicine at the ready.

C: 虎、虎克也在…克拉拉会加油的，不会拖你后腿的！
E: H—Hook, you're here too? I won't let you down!

C: 嘿嘿，见识见识…虎克大人漆黑的手段！
E: Get ready... Hook's got another pitch-dark trick up her sleeve!

C: 疼死啦！
E: That huuuurt!

C: 不提公司，就是在「战略投资部」里，也有许多我不敢苟同的家伙。尽管是同事，却完全不是一路人，例如那位砂金…衷心祝愿你不用和他打交道。
E: In the IPC — no — even just the Strategic Investment Department — there are plenty of unsavory characters I don't care for. They may be my colleagues, but we're not the same. Take Aventurine, for instance... I sincerely hope you never have to deal with him.

C: 艾丝妲小姐，幸会呀！令堂最近身体可好？回头再一起吃个饭吧！
E: Lady Asta! How's your mother been? We should hang out more!

C: 却能，邀诸位共赏。
E: Savor it in my place... Hmph!

C: 那就别怪我不客气了！
E: No more playing nice!

C: 本以为此生不会再远行了，但…人生还很长，对么？
E: I thought my days of wandering were behind me, but... there's still much to be experienced.

C: 相较寰宇众星，我们的生命不过是蜉蝣一般短暂…我多希望能见到仙舟真正凯旋的那天。
E: Compared to the skies and the stars, our lives are as brief as fleeting insects... How I wish I can witness the day that the Xianzhou truly returns in triumph.

C: 要说「法眼无遗」，我还差得远呢……
E: When it comes to seeing everything, I've still got a long road ahead of me...

C: 当断不断，必受其乱。
E: Hesitation only breeds chaos.

C: 世间万物自有其法……
E: All things in this world have their laws...

C: 卦象涨落不息，还需好好筹划。
E: One's hexagrammatic position is always in flux. Planning is paramount.

C: 尚未取得「剑首」之名，说明我的技艺还需精进。但将军又说，我差的不是剑术，而是时间…同那位「剑首」相比，我到底差在哪儿呢……
E: Not having the title of Sword Champion just means my skill still needs sharpening, but the general said I don't need more skills, just more time... *sigh* How exactly am I worse than that Sword Champion...

C: 调息顺畅啦。
E: I can breathe easy again.

C: 嗯，不治已病，要治未病。
E: I told you they were sick.

C: 十王司的判官尽是些天残地缺之人，这孩子也不例外。她虽然为人比较怯懦，但真本事还是有几分的。万不能小瞧了她，容易吃亏。
E: The judges of the Ten-Lords Commission are all people who suffer from some affliction or another, and this child is no exception. She might be timid, but she is very capable at work. It would be unwise to underestimate her.

C: 藿藿：驱邪…缚魅…
E: Huohuo: Demons... depart...

C: 用这令旗，不仅调兵遣将能胜人一筹，投降也能先人一步……
E: I can use this banner to dispel demons... but it also comes in handy when signaling my surrender...

C: 夙愿未成，尚不能歇息。
E: I cannot rest until my wish is fulfilled.

C: 往前奔跑，路没有尽头。
E: Keep running forward, for this path has no end.

C: 它因月狂而生，是我的血脉，越是驱使，便越是滋长。但我没有停下的理由，为了仙舟的胜利。天弓之神，来比一比吧…我的速度比「流星」更快。
E: It is my blood, born from Moon Rage, coursing through my veins. The more I wield it, the more it grows, yet for the sake of the Xianzhou's triumph, I have no reason to pause. God of the Skybow, let's have a competition — my speed outpaces that of a shooting star.

C: 一块儿来吧!
E: All together!

C: 剑胚尚需千锤百炼，方能锻铸成器。
E: A sword must be hammered and refined a thousand times over before it can be forged into a weapon.

C: 我是土生土长的罗浮持明，曾以「丹朱」之名拜师求艺。但师父陷入政争，被流放他乡，我也随她远走。如今改换姓名「衣锦还乡」，真是感慨万千。
E: I am a Vidyadhara, born and raised on the Luofu, and I once studied the healing arts under the name of "Dan Zhu." But my master became bogged down in politics and was banished to a place far from home. I followed her there. Now that I've changed my name and come home, many complicated feelings have returned.

C: 以不变应万变。
E: Fight changes with changelessness.

C: 如此一来，小女子也能跟上各位了。
E: Now, I'll be able to keep up with all of you.

C: 长梦已醒。
E: The long dream has vanished.

C: 做得好，加十分。
E: Well done... ten points.

C: 心诚则灵。
E: A sincere heart prevails.

C: 过去是无法逃离的，你我都是如此。
E: You can't escape the past, and neither can I.

C: 万事俱备，到了登台演出的时刻了。
E: Everything is ready. It's time to step on stage.

C: 该进入新乐章了。
E: Time to play the next piece.

C: 是{NICKNAME}吗？终于有机会一起并肩作战了！
E: Is that {NICKNAME}? Yes! Finally, we get to fight side by side!

C: 是哪位客人的遗失物吗…？
E: Did a guest leave this behind...?

C: 那边好像有个难缠的客人…
E: Looks like a troublesome guest...

C: 他以虚浮的外表伪装自我，献上了一场盛大的演出。一位可敬的对手，若是还有机会，我很期待下个舞台的交锋。
E: He disguised himself with a superficial facade and gave us a grand performance. A respectable opponent. If there's still a chance for another clash on stage, I look forward to it.

C: 不是每个人都能走出过去。但迷茫过后，人行走的姿态定会变得更坚定些。
E: Not everyone can move beyond their past. But once a person comes out of the fog, their stride will undoubtedly become more resolute.

C: 好孩子，听话。
E: There's a good child. Do as you're told.

C: 我不认同这位渎神者的理念，但就追求理想的执着而言，我们殊途同归。
E: I do not agree with the ideals of that blasphemer, but we are the same when it comes to the determination with which we seek our dreams.

C: 自黄金战争以来，世界几近覆灭，如今人类仅余奥赫玛这一座城邦，我的职责便是守护这一方净土…不惜任何代价。
E: The world is almost destroyed after the Chrysos War, and now Okhema alone remains as the sole city of humanity. My duty is to protect this remaining haven... At any cost.

C: 小风堇一直在试着帮我们抵抗磨损，不光是药物起了作用，每次一看到她那煦光般温柔的笑容，我们就又充满能量啦！
E: Cinny has always helped us against our deterioration, and it's not just her medicines that work wonders. We get super re-energized every time we see her smiles that are as warm as sunshine!

C: 他是我最优秀的学生之一，但这往往意味着，他会和我…他的老师，走上不同的路。
E: He is among my most exceptional students, yet this often implies that he and I... his teacher... will walk separate paths.

C: 我并非绿海豚…若你不能理解，把我当做大地兽也行。
E: I'm NOT a green dolphin... If you can't get it, just think of me as a dromas.

C: 不冒些风险，何以制胜？
E: Without risk... how does one expect to win?

C: 我能看到，过往的英雄之火仍在他的心中燃烧。有这样经验丰富的前辈引路，让人放心多了。
E: I can see it. The heroic fire from the past still burns in his heart. Having such an experienced senior to guide the way makes me feel much more at ease.

C: 无畏、乐观、自信…每一次与你开拓，我都受益良多。
E: Fearless, optimistic, confident... I learn so much every time I trailblaze with you.

C: 如有错漏之处，还请指证。
E: If there are any mistakes or omissions, please point them out.

C: 我来送你上路。
E: You've outstayed your welcome!

C: 那些我以为遗忘的，其实从未离我远去。它们是诗行的起始，而一站站开拓，会续写更浪漫的篇章。
E: Things that I thought I had forgotten, in fact, never left me. They are the opening lines of the poem, and with every stop on the Trailblazing journey, they will continue to write even more romantic chapters.

C: 警惕起来。
E: Stay alert.

C: 坚不可摧。
E: Indestructible.

C: 好，多多益善。
E: Great, the more the better.

C: 仙舟「罗浮」
E: The Xianzhou Luofu

C: 切换角色3
E: Switch to Character 3

C: 坚持信念的代价，总是迷失返回的路\n<color=#8790abff>※流萤视角下，与AR<unbreak>-214</unbreak>重逢</color>
E: The cost of holding onto beliefs is often losing the way back\n<color=#8790abff>※ In Firefly's POV, reunite with AR<unbreak>-214</unbreak></color>

C: 长眠之梦的呓语
E: Murmurs of the Long Slumber

C: 赢在起跑线
E: Winning from the Outset

C: 风靡全奥赫玛的「奇美拉世界锦标赛」正在盛大进行。组建你的出战阵容，与熟悉的十三位奇美拉训练家展开精彩对决吧！
E: Okhema is abuzz with the "Chimera World Tournament"! Assemble your lineup and get ready for spectacular matches against thirteen familiar chimera trainers!

C: 舔舐…背叛伸出火舌
E: Lick... Enkindled Betrayal

C: 记忆紊流
E: Memory Turbulence

C: 飞萤扑火，向死而生。
E: Like fyreflies to a flame... life begets death.

C: 果然，还远远没有结束。
E: I knew it. Everything's far from over.

C: 亲卫队徽章
E: Royal Guard Badge

C: 喵喵大队
E: Meow-Meow Squad

C: 白银
E: Silver

C: 穿戴者所有技能造成的伤害+<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>
E: Increases DMG dealt by all the wearer's abilities by <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>.

C: 对战开始时：队伍中最强的咕噜鱼儿对<color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=0 width=1 height=1>生命值</color>最高的对手造成<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>点伤害。每有<unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak>名同伴被召唤后，重新发动该技能
E: At the start of battle: The strongest Gurgling Fish in the team deals <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> DMG to the opponent with the highest <color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=0 width=1 height=1>HP</color>. This ability triggers again for every <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> companion(s) summoned.

C: 对战开始时：队伍中最强的猫咪神偷对所有<color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>攻击力</color>低于自身的对手造成<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>点伤害，并从其中偷取随机1只进入召唤队列
E: At the start of battle: The strongest Master Cat-Thief in the team deals <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> DMG to all opponents with <color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>ATK</color> lower than that of this unit's, and steals 1 random target among them into the summon queue.

C: 使随机2只奇美拉<icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>攻击力+<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>，<icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=1 width=1 height=1>生命值+<unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak>
E: Increases 2 random chimeras' <icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>ATK by <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> and <icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=1 width=1 height=1>HP by <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak>

C: 回合开始时：我方奇美拉在本场对战每交换<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>次位置，队伍中最强的苹果糖向对手发射<unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak>枚攻击随机目标的导弹，每枚导弹造成<unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak>点伤害
E: At the start of turn: For every <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> position swaps ally chimeras make in this battle, the strongest Candied Apple in the team launches <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> missile(s) targeting random opponents, each dealing <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> DMG.

C: 对战开始时：队伍中最强的奇兽爵召唤<unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak>只<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>级的咕噜鱼儿
E: At the start of battle: The strongest Dux Beast in the team summons <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> level-<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> Gurgling Fish.

C: 对战开始时：队伍中最强的猫咪神偷对所有<icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>攻击力低于自身的对手造成<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>点伤害，并从其中偷取随机1只进入召唤队列
E: At the start of battle: The strongest Master Cat-Thief in the team deals <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> DMG to all opponents with <icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>ATK lower than that of this unit's, and steals 1 random target among them into the summon queue.

C: 喜欢小三月嗷呜~
E: I like March, awoo~

C: 变弱射线！
E: Ray of Enfeeblement!

C: 想成为小风堇的助手~
E: I want to be Cinny's assistant~

C: 队伍全靠我在尽力。
E: I'm carrying this whole team.

C: 我会带领各位走向胜利。
E: I will lead you all to victory.

C: 碰见我，对面要倒霉咯。
E: They're in for a world of hurt when they run into me.

C: 你想要变得可爱！
E: You wish you can be cute!

C: 不投降的话，就要揍你啦~
E: Surrender now, or you're in for a beating~

C: 无法对空位置使用物品
E: Cannot use items on empty slots

C: ・星期日来到热砂的时刻与列车组会面，他宣布拒绝你们所提供的星核应对方案，并在内心世界中以回忆经历阐释了他的「秩序」理念。\n・然而，你们已然继承了米哈伊尔的「开拓」意志，决心阻止「秩序」对美梦的统辖。为此，星期日向你们发出决战的邀约。
E: ・ Upon meeting with the Express Crew at the Moment of Scorchsand, Sunday declared his rejection of your proposed solution to the Stellaron crisis, and explained his ideology of Order through his memories in the inner world.\n・ But you, having inherited Mikhail's will of Trailblaze, resolved to resist the Order's dominion over dreams. Thus, Sunday issued his final challenge.

C: 须用「强权」
E: You must use "force."

C: 《蝗灾中的世界：重建秩序》丛书宣传单
E: Flyer for The World in Swarm Disaster: Rebuilding Order Book Series

C: 《忆梦浮廊》
E: Corridor of Memorial Dreams

C: 解锁无名勋礼可获得的奖励头像。
E: Avatar reward obtained from unlocking Nameless Honor.

C: 她还好吗？
E: Is she okay?

C: 没见着啊？
E: I can't see you?

C: 有如大梦
E: Come Un Sogno

C: 聆听海的礼赠
E: Heed The Ocean's Gift

C: 流萤决意挡下攻击，并祈祷自己活下去，而这正中「梦主」下怀。「偏偏那『死地』的降临，正因你在众人当中，最先求取『生路』。」
E: Firefly resolved to block the attack, praying for her own survival, which was exactly what the "Dreammaster" wanted. "But 'death' will come because you, out of all people, are the foremost in seeking 'life.'"

C: 流萤与黄泉对峙，诘问其身份。黄泉只送上一则忠告——「虚无」是注定的终局，在<color=#f29e38ff>「末王」再度登神之时</color>，她与流萤会有最后一次重逢。
E: Firefly confronted Acheron, questioning her identity. Acheron gave only a warning: the Nihility was the inevitable finale. And they would have one final reunion <color=#f29e38ff>when Terminus ascended to godhood once more</color>.

C: 太一之梦，原始梦境，十二时刻，你们必须依次跨越三重梦境，才能直面星期日。为唤醒足够多的自由意志，波提欧觉得有更好的方式。
E: Ena's Dream, the Primordial Dreamscape, the Twelve Hours. To confront Sunday, you had to cross the three dreamscape layers. Boothill believed there was a better way to awaken enough free will for the plan to work.

C: 「翡翠」基石的解放将会汲取入梦者的欲望，给出「存护」的承诺，从命途层面夺取「秩序」的力量。而与星期日的最终决战，则交托给了你。
E: The release of the Jade Cornerstone's powers would absorb the dreamers' desires and offer them the Preservation's promise, seizing the Order's powers on the level of Paths. As for the final battle with Sunday, that task fell to you.

C: 完成狮震八方「噩梦」难度挑战
E: Complete the Earthshaker Leo challenge in Nightmare mode

C: 累计获得#4点荣誉值
E: Obtain #4 Honor in total

C: 给我强大的火漆！
E: Give me the mighty Sealing Wax!

C: 哪来的怪物？看打！
E: What's that monster doing here? Take this!

C: 获得该奇物时，立即获得<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>个1星祝福。在【遭遇】【转化】【首领】区域战斗胜利后，获得<unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak>个随机1-3星祝福【该奇物可以通过事件升级】
E: When obtaining this Curio, immediately gains <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> 1-star Blessing(s). After achieving victory in Encounter, Conversion and Boss Domains, gains <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> random Blessing(s) of 1- to 3-star rarity. This curio can be leveled up through Occurrences.

C: 奇美拉辩工作
E: Chimera On "Work"

C: 每层【会心】额外使造成的追加攻击伤害提高<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>。
E: Each stack of "Critical Boost" additionally increases Follow-Up ATK DMG by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>.

C: 共舞的渴望
E: Yearning for a Shared Dance

C: 橡木鸣蛀之梦，梦主实行一切阴谋的地方——当然，律令所说的话不能尽信。既然阴差阳错来到了这里，想办法获取更多关于梦主的线索吧。
E: The Dream of Gnawing Oak, the place where the Dreammaster executes all his schemes... Of course, the words of the laws can't be taken at face value. Since I've ended up here by a twist of fate, I'll see if I can find more clues about the Dreammaster.

C: 通过原始忆域非常顺利地潜入了匹诺康尼，尽管代价非小。接下来，要想办法进入「十二时刻」了。
E: You slipped into Penacony through the Primordial Memory Zone without a hitch, though it came at a heavy cost. Now you have to find a way into the "Twelve Hours."

C: 歌斐木似乎得到过高明忆者的帮助…可在梦境中无所不能的他，又何必假手他人？但愿即将见证的罪行能带来解答。
E: Gopher Wood appears to have had assistance from a skilled Memokeeper... but why would someone all-powerful in the Dreamscape need another's help? Let's hope the crime I'm about to witness can answer that.

C: 在黑天鹅的帮助下，你从星期日编织的幻觉中醒来，然而，要想终结眼前的长夜，一个人的力量远远不够。
E: With Black Swan's help, you woke up from the illusion woven by Sunday. However, one person's strength alone is far from enough to end the Evernight before you.

C: 梳理现状
E: Assess the situation

C: 或许，我们很快就会再度相逢。
E: Perhaps we'll meet again soon.

C: 任何地方都有可能受人窥视。唯独在这里，我才能放心说一些…只能你知我知的秘密。
E: We could be watched if we met anywhere else. This is the only place... where I can feel safe sharing secrets that should stay between us.

C: 慢慢来，别被记忆淹没，也别担心迷失，记住我的声音，记住此刻的触感，这会将你重新带回我的面前——
E: Take it slow. Don't let the memories overwhelm you, and don't worry about getting lost. Remember my voice. Remember the touch you feel at this moment... it will guide you back to me.

C: 哎呀，从一开始，你的记忆就出现「缺失」了么？这可有些麻烦，该从哪里着手呢……
E: Oh my. Have there been "gaps" in your memories from the very beginning? This is quite troublesome. Where should we begin...

C: 是啊，和预期一样，你没法恢复「做梦」的机能。
E: Yeah. As expected, you can't recover the "ability to dream."

C: 让我试一试就知道了。
E: Let me try it out, then we'll know.

C: 这条走廊尽头，究竟是……
E: What lies at the end of this corridor...

C: 没注意，忆域里有些怪动静很正常，听说，很多回忆会一直重演。
E: I didn't notice anything. Strange disturbances in the Memory Zone are nothing unusual. They say... many memories of the past will replay over and over again.

C: 需要些私人时间，我明白。那就约好了，改天见，大明星。
E: You need some alone time, I get it. It's a date then, catch you later, superstar.

C: 明白。
E: Understood.

C: 可以什么？觉得自己能拿回失去的力量？
E: What do you mean "can"? You think you can get your lost power back?

C: 但从她的神情来看，我相信…那是一段只属于你们两人的，美好而又难忘的时光。
E: But judging from her expression, I believe... it must have been a beautiful and unforgettable time that belonged to just the two of you.

C: 多么好心的愚者啊，「钟表匠」米哈伊尔的过去，也因此被你和流萤掀开了一角。
E: What a kind-hearted Fool she was. Thanks to her, you and Firefly managed to uncover a piece of Watchmaker Mikhail's past.

C: 嗯，在你到来前，我先去搜集了一些情报。就我所知，他曾将自己<color=#dbc291ff>最为阴暗的罪行</color>掩埋于此。
E: Mm-hmm, before you arrived, I did some digging around. From what I've learned, he buried his <color=#dbc291ff>darkest crimes</color> right here.

C: 没错，请吧，一切行动都将带来喜悦……
E: That's right. Go ahead. Every action brings joy...

C: 这是我们早已注定的命运，总有一天，我也要迎来相同的结局。
E: This is our predestined fate, and one day, I too shall meet the same end.

C: 艾利欧曾说，我会在匹诺康尼经受三次死亡。而这「第一次死亡」…我想自己决定它如何到来。
E: Elio once said that I would face death three times in Penacony. And for this "first death"... I want to decide how it comes.

C: 这只是第一次死亡，我还有很多时间，去完成我们一起立下的约定。
E: This is just my first death. I still have plenty of time to fulfill the promise we made together.

C: 「哦…一位忆者，你侍从流光忆庭…还是焚化工？」
E: "Oh... a Memokeeper. Do you serve the Garden of Recollection... or The Cremators?"

C: …现在没有，以后也不会。
E: ...I'm not now, and never will be.

C: 歌斐木先生？您怎么…
E: Mr. Gopher Wood? How did you...

C: 请带路吧，但事先说明：同意见面不代表我的任何态度。
E: Lead the way, but let me be clear: agreeing to meet doesn't imply anything about my stance.

C: 流萤小姐？你可以现身了。
E: Miss Firefly? You can show yourself now.

C: …别再开玩笑了，你早就抛弃这条命途了。
E: ...Stop joking around. You abandoned that Path long ago.

C: 那知更鸟呢？那簇焚烧记忆的火花，你就不觉得太过吗？
E: What about Robin? Those sparks that burned through memories... don't you think that was a bit too much?

C: 很可惜，你今天的好运用完了。比起赢，我一直觉得输更有趣，试试又怎样？
E: Too bad you've used up all your luck for today. I've always found losing more interesting than winning. What's the harm in giving it a try?

C: 我因此沉入了混乱的忆域，此后，<color=#dbc291ff>我的「渴求」，将我带至此地。</color>
E: Thus I sank into the chaotic Memory Zone, and then, <color=#dbc291ff>my "desire" led me here.</color>

C: 偏偏在谐乐大典即将开幕的时刻，一位格拉默铁骑的末裔不请自来，一切再度开始转动。
E: Yet just as the Charmony Festival was about to begin, a descendant of the Glamoth Knights appeared uninvited, and everything began to turn once again.

C: 它们并非「不够真实」，而是事物在不同的角度下，总会呈现出不同的样貌…不妨想想，我们何曾{RUBY_B#记忆的倒影}从镜子里{RUBY_E#}看到原本的自己？
E: It's not that they're "not real enough." Things always look different when viewed from different angles... Ever thought about whether we've truly seen our authentic selves {RUBY_B#reflection in memory}in a mirror{RUBY_E#}?

C: 还记得那位星期日的野心么？他计划利用星核、橡木家系十万余人的意志，和匹诺康尼众生的愿望，篡夺「同谐」权柄，令「秩序」重现世间。
E: Do you remember Sunday's ambitious plan? He intended to harness the power of the Stellaron, the collective will of over <unbreak>100,000</unbreak> Oak Family members, and the desires of everyone in Penacony to usurp the Harmony and restore the Order.

C: 先说一个坏消息吧，我们要面对的敌人，已不再仅仅是星期日了，也不再是他篡夺的「齐响诗班」。
E: Let me break the bad news first. The enemy we're up against isn't just Sunday anymore, nor is it the Harmonious Choir that he's usurped.

C: 是我交还给你的「遗物」。
E: It's the relic I returned to you.

C: 在此之后呢？石心十人的力量，也不可能撼动接近星神的存在。
E: So what? Even the power of the Ten Stonehearts can't rattle an existence already approaching Aeonhood.

C: 哈哈，怎么会！你要是在意赏金，我再给多加个十亿，如何？
E: Haha! No way I'm just after that! If you're worried about the bounty, how about I add another billion to that number?

C: 因此，我们就在这作最后的道别吧。
E: Let's bid our final farewells here.

C: 可有些人永远无法找到。
E: Some will never find their answer.

C: 也许都不是。我倒是听说过一个说法，一直都很喜欢。
E: Maybe it's neither. There's a saying that I always liked.

C: 我也是在太一之梦消散后，才刚刚意识到。之前是我误会了，被「死亡」送入流梦礁，根本不能算是一次死亡，那未免太轻松了。
E: I only realized it after Ena's Dream dissipated. I've made a mistake. Being sent to the Dreamflux Reef by "Death" could hardly be called a death at all. That would've been way too easy.

C: 我会像你想要的那样，记住你。
E: I'll remember you just the way you want me to.

C: 为时已晚——你情愿用她想要的方式将她记住，在你的脑海里，结局会是美好的。
E: It is too late. You would rather remember her in the way she wished, and in your mind, the ending would be a happy one.

C: 「我是翁法罗斯掌管火漆的神。」它双手叉腰，挺起胸膛，「把火漆给我，我来帮你合成一枚超~强大的火漆！」
E: "I am the Amphorean God of Sealing Wax." It puts its hands on its hips and puffs out its chest. "Give me your Sealing Wax, and I'll synthesize a super powerful one for you!"

C: 「嗷呜~」小奇美拉垂头丧气地回到了工位上，开始加班。
E: "Awoo~" The little chimera trudges back to its workstation, ready for another round of overtime.

C: 艺术！是艺术承载着我们漫无目的的渴求、燥热的激情和虚掷的光阴。唯有艺术，才是最好的答案！
E: Art! Art carries our aimless desires, burning passions, and squandered time. Only art can be the ultimate answer!

C: 满目疮痍的垃圾桶王国，将重新归于「秩序」之下。所有桶都将生活在幸福之中，享用最洁净的垃圾。
E: The devastated Trashcan Kingdom shall be restored under the Order. All cans will live in happiness, enjoying the cleanest trash.

C: 书籍、钢笔和纸张依旧停留在书桌上，但再也等不到它们的主人。
E: The books, pens, and papers remain on the desk, but they'll never see their owner again.

C: 对战也是工作的一部分，小灰按「团建」来理解就好！
E: Combat is part of their job too, Little Gray. Just think of it as team building!

C: <color=#dbc291ff>小灰可以使用任何选手的阵容参赛，完全自由哦。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Little Gray can use any player's lineup to compete. In other words, you have complete freedom!</color>

C: 嗷呜！「奇美拉世界锦标赛」即将开始！这次，你会采取什么策略呢？
E: Awoo! The Chimera World Tournament is about to begin! What strategy are you going to use this time?

C: 开幕雷击嗷呜！现在的年轻人说话都这么直接的吗？
E: A heavy hit right off the bat, awoo! Are all young people these days so straightforward?

C: 谢谢你，好心的{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}！
E: Thank you, kind {F#lady}{M#sir}!

C: 拥有【生命计数】的单位<color=#f29e38ff>受到攻击时</color>不会损失生命值，但是会减少【生命计数】。【生命计数】<color=#f29e38ff>归零时</color>单位将陷入无法战斗状态。<color=#f29e38ff>治疗</color>和<color=#f29e38ff>护盾</color>效果无法避免【生命计数】减少。
E: Units with "HP Count" will not lose HP <color=#f29e38ff>when attacked</color>, but their "HP Count" will decrease instead. When the "HP Count" <color=#f29e38ff>reaches zero</color>, the unit will be knocked down. <color=#f29e38ff>Healing</color> and <color=#f29e38ff>Shield</color> effects cannot prevent "HP Count" reduction.

C: 这是我们拥有的<color=#f29e38ff>生命</color>！输掉对局时，会扣除1点生命。清空的时候，比赛就算失败了哦。
E: These are your <color=#f29e38ff>HPs</color>! You'll lose 1 HP when you lose a match. When they're all gone, it's game over!

C: 是我的<color=#f29e38ff>专属奇美拉</color>呢。
E: It's my <color=#f29e38ff>exclusive chimera</color>.

C: 后面就可以自由切换赛事模式啦。
E: After that, you'll be able to freely switch between match modes.

C: 「困难」难度已解锁，现在可以挑战更高难度的关卡了。
E: "Hard" difficulty unlocked! You can now challenge more difficult stages.

C: 启用后将把角色命途切换为队伍中预设的命途
E: After activation, the character's Path will be switched to the preset Path in the team

C: 切换命途后，角色在此队伍中的预设将会失效
E: After switching Paths, the character's preset in this team will be disabled

C: 切换命途
E: Switch Paths

C: 轻受击
E: Hit by Light Attack
